name: Executive Director
subject: There's a better way
body:
Don't tell me we can't do this I am asking for a few minutes of your time today because your involvement here is important. The extremes in Washington want you to believe that their way is the only way. They continue to divide us. _They care more about viral sound __bites_ _ than sound policies._ Fellow American, it's time that we take a serious stand and demand better from our leaders because further division is not going to solve rising crime rates, rising inflation, or turn our economy around. Governor Larry Hogan believes that we can change things for the better in America **together.** [**_There is a better way forward, but only if you are willing to join us in this mission. Check out our latest video and send in any support you can give to this national movement!_**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=59c104a69b1f4c55baae4faceeafb08c&_e=PXNV_rbukL1PO_CejLF5EKQgcKKX3Q4iR_-GQRdHSqnsX4S8cnL2ysRJycj9gweaot0u-uYm0hYGSw99qTog726qYO1LNTpj6U5HshyF8bmpzPHfYiq-tIv19zoZH4_2w3jeR7LvL5YW9m1tHEzwKyQhC-_7Z_gnsHBdhJBgv3625FGfYtm6cL8yUq-c1M_O8lDw6g6pHFZN1FFE0u2p5SB964Bykygov9YoJDz82M4aFNzaPppcFgsfrVKScEH-vbK35LAQCVE-h3U7BbePRs44o3lCLbH6W51uyLwC7Cg8vanWvOSdophPdg0rOscK7UtOhgPHRw0xdhq12nzY2A%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=59c104a69b1f4c55baae4faceeafb08c&_e=PXNV_rbukL1PO_CejLF5EKQgcKKX3Q4iR_-GQRdHSqnsX4S8cnL2ysRJycj9gweaot0u-uYm0hYGSw99qTog726qYO1LNTpj6U5HshyF8bmpzPHfYiq-tIv19zoZH4_2wczHDKctC-WL2MDZ-v-t1gujEPT4g-YPFnNqBrU2liRYbsqJksSpGxkpdH8k6tG78939xMpgann3ANqQdazJP54M-I6PbXcsxlUDYBedo7tBEbDSxkIcAordL9yPDUmxlKTLxJh2E9J-BKS_07tzJQVQ96as00sHl99CV493U7Tm1aRz6-AjEI-iC19f_7UVf59DEM4sokRC_gpywiEN5w%3D%3D) [_**WATCH NOW**_
**&**

**FORWARD**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=59c104a69b1f4c55baae4faceeafb08c&_e=PXNV_rbukL1PO_CejLF5EKQgcKKX3Q4iR_-GQRdHSqnsX4S8cnL2ysRJycj9gweaot0u-uYm0hYGSw99qTog726qYO1LNTpj6U5HshyF8bmpzPHfYiq-tIv19zoZH4_2kh5x6xDOxla-7Rf91nQKU5-F6zPcuGFyzgXrZBiaoFTFGaruRddm0zeP9Ms24Eu-i8bu5pu8KPXQWAo2_Uo3B3d1Vn-pOmM9WjugkALJ_SGz2UmE6zJLvqxJsk7hw3wnkrGbwJGBp5anzy7oxmuJXSTojclZxbc8yreOr2fTQH3Z8nQR2iMOXoLBBhEsN77B898sBJZMo035NeBgVFLREg%3D%3D) In Maryland, Governor Hogan has shown us that there is a better way to lead in the face of adversity. Even if it meant going against his own party because it's people that matter, not politics. **_An America United_ has been a vehicle for real change and you are needed to fuel this growing national movement.** [**Can you contribute any amount from $5 to $50 or something larger to support this mission?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=59c104a69b1f4c55baae4faceeafb08c&_e=PXNV_rbukL1PO_CejLF5EKQgcKKX3Q4iR_-GQRdHSqnsX4S8cnL2ysRJycj9gweaot0u-uYm0hYGSw99qTog726qYO1LNTpj6U5HshyF8bmpzPHfYiq-tIv19zoZH4_281CUDG7bO8deWRDE_VzRZkba_JyX8uma8kcgO5TNE-l3mgH70uGfc0RT0WOLNk-4MN58QbzBypelbbu99wF17UEnFgY1-9qlvJbwMf5nGDEb6fkfICWp9iV97tLZIA-MLW6VwDYqiC89oSnZG9rcPaX2w2I53dR5SO9LZPCU69oPsv5eUzX7BCp6FE_Fbr6N3MwrqndAPDOUBz2aFpy1qA%3D%3D) Together, we will bring America together and champion common sense conservative reforms that Americans deserve. Sincerely, **David Weinman** _Executive Director, An America United_ [**Demand Better Leadership >>> Join AAU Today**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=59c104a69b1f4c55baae4faceeafb08c&_e=PXNV_rbukL1PO_CejLF5EKQgcKKX3Q4iR_-GQRdHSqnsX4S8cnL2ysRJycj9gweaot0u-uYm0hYGSw99qTog726qYO1LNTpj6U5HshyF8bmpzPHfYiq-tIv19zoZH4_2wQQHVVpa_KiIBPTNxMm_0WVr0yry65QHcy_XpKAXK6dbil8kYtC9UlDo23IcxTdH14sxAdkqbuoCzH7kDxLv7eZgE1Q0fhgKiztdlC362W5_2C12kAKOItDJhrb854W052mIvePEhvi0ndwWbm-ezHtX5PVm-F5UvY-8ufdOyYcaoSgyL_g2zVQz-u5lsz9LApVsl9rQmLrgGgqX0VazFQ%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=59c104a69b1f4c55baae4faceeafb08c&_e=PXNV_rbukL1PO_CejLF5EKQgcKKX3Q4iR_-GQRdHSqnsX4S8cnL2ysRJycj9gweaot0u-uYm0hYGSw99qTog726qYO1LNTpj6U5HshyF8bmpzPHfYiq-tIv19zoZH4_2aecAWokfU-Ke49XvuzlywvbwgcAPUWWViHz_pLmc_jXoKImcykQSnQTcwIDZFBET-a7eaV1YsbB2jVo3UjL1Rhiq1o-hWJuFE4u416NKNHnGMUoMfz-0aLMUcGfEQCydQNF7MIbz6nCeHgB-NUYNavNbUM87zw5jjYnVhrJzXqw9V3-YjhGU--zD1XEqylGMsJtM8y4rfM_CRdJAEycX9A%3D%3D) _Join An America United_ _on social media! _ | | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=59c104a69b1f4c55baae4faceeafb08c&_e=PXNV_rbukL1PO_CejLF5EBjE01zJpMYSyV5KJZLiHVHPY0E066dR3kUmDaCQ_9RCaTQHKVWdZPkcwslMWW1ISm-OOBFUG3wrBb5eXwihzh1L-Vq_G0PXXd7cDrN2dTwbDYjuCleVTG9f52ESQY2Xn4LEakY-eBlS1NK5z3sUpPBGtI6dHE6_NE7rBq_PNx2SZs9O9FSEHbg4b7quV6iUu7Mi33ZjbFC9_PJdjnlMHMndTFqHe7fng_ZqzQcM88B7N_YRPVy2d1jOMoqmKH4gdA%3D%3D) | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=59c104a69b1f4c55baae4faceeafb08c&_e=PXNV_rbukL1PO_CejLF5EPScFC_4CgILkpJMZdoldyBe2GpWTcSlZUBc3VLYsTW9hSrmIg1vHtTlfzKK6wWhLHmqmYijEJnN3wDjhEtE4t171rQ0fRuNAi38CL0W3VoUobZj3Ec5w_ICmp7R0fgjmvxyv_KXqaInH3awPwVPlPqcqH9MtvofVR9IKLJ5vvL7hRS0pXyVIKNi8vnEzfiveZaCPAqAozj82qcMupRYjcVaM6-RFxyy92BHe2IQ3-1nwvzbd590Idsrrz3EwmHsSQ%3D%3D)

name: John Legend
subject: Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7398?t=1007&amount=25&akid=2309%2E3611125%2EUcBDf7 ]A personal message from John Legend

Hello,

We’re at a turning point in our country. Even though Democrats have a thin
majority, Republicans are using the filibuster to block important bills in
the Senate.

50/50 is not enough. It’s clear we must expand the Democratic Senate
majority to abolish the filibuster and make the real progress American
people want. I believe Tim Ryan is our opportunity to do just that.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7398?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2309%2E3611125%2EUcBDf7 ]Will you join me in supporting his campaign? Please, make a donation of
whatever you can afford to help us flip Ohio blue. Anything you give would
mean a lot to me personally.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7398?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2309%2E3611125%2EUcBDf7 ]Donate

I was born and raised in Springfield, Ohio. That’s actually how I got my
start in music—performing in my church choir. I will always have a special
place in my heart for the Buckeye State.

Ohio’s U.S. Senate race in November is one of the most important fights of
our lifetime, which is why I couldn’t just sit on the sidelines. And you
can’t either.

Tim’s right-wing opponents and their billionaire backers are already
spending upwards of $40 MILLION to keep Ohio red and ensure Mitch
McConnell retakes total control of the Senate.

If that happens, friend, voting rights, a higher minimum wage,
affordable health care, high-quality education for all our kids, and more
are in jeopardy. I don’t want to think about the damage that Republicans
could do if they regain their grip on our government.

But the good news is if we win Ohio, Democrats can hold and expand our
Senate majority. Even better news? Tim is neck-and-neck with his GOP
opponents in the polls.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7398?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2309%2E3611125%2EUcBDf7 ]We CAN win, but only if you help Tim fight back against the attacks
heading his way. Can I personally count on you to add a donation now to
help Tim’s campaign win this important race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7398?t=1011&amount=25&akid=2309%2E3611125%2EUcBDf7 ]Donate

Tim Ryan is the leader Ohio deserves. He will do whatever it takes to make
sure working families get the support they need. That’s why we’re both
counting on your help to win.

Thank you. I know how much this team means to Tim and it’s incredible to
see so many supporters join this fight alongside us.

—John Legend

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=2309%2E3611125%2EUcBDf7 ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1002&akid=2309%2E3611125%2EUcBDf7 ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1003&akid=2309%2E3611125%2EUcBDf7 ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1004&akid=2309%2E3611125%2EUcBDf7 ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1005&akid=2309%2E3611125%2EUcBDf7 ][IMG]

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.timforoh.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2309%2E3611125%2EUcBDf7

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathan=20Hochman=20for=20Attorney=20General=202022?=
subject: Assemblymembers Choi and Nguyen Join Team Hochman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
These two Orange County leaders are the latest elected officials to endorse Nathan Hochman for Attorney General. | | |
---
| | | _“With crime on the rise and Californians feeling less safe, we need an experienced prosecutor to serve as Attorney General. Nathan Hochman has the right public safety priorities and the experience to get the job done. He has my full support to be our next Attorney General”_
**-Assemblyman Steve Choi, PhD**
---
| Welcome to the team, Assemblyman Steve Choi and Assemblywoman Janet Nguyen!

I am so grateful to have the support of these two strong leaders from our California Assembly Republican Caucus.

Assemblyman Choi has been developing substantive policies to address homelessness and Assemblywoman Nguyen has passed key legislation expanding health care for the homeless and mentally ill. Both of these leaders are taking on tough issues in Sacramento and developing real solutions. I look forward to working with them both to secure a safe and secure future for families in Orange County and across the State.
---
|
---
---
| Assemblyman Choi and Assemblywoman Nguyen join a growing list of Orange County elected officials endorsing our campaign, including Assemblyman Phillip Chen, Congresswoman Young Kim and Congresswoman Michelle Steel.

Each day, our campaign grows as our strong bipartisan message of safety and security resonates with voters across California. We have momentum on our side and I am excited to continue campaigning for the June primary in the months ahead. Please reach out if you have any questions or are interested in joining the cause!

Sincerely,

Nathan Hochman
_Candidate for California Attorney General_
---
| |
---
| [Donate to Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=2427e7bcb4&e=94837ebab3 "Donate to Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022")
---
| | Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
FPPC ID 1437955

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=5e18d418e9&e=94837ebab3&c=571a69c4ee) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://strategyinsightshq.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=5e18d418e9&e=94837ebab3&c=571a69c4ee).

name: Tony Cowden
subject: Join the offense
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
TONY COWDEN FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s time we get our nation back on trackPeter. | No longer want to receive emails from Tony Cowden for Congress? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=f3d8615caa904619bcdd7a6d41ada80f&_t=eE_oxgzKu5i-JAsnev5gjmH5Maoo18IM6PeqQwgqrSX7ABjw-7oczS4-NcETBFAPcMSKxGQWfeOOpeBs5ozRuo2OBMbJti8LTTn8ogUexBDNtMrs5-KV_j7chbIJFtwybbSOuIYy6DH1OTuLN2i1P_jYsQSSdFxo_xYmFjEOdVQ%3D).

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3d8615caa904619bcdd7a6d41ada80f&_e=dLflONB8a1LarH4vaFVRu_nfRDjq6GDyAacH56PU8xpDvMYfF1sGcP08rYpTd3E7cSfkMT3Ms2hy_vyRGVBxsA4ZsI7GyS3KWb72l_WQ4GlfwAjoWzOtg9iLL-mdyXYfzAnFyy3E0YISb1culfjq4iVX3P6HpFN1szpZprYKfTV4rti_ZObPqJTWOL1mbOge2pUNMiOUhknJpKGb80WV8eZP6cAZ2aqWJeLmFzSk5QKeXrXgUV_sLJarFiKf9uzwFAtA16sBPmAOpu4CuAkllz-wfYfPwASzkVn_yLBO9fsWJyyi3Z6nJiWamXzzZldoyMlJJGPtFYqBQoU-BhLBNhMOEGv8yE86ESEolyin0_nNj1Fiyt-58ulM9FKLp0rdLdRW4WwTWcuXGu355JAc3iJbdYjbXGYt9gzAG5RHfaLt0jDDGdup8BBwWJ4-p0qpolS6TPKpmIJkfXQ3hoYU6g%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

**The elitist politicians in Washington D.C. have gone soft and taken our nation off track.** That's why I'm ready to go to war again for the values we cherish, the future of our children, and the soul of America.

[**My name is Tony Cowden and I'm running for Congress.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f3d8615caa904619bcdd7a6d41ada80f&_e=dLflONB8a1LarH4vaFVRu_nfRDjq6GDyAacH56PU8xpDvMYfF1sGcP08rYpTd3E7cSfkMT3Ms2hy_vyRGVBxsA4ZsI7GyS3KWb72l_WQ4GlfwAjoWzOtg9iLL-mdyXYfzAnFyy3E0YISb1culfjq4iVX3P6HpFN1szpZprYKfTV4rti_ZObPqJTWOL1mbOge2pUNMiOUhknJpKGb80WV8eZP6cAZ2aqWJeLmFzSk5QKeXrXgUV_sLJarFiKf9uzwLv5kfEwtV1Bbf9Hrf_AB9GJdMpgxOx0RlrZ0fb4L17Ja4T4SzlcoQjV8UNZRBy64iFUWH0YUby2FIDEpF-kJT9ix0UJ_SK41ZwtWE8z4QdIiQhEHoIZ4ZnaGDUlk1P-AESLQWScT_d2XCEa3T1LoZODuijgPLKT9gDeTJgGCgKIEOLDyhT3JKKkqV1ghfQXyx4-Ohi3QrFBMMXMOpjWa1w%3D%3D) I'm a former Special Forces Soldier and CIA Operative that served for years on the battlefields of Iraq and Afghanistan. **If I learned anything from my time fighting America's enemies, it's that** _**corrupt intentions will thrive when good people do nothing.**_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Joe Kent Condemns WA State Legislature
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Joe Kent for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=00856e661d&u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=ced254324a)
---
|
---
|
---
| | **JOE KENT CONDEMNS WA STATE LEGISLATURE**
---
| **DATE: February 10, 2022
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**Contact: Ozzie Gonzalez
Cell: 951.442.0680
[ozzie@joekentforcongress.com](mailto:ozzie@joekentforcongress.com)**
---
| Battle Ground, WA – Today, candidate for Washington’s 3rd Congressional District, Joe Kent, speaks out against the violation of our 2nd Amendment rights by the WA state legislature. Candidate Joe Kent made the following statement:
---
| Last night the Washington State Senate voted to pass a bill that will ban the importation, manufacture, and sale of magazines with a capacity greater than 10 cartridges.

In the summer of 2020, we watched violent mobs burn down small businesses, murder innocent people, and march into our neighborhoods. Instead of targeting law abiding Americans, leaders should be targeting the left-wing terrorist organizations and their benefactors.

Our absentee congresswoman, Jaime Herrera-Beutler, refused to condemn this legislation or do anything about it. This follows her pattern of opposing our fundamental 2nd Amendment rights by both advocating and voting for Red Flag laws to seize firearms from citizens without due process.

As your member of Congress, I will use the bully pulpit of my office to rally opposition to these laws across our state, I will introduce federal legislation denying funding to states that pass laws like this, and I will lead lawsuits to overturn these unconstitutional laws in court.

Our 2nd Amendment is the only thing stopping tyrants from turning us into Australia, and I will be a warrior in Congress for our right to bear arms.
---
| Joe Kent is available for interviews. If interested, please email Ozzie Gonzalez at [ozzie@joekentforcongress.com](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=70eccde09b&e=00856e661d) or via cell at 951.442.0680. ###

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Medicare for All is not a pipe dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,

We received some difficult news recently here in California: the bill in the state legislature that would create a universal, single-payer healthcare system across the state, has failed. AB1400 was the result of a huge coalition of medical workers, activists, and community members and while this loss is hard, **the fact that we even got universal healthcare on the agenda is a huge win. **
I’m here to remind you that universal, national healthcare coverage–like AB1400 or Medicare for All–is not a pipe dream. **We’re closer to achieving this lifesaving model than ever, but it’s going to take more guts, determination, and hard work to get there.** There’s a reason why I’m running for Congress, and it has to do with my deep belief that progressive social and economic policies will lead us into the resilient future we need.
**[It’s time for California’s 23rd district to get the representation we deserve in Congress, and see lasting change from the bold policies I’m championing. Not everyone has the courage to stand up for what’s right, but I don’t back down from a fight just because it’s hard. Will you show you’re with me and chip in to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41656200/329793619/-431919476?refcode=2-11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjQ0MTBkNS1mZjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zeaQWOYq3aDIGB-c-UlLX4hk_Qt8MnLf8REKeHuXh3Q=)**

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41656201/329793620/-431919476?refcode=2-11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjQ0MTBkNS1mZjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zeaQWOYq3aDIGB-c-UlLX4hk_Qt8MnLf8REKeHuXh3Q=)**

Whether it’s at the local, state, or federal level, it’s going to take millions of us raising our voices to get major legislation like Medicare for All passed, but it will be worth it. What we can’t do is give up, or get complacent. **What we must do is remember that 55% of all Americans–the majority–support Medicare for All.**
The main reason we don’t have Medicare for All today is because of the intransigence of the Republican Party. The majority of Democrats support it, but the majority of Republicans don’t. **But here’s the thing: Medicare for All will help Republicans of all stripes too. **
Just a few decades ago, the Republican Party, from lawmakers to the base, used to widely support single-payer healthcare. So why the dramatic swing in policy since then? **The only clear, documented reason why the Republicans turned away from the policy is because Democrats themselves began to support it in higher numbers. **
**[Medicare for All would save hundreds of thousands of lives, and increase quality of life for millions of people. We need leaders who will remind the Republican Party that they serve their constituents, not donors like Big Pharma, and prove once and for all that the people support national healthcare. But I need your help to get to Congress so I can lead. Will you support my campaign with a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41656202/329793621/-431919476?refcode=2-11&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjQ0MTBkNS1mZjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zeaQWOYq3aDIGB-c-UlLX4hk_Qt8MnLf8REKeHuXh3Q=)**

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Vaccine Mandates Go Down in Flames
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=v_mandates_go_down&n=1)
---
Peter \-- The COVID Tyrants who are trying to run our lives are running into a massive roadblock. 'We the People' are REFUSING to follow their anti-science mandates in mass. **Here's the deal...the Canadian trucker protest is a beautiful display of what happens when people have had enough. The****spirit of what's happening in Ottawa is also happening around the country, and in Minnesota.** Just this afternoon, Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey and St Paul Mayor Melvin Carter [announced the failure of their vaccine mandate program ](https://www.action4liberty.com/minneapolis_st_paul_vaccine_mandates_a_failure_restrictions_lifted?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=v_mandates_go_down&n=2)(aka Vaccine Passports). They immediately ended their anti-liberty restrictions placed on small businesses in their cities.
Of course, the damage was done. I spoke to Greg Urban, owner of Wild Greg's Saloon in Minneapolis, about what Frey did to small business owners like him. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/minneapolis_st_paul_vaccine_mandates_a_failure_restrictions_lifted?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=v_mandates_go_down&n=3)
## The tides are turning though!
To defeat the COVID Tyrants and their quest for more power and control over our lives, we MUST organize a powerful resistance. That's why Action 4 Liberty exists. Our mission is to protect liberty for the next generation. To do that, we find, equip and activate patriots in Minnesota to rise up against the Political Class in order to take back our state! As you can imagine, that puts us smack dab in the middle of the crosshairs of politicians. They look to destroy and DEFUND us so that we fail. **_That's why I desperately need your help. Our organization is funded by individual donations. Help my team continue organizing the resistance to COVID Tyranny by donating today._** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=v_mandates_go_down&n=4 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=v_mandates_go_down&n=4)
---
We will not stop fighting until mask mandates, vaccine passports and emergency powers are gone for good. We say: NEVER AGAIN!
For the first time since the beginning of COVID, the political winds are at our back. That's scaring these politicians.
**We've driven all across the state activating thousands of new patriots in just the last couple months. The Stop Vaccine Mandates and Never Again Resolutions were introduced in nearly every precinct in Minnesota on Caucus night.**
On top of that, I have the most capable and dedicated team of young liberty professionals in the country who will knock doors, make phone calls and anything else needed to win back our liberties.
In order for us to stop mandates and make sure they Never Happen Again, I [**need your help**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=v_mandates_go_down&n=5) to keep leading this movement.
The spirit that drives the Canadian trucker protest in Ottawa is alive and well in Minnesota. Help equip Action 4 Liberty to LEAD and steer this energy towards the Political Class that is standing in our way.
**[Support Action 4 Liberty today by donating $100, $50 or even $25! Want to make a bigger impact? Consider a gift of $500.](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=v_mandates_go_down&n=6) **
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=v_mandates_go_down&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=v_mandates_go_down&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=v_mandates_go_down&n=9), software for leaders.

Peter,

Democrats just went public with their online fundraising data for the second half of 2021, and the numbers we're seeing across the board are astonishing.

**Democrats are proving once again, as they did in 2020, that they're going to give us Republicans a run for our money - quite literally - in this year's midterm elections.**

If you've been following our Senate race in Georgia, then you already know polling shows our race is a dead heat. You may also know our Democrat opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock, is the #1 fundraiser in the entire country. But what we're now learning is that he raised over $11 million from an astounding 410,276 donors ONLINE in the last six months.

**Peter, that's a lot of money from a lot of donors.** In fact, he's building a massive online network of Democrat donors on the scale of a presidential campaign - not a normal Senate campaign.

That's why we're reaching out to you today with a simple request: **[will you join our grassroots army of conservative PATRIOTS who will propel us to victory in Georgia and flip the Senate in favor of Republicans?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3d98067388f446ff9c5a974dbdf177be&_e=N8nCdCWYw-Nz1MKsGjoW5YgQz6BT8D97t795Y7JXgiZiGi8JfHB3LBi-dzpiWgoMQhDBKSu_T-A0ouXtxi2yqirPLU_uQNKbbUDot7iuguLfdDGo-fP_FXQ4PR-Dk_kCcJ8Wviw0cQmAauUrIyQ7EPkdgt7tq_CVjFk0oz0Z4oknZoPsk4_4qjKH30Uo_ZGU7tYSuKc3iWgktSBq1Ez43d_Za4A7Z87v6EJ9K5bG98IzAafPfARP2D8Zrv-dnky-G8p4uYDJuIIicSk4xpPzhfYaiQZoR8DGZK3Zl48eJs0jHpA6UX12nG8zGtlhVVUFeWsdThu404T6VQoWjLq6GGUYCvW1v6QrYkrjn7StE8gfnw5VpAVs9wHRHFtUVEPiFMlY8-3hOWaaQvv7WDhm4PBW8etX3p35ZIHiefr006m9CT-XL8PtZq_0CK9_abZmn8SSXXFZ5IsJapTKEbMWeKQcJNZYHH-go8-f71ZQ-mw%3D)**

**This month, we're setting a goal of recruiting 10,000 new donors so we can begin closing the financial lead that our opponent holds over our campaign at the moment.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: Michael Bloomberg's candidate for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
Flip flopping isn't leading | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=5545da3844&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | |
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=bf5e299765&e=9d6926af69)By now, you may have heard of Scott Jensen’s repeated flip-flops on his position on the Second Amendment.

**[As a state senator I have never wavered in protecting your rights which is why the Minnesota Gun Owners Caucus has given me an ‘A’ rating for my work at the Capitol.](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=9713cfc980&e=9d6926af69)**
Leadership is about action and not flip flopping for photo opportunities or chasing headlines. True leadership is standing up for our values every day and that is what I have strived to do and will continue do as your next Governor.

In 2016, Scott Jensen sought the support of gun rights groups in his campaign for the Senate - pledging to work with those organizations to oppose gun control legislation.

While in the Senate, Scott Jensen folded under pressure from anti-gun groups and introduced two gun control bills.
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=7943c2987e&e=9d6926af69)
[One of those was written by Michael Bloomberg’s gun control lobbyists](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=c6895151d0&e=9d6926af69)[. ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=371bfa4573&e=9d6926af69)

Candidate Scott Jensen has a history of saying one thing to get elected and then governing differently.

Can we trust him as Governor?

---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=0edac57f61&e=9d6926af69)

Fellow Conservative,

**_FIRST_** , Raphael Warnock won a 2021 special election by about 100,000 votes - out of more than 4 million ballots cast - becoming the first Democrat to win election to the Senate from Georgia since 2000.

**_THEN_** , Senator Warnock, using the national donor list he built during the 2021 runoff race, raised $32 million in his bid for a full six-year term in this fall's midterm elections.

**_NOW_** , we're in a “statistical dead heat” in the race for Georgia's Senate seat. BUT Warnock's got more than $23 million in the bank (cash) that he is using to make an $861,000 ad buy.

That's why we're asking you to help us close the gap between what our opponent has in the bank and what we've got in our reserves.

_This race is going to be the most expensive race of the 2022 cycle._

We know that it's only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. **[It's going to take thousands of hours of work to catch up with our opponent's fundraising, which is why we're emailing you today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0e1d9eac1558467fa393523015810e48&_e=Oa3r-tOnu596CGq-Jdc4dbOg7Nsncodg81NvEr9kIv_x_wkaAgkbIKt0dEMnTFXqhftUexTRGif6VfSHjnczC7x7pXpHGGJwBsnRRND3Zjw-zwob7rz-rf5Agm9mSpxwrkOBLfmYY_0BTzw6kUnoN04GHASKCGzXEV5P0v--Tv_acHZh1N_pRgKANmBayy7PVz_HYg98y8_SbirQZSPpGZ2X5rk54Y55ExpVjlf_Z4xG0DiadT8trmQK6hJMPs1cTHdvOd2oHXTmbff1K4om7upVor3O8f8hT3YX9Hu5Yg328RhN9zDmyQ9mPxm3Y9Xdcy4GyUe99Dik_yjexKWcz5jcDm2XFds1WTRuSXRaOrCcU8O9HtoqSBqleu6qPZdTyL8PT8_t7oSqlIuXufMF-NpXmVnHKZJ8uHLvKmYa7XCkNjd9fJl9LijklzVrVtgA8GlnJQPphQTw8s7iMyRrDA%3D%3D)**

One of our biggest hurdles is complacency. We must start NOW.

Don't believe me? Here's how THEY put it, in their own words: This _(now-deleted)_ tweet came from the woman who ran against me for the Wisconsin Senate in 2020, an elected state Representative in Wisconsin. body:
Peter, Americans want their way of life back. Washington needs to wake up. It is past time to rip off the band-aid of these COVID era policies. Congress needs to get spending under control and stop the bailouts from Washington.
Hi Peter, **Americans want their way of life back. Washington needs to wake up. **It is past time to rip off the band-aid of these COVID era policies. Congress needs to get spending under control and stop the bailouts from Washington._**We are now over 30 trillion in debt. This out of control spending has led to inflation and rising prices, which is crushing families. **_We need to stop the endless spending, get Big Government out of the way, and help the American people get back to work. **As long as the Democrats are in control of the House, Speaker Pelosi and her followers are going to push through massive spending bills to fund their far-left priorities.[Will you consider donating to our campaign so we can finally retire Nancy Pelosi once and for all this November?](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zikjrhd-idtjvlhlh-r/)**Nancy Pelosi, Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Democrats across the country are raising millions of dollars to keep their one-party rule intact. Our country cannot afford another two years of Democrats' one-party rule and socialist spending schemes. Your donation will help us fight back against their far-left agenda. [You can check out my interview on Newsmax by clicking the link here.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zikjrhd-idtjvlhlh-y/)Thanks,Bryan
**--

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What is coming
body:
Hello Peter,

You
likely know this but, in the coming months, a monumental Supreme
Court decision will be taking place.

Dobbs v.
Jackson Women's Health Organization has the potential to overturn
Roe v. Wade. In essence, it will make abortion a state-based
issue (where it belongs.)

While
some may see the overturning of Roe v. Wade as the final victory
in the fight for the preservation of human life, I don't believe
this will be the big "win" we are looking for. If the law moves
to the state legislation, it does not guarantee that abortions
will stop happening.

What we
need is much bigger than a court case-we need a culture shift.

I've
started working with a group of individuals who are looking to
create this cultural change. One of the first steps we've
identified is aligning our community around a shared set of
values. We need people like you and I to make a commitment to
protect the unborn.

You can
read more about it here:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59627934:sD5twJHNF:m:3:2394957096:07888A1C54E1B26F4F6ACFB13D6F219E:r

I realize
that I cannot do this alone. You've shown me in the past that you
value the life of the unborn as much as I do. If we're going to
be successful, if we're going to change our nation's culture,
then we need to work together.

Together
we can make real change for those who cannot do it for
themselves.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59627934:sD5twJHNF:m:3:2394957096:07888A1C54E1B26F4F6ACFB13D6F219E:r

Regards,
Ben
Carson

--
Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder
and Chairman
American
Cornerstone Institute

Copyright
© 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m in danger.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl5pb4buu7bvfo6jtp4sa1qb0jlccs64aadqsauo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqm8c5kcjhm6p36ctgn6cdksir6dc71mloe8dlmcaqe6d70s2pnac3im3h6ctjn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjbd1ge9rmcd72mdgmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5gmapr7c9j64oh5u)
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt7hr48851g1dih74jot3s6kk62h8oshdhaqdlc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cljmeoj6c9h2bs)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z003vststhsgu1a56hhvdlr5hi0kjif96rfsn608_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo7bdr26tjj0tlgehjr9d9hctj3cdtm6spj6olme8rj6sj2etg77clncli7eodgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjbd1nmtg6cdj4mmqjfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5gmao70c3imeoh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7q290dmv3u3crf6ff3h35k8eo3e0cgaskjf1du8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge0o75cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1nnlfrfrgbi55m66825hoco843k8dta414feaj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge0o75cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlup40s5bo87ogdqge52va10dkkhok9hqktskumo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge0o75cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

From: **Petition Alert (via House GOP) **
Date: Sat, February 5, 2022 at 4:58 PM
Subject: Stand with truckers against mandates >>>

Hi Fellow Conservative,

Right now, truckers are leading the charge to finally put an end to the coercive and overbearing COVID mandates the Left loves so much.

With everyday citizens by their sides, the truckers are demonstrating through their resistance just how much power grassroots patriots can have when they join together and stand up to elite control.

And here’s the thing, we are closer than ever to defeating the Radical Left’s anti-freedom COVID regime, but we MUST make our voice heard, loudly, clearly, and all together.

**[Sign the official petition to show your support for the truckers and join our virtual convoy for freedom>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h4fk-1xpor-4qqlpo7/ "Sign the official petition to show your support for the truckers and join our virtual convoy for freedom >>>")**

name: Aaron Brown
subject: What do Joe Rogan, Elon Musk, and FEE have in common?
body:
What do Joe Rogan, Elon Musk and the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) all have in common? All three are cultural forces
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9musu991q0nogvkcgfgg82cljcq6k3g5hssqmho_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge4or2c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4oni6jir2phjc1pj0pdlmmpr9ptlm5ob3dtlc1iebcj4mcoedcrjmhgmfdr5caprfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4d3666rjacb7m9p6cd70m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmspmdobkumbec84icu6bl30j3mf61qnb9n2fcug_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge4or2c9h2bs)

Hi Friend,

What do Joe Rogan, Elon Musk and the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) all have in common?

All three are cultural forces to be reckoned with, advocating for free speech, civil liberties, free enterprise, and liberty.

Joe Rogan and Elon Musk reach MILLIONS of people on social media with a common sense message about fighting COVID/lockdown tyranny, basic economics, gun rights, and much more.

So does the Foundation for Economic Education.

**The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) is the world 's leading pro-liberty, free enterprise think-tank. FEE's mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society. **

So how do we reach MILLIONS of young people like Joe Rogan and Elon Musk?

FEE reaches millions of students, young people, and citizens physically in the classroom and online. We produce online content and engage on cultural topics to share our message of limited government, entrepreneurship, and civil liberties.

We create articles, videos, explainers, and relate the ideas of liberty to what's happening in pop culture to capture the attention of younger generations.__**In fact, FEE 's online content is seen over 1 million times by young people between the ages of 16 and 22 every single week. **__

Giving up on young people is a FAILING strategy to defeat socialism, restore our Republic and fight for liberty.

[_**My goal is to raise $25,000 to help fund FEE 's efforts to teach young people about the principles of liberty and free enterprise. Please help me reach this goal by donating ANY amount by clicking here >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9q629ob0g4e2r4k1n3qg8if434hbkgo44gqij38_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge4or2c9h2bs)

FEE is one of the ONLY pro-liberty organizations teaching young people about the ideas of free enterprise, entrepreneurship, and liberty online.

You know who else is actively reaching out to young people on the internet?

Socialists.

Not good.

We CANNOT allow socialism, cancel culture, and big government to be the only voices young people hear or interact with on the internet. This is how the forces of big government recruit followers, advocates, and influencers.

The Foundation for Economic Education is going behind enemy lines and reaching out to young people with our message.

And you know what? It works.

**Our message of entrepreneurship, responsibility, opportunity, and empowering people to live free and prosperous lives is appealing to younger generations. **

Much like Joe Rogan and Elon Musk have exploded in popularity, FEE's online social networks are growing rapidly as we reach more people and teach young people about free markets.

You can fund FEE's efforts to reach young people online by using one of these links to donate:

[_**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Become a Liberty Champion: Donate $500 >>>
Become a Liberty Hero: Donate $1,000 or more**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlp5odn20s7t4v1a7csbro7ekhtf62h5fcv56png_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge4or2c9h2bs)

We are teaching students about big concepts by breaking things down and making them simple and relatable. We teach young people about things like...

* Why deficit spending doesn't work.
* How the Federal Reserve prints money, inflates the currency, and is destroying our wealth
* How the minimum wage fails to provide people with employment and hurts younger generations and minorities the most
* Why COVID lockdowns are failing us and causing millions of job losses
* Why the government shouldn't be in charge of education, healthcare, or the economy

FEE is reaching MILLIONS of young people online and growing the ranks of Americans who love the ideas of liberty and free enterprise.

But that's not all!

Our flagship program, FEE In The Classroom, also teaches students in the classroom itself. Last year, FEE taught over 20,000 students in over 300 classrooms across the United States.

FEE is committed to spreading our message, teaching the ideas of liberty to millions, and helping build a freer society.

[**_I am inviting you to join us by making a donation of ANY amount._**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd79h97f8od5ilhg20t0p17egs2optu6rhn3ncfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge4or2c9h2bs)

Your gift has a real impact and will help FEE recruit young people to the cause of liberty.

Please help us reach our goal of raising $25,000.

I am counting on your help.

Thank you for everything,

Aaron Brown
Director of Development
Foundation for Economic Education
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2z5aq8t5ajq1c2p4rr6p269ss6uc8d9j67mdm7poo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7k36pdv27pooojv7g1j6oqcdbs0lh28jt24d348_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge4or2c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkiqiok4husmt9fcgnf9ved5sv5h888kgm9rtv40_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4oni68qm4c3666q68crjm3h35c70stgjdcrie6pj4tjie2pn1o37c5jr5cbncqrj1puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb76mq3fdr4coqm9cr2cuobapbi46h22sh2s8i66ob1clge2ob4c5h2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfeshriur8dr5o3pfea0iuri80uv7cj4677lb2u0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge2ob4c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh2351kftm99qrrq5rnl29s88urmgfo7gps81i68_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge2ob4c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsv1hm7og2486uco4s4lbb03bhljmq6d64r0ie28_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge2ob4c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Jack Bergman voted against hundreds of in-district jobs.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Jack Bergman voted against hundreds of in-district jobs. If the majority of Congress voted like Jack Bergman, there would be no full funding for Soo Locks in his own district. I'm pleased and grateful this project is finally moving forward, but I share constituents' disappointment that our current Representative did not see the value in working with Republicans and Democrats to accomplish this through bipartisan agreement. Soo Locks infrastructure project gets final funding, Jack Bergman _**voted against**_ hundreds of in-district jobs [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41663881/329805829/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDU5M2MxZi00MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wl79_ndJ_aqNqzH8KTZAmEc4JTP-uUmTQzVWIslK_-E=) _**I am pleased this is moving forward and thankful for the critical investment in the district. I share constituents' disappointment that our current representative did not see the value in joining Republican and Democratic colleagues to improve Michigan's aging infrastructure with the bipartisan agreement.**_ [HELP US REPLACE BERGMAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41663882/329805830/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDU5M2MxZi00MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wl79_ndJ_aqNqzH8KTZAmEc4JTP-uUmTQzVWIslK_-E=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41663883/329805831/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDU5M2MxZi00MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wl79_ndJ_aqNqzH8KTZAmEc4JTP-uUmTQzVWIslK_-E=) [DONATE FOR INTEGRITY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41663884/329805832/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDU5M2MxZi00MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wl79_ndJ_aqNqzH8KTZAmEc4JTP-uUmTQzVWIslK_-E=) WASHINGTON — The Army Corps of Engineers will receive $479 million from the bipartisan _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ to invest in modernizing the Soo Locks. With this investment, there is now enough funding to fully fund the Corp’s budget to finish building a new lock. U.S. Rep. Jack Bergman, who represents constituents in and around this crucial shipping gateway, voted 'No' on the bipartisan infrastructure investment, a no-vote Dr. Bob Lorinser deeply condemned. In addition to supporting the nation’s supply chain, the Soo Locks project will support hundreds of jobs. Project Manager Mollie Mahoney says, “We anticipate the construction will create roughly 1,200 jobs per year, and about 600 of those are direct jobs, most of which will be on site.” Through the Soo Locks, Great Lakes freighters carry agricultural products and materials our manufacturers and military depend on. The new lock will mean there is a modern lock to handle larger vessels and will prevent failure of the locks, which would have devastating consequences for the economy and national security. Michigan senators have led the effort for years to secure enough funding to complete this new lock—$1.3 billion in total. _**If the majority of Congress voted like Jack Bergman, there would be no final funding for the Soo Locks in his own district.**_ **Republicans and Democrats in Michigan** agreed this bill was "transformational" for Michigan. It includes unprecedented funding—to finish modernizing the Soo Locks, rebuild our long-neglected roads and bridges, keep our drinking water safe, bring high-speed internet to communities across Michigan, invest in electric vehicles, and make the largest single investment ever in the Great Lakes. The Act also strengthens our Buy American laws. | |
---
**_The improvements of the bipartisan infrastructure package will be the most significant single infusion into our country’s infrastructure in over a decade._**

Northern Michigan must focus on what the investment can do for the area. Dr. Lorinser said the federal funding will be the most significant single infusion into our country’s infrastructure in over a decade.

This investment is desperately needed. This bill creates family-sustaining jobs, advances careers, and will help small businesses grow. It upgrades crumbling infrastructure. The bipartisan agreement ━ which my opponent opposed ━ will ignite the economy and put money in working families’ pockets and food on the table, all without raising taxes.

The most recent report card on Michigan’s Infrastructure by the American Society of Civil Engineers gave the state an overall GPA of D+. Michigan’s civil engineers studied 13 infrastructure categories. Of those 13, nine infrastructure categories are in mediocre condition, and four are in poor condition.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41663885/329805833/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDU5M2MxZi00MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wl79_ndJ_aqNqzH8KTZAmEc4JTP-uUmTQzVWIslK_-E=)
The entire investment is a game-changer for the First District. It will help Northern Michigan build a robust energy grid, advance public transportation, provide access to clean drinking water for hundreds of thousands, and start to meet the broadband needs of rural Michiganders, many of whom live in the First District. It’s truly a transformative, historic bipartisan investment.

**A Historic Investment in Michigan:**
* $7.3 billion for highway repairs for Michigan
* $1 billion for environmental protection of the Great Lakes
* $563 million for bridge replacement and repairs
* $100 million to provide broadband coverage and connect at least 398,000 residents to the Internet

The legislation would provide $65 billion in investment to improve broadband, with at least $100 million directed towards providing broadband coverage to at least 398,000 residents in Michigan. It aims to lower the price of internet services, create price transparency, and help more low-income households access the internet.

**Investment in Broadband**

At a state level, the infrastructure bill would provide $100 million to extend broadband coverage and provide nearly 2.5 million low-income Michigan households the opportunity to apply for funds to help afford internet access, a goal Dr. Lorinser champions.

**Investment in Infrastructure**

Michigan stands to receive $7.3 billion in federal highway aid and $563 million for bridge replacement and repairs, as well as the opportunity to compete with other states for billions more in bridge and road projects. The investment in our infrastructure is vital as our great state has received poor marks for years for its infrastructure. A report from five years ago stated that much of Michigan’s infrastructure is reaching the end of its useful life.

**Jobs – “The bottom line.”**

The way to attract new jobs is to be a place where people can work and live, where healthcare and education are superb, and where we welcome innovation.

I commend both sides of the Congressional aisle for achieving compromise. The bill does not represent all that Democrats want, nor everything the Republicans seek. Senator Mitt Romney (R-UT) stated the legislation “provides a once-in-a-generation investment in our country’s physical infrastructure without raising taxes.”

Whenever I evaluate federal legislation, I’m looking to ensure each community in Northern Michigan is a priority. Investments in broadband and infrastructure ━ two primary components of this historic legislation ━ are investments I support.

My opponent has mislabeled this legislation and **voted no.** Unfortunately, Jack Bergman's focus is not on the crucial necessity and positive attributes of the overdue investment. If I were Northern Michigan’s Congressman, I would have voted for this bill because it undoubtedly will help thousands of our citizens economically thrive.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41663886/329805834/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDU5M2MxZi00MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wl79_ndJ_aqNqzH8KTZAmEc4JTP-uUmTQzVWIslK_-E=)
[HELP US REPLACE JACK BERGMAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41663887/329805835/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDU5M2MxZi00MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wl79_ndJ_aqNqzH8KTZAmEc4JTP-uUmTQzVWIslK_-E=)
**_We are scheduling nearly a dozen upcoming town halls over the next two month. This level of engagement and travel can be expensive for the campaign. Will you consider _[making a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41663888/329805836/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDU5M2MxZi00MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wl79_ndJ_aqNqzH8KTZAmEc4JTP-uUmTQzVWIslK_-E=)_ to help fund the continuation of our town hall series?_**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41663889/329805837/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDU5M2MxZi00MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wl79_ndJ_aqNqzH8KTZAmEc4JTP-uUmTQzVWIslK_-E=)

Investment in Broadband At a state level, the infrastructure bill would provide $100 million to extend broadband coverage and provide nearly 2.5 million low-income Michigan households the opportunity to apply for funds to help afford internet access, a goal Dr. Lorinser champions. Investment in Infrastructure Michigan stands to receive $7.3 billion in federal highway aid and $563 million for bridge replacement and repairs, as well as the opportunity to compete with other states for billions more in bridge and road projects. The investment in our infrastructure is vital as our great state has received poor marks for years for its infrastructure. A report from five years ago stated that much of Michigan’s infrastructure is reaching the end of its useful life. Jobs – “The bottom line.” The way to attract new jobs is to be a place where people can work and live, where healthcare and education are superb, and where we welcome innovation. I commend both sides of the Congressional aisle for achieving compromise. The bill does not represent all that Democrats want, nor everything the Republicans seek. Senator Mitt Romney (R-UT) stated the legislation “provides a once-in-a-generation investment in our country’s physical infrastructure without raising taxes.” Whenever I evaluate federal legislation, I’m looking to ensure each community in Northern Michigan is a priority. Investments in broadband and infrastructure ━ two primary components of this historic legislation ━ are investments I support. My opponent has mislabeled this legislation and voted no. Unfortunately, Jack Bergman's focus is not on the crucial necessity and positive attributes of the overdue investment. If I were Northern Michigan’s Congressman, I would have voted for this bill because it undoubtedly will help thousands of our citizens economically thrive. = = We are scheduling nearly a dozen upcoming town halls over the next two month. This level of engagement and travel can be expensive for the campaign. Will you consider = to help fund the continuation of our town hall series? = = PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER FRIENDS OF DR. BOB PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States

Hello,
Sometimes I get advice from political pundits to leave criticism of Donald Trump out of my campaign speeches. They worry that by calling out Trump when he’s still so popular among some voters in Iowa could be an election misstep. But I can’t do that. It would be a dereliction of duty.
Donald Trump and his cohorts helped plan and execute an insurrection – a coup – at the highest level of our government. To be silent would be complicit in condoning political violence and the evil outcomes of today’s GOP fringe.
**I’m running against Senator Chuck Grassley, one of Trump’s biggest supporters.** Donald Trump came to Iowa just to hold an event with Grassley and give him his full-throated endorsement. And Grassley took it, swooningly.
The polls show the race will be extremely close: Just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley! The challenge is going up against Grassley’s $3.7 million campaign war chest of corporate PAC and special interest money (not to mention McConnell’s Super PACs).
**Here’s where you come in: I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give to my campaign today if we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue.**
[**We need to raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight to win. Please, will you chip in $5 or more to my campaign now – whatever you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue in ‘22, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41665008/329809458/-42398318?refcode=em20220211am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDAxZWJlOC00MjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTlmjIWrqfyWa46s20PbelDr38wC9cpS8JOMFvwyqy0=)

clean_body: Hello, Sometimes I get advice from political pundits to leave criticism of Donald Trump out of my campaign speeches. They worry that by calling out Trump when he’s still so popular among some voters in Iowa could be an election misstep. But I can’t do that. It would be a dereliction of duty. Donald Trump and his cohorts helped plan and execute an insurrection – a coup – at the highest level of our government. To be silent would be complicit in condoning political violence and the evil outcomes of today’s GOP fringe. I’m running against Senator Chuck Grassley, one of Trump’s biggest supporters. Donald Trump came to Iowa just to hold an event with Grassley and give him his full-throated endorsement. And Grassley took it, swooningly. The polls show the race will be extremely close: Just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley! The challenge is going up against Grassley’s $3.7 million campaign war chest of corporate PAC and special interest money (not to mention McConnell’s Super PACs). Yvette Herrell’s Twitter lately? It’s one extreme post after another , complete with dangerous conspiracy theories around COVID, her desire to roll back reproductive freedom, and hateful, anti-immigrant rhetoric. = = = This year, voters in NM-02 need to ask themselves: Is this really the person we want representing us in Congress??? While Herrell pushes the same kind of divisive rhetoric as her beloved former president Donald Trump, and votes against the best interests of New Mexicans, we’re working hard to elect a true representative of the people: Democrat Gabe Vasquez. subject: I’m in danger.

body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z38dcbkrj48l4fgqm100mkii9rm2nksf82v79sog_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ulo6apb4s4ob2t34sjjr2tj26hjm9pjncpj74olgeerm3dji65ge5ctgcipjbdtnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchkcoored9kcur6cphhm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1c5im1o70cdim49fg)
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfrriko57fsi8bjj4c3t6eo81cp15kun0hc8mjq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge1o33clh2bs)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **
| | [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $500 DONATION](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuopnmnfcpr9mltn7ji5u4fh48sa5tv8kk7dj7ko_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clge1o33clh2bs)

name: Val Demings
subject: I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41668987/329820962/-74008005?refcode=20220211_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmVkZDNkOS00NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qtRqjZA2dUlKz0Vk2LlmiL_mjSsKX1XG468TTVAMarA=) Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: **I cannot win this without you.** [**That's why I'm asking you to become one of the donors to my campaign for Senate by splitting a contribution between me and Serve America right now. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41668988/329820963/-74008005?refcode=20220211_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmVkZDNkOS00NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qtRqjZA2dUlKz0Vk2LlmiL_mjSsKX1XG468TTVAMarA=) Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. **So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine.** The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. [**I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians – but I need your help to win this race. Will you split a contribution of $20 or more to Serve America and me to defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41668989/329820964/-74008005?refcode=20220211_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmVkZDNkOS00NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qtRqjZA2dUlKz0Vk2LlmiL_mjSsKX1XG468TTVAMarA=) In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: **6,112 donations, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend?** [**Split a contribution between Serve America and me of $20 or more right now – whatever you can spare to fuel our battleground Senate race – so we can defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41668990/329820965/-74008005?refcode=20220211_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmVkZDNkOS00NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qtRqjZA2dUlKz0Vk2LlmiL_mjSsKX1XG468TTVAMarA=) From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team. —Congresswoman Val Demings [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41668991/329820966/272679854?refcode=20220211_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmVkZDNkOS00NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qtRqjZA2dUlKz0Vk2LlmiL_mjSsKX1XG468TTVAMarA=) The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. = In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: 6,112 donations, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend? = From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team. —Congresswoman Val Demings = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Angela Valvano, Keystone Progress
subject: Abortion may be on the ballot, and off the table in PA.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=021122 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=021122]

Dear Friend,

With S.B. 8, Texas has effectively banned abortion in that state — and despite how inhumane that law is - the Supreme Court has allowed it to stand.

This summer, the Supreme Court is readying to overturn or decimate Roe v. Wade — which guarantees our constitutional right to abortion — when it rules on Mississippi’s 15-week abortion ban.

An abortion ban at 15-weeks of pregnancy is zooming through the Florida legislature and other states are following suit.

That includes Pennsylvania, where lawmakers recently introduced legislation to add an abortion ban to upcoming ballots, asking voters if the state constitution should ban the use of public money for abortions. By putting it on the ballot, they can avoid the governor's veto.

After decades of trying to restrict abortion in PA, they are now dangerously close to making abortion inaccessible in our state for countless people.

Any ban on abortion is an affront to our human rights. Bans at certain weeks of pregnancy open the door to more oppressive laws related to our bodies, our well-being, and our futures. Abortion is essential health care that takes place between an individual and their providers. Politicians have no place interfering with our health.

We co-created a coalition, Pennsylvania Abortion Liberation+ (PAAL+), to amplify abortion liberation work in PA and to mobilize our communities to take action, so that we can make abortion accessible to everyone, always.

We MUST vote out those in office who are working overtime to destroy our right to control our bodies! Please help us with a donation today as we organize and empower voters around this life or death issue.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=021122 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=021122]

Thank you.

Angela Valvano
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

clean_body: [] Dear Friend, With S.B. 8, Texas has effectively banned abortion in that state — and despite how inhumane that law is - the Supreme Court has allowed it to stand. This summer, the Supreme Court is readying to overturn or decimate Roe v. Wade — which guarantees our constitutional right to abortion — when it rules on Mississippi’s 15-week abortion ban. An abortion ban at 15-weeks of pregnancy is zooming through the Florida legislature and other states are following suit. That includes Pennsylvania, where lawmakers recently introduced legislation to add an abortion ban to upcoming ballots, asking voters if the state constitution should ban the use of public money for abortions. By putting it on the ballot, they can avoid the governor's veto. After decades of trying to restrict abortion in PA, they are now dangerously close to making abortion inaccessible in our state for countless people. Any ban on abortion is an affront to our human rights. Bans at certain weeks of pregnancy open the door to more oppressive laws related to our bodies, our well-being, and our futures. Abortion is essential health care that takes place between an individual and their providers. Politicians have no place interfering with our health. We co-created a coalition, Pennsylvania Abortion Liberation+ (PAAL+), to amplify abortion liberation work in PA and to mobilize our communities to take action, so that we can make abortion accessible to everyone, always. We MUST vote out those in office who are working overtime to destroy our right to control our bodies! Please help us with a donation today as we organize and empower voters around this life or death issue. [] Thank you. Angela Valvano Keystone Progress [] Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees. Keystone Progress 354 S Atlantic Ave Pittsburgh, PA 15224 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .
