name: Steven Olikara
subject: Senators should be legislators not telemarketers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
Image of Olikara campaign logo with photo of Steven Olikara and link to campaign website: [https://www.stevenolikara.com]

Dear Peter,

Last week I stopped in Manitowoc to meet with Sachin Shivaram, CEO of the Wisconsin Aluminum Foundry and toured the facility. We shared a commitment to building a more dignified economy – an economy in which workers have the training to get fulfilling, well-paid jobs, and Wisconsin businesses can hire the skilled workers they need to succeed. This is why I am committed to tuition-free technical and vocational training and expanding apprenticeships.

Photo of Steven Olikara touring the Wisconsin Aluminum Foundry in Manitowoc with CEO Sachin Shivaram: [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Margaret/2.3.22%20Steven%20%26%20Sachin%20at%20WI%20Aluminum%20Foundry.jpeg]

From Manitowoc, we drove to Howard, WI - just a short drive from Lambeau Field in Green Bay. Former Lt. Gov. Barbara Lawton and public education leaders hosted an electric event focused on how we can change the business model of politics [https://youtu.be/ect0fAwP1uE]. We need to change the incentives governing why we don’t have good options in politics. It has become too profitable for politicians to spew hate, divide us up, and polarize our society.

I shared my passion for campaign finance reform based on what I saw during my time in Washington, D.C. as Founder and CEO of the Millennial Action Project [https://www.millennialaction.org/our-impact]. Rather than devoting themselves to serving as inclusive legislators, many members of Congress have become hyper-partisan telemarketers – dialing for dollars to raise money for their re-election campaigns instead of doing the job we, as taxpayers, pay them to do. We need to ban members of Congress from fundraising while they’re in session and I will introduce legislation in the U.S. Senate to make this happen.

With your support, we can win this election and enact these changes in Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0211email] We can make Wisconsin a beacon of democracy and a force for positive change in our nation.

Thank you for supporting our campaign,
Steven

Image of Steven Olikara speaking at Green Bay event with link to video: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ect0fAwP1uE]

For too long, powerful forces have divided us against each other and left our most vulnerable communities behind. Help us build a new, inclusive and compassionate path forward for Wisconsin, one that champions dignity and opportunity for all. We can meet this moment and change how we do politics.

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: remember caller ID?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41674092/329839707/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk698-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzU5ZTMxMC00ZThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bV8eDF961sfh0_EQP94NkbSq0J8KaM5abC9gSQ5BWho=)
Peter: Remember how exciting caller ID was back in the day? Maybe when you were a kid, like I was, running to the telephone to see who was calling? Or even as an adult when caller ID was a brand-new thing?
**Bear with me; I promise the novelty of caller ID actually has to do with my campaign for Senate and why I'm so determined to defeat Sen. Grassley (R) here in Iowa. **
I had a few names memorized when I was a kid, but there was one I knew from the age of 10: Dad's business agent. When that name showed up on caller ID, it meant that there was work for my dad – a union pipefitter-welder. On the days and weeks that name _didn't_ show up, it meant the opposite. It meant Mom and Dad had to worry about having enough to pay the bills.
Peter, I'm in this race to be a champion for families like mine – because for years, Iowa's families have not found an ally in Sen. Chuck Grassley. He's failed again and again to stand up for workers, choosing instead to align himself with wealthy corporate interests and the conspiracy theories of the former president.
**If Sen. Grassley won't show up for America's families, it's time to send someone to the Senate who will.** That's why nobody will work harder than I will to defeat him, but I need your help. Sen. Grassley has the backing of the Senate Republicans’ campaign arm, which has more than $39 million in its campaign war chest, but I'm relying on a _grassroots movement_ to power us to victory. **I'm relying on your support.**
**[If you believe that working class families deserve a stronger voice in Congress – and if you want Democrats to retain the Senate majority – then please make a grassroots contribution of whatever you can spare before tonight's midnight deadline. Our fight grows stronger with every grassroots contribution, and together, we can defeat Sen. Grassley and win in Iowa.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41674093/329839708/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk698-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzU5ZTMxMC00ZThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bV8eDF961sfh0_EQP94NkbSq0J8KaM5abC9gSQ5BWho=)**
Peter, I'll never forget being at a union event with my dad a few years back and him saying, "I think I'm the first person in the family who has worked in the building trades to live long enough to get my pension." That really stuck with me – and it's why I fought so hard in Congress to ensure people are paid a fair wage and can be taken care of if they're hurt on the job.

I really appreciate your support.
Abby
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41674094/329839709/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk698-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzU5ZTMxMC00ZThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bV8eDF961sfh0_EQP94NkbSq0J8KaM5abC9gSQ5BWho=)
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Peter,

With one of the most competitive Senate elections being our race, the balance of the Senate majority will come down to Wisconsin. That’s why we’re aiming to report huge numbers every quarter and set big goals for our monthly fundraising.

And while at times he’s trailed us in fundraising last year, Ron Johnson entered 2022 with more money in the bank than us – which should alarm you. This shows that his shady corporate interest backers are writing massive checks to their favorite pawn in the Senate.

And while he has the corporate interests, we have you, Peter. Alex isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money because he wants the people of Wisconsin to know that he will put them first.

But what will it take to win one of the most important elections in 2022? A HUGE grassroots team behind us – and that’s why we’re coming to you today.

clean_body: Ron Johnson entered 2022 with more money in the bank than us – which should alarm you. | | = Peter, With one of the most competitive Senate elections being our race, the balance of the Senate majority will come down to Wisconsin. That’s why we’re aiming to report huge numbers every quarter and set big goals for our monthly fundraising. And while at times he’s trailed us in fundraising last year, Ron Johnson entered 2022 with more money in the bank than us – which should alarm you. This shows that his shady corporate interest backers are writing massive checks to their favorite pawn in the Senate. And while he has the corporate interests, we have you, Peter. Alex isn’t taking a dime of corporate PAC money because he wants the people of Wisconsin to know that he will put them first. But what will it take to win one of the most important elections in 2022? A HUGE grassroots team behind us – and that’s why we’re coming to you today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Peter,

What if I told you we have a chance to...

...defeat one of the most liberal Democrats in the Senate?

...take back the Senate by winning just ONE race in Georgia?

...elect a conservative superstar and football hero to the United States Senate?

What if I told you we can do ALL THREE?

**That's why I'm endorsing my friend, Herschel Walker.**

**[Republican Herschel Walker is the clear choice for the U.S. Senate in Georgia, but he needs you to join his team. Will you rush a donation right now to join me in supporting Herschel Walker, a fellow freedom-loving conservative, today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59526614:6IpbWzEZN:m:1:3298722022:C1C7942DA164C98FB0A45FA8F4F383B0:r)**

From crushing it on the college and professional football fields to owning a successful business and being a spokesman for an organization that provides mental health services for our troops, Herschel Walker has done just about everything.

Now, he's taking on his next challenge and facing his biggest race yet by running for Senate.

We need Herschel Walker in the Senate running circles around Chuck Schumer, but it will be a costly battle.

His Democrat opponent Raphael Warnock is the #1 fundraising senator in the entire country. In fact, he raised $9.8 million in the past three months alone!

If we're going to help Herschel win in Georgia and flip the Senate Majority red, he's going to need the critical resources to fund his campaign.

That's where you and I come in.

**[Will you step up with even just $2 or more to help get Herschel Walker across the finish line?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59526614:6IpbWzEZN:m:1:3298722022:C1C7942DA164C98FB0A45FA8F4F383B0:r)**

National Republicans are already backing Jen Kiggans to flip VA-02 red – they’ll put millions of dollars behind her effort to unseat Elaine. Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin won in Virginia by campaigning on right-wing policies – so it’s no surprise that Jen Kiggans is falling right in line with his talking points.
Kiggans wants to ride the coattails of Youngkin’s victory all the way to the House. But if the policies she supports are any indication of what type of Representative she would be, we cannot let her anywhere near Congress.
Unlike Kiggans, Elaine is focused on the issues that will make a difference for hardworking Virginians – like combatting the root causes of climate change while spurring a green economy with good-paying jobs and fighting for Veterans to have better access to comprehensive healthcare. And she’ll always take a stand for equality.
[**The last thing we need is another dangerous extremist representing Virginia. name: Jane Hamilton, Candidate for Congress
subject: An Update: Betting on American workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Jane Hope Hamilton Campaign
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Labor unions get behind our campaign
Friend –
In Congress, I will always stand behind American workers and support our nation's labor unions. It’s why I have pledged to back the PRO Act and other pro-union legislation that will help secure fair wages, access to good healthcare and policies that lift up working families.
As a pro-union candidate, it was an honor to learn the news that the United Auto Workers (UAW) has endorsed my campaign for Congressional District 30. UAW represents nearly 400,000 American workers, including so many here in North Texas, who make our economy work and our nation stronger. UAW has a proven track record of fighting for family-sustaining jobs and strong benefits for their members.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90478/images/UAW%20supports%20JHH%202.png]Momentum for our campaign continues to grow every day! Our agenda to create good jobs, fight for voting rights and ensuring access to healthcare is resonating across the community. My proven record of getting things done in Washington, DC and across our community is being recognized by the support of leaders and organizations, like UAW, we can trust.
Early vote begins in less than a week and your support is more important than ever. You can learn more about how to support this campaign at my website [https://www.janehopehamilton.com/] . If you need more information about where and how to vote, visit the Dallas County [https://www.dallascountyvotes.org/early-voting-information/] or Tarrant County [https://www.tarrantcounty.com/en/elections/Early-Voting-Information.html] elections websites.
It would be an honor to serve our community in Congress. I humbly ask for your support.
Best,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90478/images/Jane.png]Jane Hamilton, Candidate for Congress
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email_ask?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90478/images/2sec_HOPE%20is%20on%20the%20ballot.gif]For over 20 years Jane has been working for our communities
Legislative Aide for The Honorable Helen Giddings
Senior staffer on the US House Rules Committee for the Honorable Martin Frost
Campaign Manager for the Dallas Democratic Sweep in 2006 which flipped Dallas County from Republican to its current status as a Democratic stronghold.
Helped elect Craig Watkins, the first African-American District Attorney in the State of Texas.
Former Campaign Manager for Dallas County Judge Clay Jenkins
Former Campaign Manager and Chief of Staff for Congressman Marc Veasey
Democratic Primary State Director for the Joe Biden Presidential Campaign
General Election Strategic Advisor for the Joe Biden Presidential and Kamala Harris Vice Presidential Campaign
https://www.facebook.com/janehopetx/ [https://www.facebook.com/janehopetx/] https://twitter.com/JaneHopeTx [https://twitter.com/JaneHopeTx] https://www.instagram.com/JaneHopeTx/ [https://www.instagram.com/JaneHopeTx/]
Paid for by the Jane Hope Hamilton Campaign
If you prefer to donate by check, please mail to:
Jane Hope Hamilton Campaign
P.O. Box 227046
Dallas, TX 75222
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/acd0a55f-d089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/d3a744ac-538b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2E3NDRhYy01MzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sstBK5IFGzWqkh54TrNZOakeOKEFDjZWu1c1i8LAzA0=&id=129132880 .

Friend — Is there anything we can say to convince you to make a contribution of any amount to Defend the Senate today? What if we told you that the Republican’s Senate campaign arm raised $13 MILLION more than Democrats did this past year to take back the Senate? What if we told you that former President Trump’s cadre of outside groups has $122 MILLION in the bank? What if we told you that in Ohio there are two Republicans running for Senate who have given more than $10 MILLION to their own campaigns? body:
If you still support House Republicans, please renew your 2022 Sustaining Membership before midnight to correct the record.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3h5xg--fgxr-4qqlpo0&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Fellow Conservative,

**You’ve been marked as a DEMOCRAT.**

If you still support House Republicans, **[please renew your 2022 Sustaining Membership](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h5xg-1xrry-4qqlpo4/ "please renew your 2022 Sustaining Membership")** before midnight to correct the record.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h5xg-1xrrz-4qqlpo5/)
---

**[This is your FINAL CHANCE to renew your 2022 Membership and help Republicans win back the House Majority!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h5xg-1xrs0-4qqlpo2/ "This is your FINAL CHANCE to renew your 2022 Membership and help Republicans win back the House Majority!")**

Mark from our 2022 Membership Services team reached out repeatedly.

He thought you could be one of our top supporters and he did everything he could to make sure you renewed your membership. But he must have been mistaken.

You made him sad.

**Fellow Conservative, we don’t want to have to ask you again. The need for patriots like you to step up and help conservatives take back our country is clear.**

---
| | | [DO YOUR PART](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h5xg-1xrs1-4qqlpo3/ "Generic Button")
---

Each day that Biden and Pelosi’s Democrats control Congress is another day our country slides further and further toward socialism. We’re fighting for our children's and grandchildren's futures, and the survival of America itself.

**[So, will you FINALLY step up today and renew your membership to help Republicans win in 2022?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h5xg-1xrs2-4qqlpo4/ "So, will you FINALLY step up today and renew your membership to help Republicans win in 2022? ")**

-National Republican Membership Office

PS - We need your answer by midnight. If you ignore us again we will have to assume you are a Democrat.

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h5xg-1xrs3-4qqlpo5/ "Generic Button")
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h5xg-1xrs4-4qqlpo6/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h5xg-1xrs5-4qqlpo7/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h5xg-1xrs6-4qqlpo8/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

---

Every candidate on this list supports the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, racial justice reform, women's choice, and the other issues Blue America stands for.

This fundraiser helps all of us and advocates for necessary progressive policies, so, we’re asking for donations based on our favorite musical artist — the candidate with the most donations receives an additional $1k donation. **My favorite band is AC/DC and trust me, I’m a huge fan:**
**_"The good lord made the world with four elements and AC/DC made rock'n'roll with three chords. Both were masterpieces."_**
[If you, _like me_ , love AC/DC, donate now and get the chance to win a free book and CD — and give me the chance to receive $1k from Blue America→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41678944/329861701/-607625211?tandembox=show&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220210_1_1&refcode2=71b622ca-568b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MWI2MjJjYS01NjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wx4u71rj41KHLMWdwYIF6CeWO4jLkEzEUO1V7JxXUL4=)

Thanks,

Tom

Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. Here’s why: Blue America, an organization that exclusively supports progressive candidates, has launched a contest — = | | = Every candidate on this list supports the Green New Deal, Medicare for All, racial justice reform, women's choice, and the other issues Blue America stands for. This fundraiser helps all of us and advocates for necessary progressive policies, so, we’re asking for donations based on our favorite musical artist — the candidate with the most donations receives an additional $1k donation. My favorite band is AC/DC and trust me, I’m a huge fan: "The good lord made the world with four elements and AC/DC made rock'n'roll with three chords. Both were masterpieces." = Thanks, Tom | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. My experience as Mayor of Kansas City prepared me to negotiate effective, bi-partisan solutions. In the Senate, my priority will always be the hardworking, everyday people of Kansas. It’s our state, _where I learned two of my core values, hard work and caring for my community._

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

When I was a kid, my first real job was working at the Chuck E. Cheese off of U.S. 19 in Clearwater.

One day while I was counting tokens my boss, Jeff, overheard me listening to some...pretty embarrassing music. The next day, he handed me a mix CD (Remember, this was the early 2000s) and he said “listen to this”.

It had bands I’d never heard of — like Alkaline Trio, Jimmy Eat World, and Jawbreaker. [I didn’t know it yet, but Punk Rock would change my life and make me the person I am today. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41679420/329863457/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220211_FR_PUNK_A1_HEADER_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGIxNTVkYS01NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHTAfWePV5F9gzg1wkFAZEjWMMrqNEaqjgpt6GJ0HoQ=)

As I listened to that CD (over and over and over), a whole new world opened up. Because Punk Rock wasn’t just about the great music — it was political, self-reliant, emotional, and cathartic.

[And while my clothes are a little more conventional these days, I still hold on to the lessons I learned from punk.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41679423/329863461/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220211_FR_PUNK_A1_HEADER_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGIxNTVkYS01NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHTAfWePV5F9gzg1wkFAZEjWMMrqNEaqjgpt6GJ0HoQ=)

[Resist Greed:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41679425/329863463/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220211_FR_PUNK_A1_HEADER_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGIxNTVkYS01NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHTAfWePV5F9gzg1wkFAZEjWMMrqNEaqjgpt6GJ0HoQ=) From corporations to career politicians, there’s always someone looking to get ahead by exploiting someone else (or even our planet!!). We need to stick together!

[Fight Injustice:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41679426/329863464/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220211_FR_PUNK_A1_HEADER_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGIxNTVkYS01NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHTAfWePV5F9gzg1wkFAZEjWMMrqNEaqjgpt6GJ0HoQ=) I learned to fight for what you care about, even if it’s unpopular — and ALWAYS stand up for the underdog.

[Think Outside the Box:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41679428/329863466/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220211_FR_PUNK_A1_HEADER_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGIxNTVkYS01NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHTAfWePV5F9gzg1wkFAZEjWMMrqNEaqjgpt6GJ0HoQ=) Through punk, I learned there’s a HUGE world out there to be explored. No one person has all the answers. We ALL need to get more comfortable thinking outside the box and looking for solutions everywhere.

[DIY - Do It Yourself:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41679430/329863468/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220211_FR_PUNK_A1_HEADER_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGIxNTVkYS01NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHTAfWePV5F9gzg1wkFAZEjWMMrqNEaqjgpt6GJ0HoQ=) Punk taught me that if you wanted to do something, you didn't need to wait around until someone gave you permission. You could roll up your sleeves and do it yourself.

The lessons Punk Rock taught me are the reason I’m here today. I believe that good people need to run for office — because we need good people in Congress who are willing to step up, take risks, and do good things.

[Well — I’m not hiding anything.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41679436/329863474/-451217501?refcode=EM_BS_GEL_220211_FR_PUNK_A1_HEADER_U1_X1_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGIxNTVkYS01NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wHTAfWePV5F9gzg1wkFAZEjWMMrqNEaqjgpt6GJ0HoQ=)

No one person has all the answers. We ALL need to get more comfortable thinking outside the box and looking for solutions everywhere. = Punk taught me that if you wanted to do something, you didn't need to wait around until someone gave you permission. You could roll up your sleeves and do it yourself. The lessons Punk Rock taught me are the reason I’m here today. I believe that good people need to run for office — because we need good people in Congress who are willing to step up, take risks, and do good things. | | = | | = But a funny thing happened to me when I first started exploring a run for office: People actually told me I might have to hide my love of punk rock. = I think Americans are ready for a different kind of politician, one that doesn’t shy away from acknowledging their humanity. Punk rock changed my life and I’m proud of the lessons it taught me. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for reading about my punk story. Eddie Geller P.S. If any of you out there are screaming, “Those bands are technically emo!” Well, I can’t argue with you on that. | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by Eddie Geller for Congress Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. Box 1111 11507 Dr. Martin Luther King Jr Blvd Mango, FL 33550-9700

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: We need more pediatricians in the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
As we learn to live with COVID-19, fight to ensure all women have access to a full range of reproductive healthcare, and work to bring down the cost of prescription medications, it is more important than ever to have doctors in the House charting the path. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41679461/329863501/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWIxNTVkYS01NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TynqbIRVImfHNibl0rli_1T3-uqa_4_-KmdeitQazPk=&emci=9c85bd93-d189-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4ab155da-578b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

As we learn to live with COVID-19, fight to ensure all women have access to a full range of reproductive healthcare, and work to bring down the cost of prescription medications, it is more important than ever to have doctors in the House charting the path.

As you might know, I am the first pediatrician _ever_ elected to Congress. I am very excited to share the news that two more Democratic women pediatricians are running for Congress, and with your help, they can win critical swing seats in November.

**I'm proud to endorse Dr. Yadira Caraveo running in Colorado's 8th District and Dr. Annie Andrews running in South Carolina's 1st District.**
* **Dr. Yadira Caraveo** is a pediatrician in Colorado who saw the struggles her patients' families faced and knew something had to be done. She decided to run for the state legislature and since taking office, she's focused on lowering the cost of prescription drugs, limiting toxic pollution that is endangering our childrens' health and planet, and ensuring all Coloradoans have access to paid family and sick leave. She's running for Congress in Colorado's new 8th Congressional District, which the _Cook Political Report_ has named a "toss-up."

* **Dr. Annie Andrews** is a pediatrician, Associate Professor of Pediatrics, and community advocate in South Carolina. She is a gun violence prevention researcher and active volunteer with Moms Demand Action, working to reduce pediatric firearm injuries and educate her community about gun safety. She's running for Congress in South Carolina's 1st Congressional District, which flipped red in 2020 in one of the closest races in the country.

**[Will you split a donation between Dr. Yadira Caraveo, Dr. Annie Andrews, and my campaign to send two more women pediatricians to Congress and defend our Democratic House majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41679462/329863502/-628399450?refcode=em22_220211_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220211_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWIxNTVkYS01NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TynqbIRVImfHNibl0rli_1T3-uqa_4_-KmdeitQazPk=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41679463/329863503/-628399450?refcode=em22_220211_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220211_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWIxNTVkYS01NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TynqbIRVImfHNibl0rli_1T3-uqa_4_-KmdeitQazPk=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41679464/329863504/-628399450?refcode=em22_220211_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220211_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWIxNTVkYS01NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TynqbIRVImfHNibl0rli_1T3-uqa_4_-KmdeitQazPk=)
---

In Congress, I know Dr. Caraveo and Dr. Andrews will join me in the work to make health care more affordable, lower the cost of prescription drugs, keep our communities safe from COVID-19 and our children safe from gun violence, and protect a woman’s right to make her own healthcare decisions. And with Republicans only five seats away from retaking the House, winning these swing seats in Colorado and South Carolina is critical to protecting our majority and the progress we've made.

But Dr. Caraveo and Dr. Andrews have tough fights ahead of them, and they need our support to ensure they have the resources to take on their Republican opponents and turn SC-01 and CO-08 blue this November.

**[If you're ready to send two more women doctors to Congress and protect our House majority, split a donation between Dr. Caraveo's, Dr. Andrews', and my campaign right away.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41679465/329863505/-628399450?refcode=em22_220211_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220211_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWIxNTVkYS01NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TynqbIRVImfHNibl0rli_1T3-uqa_4_-KmdeitQazPk=)**

Thank you,

Kim [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41679468/329863506/-628399450?refcode=em22_220211_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220211_mm1_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWIxNTVkYS01NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TynqbIRVImfHNibl0rli_1T3-uqa_4_-KmdeitQazPk=)

We need folks knocking doors, making calls, and stuffing envelopes - and that takes funding. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = The primary election is going to be close, Peter, and reaching out to voters to ensure they hear our message is absolutely crucial. =_ Thank you, Eddie Eddie Rodriguez is a community leader and public servant running to serve Texas' 35th District in Congress. =** If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . name: Cammack Research Team
subject: Is Biden America’s Trafficker-in-Chief?
body:
Biden’s open-border agenda is destroying America while cartels profit.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l7gumBXlVYNlNvh3EiPI4q-swJgb-q2xaNBDNT5_GvxRyQ_ehwK_9dTo3lR7HaSgh_e68MVzCZhevWejddpLIo8ZUn0-OgCIZ_d3ktpAOa_yCoD-aQEXMUzJfDGYxGu9-oSBktk8syc34GUJEy0TLXL-i1n8I7w1p-vjo2tdsP9LYugCfljsxaRKdq5DdehibRpPEjQtKpA=&c=m-fJ5KPkNMPASrrIFOnO0ouCbgDD7DrujF9SBpUPKc3rRuZXGlvYcw==&ch=BP25QIdIAHmG71XfmRdJqkF94Dx8V2nxUOLVy02d59ac95isoAYstg==)
---
| Friend,
Biden's open-border agenda is destroying America while cartels profit. Biden has created a system where if you are a member of the cartel, a trafficker, or a drug dealer; it's a great day in America for you.
Our southern border has been left completely wide-open for criminal organizations who flood our communities with fentanyl and heroin. The United States Border Patrol do what they can to stop the flow of illegal narcotics, but Biden consistently punishes border agents for doing their job.
Yet again, it seems Biden is putting America dead last when it comes to border security, but what do you think? [Is Biden the Commander-and-Chief or Trafficker-in-Chief of America?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l7gumBXlVYNlNvh3EiPI4q-swJgb-q2xaNBDNT5_GvxRyQ_ehwK_9dTo3lR7HaSgh_e68MVzCZhevWejddpLIo8ZUn0-OgCIZ_d3ktpAOa_yCoD-aQEXMUzJfDGYxGu9-oSBktk8syc34GUJEy0TLXL-i1n8I7w1p-vjo2tdsP9LYugCfljsxaRKdq5DdehibRpPEjQtKpA=&c=m-fJ5KPkNMPASrrIFOnO0ouCbgDD7DrujF9SBpUPKc3rRuZXGlvYcw==&ch=BP25QIdIAHmG71XfmRdJqkF94Dx8V2nxUOLVy02d59ac95isoAYstg==)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I'm no stranger to tough fights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Hi friend, I wanted to take a moment to thank you for being a part of this campaign.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41681778/329874093/-1829049351?refcode=jtk644-fr-nondonors&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWRhNmJiYi01YzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s5_bAcagj2YtDfgzy2SHmkvaBPPGKYECmI9HmLuYJmE=)
---
Hi friend, I wanted to take a moment to thank you for being a part of this campaign.
Because of your grassroots support, we've been able to reach voters across the Granite State, respond to GOP attacks, and hire organizers in every corner of the state.
But 2022 is shaping up to be a tough year for Democrats. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and he's laser-focused on New Hampshire. The GOP is doing whatever they can to beat me – flooding the Granite State's airwaves with attack ads and recruiting far-right candidates to run against me.
I'm no stranger to tough fights. My last race was decided by just 1,017 votes. **I know what it takes to win in a swing state like New Hampshire, but it's going to take all of us working together. **

name: Nina Turner
subject: Show me your donors and I’ll show you who you’ll fight for in Washington.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
When you’re running on a platform of making the wealthy pay their fair share, the establishment is going to fight back.
#

Hello Somebody!
I’ve often said: _Show me your donors, and I’ll show you who you’ll fight for in Washington._ So when folks ask me why I’m running for Congress, I point them to the very people backing this campaign.
I’m proud that since we launched this campaign, the most common occupations for our donors are teachers and nurses. And the most common employer is the USPS.
I’m in this fight for working people, not the millionaires and billionaires rigging the system against the rest of us.
But when you look at who’s funding our opposition, you’ll see exactly the people we’re committed to fighting against: big pharma reps, student loan servicers, Republican billionaires, corporate PACs, the works!
Sadly, I can’t say I’m surprised. When you’re running to take on the status quo and make the wealthy finally pay their fair share, the establishment is going to fight back – and fight back _hard._
**[As long as we stand together, there is no doubt in my mind that we are going to win. But it does mean that I have to ask. Can I count on you to make your FIRST donation to our campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41681842/329874215/1088907945?refcode2=6a1c5c25-5d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220211-1-t1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTFjNWMyNS01ZDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1AGrUnpCdfCt-hSG2IyHwLG_BRrUPjjuGGQnC6zmEU=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41681843/329874216/1088907945?refcode2=6a1c5c25-5d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220211-1-t1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTFjNWMyNS01ZDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1AGrUnpCdfCt-hSG2IyHwLG_BRrUPjjuGGQnC6zmEU=)**
I can’t tell you how proud I was to hear that **teachers** and **nurses** are two groups helping lead our movement to Congress. When it comes to reaching the goals that we set out to accomplish, nobody knows the value of an accessible and quality education, or the desperate need for Medicare For All, better than our teachers and nurses.
But the truth is, in order to win this race, we will need to have the financial resources to take on Wall Street, the insurance companies, the drug companies, and the fossil fuel industry.
And the ONLY way that’s going to happen is if ALL of us step up and get involved.
**[Please make a contribution to stand with our campaign today. We’re running a 100% people-powered campaign, so every donation makes a BIG difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41681844/329874217/1088907945?refcode2=6a1c5c25-5d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220211-1-t1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTFjNWMyNS01ZDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1AGrUnpCdfCt-hSG2IyHwLG_BRrUPjjuGGQnC6zmEU=)**
A single contribution can be so powerful in a race like ours — especially when thousands of others join in at the same time. That’s how we’ll stand up to big money. And that is how we’ll win.
With these hands,
Nina Turner
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41681845/329874218/1088907945?refcode2=6a1c5c25-5d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220211-1-t1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTFjNWMyNS01ZDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1AGrUnpCdfCt-hSG2IyHwLG_BRrUPjjuGGQnC6zmEU=)**

* * *
Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
---
Nina Turner for Us
PO Box 91956
Cleveland, OH 44101
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6f822b1e-5d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/6a1c5c25-5d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTFjNWMyNS01ZDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1AGrUnpCdfCt-hSG2IyHwLG_BRrUPjjuGGQnC6zmEU=&id=113311558) to unsubscribe.

Hi there,

**I just ran the numbers and we are _extremely_ short of our 2022 Membership goal.** I saw that Brian Mast reached out to you about the deadline and you have yet to respond.

I thought I would shoot my shot and let you know that**[I have extended the deadline for you to renew your membership to February 15th. Patriot, it’s Brian Mast.

Newt Gingrich emailed you.

Nicole Malliotakis emailed you.

Elise Stefanik emailed you.

Kevin McCarthy emailed you.

Donald Trump Jr. emailed you.

_**Now I’m emailing you.**_

There’s only a few days left in January and House Republicans need to finalize our membership lists for 2022. **Failure to renew by 11:59pm on January 31st will result in your membership being terminated permanently. **

1. You will be providing conservative candidates across the country the resources they need to go on offense and bring the fight to Democrats.
2. You will be showing your support for our plans to hold Joe Biden and Democrats accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be a critical piece of our House Republican team as we work to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi for good.

November’s election will be the most important election of my lifetime. With America in chaos under Joe Biden’s failed leadership, it’s up to Republicans in Congress to put America first and fight for the solutions to the problems that affect everyday Americans like you and me.

It’s simple: _We need patriots like you to step up and help us save America._ **[Your support today will ensure that we have the resources needed to wage this fight and to take back the House, so please make sure you renew your 2022 Membership NOW>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h6ej-1xsli-4qqlpo8/ "Your support today will ensure that we have the resources needed to wage this fight and to take back the House, so please make sure you renew your 2022 Membership NOW >>>")**

Happy Friday, Team New Deal!

Normally, we’d be gearing up to push our mid-month fundraising deadline on the 15th. But before the weekend officially starts, _**we have an even more pressing and urgent deadline request.**_

Monday the 14th is not just Valentine’s Day — it’s also the first day of early voting. Hundreds of Texans will be making up their minds and submitting their **final decision on whether to vote for Jessica Mason or not.**

Once votes start coming in, everything that matters to the working-class people in TX-30 is at stake. The future of our healthcare, our environment, our education system, our affordable housing, our food security, _and so much more _are all on the line.

**This weekend is our LAST CHANCE to reach key voters before they officially cast their ballots and the counting begins. We need clipboards, flyers, pens, waters, and other supplies to keep our small, scrappy team as fueled as possible while we knock on doors, make phone calls, and boost digital content. **

As we hustle through these next two days to energize voters on time, we need to know Jessica’s grassroots coalition is still strong and is fighting alongside us every step of the way to elect a true name: Glynda Carr
subject: Letitia James is the leader New York needs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Dear Peter,

I have dedicated my entire career to finding and uplifting progressive Black women who have the courage, passion, and track record to win and lead. I endorse women who refuse to be bought or intimidated by special interests.

That’s why Higher Heights for America is proud to endorse [**Letitia James for attorney general of New York. name: Wade Herring
subject: Acknowledging the past and looking forward to the future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
Friend -
Black History Month is an important time for everyone to examine America’s history, and with that understanding, resolve anew to work for a better future.
As a young boy growing up in Macon, segregation was sadly every day and commonplace. Downtown department stores still had separate restrooms and water fountains for people of color. Black people and white people lived separate and unequal lives.
School curriculum erased Black Americans’ contributions to our society and culture. One of my elementary school teachers proudly displayed a portrait of Robert E. Lee in her classroom and taught us the false story of the “Lost Cause.”
We need to honestly examine the good, the bad, and the ugly about our nation’s history, not deny it. With that knowledge, we can better understand our present and do the hard work necessary to make the present and future more inclusive for all of us.
With all her imperfections, America remains a place of hope and opportunity. Our nation has undoubtedly made progress since I was a boy, and yet, America still has promises to keep. I am running for Congress to build a better tomorrow, not to return to a yesterday that never was.
Black History means American History and all that it includes. In Georgia, that history encompasses music legends like Otis Redding and Little Richard from my hometown of Macon, and most importantly, the monumental events of the Civil Rights Movement that happened right here in the First District, including Savannah and Midway.
Now more than ever, it is important that we continue to advocate for equality and equity – whether we’re fighting for voting rights or ensuring that America’s full history is taught in our schools, teachers and parents working together as partners, without interference from politicians.
I hope you will join me in celebrating Black History Month by acknowledging the past and looking forward to the future. History has its eyes on us.
Sincerely,
Wade Herring
https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1 [https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1] https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1 [https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1] https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/]
www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [https://www.wadeherringforcongress.com/] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com

name: Latham Saddler
subject: Serious Times Require Serious Leadership
body:
Herschel Walker Isn't Showing Up
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| Fellow Patriot,
Serious times require serious leadership.
Each and every day, Raphael Warnock and his far-left supporters seek to lead us further down the river to socialism, where big government mandates control you, your business, and your children's education. We need to fight back, and it's going to require proven fighters to do it.
This past weekend [I spoke to the Cobb County GOP about the need to hold our leaders to a higher standard.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYK5ORwRvwdp_E7flDdsN1Vj20S7AUEnplWSGJ7LtMLFH1TCGc80mcMRohakvnXD-LpwQOnEP6lyuJiBAZwG4SrXNPrlUrzdrImj5P4OyXNFKZruXas8fpRhoekHM2LQ7ycdC8EyUWB6kk680OoaY4Ch8YnOshtFlmEtNUQGegmft5nKJvkvqiK5_bOp1jGNXAGa3H4vPuWsFnptScTx3P5fpYboDh2B1C3IgljFvG3k2JpBACXT2g==&c=WtXD24eXxdoc9zZdM02wDbF4__myOfPEvF-P9wCJrsyBV-T0Bs7oBg==&ch=aFnrF8sjoxwk1h1eqLw8KERbYi-2k4niXogIuQS2cVJy-Mhqopw71w==) I've always been my own man and I certainly won't be a politician that can be bought. I've made a vow that when I get to the United States Senate I'm going to speak the truth, no matter what, and make every decision through the vision of our founders and constitution.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYK5ORwRvwdp_E7flDdsN1Vj20S7AUEnplWSGJ7LtMLFH1TCGc80mcMRohakvnXDyeCnlum8InfofToqzUoPUPYcEg78MlZN4TVFsQCn272tEvbn4qtoUViMGQzTwj8xOWhCwR1gmRUCnanKxvDdwEIPwMOREvJMawC2nZJ7HEOY-j3InHQJ2g==&c=WtXD24eXxdoc9zZdM02wDbF4__myOfPEvF-P9wCJrsyBV-T0Bs7oBg==&ch=aFnrF8sjoxwk1h1eqLw8KERbYi-2k4niXogIuQS2cVJy-Mhqopw71w==)
---
| [Take 2 minutes to watch the end of my speech.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eYK5ORwRvwdp_E7flDdsN1Vj20S7AUEnplWSGJ7LtMLFH1TCGc80mcMRohakvnXDyeCnlum8InfofToqzUoPUPYcEg78MlZN4TVFsQCn272tEvbn4qtoUViMGQzTwj8xOWhCwR1gmRUCnanKxvDdwEIPwMOREvJMawC2nZJ7HEOY-j3InHQJ2g==&c=WtXD24eXxdoc9zZdM02wDbF4__myOfPEvF-P9wCJrsyBV-T0Bs7oBg==&ch=aFnrF8sjoxwk1h1eqLw8KERbYi-2k4niXogIuQS2cVJy-Mhqopw71w==)
---
| These aren't just the same empty words you might hear from candidates who talk a big game but don't show up. I have had the great honor of serving on the battlefield as a Navy SEAL officer, fighting every day to advance the America First agenda in the Trump White House, and traveling across the state talking to everyday Georgians. I hope you'll agree--I've proven that I'm ready to do the work and bring authentic leadership to Washington.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Georgia deserves a Senator who is going to show up and talk about their vision for our state and country and answer the hard questions from voters. We can't defeat Raphael Warnock by nominating someone doing his best impression of Joe Biden's Basement Strategy. While Herschel Walker avoids debates, interviews, and most importantly the voters, I show up every chance I get. If you've seen me, you've probably heard me tell you to ask me the hard questions. I mean it because I want to know what is on your hearts and minds, and it helps me prepare for the road ahead.
---

| As we inch closer to the Primary Election, we are preparing to get our message out to the masses. Now is the time to make sure you have everything you need to show your support as part of Team Latham and bring others on board. clean_body: Herschel Walker Isn't Showing Up | | | | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, Serious times require serious leadership. Each and every day, Raphael Warnock and his far-left supporters seek to lead us further down the river to socialism, where big government mandates control you, your business, and your children's education. We need to fight back, and it's going to require proven fighters to do it. This past weekend == I've always been my own man and I certainly won't be a politician that can be bought. I've made a vow that when I get to the United States Senate I'm going to speak the truth, no matter what, and make every decision through the vision of our founders and constitution. | == | == | These aren't just the same empty words you might hear from candidates who talk a big game but don't show up. I have had the great honor of serving on the battlefield as a Navy SEAL officer, fighting every day to advance the America First agenda in the Trump White House, and traveling across the state talking to everyday Georgians. I hope you'll agree--I've proven that I'm ready to do the work and bring authentic leadership to Washington. | | | | | Georgia deserves a Senator who is going to show up and talk about their vision for our state and country and answer the hard questions from voters. We can't defeat Raphael Warnock by nominating someone doing his best impression of Joe Biden's Basement Strategy. While Herschel Walker avoids debates, interviews, and most importantly the voters, I show up every chance I get. If you've seen me, you've probably heard me tell you to ask me the hard questions. I mean it because I want to know what is on your hearts and minds, and it helps me prepare for the road ahead. | | | | | == | | | == | == | | | == | | | == | == | | | As we inch closer to the Primary Election, we are preparing to get our message out to the masses. I'm so thankful to my wife, family and friends for all the support you continue to show me. I can't wait to get to Washington and fight for all of us! | | | | | Lastly, please share this email with your friends and family, and be sure to follow us on ==, ==, and ==. subject: My interview with Telemundo

body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Growing up, my parents and I used to watch the local Telemundo channel together. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=telemundo] Every morning we would watch the news and end the night with some telenovelas and a soccer game on the weekends. This television station was a part of my childhood.
So last week, I had the honor to be interviewed by Telemundo44 about my campaign. The experience was surreal, and it reminded me to be grateful for each opportunity that this campaign has allowed for me. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=telemundo]
My parents got to turn on Telemundo that night and watch me, a congressional candidate, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=telemundo] talk about my campaign and the need for representation in the Hispanic community in Virginia's 8th and beyond.
I'm thrilled that each of you are along for the ride with me, and I appreciate your continued support.
If you are fluent in Spanish, you can watch the interview by clicking below. We are currently in the process of getting an English transcript done and posted soon!

Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.

body:
I know you’re probably busy finishing up your work week, but I wanted to share some great news with you. | | |
---
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41683826/329882411/-2096412469?refcode=xxxxxxxx_em_fr_x_template_x&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc4OThhMy02NDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBMNrDnk2WMJICQhke4PWAZvgWQG69o9_z5zdU9EYZ4=)
---
| Listen, I know you’re probably busy finishing up your work week, but I wanted to share some incredible news with you. _PrimaryCast_ just declared me as the **_current front-runner in PA-18 with a 48% chance of winning_** – that’s amazing at this point of the race! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41683828/329882415/-2096412469?refcode=20220211_em_fr_b1_primarycast_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc4OThhMy02NDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBMNrDnk2WMJICQhke4PWAZvgWQG69o9_z5zdU9EYZ4=) But I still need to raise [_$986 before my End of Week deadline in 2 days,_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41683829/329882417/-2096412469?refcode=20220211_em_fr_b1_primarycast_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTc4OThhMy02NDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fBMNrDnk2WMJICQhke4PWAZvgWQG69o9_z5zdU9EYZ4=) and I can’t afford to slow down and lose this momentum. I have to knock on every door in the district, run more digital ads, and hire more incredible staff. name: Leader Kevin McCarthy
subject: Humbly requesting 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3h6vp--fgxr-4qqlpo8&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | This is Leader Kevin McCarthy. I’m humbly requesting 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers.
* Republicans are 5 seats away from the majority.
* A record 29 Democrats have retired so far.
* This cycle, we have some of the best GOP candidates I’ve ever seen.

I want to introduce you to 8 of the best:

Esther Joy King (IL-17)
Amanda Adkins (KS-03)
Bruce Poliquin (ME-02)
Ryan Zinke (MT-01)
Tom Kean Jr. (NJ-07)
Monica De La Cruz (TX-15)
Wesley Hunt (TX-38)
Derrick Van Orden (WI-03)

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h6vp-1xu2r-4qqlpo4/)
---

* 5 seats to take back the house
* 29 Dem retirements
* 8 tier 1 candidates who will crush their competition.

**The numbers are good.**

But we have one problem: These candidates need resources to go up against the liberal money machine.

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h6vp-1xu2s-4qqlpo5/)
---

As Republican Leader of the House, I am begging- will you chip in $10, $20, or anything you can give to help us ensure victory in the 2022 midterms? I will personally match every dollar you give for the next hour:

---
| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h6vp-1xu2t-4qqlpo6/)
---

Thank you,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h6vp-1xu2u-4qqlpo7/)
---
Leader Kevin McCarthy

---
**A note from Kevin:**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h6vp-1xu2v-4qqlpo8/ "Kevin McCarthy urgently needs YOU to take action")
---

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- **[ EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h6vp-1xu2w-4qqlpo9/ "EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>")**

The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy
Leader, House Republicans

I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- "EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>" The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started. name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Parents: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Wisconsin liberals say what they really think! _Peter,_ When the Democrats tell you **what they really think, ****we should listen to them!** Today, Wisconsin Rep. Lee Snodgrass made national news for a tweet she sent, then defended, then deleted, that sums up the Democrats' true core belief about education. [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhuljy-yuhdluddtl-r/) [Join the Fight - WIN for Parents! >>>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhuljy-yuhdluddtl-y/) Democrats have been tripping all over themselves today to pretend that they don't really believe what Rep. Snodgrass said.
* But they did just lose an election in Virginia when their candidate said** "I don't think parents should be telling schools what they should teach."**
* The Biden administration did label parents as **" domestic terrorists."**
* And they did side with liberal unions over parents and taxpayers for decades.

**Are we going to let the Democrats get away with disrespecting parents?** In Congress, I proudly signed on to the Parents' Bill of Rights to demand that parents are heard from, giving parents transparency into their kids' curriculum to know what's happening in the classroom.I also introduced the CRT transparency act to give parents the ability to fight back against divisive and inaccurate lessons making their way into our classrooms. **[If you're with me, click here to join me and stand up for parents!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhuljy-yuhdluddtl-j/)** [Show the Democrats how WRONG THEY ARE! >>>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhuljy-yuhdluddtl-t/) Thank you, Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhuljy-yuhdluddtl-h/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhuljy-yuhdluddtl-k/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhuljy-yuhdluddtl-u/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhuljy-yuhdluddtl-o/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41685205/329887924/1755688436?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220211courtvbm_dhq_90da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjFkYmI2NC02NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWwCFaTNL5VY1Et6hiujoluobhufb_KrKp66AxwzOY0=&emci=0241495e-678b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=db1dbb64-678b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=13185894)

_Chris speaking at a 'Stop the Fraudit' protest_
The Pennsylvania GOP, however? They’ve done a complete 180 on mail voting in the last 3 years.
In 2019, they stood behind _Act 77_ — a critical bipartisan law that gave every PA voter the ability to request a mail-in ballot to vote. And in 2020, the GOP-controlled legislature again supported vote by mail to allow people to safely and securely cast their ballots during the pandemic.
But since Democrats won the state in 2020, the radical right has fought vote by mail ... all the way up to the Commonwealth Court, which struck down the mail voting law. (Fortunately, the PA Supreme Court has put that decision on hold.)
Why the change of course? Because the right wing knows their policies are deeply unpopular across the Commonwealth, and higher voter turnout means they’re more likely to lose.
**We must elect leaders like Chris — who’ll fight for our rights in Congress and work to end the roll back of some of our most basic rights.**
[**Add your name now to our voting rights petition to show your support for the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ and the _Freedom to Vote Act_.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41685206/329887925/1755688436?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220211courtvbm_dhq_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjFkYmI2NC02NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWwCFaTNL5VY1Et6hiujoluobhufb_KrKp66AxwzOY0=&emci=0241495e-678b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=db1dbb64-678b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=13185894)
Thanks for standing with us in support of our democracy.
Team Deluzio

__ | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. name: Gary Black
subject: It's time for Herschel to stop hiding
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8271806be3f0d365/9c2022d50f8b503cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — Normally on Fridays, we send out a newsletter with campaign updates. Today, however, I need to share something a little different.**

---
Questions have continued to pile up about Herschel Walker — about his past violent episodes, run-ins with law enforcement, and his positions on the issues. I will not sit back and wait to see what happens here. **[Just yesterday, the Associated Press ran this shocking story, which I hope you’ll read here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8271806be3f0d365/9ed11057a752dea7c3d6b838967d376c/37793)** In response, today I called on Herschel Walker to do three things:
1. Answer questions about the issues, as well as about his past.

2. Commit to **three Republican primary debates.

**
3. Open his campaign events — which have thus far been kept secret — to the public.

[**Video of my remarks can be viewed here or below.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8271806be3f0d365/31a62935f551b4cbc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8271806be3f0d365/43958dc29c2c3361c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
It’s not my job to say whether these issues are disqualifying. That’s the voters’ job. **However, this is a conversation we must have NOW, before the Republican primary in May. ** If Herschel Walker spends the next three months hiding, avoiding debates, and ignoring tough questions, the Democrats and the media will force this conversation in the general election. And, folks, that will jeopardize the entire Republican ticket in Georgia, as well as winning back the U.S. Senate majority. **No matter how much we like Herschel the football legend, we must ask tough questions of Herschel Walker the candidate and expect honest answers.** Period.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8271806be3f0d365/e4ae9cd15b23dadbc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black
---
[**WATCH HERE »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8271806be3f0d365/b1b6acb0580fb449c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8271806be3f0d365/338272e5c424afbfc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/8271806be3f0d365/93f1b19e73c09ecec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=8271806be3f0d365&d=d645d33da25e0e2ac3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=8271806be3f0d365).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---
PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.

name: Val Demings
subject: as of 1:30 p.m.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
What happens in Florida will decide Senate control
| |
---
Friend, I'm thrilled to share some great news:

Even with far-right outside groups dumping millions into Florida and GOP leaders like the chair of the RNC attacking me _personally_ , **the polls show me neck and neck with Marco Rubio.**
**But here's the problem:** This is shaping up to be the most expensive Senate race in history, and national Republicans are about to start their first attack ad blitz against me. Floridians will be hammered with lies when they turn on their TVs – and I know this barrage is just the beginning of what's in store.
What happens in Florida will decide Senate control, so Republicans and their dark money allies will do everything they possibly can to defeat me. **And right now, my fundraising numbers are stalling at the worst possible moment. ****As of 1:30 p.m., I'm still $15,000 short of tonight's midnight grassroots goal. **

**I'm getting worried that I won't have enough resources to counter the GOP's lies without an urgent groundswell of grassroots support. **
[**So with the Senate majority on the line, I have to ask again before my critical midnight deadline: Will you rush $5 or more right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41685597/329889681/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2250-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2VmZWE0Yi02OThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HCtRrdrBAWpaG9rkYtPKs8PwQY0i8MR0Zzhl71vl0d8=)
Thank you for your support. It means so much to me.

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41685598/329889682/-890400302?recurring=0&refcode=jtk2250-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2VmZWE0Yi02OThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HCtRrdrBAWpaG9rkYtPKs8PwQY0i8MR0Zzhl71vl0d8=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. clean_body: What happens in Florida will decide Senate control | | Friend, I'm thrilled to share some great news: Even with far-right outside groups dumping millions into Florida and GOP leaders like the chair of the RNC attacking me personally , the polls show me neck and neck with Marco Rubio. But here's the problem: This is shaping up to be the most expensive Senate race in history, and national Republicans are about to start their first attack ad blitz against me. Floridians will be hammered with lies when they turn on their TVs – and I know this barrage is just the beginning of what's in store. What happens in Florida will decide Senate control, so Republicans and their dark money allies will do everything they possibly can to defeat me. And right now, my fundraising numbers are stalling at the worst possible moment. As of 1:30 p.m., I'm still $15,000 short of tonight's midnight grassroots goal. I'm getting worried that I won't have enough resources to counter the GOP's lies without an urgent groundswell of grassroots support. = Thank you for your support. It means so much to me. Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. name: Team McGrath
subject: Lies, fear, hysteria. Rinse & repeat.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’re taking a pragmatic approach.

| Deb’s Republican opponent, Derrick Van Orden, is using the opioid and fentanyl crisis to stoke fear and demonize undocumented immigrants.

**His solution to the crisis?** Divert our resources to the southern border to reduce illegal border crossings.

**The only problem?** That will do nothing to stop fentanyl from entering the country and stem the tide of deadly overdoses.

Thousands of people are dying preventable deaths from opioid overdoses. **We need proven solutions that help end this crisis.** Not fear-mongering politicians using the same failed policies from the failed war on drugs.

[**If you are ready for a Congresswoman who cares about solving problems instead of scoring political points, help send Deb to Congress by pitching in $25 now >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41685695/329890167/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.c9cf2013-6a8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.c9cf2013-6a8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWNmMjAxMy02YThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YpvbBrWHOAoVEUabBHsEnWSYjC0tlgkmSDBgBYsNRJQ=)

Since President Nixon declared a War on Drugs in 1971, the United States has failed to curtail the flow of heroin, cocaine, methamphetamines, and now fentanyl across our borders despite spending more than one trillion dollars on the effort.

While Derrick Van Orden is preoccupied with blaming immigrants, low-income communities, and those with substance abuse disorders, Deb is focused on proven solutions to this public-health crisis.

Solutions like treatment programs to break the cycle of addiction, good-paying jobs to build up our communities, Narcan to prevent overdose deaths, and early intervention as a general health care practice.

Derrick Van Orden cares about fear-mongering - Deb cares about real solutions.

We need Deb in Congress to fight for comprehensive health care reform that will tackle the opioid crisis.

Here on Team McGrath, we focus on realistic solutions and serious problem-solving. And we know our grassroots team is too. [**Help us elect a champion for serious health care reform. Donate $25 or whatever works for you today clean_body: We’re taking a pragmatic approach. | Deb’s Republican opponent, Derrick Van Orden, is using the opioid and fentanyl crisis to stoke fear and demonize undocumented immigrants. His solution to the crisis? Divert our resources to the southern border to reduce illegal border crossings. The only problem? That will do nothing to stop fentanyl from entering the country and stem the tide of deadly overdoses. Thousands of people are dying preventable deaths from opioid overdoses. We need proven solutions that help end this crisis. Not fear-mongering politicians using the same failed policies from the failed war on drugs. = Since President Nixon declared a War on Drugs in 1971, the United States has failed to curtail the flow of heroin, cocaine, methamphetamines, and now fentanyl across our borders despite spending more than one trillion dollars on the effort. While Derrick Van Orden is preoccupied with blaming immigrants, low-income communities, and those with substance abuse disorders, Deb is focused on proven solutions to this public-health crisis. Solutions like treatment programs to break the cycle of addiction, good-paying jobs to build up our communities, Narcan to prevent overdose deaths, and early intervention as a general health care practice. Derrick Van Orden cares about fear-mongering - Deb cares about real solutions. We need Deb in Congress to fight for comprehensive health care reform that will tackle the opioid crisis. Here on Team McGrath, we focus on realistic solutions and serious problem-solving. And we know our grassroots team is too. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = Thank you for your support, Team McGrath | Deb McGrath is an Army Veteran, former CIA officer, and mother of three running for Congress in WI-03. She’s fighting for affordable health care, good-paying jobs, and common prosperity. Deb served our country for over four decades from all over the world. Now she’s being called to serve her hometown and western Wisconsin in Congress. This campaign runs on the support from folks like you. = | **=** **=** Learn more at: Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 41, Menomonie, WI 54751 Use of Deb McGrath's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform (or that of others) does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army, the Central Intelligence Agency, or any other branch of government. BREAKING: MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE ENDORSES JD VANCE

"JD Vance is the conservative warrior that the entire America
First Movement needs fighting for us in the US Senate"
- Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene

Peter,

I am beyond proud to officially endorse JD Vance for U.S. Senator
for Ohio.

At this pivotal moment in America, we need courageous patriots
like JD Vance fighting for us. JD understands what we are up
against and he is not afraid to stand up as a proud conservative.
He will ALWAYS fight against the woke authoritarianism our
opponents want to impose.

JD is a true America First Patriot who puts people over
politicians and believes in TAKING ACTION, rather than just
talking a big game on television. I have no doubt he will always
be a proud warrior for our America First values in Washington.

Subject: Wisconsin is Ground Zero for the MAGA Effort
