I’m not just talking about voter suppression and gerrymandering. subject: I'm asking you directly, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Democrats can't keep Senate control without your help.
| | |
---
Friend,

Mitch McConnell only needs to flip _one seat_ to retake the Senate and roll back every bit of progress Democrats have made for working families. If we're going to stop him from regaining control, we need to build a grassroots movement powerful enough to fuel Democratic victories across the country.
**That's** **why this is so important:_ _** The DSCC just launched a brand-new, one-stop hub where supporters like you can learn all about the candidates running in crucial battleground races, volunteer to support them and directly donate to their campaigns – including Catherine Cortez Masto right here in Nevada.
With everything from reproductive freedom to affordable health care on the line, the stakes of this fight are too high to sit on the sidelines. The only way Democrats can withstand the GOP's attacks and win is with _your_ help – and the DSCC's new command center makes it easier than ever to get involved.

**So, friend, I'm asking you directly:[Will you click here to head over to the DSCC's new grassroots hub and join our fight – so we can protect Senate control, expand our Democratic majority and keep McConnell out of power?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41685994/329891551/-1571189763?refcode=jtk1631-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzBmOTExYS02YzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IB23tSpAtQBBDhazIPZmeka10IvHnVWw6-jXaKtfsN8=&emci=bdd3b395-db8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=e70f911a-6c8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=3800590)**

https://www.delinadisanto.com/ [https://www.delinadisanto.com/]In case you need another reason why David Schweikert needs to be removed from office, look no further than his ethics violation.
As a quick summary, Schweikert violated 11 ethics rules — ranging from misusing just under $300,000 in campaign funds as a personal tab, pressuring his taxpayer funded staff members to campaign for him, and dodged and lied to the committee during the investigation.
David Schweikert has consistently proven that he does not put Arizonans first, whether it be through his ethics violations or voting record. He has violated his oath, abused his power, and broken our trust. It’s time we remove him from office in November.
That’s why Delina is running for Congress in Arizona's first congressional district. She understands the growing distrust that Americans have in their politicians. Through a bipartisan, pragmatic approach, Delina will help find solutions to the problems facing working Arizonans.

Hello,
When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful.
People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ **I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened.**
They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service.
**And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other.**
This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue.
**In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – every dollar you can afford before our midnight deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41686424/329893702/-42398318?refcode=em20220211mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2M5ZWFkMS02YzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=13TDqcsccss3WqvMOWOeRLA7DZx5JwhdEwVwZ9kT29s=)

subject: Onward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
I want to extend my congratulations to those of you... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indgop/onward?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Onward_**
---
|
---
_File Photo:**Chairman Kyle Hupfer** (C) stands with**Rep. Jim Baird** (IN-04) (L) and**Rep. Larry Bucshon** (IN-08) (R) at the 2020 Congress of Counties. _
| I want to extend my congratulations to those of you who took the first step toward Nov. 8, 2022, and filed your candidacy to be on the primary ballot in early May. Being a candidate for office takes time and energy—time knocking on doors, attending community events, developing campaign materials, sitting down for interviews, and so much more—all in the name of bettering your community, and of course, without guaranteed success.

But the good news is that the Indiana Republican Party has _just_ the event for you that will make you an even better candidate and show you how to use your time and energy as effectively as possible—the 2022 Congress of Counties. This two-day training event will feature breakout sessions with some of the top insiders on a variety of topics like launching a campaign, fundraising, data analytics, social media, and more. Plus, you'll have the opportunity to network with hundreds of dedicated Republicans from across the state and see what campaign strategies they're undertaking to ensure success at the ballot box.

You can find more information about the event [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=79a467c8f7&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Onward to primary day (and the 2022 Congress of Counties)!

Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend.

Best,

Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| **_Honoring Teresa Lubbers_**
---
|
---
_**Gov. Holcomb** speaks at **Teresa Lubbers'** final address as Indiana's Commissioner for Higher Education._
|
---
_**Gov. Holcomb** presents **Teresa Lubbers** , Commissioner of the Indiana Commission for Higher Education, with a Sagamore of the Wabash. _
| On Tuesday, **Gov. Holcomb** joined Teresa Lubbers, Indiana's Commissioner for Higher Education, at her tenth and final State of Higher Education address where he presented her with a Sagamore of the Wabash for her 13 years of service dedicated to bettering educational opportunities and outcomes for Hoosiers. _"[Teresa] has been tenacious, fearless, creative and innovative throughout her career and she's done it with class every single day. I was honored to present her with a Sagamore of the Wabash."_ — **Gov. Eric Holcomb **
---
|
---
| **_WATCH: Chairman Kyle Hupfer Speaks at RNC Winter Meeting_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8b4be8f4c2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
_**Chairman Kyle Hupfer** delivers the General Counsel's Report at the 2022 RNC Winter Meeting._
| **Chairman Kyle Hupfer** , who also serves as the general counsel of the Republican National Committee (RNC), delivered the General Counsel's Report last Friday at the RNC's Winter Meeting in Salt Lake City, Utah.

In his remarks, he notes the achievements of the RNC's legal team, including stopping Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandate and fighting against non-citizen voting in New York and Vermont.

You can watch his full remarks by clicking **above**.
---
|
---
| **_Our Newest State Senator - District 47_**
---
|
---
_**Chairman Kyle Hupfer (L)** and **Harrison County Republican Party Chairman Scott Fluhr**_** (R) **stand with **_Gary Byrne_ (C), **Indiana's newest state senator for the 47th district._ _
| **Chairman Kyle Hupfer** released the following statement after the completion of the caucus to replace Erin Houchin in Senate District 47: “Congratulations to **Gary Byrne **on his caucus victory tonight to become Indiana's newest state senator. “Hoosiers in the 47th district will certainly be well-represented by **Gary **in the statehouse, and I look forward to the work he will undertake as part of our strong Republican team delivering results for all Hoosiers."
---
|
---
| **_ICYMI: Illegal Migrants Using Arrest Warrants as ID_**
---
| There’s been another _startling _development in the Biden Administration’s disastrous attempt at securing our southern border:
**The Transportation Security Administration (TSA) is allowing illegal migrants to use arrest warrants as a valid form of identification to travel throughout the country.**
Late last month, a TSA spokesperson confirmed the practice stating, "For non-citizens ... who do not otherwise have acceptable forms of ID for presentation at security checkpoints, **TSA may also accept certain DHS-issued forms, including ICE Form I-200 (Warrant for Arrest of an Alien).** ”
---
| [Continue Reading](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c64a35441b&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Continue Reading")
---
|
---
| **_Legislative Session Midpoint_**
---
| This past Monday marked the midpoint of the Indiana General Assembly's legislative session.

During the second half of the session, bills passed by their chamber of origin will switch chambers and begin the process again before they have the opportunity to go before the governor and be signed into law.

Bills leaving the Senate: **161**
Bills leaving the House: **104**

Visit [iga.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=000f53dd8f&e=1acd9bb3d6) to stay up-to-date on the latest legislative developments.
---
|
---
| _**2022 Congress of Counites**_
---
|
---
| Registration is**still open** for the Indiana Republican Party's 2022 Congress of Counties!

This two-day training event for Republican Party leaders, candidates, and grassroots activists is scheduled for Friday, February 25 through Saturday, February 26, 2022, at the historic French Lick Resort in French Lick, Ind.

**Thankfully** , general admission for the event was _not impacted_ by **Bidenflation** and remains at $100 per person.

You'll want to experience the 2022 Congress of Counties to kick off the election season, meet Indiana’s top Republican elected officials, and learn more about critical election topics to help you and your county party**win** and keep Indiana on the **right** track.

_**Overnight Accommodations Update**_
* Our special rate room block at _French Lick Resort_ is **sold out**.
* There is **no vacancy** at either _French Lick Resort_ or _West Baden Hotel_.
* Our room block at _Best Western Plus_ is **sold out**.
* We have **a limited room block** at _ Comfort Suites._ _Please note: Once the rooms are taken, they are completely sold out._ You can call 812-788-7018 to book your reservation and inform the booking agent that you are with the Indiana Republican Party Congress of Counties. The hotel is located at 9530 W State Rd. 56, French Lick, IN.

_**> > The last day to register is Monday, February 21—don't miss out! <<**_
---

clean_body: I want to extend my congratulations to those of you... | | | | | | | Onward | File Photo:Chairman Kyle Hupfer (C) stands withRep. Jim Baird (IN-04) (L) andRep. Larry Bucshon (IN-08) (R) at the 2020 Congress of Counties. | I want to extend my congratulations to those of you who took the first step toward Nov. 8, 2022, and filed your candidacy to be on the primary ballot in early May. Being a candidate for office takes time and energy—time knocking on doors, attending community events, developing campaign materials, sitting down for interviews, and so much more—all in the name of bettering your community, and of course, without guaranteed success. But the good news is that the Indiana Republican Party has just the event for you that will make you an even better candidate and show you how to use your time and energy as effectively as possible—the 2022 Congress of Counties. This two-day training event will feature breakout sessions with some of the top insiders on a variety of topics like launching a campaign, fundraising, data analytics, social media, and more. Plus, you'll have the opportunity to network with hundreds of dedicated Republicans from across the state and see what campaign strategies they're undertaking to ensure success at the ballot box. You can find more information about the event . Onward to primary day (and the 2022 Congress of Counties)! Enjoy this week's newsletter and share it with a friend. Best, Chairman Kyle Hupfer | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | Honoring Teresa Lubbers | Gov. Holcomb speaks at Teresa Lubbers' final address as Indiana's Commissioner for Higher Education. | Gov. Holcomb presents Teresa Lubbers , Commissioner of the Indiana Commission for Higher Education, with a Sagamore of the Wabash. | On Tuesday, Gov. Holcomb joined Teresa Lubbers, Indiana's Commissioner for Higher Education, at her tenth and final State of Higher Education address where he presented her with a Sagamore of the Wabash for her 13 years of service dedicated to bettering educational opportunities and outcomes for Hoosiers. "[Teresa] has been tenacious, fearless, creative and innovative throughout her career and she's done it with class every single day. I was honored to present her with a Sagamore of the Wabash." — Gov. Eric Holcomb | | WATCH: Chairman Kyle Hupfer Speaks at RNC Winter Meeting | Chairman Kyle Hupfer delivers the General Counsel's Report at the 2022 RNC Winter Meeting. | Chairman Kyle Hupfer , who also serves as the general counsel of the Republican National Committee (RNC), delivered the General Counsel's Report last Friday at the RNC's Winter Meeting in Salt Lake City, Utah. In his remarks, he notes the achievements of the RNC's legal team, including stopping Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandate and fighting against non-citizen voting in New York and Vermont. You can watch his full remarks by clicking above. | | Our Newest State Senator - District 47 | Chairman Kyle Hupfer (L) and Harrison County Republican Party Chairman Scott Fluhr (R) stand with Gary Byrne (C), Indiana's newest state senator for the 47th district. | Chairman Kyle Hupfer released the following statement after the completion of the caucus to replace Erin Houchin in Senate District 47: “Congratulations to Gary Byrne on his caucus victory tonight to become Indiana's newest state senator. “Hoosiers in the 47th district will certainly be well-represented by Gary in the statehouse, and I look forward to the work he will undertake as part of our strong Republican team delivering results for all Hoosiers." | | ICYMI: Illegal Migrants Using Arrest Warrants as ID | There’s been another startling development in the Biden Administration’s disastrous attempt at securing our southern border: The Transportation Security Administration (TSA) is allowing illegal migrants to use arrest warrants as a valid form of identification to travel throughout the country. Late last month, a TSA spokesperson confirmed the practice stating, "For non-citizens ... who do not otherwise have acceptable forms of ID for presentation at security checkpoints, TSA may also accept certain DHS-issued forms, including ICE Form I-200 (Warrant for Arrest of an Alien). ” | "Continue Reading" | | Legislative Session Midpoint | This past Monday marked the midpoint of the Indiana General Assembly's legislative session. During the second half of the session, bills passed by their chamber of origin will switch chambers and begin the process again before they have the opportunity to go before the governor and be signed into law. Bills leaving the Senate: 161 Bills leaving the House: 104 Visit to stay up-to-date on the latest legislative developments. | | 2022 Congress of Counites | | Registration isstill open for the Indiana Republican Party's 2022 Congress of Counties! This two-day training event for Republican Party leaders, candidates, and grassroots activists is scheduled for Friday, February 25 through Saturday, February 26, 2022, at the historic French Lick Resort in French Lick, Ind. Thankfully , general admission for the event was not impacted by Bidenflation and remains at $100 per person. You'll want to experience the 2022 Congress of Counties to kick off the election season, meet Indiana’s top Republican elected officials, and learn more about critical election topics to help you and your county partywin and keep Indiana on the right track. Overnight Accommodations Update Our special rate room block at French Lick Resort is sold out. There is no vacancy at either French Lick Resort or West Baden Hotel. Our room block at Best Western Plus is sold out. We have a limited room block at Comfort Suites. Please note: Once the rooms are taken, they are completely sold out. You can call 812-788-7018 to book your reservation and inform the booking agent that you are with the Indiana Republican Party Congress of Counties. subject: Fwd: Roy’s calling for a nonpartisan redistricting commission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
North Carolinians deserve fair representation. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687022/329896025/823540626?refcode=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIzMzU1Mi02ZDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eQ8IqOFbP3loEhcNI9AgY8Q8I6aZ6wIPXmCYCn_cRTg=&emci=124dd838-a28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Did you see Roy’s message from the other day, Peter? If we’re going to ensure that every single North Carolinian is fairly represented in Raleigh and in Washington, we HAVE to end the GOP’s legacy of ultra-partisan gerrymandering. That starts with creating a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission for North Carolina. **[If you’re with Roy, sign on to support a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission today>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687023/329896027/1055395322?refcode=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIzMzU1Mi02ZDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eQ8IqOFbP3loEhcNI9AgY8Q8I6aZ6wIPXmCYCn_cRTg=&emci=124dd838-a28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)** Thanks so much! Team Cooper
**Begin forwarded message:**
To: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
From: Roy Cooper
Date: February 8, 2022 9:01AM
Subject: I’m calling for a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission in North Carolina. Will you join me, Peter?
> You deserve to know that your vote counts the same as any other, Peter. That’s how our democracy is supposed to work — one person, one vote, where all of us have an equal say in our government. But partisan gerrymandering tactics ensure that some votes count more than others. Peter, redistricting should not be used for partisan advantage. Last week, the North Carolina Supreme Court ruled that the congressional and legislative maps drawn by Republican legislative leaders in Raleigh are an unconstitutional gerrymander. A healthy democracy requires free and fair elections. That’s why I want North Carolina to establish a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission to ensure that future legislative maps accurately reflect the political reality of our state and fairly represent all our people. **[Our democracy is on the line. Sign my petition today to stand with me and call for a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687024/329896029/1055395322?refcode=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIzMzU1Mi02ZDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eQ8IqOFbP3loEhcNI9AgY8Q8I6aZ6wIPXmCYCn_cRTg=&emci=124dd838-a28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687026/329896031/1055395322?refcode=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIzMzU1Mi02ZDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eQ8IqOFbP3loEhcNI9AgY8Q8I6aZ6wIPXmCYCn_cRTg=&emci=124dd838-a28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
> ---
> Here in North Carolina, the Republicans gerrymandered our district maps in 2010 and 2020 so blatantly that the maps got thrown out. It’s egregious partisanship on display for all to see, and we have to put an end to it.
> **[Will you join me in the fight? Sign my petition today to call for a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission for North Carolina>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687027/329896036/1055395322?refcode=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIzMzU1Mi02ZDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eQ8IqOFbP3loEhcNI9AgY8Q8I6aZ6wIPXmCYCn_cRTg=&emci=124dd838-a28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)**
> Thanks for standing with me,
> Roy
> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687029/329896037/435245919?refcode=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIzMzU1Mi02ZDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eQ8IqOFbP3loEhcNI9AgY8Q8I6aZ6wIPXmCYCn_cRTg=)
> [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687031/329896039/435245919?refcode=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIzMzU1Mi02ZDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eQ8IqOFbP3loEhcNI9AgY8Q8I6aZ6wIPXmCYCn_cRTg=)

> [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687035/329896041/435245919?recurring=true&refcode=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.57233552-6d8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzIzMzU1Mi02ZDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eQ8IqOFbP3loEhcNI9AgY8Q8I6aZ6wIPXmCYCn_cRTg=)

body:
| **DESPITE** our Senate Majority hinging on Raphael Warnock’s re-election race...
**DESPITE** the entire Republican Party trying to destroy Senator Warnock...
**& DESPITE** asking for your support _EVERY. SINGLE. DAY...._ [**We’re STILL desperately behind on our goal to support Democrats like Sen. Warnock and need YOUR help to catch up! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5723?t=6&akid=1250%2E878179%2EP0aHGD) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5723?t=7&akid=1250%2E878179%2EP0aHGD) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [URGENT DEADLINE: Chip in $5 to help fund our campaign to save Democrats like Raphael Warnock »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5724?t=8&akid=1250%2E878179%2EP0aHGD)
---
Look, you know what's at risk if Raphael Warnock loses re-election.

**If we don’t raise another $34,816 by midnight tomorrow to support Democrats like Sen. Warnock,_MAGA Republicans will STEAL our Senate Majority._**

Mitch McConnell, Ted Cruz, and Josh Hawley will have their dreams come TRUE with the opportunity to destroy health care, Social Security, and voting rights!

_And the state of this race has Republicans jumping for JOY:_

❌ Republicans are ahead in the polls.
❌ They have all the dark money they could ask for.
❌ They have a huge chip on their shoulder from last year.
[**But they don’t have you. Please, DO NOT sit this one out! Chip in $5 to SAVE Democrats like Sen. Warnock and help us LOCK-IN our Senate majority »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5723?t=9&akid=1250%2E878179%2EP0aHGD)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1250%2E878179%2EP0aHGD). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1250%2E878179%2EP0aHGD).**

name: Spanberger Field Team
subject: We’d like to introduce ourselves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uMK906h8t7WuxfJ3C_m1J-vHozbNXkcinpGgTd_B-XY=/xo0SVQ8FcNW4ulYW5PmKziOi-Va_TsKNQIBFSSrr4-M=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220211-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Hi Peter,

Our names are Savannah and Joe, and we just joined Team Spanberger as Field Organizers in counties that are new to the 7th District! We both call Virginia's new 7th district home, and we're beyond excited to join such an important race!

We're eager to talk about Abigail's work in Congress and the values and vision that drive her every day! **Your support enables us to organize events, send folks out to knock on doors, and introduce Abigail 's work to new voters.**

Now that it's Election Year, our efforts are ramping up, and we can't wait to see our plans take off with your help. Our ask is this: [_**Will you make a contribution to our campaign today? Your investment fuels our outreach efforts, and we have a lot of exciting work ahead of us!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/uMK906h8t7WuxfJ3C_m1J-vHozbNXkcinpGgTd_B-XY=/xo0SVQ8FcNW4ulYW5PmKziOi-Va_TsKNQIBFSSrr4-M=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220211-1-EM&amount=25)

name: Nikki Fried
subject: No low is too low for Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Hasn’t he done enough?!

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687549/329898473/-1468176026?refcode=211education&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzdjMDJlNC02ZThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6FePGNcn8U4Up6ASj-c8nKDhyMggKWkWoAY5FpKqjxM=) Peter, The Florida legislative session is in full swing, and it’s getting hard to keep track of the sheer number of terrible policies Ron DeSantis is trying to force on our state. So today, I want to draw your attention to three bills making their way through the legislature right now:
* **SB 7044:** A bill that makes colleges and universities seek their own accreditation
* **SB 1834:** The Senate’s version of the “Don’t Say Gay” bill, banning discussions about sexual orientation in school
* **HB 7:** The “Stop W.O.K.E.” act that allows parents to sue schools that teach topics that make them “uncomfortable” — aimed at ending discussion of slavery and racism in our classrooms

To make a long story short, Ron DeSantis and his GOP allies are dead-set on attacking our education system, censoring students and teachers, and instilling their own bigotry and hatred into a system meant to benefit young people — not hold them back. **And if we leave them unchecked — if we don’t defeat DeSantis and put the veto pen in the hands of someone who gives a damn about Florida students and families — this is just the beginning of the damage they’ll do. ** [**We can’t let that happen, Peter. Help me defeat DeSantis and put an end to his attack on Florida education. Click here to chip in $10 before the weekend.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687550/329898474/-1468176026?refcode=211education&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzdjMDJlNC02ZThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6FePGNcn8U4Up6ASj-c8nKDhyMggKWkWoAY5FpKqjxM=) **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately._ | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687551/329898476/-1468176026?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=211education&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzdjMDJlNC02ZThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6FePGNcn8U4Up6ASj-c8nKDhyMggKWkWoAY5FpKqjxM=) | [$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687552/329898479/-1468176026?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=211education&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzdjMDJlNC02ZThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6FePGNcn8U4Up6ASj-c8nKDhyMggKWkWoAY5FpKqjxM=) | [$20](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687555/329898480/-1468176026?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=211education&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzdjMDJlNC02ZThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6FePGNcn8U4Up6ASj-c8nKDhyMggKWkWoAY5FpKqjxM=)

clean_body: Hasn’t he done enough?! = Peter, The Florida legislative session is in full swing, and it’s getting hard to keep track of the sheer number of terrible policies Ron DeSantis is trying to force on our state. So today, I want to draw your attention to three bills making their way through the legislature right now: SB 7044: A bill that makes colleges and universities seek their own accreditation SB 1834: The Senate’s version of the “Don’t Say Gay” bill, banning discussions about sexual orientation in school HB 7: The “Stop W.O.K.E.” act that allows parents to sue schools that teach topics that make them “uncomfortable” — aimed at ending discussion of slavery and racism in our classrooms To make a long story short, Ron DeSantis and his GOP allies are dead-set on attacking our education system, censoring students and teachers, and instilling their own bigotry and hatred into a system meant to benefit young people — not hold them back. And if we leave them unchecked — if we don’t defeat DeSantis and put the veto pen in the hands of someone who gives a damn about Florida students and families — this is just the beginning of the damage they’ll do. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Let’s be real here — a Governor who cares about students and families shouldn’t be something new. It should be a given that any leader with the power to help our students thrive would do everything they could to make it happen. But with DeSantis in the Governor’s office, nothing is sacred. Whether it’s hindering our students, hurting our environment, or attacking our constitutional rights, no low is too low for Ron DeSantis. = Thank you for your support. — Nikki ** Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor Nikki Fried for Governor 6619 S Dixie Hwy No. 148 Miami, FL 33143 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Paxton's Patriots
subject: Standing Up for the Second Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ken Paxton Campaign
body:
Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 11, 2022

|
---
**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 11, 2022 **

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** As Attorney General, Ken Paxton is fighting to protect our Second Amendment rights at every turn. That's why he's endorsed and A+ rated by the NRA their millions of members who are our nation’s foremost defender of our Second Amendment right to keep and bear arms.

**Link: **[https://sanangelolive.com/news/politics/2022-02-10/national-rifle-association-victory-fund-endorses-texas-attorney-general-paxton-re-election](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=16ce35587c134195b4268857a845d927&_e=XI3J_3YsFiLSXLDwpy97ENo6a_Qkldj6OdoRCrKWfmVaUpfVopC_H441BDRiyxVbTv8O6I7eUtlHi_WsK6fO_hLbI2Be8ZQyvMKIlXl63c1D-m6zAeTv6AIj_kdBVoyeLnC8Tr1TsTEx4RUbvcMjP4eVbNv23rrE_91tXXTIM2C-wx_EqGhOZuBIeLrNjXAqn-syZNBlMu20UWHUADXipA1p-U2bIP4fqGplfsS7fsIWhu0AacX_mBia8FNEMWgfD0elX7M5FKJuMfeT03YdGL1kwIuAQ9DoSsbjguRqvTl2Fy41LJXIrpCvicMyoXXMRIAl_XjudDWFMG3b6hkOc54N02CnRmLTLlSLQpqYWQ9Vs3G59dkqhJOD5kr4Zr6uPoZRVU-XPXKkxK1F54YmLTBI_uDNvlMxAA96lBUuy2E%3D)

**Theme of the Day: Standing Up for the Second Amendment**

~ In case you missed it, yesterday Ken Paxton received a major endorsement from the National Rifle Association and was given the highest attainable “A+” rating. As they said, "Ken Paxton has demonstrated an unwavering commitment to safeguarding the constitutional rights of all law-abiding Texans through his active role in Second Amendment litigation _. _He's constantly battling on the frontlines and in trenches of the battle to protect Texans' Second Amendment rights. We encourage all Texas NRA members, supporters, gun owners, and sportsmen to vote Ken Paxton for Attorney General in the March 1 primary election." ~ Ken Paxton knows the Second Amendment to the U.S. Constitution prevents the government from infringing upon our right to personally keep and bear arms. This is an important constitutional right that is for all Americans. It doesn't matter whether you’re from Hawaii, or you’re from Texas, or you’re from Louisiana, the Second Amendment applies to you and the state cannot stop you from following the Second Amendment.

~ Under Ken Paxton's leadership, Texas has led or joined a number of coalitions of state attorneys general in filing "friend of the court" briefs supporting the Second Amendment in numerous landmark court cases, including New York State Rifle & Pistol Association v. Bruen. This case before the United States Supreme Court seeks to protect the right to carry a firearm for self-defense outside the home.

~ Ken Paxton has defended Texas' campus carry law, enforced Texas' state firearms preemption statute, and issued an opinion preventing local officials from abusing COVID disaster declarations to close gun stores. Ken Paxton also signed an amicus brief on the McDonald v. Chicago case to the U.S. Supreme Court in defense of our right to keep and bear arms and to prevent local ordinances from infringing on that right. The McDonald case extends the constitutional protection of individual rights to state and local government laws as well to ensure that no government entity may set local policies that infringe upon our right to personally keep and bear arms.

We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=16ce35587c134195b4268857a845d927&_e=XI3J_3YsFiLSXLDwpy97ECXza1KBit4CxmhvXDqMyCyiiJOH1gz_zy0M2lmYJP3vILyoqF8ivGmY1IXVtg4obsHUNijHKGyi6HvNyio3MgH9fQ2I9esoxNQ3u_bFOhgIl4YTSTte14tmzyz5Rrhmzm2pD5nUOeS9WFiA9D6QF2qbHxEy9b3rrWI9s-XRq-8FP-wlGCsWZ9DMBBcOlUUtRlwI6FMfjfwf9773eXI2xkBjz4DQrom7_yBDdOGrsxAWo_WsENbnFW8Gzex0lQGjJw%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to [join our efforts](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=16ce35587c134195b4268857a845d927&_e=XI3J_3YsFiLSXLDwpy97ECXza1KBit4CxmhvXDqMyCyiiJOH1gz_zy0M2lmYJP3vMmAEh1h_Tg6DMG4hLOZsLGZYEwxCqpVjg1G8IwFCu5S60MnqWskicS-xog5sN6GvAysfC-h9MyDr0nuKFZzZU55BPEUtiKGrTPjfGvC6INAtvVRHdnTRWJbIUHWSVnXclePpInNxtwrrzyAcQjUhV5NVtVkEofS28JnQcCwx42jUlywo7Igie4M7iisRqFxIyPFfG91xhabuM_Fq77pmaw%3D%3D) and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates [by clicking here.](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=16ce35587c134195b4268857a845d927&_e=XI3J_3YsFiLSXLDwpy97ECXza1KBit4CxmhvXDqMyCyiiJOH1gz_zy0M2lmYJP3v9ihL1yDT8pn5qLfbgDe6oj71MG7Xsk_0m9zP-7Qws5n8F-82gsml-mVppxE2pL6D9AXuSV6X0JAEbzItHSbh5C6pI90QUhv5NPUjMA0gu3xNJRxxxMyczzYovnS2UX9MGJwObV8dUZHgLYhT-CufROOnsRRTU6F1sJfWfuvU2B-fDyWIgeF8gqtT4jGnHdJhDk__58uFSmW6MJhkbVDR0g%3D%3D)

**[Paxton's Patriots](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=16ce35587c134195b4268857a845d927&_e=XI3J_3YsFiLSXLDwpy97ECXza1KBit4CxmhvXDqMyCyiiJOH1gz_zy0M2lmYJP3v1xru4DyvNMYSJe5nFlLXpET1LAHj0j0w3Tub45w7xZKx-YGbwTjNM9jpxLCXZj1H-8fhC4ei4VbPuYg3qlgVJmTUKcva5CdR0alOdw0XR-6hvQDj0rJHrrn3RUoH5Faj8HCoEtiHj4Op5wH3LyQvjtFUXuouBsHxG7HUlovTmlIbWELnhogwmgs7M9J-eHSNqpsnwD4luL3CrtagA-Vc_Q%3D%3D)** | [**DONATE** ](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=16ce35587c134195b4268857a845d927&_e=XI3J_3YsFiLSXLDwpy97EAij8kTKG7yPnRzZ1312dvHoeH603keMkap94Gw_y-jKX0AKFCR8ZwuXp4Qq7BdltwBx3219oWeghDYKKd4pZNLd5tgz9bABD37x5aSAgnPZXAPg0eyOh2JyzwiDygzWfTloaLfLKZh5SnccNJy8RV7lSbtYD1AwaGBJX1B81dUef8dWVZJZbme5XIchzoFC7fqRlhA9DzLtsRamHhvZ_gpS0Begf4FkszpUlp6nhiyr01kqzFRtCKMpu-n6qNOuTkrIk6IQdeuJMYll84OMT7bLX7ymd7sUMgbNKUAeYsg3kDKLO-ZSDPIFoL7wSF_uOtuW57qeb1MFFeOEd8RZw2sWAan_hoSpcPmFYm-X4rxSYqQeM8sGVGlBF8m4K_CtFyjBaKVS66fDVdAn74WefzSOTXf8aSDFbBD0kyJnEgWBMG894bkqAcDeQdCVmb-xbQ1GzZFdKEQTRPUlnvtsZ3YRtB5YuzWa86RNdBgo6alCykg1sdt8PMkg45-buwABZNbklRIa67-fBqD3Ag5I7Bs%3D)

name: Team MLG
subject: Don't miss these updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
Michelle Lujan Grisham is building a better future for New Mexico
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687710/329898945/-2081290588?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWY3OGQ5Ni02ZjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=luKEH11pa9Nd1ewIV0lIEEXXmazffx8bQQZhj8xJ3BY=&emci=44ecea23-9f8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f1f78d96-6f8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)
---
_Hi, Peter! Michelle Lujan Grisham is building a better future for New Mexico as the state legislative session continues. You're a key part of this campaign, so we want to give you a behind-the-scenes look at what the Governor is working on._
|
---
**Strengthening Education**
Right now, the nation is facing a teacher shortage – but Gov. Lujan Grisham is working to provide New Mexico students with top-tier education. She proposed raising teacher wages this year to encourage educators to work in New Mexico, and the state legislature just passed her landmark bill.

Currently, the minimum salary for entry-level teachers is $41,000 per year – and the bill would increase starting teacher salaries to $50,000, making New Mexico the highest-paying state in the region. We know that New Mexico children deserve the best – and now, they will learn from the very best teachers, too.
|
---
**Fighting Climate Change**
Gov. Lujan Grisham has been leading New Mexico toward a greener future since the first day she got into office. With the start of the new legislative session, the Governor has taken two exciting steps toward reducing our state's greenhouse gas pollution.

First, the Governor was proud to see the Senate pass the Clean Fuel Standard Act, which will reduce emissions by an estimated 18.5 million metric tons of carbon dioxide – the equivalent of taking 570,000 cars off the road for a year. Additionally, the Governor just announced the introduction of a bill that would incentivize clean hydrogen development and steer the emerging industry toward a low-carbon future.
|
---
**Supporting Small Businesses**
Gov. Lujan Grisham launched the Buy New Mexico initiative in 2019 to support our state's small businesses, and the state Senate just unanimously passed a bill that would expand this successful initiative.

The bill will incentivize New Mexicans to spend their money at local businesses, including those owned by Native Americans and veterans. This is just one of many policies that the Governor has implemented to attract entrepreneurs to our great state and strengthen our local economies.
|
---
**Social Media**
Follow us at [**@Michelle4NM**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687711/329898946/-2133875671?lang=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWY3OGQ5Ni02ZjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=luKEH11pa9Nd1ewIV0lIEEXXmazffx8bQQZhj8xJ3BY=&emci=44ecea23-9f8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f1f78d96-6f8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352) on Twitter, [**@michellelujangrisham**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687712/329898947/1312126551?hl=en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWY3OGQ5Ni02ZjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=luKEH11pa9Nd1ewIV0lIEEXXmazffx8bQQZhj8xJ3BY=&emci=44ecea23-9f8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f1f78d96-6f8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)**** on Instagram, or [**Michelle Lujan Grisham**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41687713/329898948/1915716596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWY3OGQ5Ni02ZjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=luKEH11pa9Nd1ewIV0lIEEXXmazffx8bQQZhj8xJ3BY=&emci=44ecea23-9f8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f1f78d96-6f8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352) on Facebook to stay in the loop on the latest from our team.

Here we go with another political stunt....
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Ffebruary-2022-general-donation/1/0100017ee92c4dcf-ca5c8eeb-e80e-4e4a-8393-365fcb60d749-000000/lStD1IJXgi3uzoxEdEkjfLHRLso=257)
Dear Friend,
[_In 2014, Maggie Hassan signed a $30 million state gas tax into law._](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefeat-hassan/1/0100017ee92c4dcf-ca5c8eeb-e80e-4e4a-8393-365fcb60d749-000000/Ttg0J89Nd9WoDqVCoTKmds_eiWI=257)[_ _](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefeat-hassan/2/0100017ee92c4dcf-ca5c8eeb-e80e-4e4a-8393-365fcb60d749-000000/-vfADtQsavTbUMjXEbBr01WzlMs=257)

Senator Hassan is one of the most vulnerable Senators up for re-election in 2022. With the entire country feeling the pressure of record-breaking high gas prices Senator Hassan has pivoted to saying she supports a “federal gas tax holiday.”

This is nothing but a political stunt by Maggie Hassan to try to save herself from Biden’s plummeting polls. But do not be fooled Hassan has voted in lock step with the Biden administration since the day he took office.

[We need to hold Hassan accountable for her votes. We need to hold Hassan responsible for the detrimental effects that inflation has had on Granite Staters. We need to FIRE Hassan in November.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefeat-hassan/3/0100017ee92c4dcf-ca5c8eeb-e80e-4e4a-8393-365fcb60d749-000000/JA7G4ySG0Qv_ZMXnBv-QJkxly68=257)
[Any donation made today will go directly to firing Hassan in 2022. Thank you in advance for your support. Friend, it's happening. Liberals are finally pulling back on their anti-science COVID restrictions.

Big cities and radical hotspots like New York are getting rid of their mask mandates and vaccine passports. The White House is now revising what counts as a COVID case and proclaiming victory over the virus!

_Turns out - all they needed to see was absolutely dismal polling numbers._

Now, these tyrannical “leaders” think they can walk away and be done with it all. After millions in economic destruction, the loss of lives and livelihoods, and the undeniable violations of our civil rights.

**We can’t let them. We must hold them accountable so this NEVER HAPPENS AGAIN.**

Will you chip in now to help me get to the bottom of it?
__

Friend, we know the political elites don’t want the public to know what they knew and when they knew it. _They don’t want us to PROVE_ their anti-freedom regulations were always about power and not about science.

It is our responsibility to hold them accountable.

Americans deserve to know:

* When did Fauci, Biden, and others in the government first know about COVID-19?
* Did they suppress evidence to promote lockdowns, mask mandates, and 24/7 media hysteria?
* How much did our government fund the Wuhan labs who probably created the pandemic?
* And why did they change their tune on a dime?

The truth is: what these COVID radicals did is truly unacceptable.

_And if it’s over, I’m glad it’s over! _

But I will not stop fighting till we get to the full truth and Americans know exactly why these nuts can never be trusted again.

I hope you’ll join my fight by chipping in now: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3694317/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za07o257ttrr8j9l0h5mo2lbc6gsfc630ovoui20_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdg6eo74clh2bs)**

Friend,

I’m reaching out to ask you for a **[contribution of $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41688250/329900583/1573964380?refcode=em-2.11.22-nopen-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTAwNmViMS03MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uAgWrQFX3J0FHfO82Clp4wjsgE1adXN4RYiU4vgOY4s=)** to my campaign to replace Madison Cawthorn in NC-14. Things have changed dramatically in my race, so I hope you’ll let me explain why your support is so critical right now.

**Last week, the NC Supreme Court threw out the Republicans' gerrymandered congressional maps. This is a huge win, but while new maps are drawn, we are losing precious time ahead of the May 17th primary. It's possible we'll have less than three months to campaign in our new district before ballots are cast.**

The truth is it's very likely that our district will still be favorable for Democrats, but nothing has changed about my campaign. This race is still about our education, economy and our environment. It's about ensuring working families have a shot at good-paying jobs and safe, affordable housing.

We need to lay the groundwork right now to reach those critical swing voters and counter the onslaught of attacks coming from our GOP opponents. This is going to take resources, and truth be told, fundraising has been difficult with Republicans creating so much uncertainty.

That's why we need to ask:

**[We're counting on another 110 donations coming in today to help us pick up the pace. Can I count on you to chip in $3 before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41688251/329900584/1573964380?refcode=em-2.11.22-nopen-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTAwNmViMS03MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uAgWrQFX3J0FHfO82Clp4wjsgE1adXN4RYiU4vgOY4s=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41688252/329900585/1573964380?refcode=em-2.11.22-nopen-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTAwNmViMS03MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uAgWrQFX3J0FHfO82Clp4wjsgE1adXN4RYiU4vgOY4s=)

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Jenny Ellis Interviews Jameson Ellis
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [ ](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ5b3V0dS5iZSUyRjdhUUQ5WGU2VHlv&sig=9c8esUnFZXpUGi1oRkGm4wuDN1xeCMM7hfbX5VwnyDmk&iat=1644612561&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=56A70A1A347)
---
| | |
---
| | Hey Peter,

Liberty is currently an illusion. I'm not sure if you've ever seen the movie, The Matrix, but often it feels like that's what we're living in right now... one big giant computer program that is a simulated reality.

Nothing feels real.

Often, it's as if I'm having to pinch myself to make sure I'm not in the middle of a nightmare.

Liberty is hanging on by a thread, and if we don't rally together in our fight to restore liberty, then it will be lost forever.

With that being said, I was honored to be interviewed by Jenna Ellis, a former member of President Donald Trump's legal team.

Jenna gave me the opportunity to share from my heart and talk about what inspired me to run for Congress in the first place...

And she was also intrigued to learn more about the man who has decided to primary Dan Crenshaw.

There's not much to know, except for the fact is that I'm just an average, everyday, ordinary citizen just like her... just like YOU.

You can tap the video above to check it out or you can [tap here to watch the interview on YouTube](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ5b3V0dS5iZSUyRjdhUUQ5WGU2VHlv&sig=9c8esUnFZXpUGi1oRkGm4wuDN1xeCMM7hfbX5VwnyDmk&iat=1644612561&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=56A70A1A347).
---
| | |
---
| | For Liberty,
---
| | |
---
| |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | Hey Peter, Liberty is currently an illusion. I'm not sure if you've ever seen the movie, The Matrix, but often it feels like that's what we're living in right now... one big giant computer program that is a simulated reality. Nothing feels real. Often, it's as if I'm having to pinch myself to make sure I'm not in the middle of a nightmare. Liberty is hanging on by a thread, and if we don't rally together in our fight to restore liberty, then it will be lost forever. With that being said, I was honored to be interviewed by Jenna Ellis, a former member of President Donald Trump's legal team. Jenna gave me the opportunity to share from my heart and talk about what inspired me to run for Congress in the first place... And she was also intrigued to learn more about the man who has decided to primary Dan Crenshaw. There's not much to know, except for the fact is that I'm just an average, everyday, ordinary citizen just like her... just like YOU. You can tap the video above to check it out or you can . | | | | | For Liberty, | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | Sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Jameson Ellis For Congress, 206A S Loop 336 W #309, Conroe, TX 77304, United States

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: SAVE SOTA PLAN!
body:
| Peter -- Vaccine and mask mandates continue to destroy our state. People are still losing their jobs and seeing their businesses unnecessarily suffer. Our rights have been trampled and we need new leadership. Our campaign has been picking up traction following a great showing at the Caucus. Minnesotans are craving an **outsider** candidate who stands up for our Rights and will beat Walz this November. I have been traveling the state spreading the message of freedom, and we're continuing to gain momentum. This is a movement of ordinary people taking back their government and I am so proud to help lead this fight alongside you. Minneapolis and St. Paul Mayors have decided to remove **vaccine passports** because of the pressure mounted on them by their constituents. They have failed and they know it. The widespread unpopularity of vaccine mandates and passports among everyday Minnesotans serves as clear vindication. The Left is weak and failing. I'm excited to fill you in on my platform to solve the issues in our state and turn us around. We want **YOU** to join this movement and our agenda is centered around serving people just like **YOU**!
## **We call it The Save Sota Plan!**
[****](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rPi4oAUq_ZRBeNS3BqV5iPiTY_pAlR_NA1vq62axn4GC&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=save_sota_plan&n=1) Our Constitutional rights have been **under attack** because of the Walz Covid regime; I will reverse course and lead our state to freedom and prosperity by ending all mask and vaccine mandates. I will remove the power of the Governor to unilaterally declare Emergency Declarations, giving myself less power in the process. I will give **YOU** back **YOUR** tax money from the surplus that the government overtaxed us, and pledge to never raise taxes. There will be big spending and tax cuts under my administration. We must protect and defend the 2nd Amendment by passing Constitutional Carry and Stand Your Ground Laws. We will send violent criminals to jail and hold the **rioters** and **looters** accountable. There must be faith in our electoral process again. We need Voter ID, provisional ballots, better inspections and rejections of absentee ballots, and conservative election judges overseeing the **entire** process. And I will be your champion on that. I will protect our children’s education by banning Critical Race Theory, which teaches kids to be racist and hate their fellow citizens. Parents are in charge of their children’s education so school choice must be implemented. I will end taxpayer funding of Planned Parenthood so that helpless babies are secured the **R****ight to Life**. That is our **Save Sota Plan** , with your support we can make this happen. | [](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rPi4oAUq_ZRBeNS3BqV5iPiTY_pAlR_NA1vq62axn4GC&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=save_sota_plan&n=2 "I SUPPORT THE SAVE SOTA PLAN") [I SUPPORT THE SAVE SOTA PLAN](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rPi4oAUq_ZRBeNS3BqV5iPiTY_pAlR_NA1vq62axn4GC&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=save_sota_plan&n=2)
---
Also, this campaign is not funded by lobbyists and Special Interests like the career politician candidates. I need your help.
[Consider donating to this campaign to help us Save Minnesota. $25, $50, or $100 goes a long way to helping us win!](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=save_sota_plan&n=3)
Thank you!
Dr. Neil Shah
Conservative Candidate for Governor
[www.ElectNeil.com](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=5JezZIIJQQrVuUtHI_sfDD1Ub6RYh9Vgrrtgs-Sc8qk&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=save_sota_plan&n=4)
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States

name: Trevor Maloney
subject: McMaster + Trump = Trouble
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina
body:
| Joe’s campaign manager here. Did you see the news that Donald Trump is officially getting involved in our governor’s race?

**Not only did Trump Jr. host _massive_ fundraisers for Henry McMaster, but now McMaster is reportedly having closed-door meetings with the former president at Mar-a-Lago.**

Look, Trump has campaigned for McMaster before and his involvement in our race means more far-right extremism, more dark money, and more disinformation are headed our way.

Joe’s committed to focusing his campaign on the issues and doesn’t take a dime from special interest PACs, but we can’t ignore Trump’s involvement.

**_[Will you help us fight back? Click here to contribute $10 or any amount so we can reach our goal to raise another $30,000 on digital for February.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41688616/329903068/80455361?amount=10&contactdata=AitVTMpJrJAUUa8aOxvKH0e98jRUK5jB3BQ4nraUml0qARfaFvyDMx%2FtQqjELRAf%2FIJXmv5qutsV04yisvLrY7mrfRNPuguOlTqx%2FuZz29I%3D&refcode2=6fa1848d-748b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&source=JC_EM_FR_3MO_220211_1_1&utm_source=jc_em_fr_3mo_220211_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmExODQ4ZC03NDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cdamrBNmFjH1j6hJFKMezx1MOqEqEF1V6b25z-tpF2Y=)_**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Peter, what do you say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
“Michael Brown is my choice for Governor. As a business owner, I’m grateful that he understands how businesses in the state are hurting,” Singh said. | | | |
---
| | | Peter:

The momentum is growing. **Every day more and more Michiganders join the campaign.**

Today, I'm pleased to announce that business owner Sam Singh has endorsed my campaign.

This is what Sam had to say:
> “Michael Brown is my choice for Governor. As a business owner, I’m grateful that Michael understands how businesses in the state are hurting. Taxes are too high, and the regulations imposed on us make it difficult to conduct business."
Sam owns three petroleum stations as well as other businesses. He’s frustrated that sales taxes collected on gasoline do not go towards fixing roads.
---
|
---
|
> “I pay thousands of dollars to the state of Michigan in gas taxes, and I want every cent of that devoted to our roads and infrastructure. My customers want that too, and Michael Brown will make sure that happens.” – Sam Singh

I’m grateful for Sam’s support.

Gretchen Whitmer put thousands of Michiganders out of work and forced many small businesses to close because of her unlawful lockdown orders. **From day one I’ll be focused on creating a positive business-friendly environment** so we can compete with our neighboring states and expand opportunities in our state.

We need to revitalize Michigan. I'll **reduce the state income tax** on individuals and businesses, **repeal the tax on retirement benefits** , **reduce burdensome regulations** , and ensure that **sales taxes collected on gasoline purchases are earmarked for road improvements.**

I challenge you today: add your name to the growing list of endorsements.

Join Sam Singh and other business owners, as well as **State Representative Beth Griffin** , St. Joseph County **Sheriff Mark Lillywhite** , Berrien County **Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli** , Motor City Madman **Ted Nugent** , and many other Michigan citizens in supporting my campaign.

Together we can Fix Michigan.

Thank you,

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor

---
|
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Asking you to help us catch up with our opponent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We know that it’s only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. We know that it's only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. |
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c4faac29a32d48058d7a3688b88925f9&_e=1wlgrBr7Vh7uXkDBCDqvwYK0kQAE0SXfzxkV_w8k-Vq8nGfgZo_pgpi6-Ic05d6bQpnRGRna8mrwFxXbtxHbIFR1DiY4IquptYP8LYuNqLLl6-E9OM7Cen0_GievbtNO3C3XSY2hSHOzfJgPq9vDFSh6LFA1pKV8LFLmw6V7QE4SeJUH3yNSeddAHck5J92VPEY_2tWzgCWlnJW-tsf_89S-ArVoZNysYjatHoAA5A7XVpu5pM3d3Sv_PnBX8xKRWHeuRbWwHxtf6VALHZuXqlFRD1DFvaLNbcXYvrson1JSC9YJsBtu8Pmfbvc0Vcp6Qq2BQ4FVN5WJGb2DDQHtD2nN9d_p1NghhDBo5cvqta0A3DGyNP2dzdXWebXy-y9DMFawxoKfiwh083oGHUHxad5eqxlivoQ-TfpKgwa99fAX_bCIUMCaMa53kgT9H9WQhWAOFd2VboR3u2gS14N7v04QnTrK2LXyGDhxr-Aq4z0%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**_FIRST_** , Raphael Warnock won a 2021 special election by about 100,000 votes - out of more than 4 million ballots cast - becoming the first Democrat to win election to the Senate from Georgia since 2000.

**_THEN_** , Senator Warnock, using the national donor list he built during the 2021 runoff race, raised $32 million in his bid for a full six-year term in this fall's midterm elections.

**_NOW_** , we're in a “statistical dead heat” in the race for Georgia's Senate seat. BUT Warnock's got more than $23 million in the bank (cash) that he is using to make an $861,000 ad buy.

That's why we're asking you to help us close the gap between what our opponent has in the bank and what we've got in our reserves.

_This race is going to be the most expensive race of the 2022 cycle._

We know that it's only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. **[It's going to take thousands of hours of work to catch up with our opponent's fundraising, which is why we're emailing you today.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=c4faac29a32d48058d7a3688b88925f9&_e=1wlgrBr7Vh7uXkDBCDqvwYK0kQAE0SXfzxkV_w8k-Vq8nGfgZo_pgpi6-Ic05d6bQpnRGRna8mrwFxXbtxHbIFR1DiY4IquptYP8LYuNqLLl6-E9OM7Cen0_GievbtNO3C3XSY2hSHOzfJgPq9vDFSh6LFA1pKV8LFLmw6V7QE4SeJUH3yNSeddAHck5J92VPEY_2tWzgCWlnJW-tsf_89S-ArVoZNysYjatHoAA5A7XVpu5pM3d3Sv_PnBX8xKRWIXWC3HLd2Kv24I6Paq6x4h5Y7KSR9JxfqRMzebd2Ljc8ZifrHWun6G0miJLfPqDQp3z5AbaQBM2ZKDW66HlikJohns8NDrTemlkzZTKDjgp9PJzj3ejTrlMxacWyGb1T1RIk3m-1ajVIdp7W72ZkWf3q4ag_8H1bnw-ofD7Pg2kY_fpZTlbJxg_F9lNC7TWw9eDDqkf4CJJvLsDHgEQ5VS1p1R1OztQhQ3N9KV6Cd4%3D)**

One of our biggest hurdles is complacency. We must start NOW.

**[Team Herschel is looking for 4,000 conservative patriots to make a gift of $6 or more today to help us close the fundraising gap with our opponent. clean_body: We know that it’s only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. We know that it's only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. | Fellow Conservative, FIRST , Raphael Warnock won a 2021 special election by about 100,000 votes - out of more than 4 million ballots cast - becoming the first Democrat to win election to the Senate from Georgia since 2000. THEN , Senator Warnock, using the national donor list he built during the 2021 runoff race, raised $32 million in his bid for a full six-year term in this fall's midterm elections. NOW , we're in a “statistical dead heat” in the race for Georgia's Senate seat. BUT Warnock's got more than $23 million in the bank (cash) that he is using to make an $861,000 ad buy. That's why we're asking you to help us close the gap between what our opponent has in the bank and what we've got in our reserves. This race is going to be the most expensive race of the 2022 cycle. We know that it's only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. One of our biggest hurdles is complacency. We must start NOW. My very best, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

Hey, Peter. With the election creeping closer every day, we’re starting to get a real sense of what we’re up against in the fall — and it isn’t pretty. There are some truly extreme figures among the Republicans who’ve jumped into the race. Lori Saine is vocally anti-vax and anti-choice. Secessionist Jan Kulmann is actively supporting Trump’s “Big Lie” about the 2020 election. And Tyler Allcorn is _proudly_ running to fight for Big Oil and Big Gas. **And the thing is, this extreme out-of-touch rhetoric isn’t something they toss out every now and then — it’s the very foundation of their campaigns.** We’re better than this. Colorado’s 8th District is better than this. [**We’ve set an ambitious $15,000 goal for this month to keep pace with the GOP’s dark money machine — will you pitch in whatever you’re able to ensure that these extremists are never elected to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41672276/329832031/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220211mm1extrem_c4cweb_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDkyNTg0Ni00YjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mwGJ6V4PUe7CJip-p1yuc7qNWSYOLjV_BnaJLGS9aBg=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Dr. Caraveo is running to make healthcare more accessible and affordable, not to rip away every person’s right to make decisions about their own bodies. She’s running to defend our democracy, not undermine our elections with lies and conspiracy theories.
Most of all, she’s running to be a voice for the working families who are struggling to achieve the American Dream — the same dream that allowed her immigrant parents to build a home in Adams County and raise their daughter to become a doctor, a state legislator, and, with your help, Colorado’s first Latina Congressperson.
This is going to be an extraordinarily competitive race, with the full force of the GOP’s corporate money behind their candidate. **That means we _must_ build a strong, resilient grassroots movement powered by small-dollar donors — like you!**

body:
They've teamed up with their RINO pals to silence me | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066157?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=e3ef96292a&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

They say you can know a man best by his enemies.

And boy, do we have enemies.

Just like President Trump, all of the right ghouls are trying to silence me, from Big Tech to the totally corrupt Republican Establishment.

I've been thrown offstage at GOP events, banned from social media, and banned from 2 payment processors--I was even banned by my old barbershop.

Last fall, the Republican Party of Arkansas called me a "racist, sexist, bigot," and disavowed my campaign. What was my crime?

I want to end the Invasion on our Southern Border by building the Wall and imposing a Total Immigration Moratorium. America is full.

I'm also a proud Southerner.

Now, the evil ADL, along with the Guardian---Communist smear operations---put me at the very top of their list of the most "extreme" candidates in America.

According to these cretins, I'm a "racist White Supremacist." Of course, the absurdity of calling a mixed-race, Indian-American individual like myself a "White Supremacist" is totally lost on them.

What these Communists don't understand is that their slanders and smears don't work on us anymore.

We know their games, and we're not playing along anymore.

All of these attacks are great badges of honor, proof positive that I'm a threat, that I can't be controlled, that I'm not a part of their club.

It's no coincidence that this latest ADL and Guardian attack came just after my campaign posted our strongest fundraising numbers yet.

They know that we're coming for them. They know that their days are numbered.

**[_Show them that their attacks are __toothless. Show them what we think about their lies and slanders of Patriots_ _._

_Do you know why my Deep State RINO opponent doesn't face these attacks? Because he's only a threat to one thing: the people of Arkansas_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=5e8b79148e&e=eda539b26b). **

[**_Help me tell the Establishment that the people are DONE with their games_ _ \-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=6c9b02f823&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, who aren't going to tuck tail and run when they get called mean names._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=8a43194889&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=a524f87dbc&e=eda539b26b)** _._**

name: Eric Stern, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We have less time to raise just as much.
#
Hi Derek,
You don’t hear from me much, but I’m Eric Stern, the Deputy Campaign Manager for John Fetterman for U.S. Senate. And one of the many hats I wear on the campaign is making sure we reach -- and ideally, exceed -- all of our monthly and quarterly fundraising goals.
Here’s what you really need to know about me: I’m a numbers guy. So when I look at a month like February, which, notably, has 2-3 fewer days in it than a normal month, it makes me nervous.
Because that means we have 2-3 fewer days to hit our monthly fundraising goal and keep up with our opponents on both sides of the aisle.
Every. Single. Day. This month we have to not only raise more, but raise more quickly than we normally do.
**With our primary election just months away, hitting every fundraising goal is mission critical.** And if we hit this deadline, with less time to do so, we can go into March confident that we can do it again and again and again.
What do you say, Derek?
**[Will you help us reach our February goal by making your first donation right now? After running the numbers, I feel confident that if enough folks decide to go above and beyond by contributing for the first time ever today, we'll be on track to meet our goal ahead of this mission-critical deadline.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43979?refcode=ema20220211-4526&t=1&akid=4526%2E434096%2EsBkt2b)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43979?refcode=em20220211-4526&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4526%2E434096%2EsBkt2b)**
Thanks for your help with this, Derek -- let's do this!!!
Eric 💙
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
**[Contribute Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43979?refcode=em20220211-4526&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4526%2E434096%2EsBkt2b)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220211-4526-footer&t=22&refcode2=4526_434096_sBkt2b&akid=4526%2E434096%2EsBkt2b)**

| | Team, We’re a week into caucus season, and I’m fired up! These caucuses are democracy in action, and they give me the chance to meet with even more folks about my vision for our Commonwealth. Last weekend, I was glad to talk with Democrats at caucuses across Massachusetts about the movement we’re building to deliver debt free education from birth to adulthood, a Green New Deal, better transit, and affordable housing for working families. The race to the Convention is a dead heat right now, and we're turning out and electing Sonia delegates every single day in communities across the state. We’re about to head into a huge weekend — there will be 70 caucuses happening virtually and in person, and that means we have 70 opportunities to bring even more folks into our movement. We don’t have time to spare if we want to deliver urgent change. It’ll be a tough fight, but I know that with your help we can get it done. [_**Can you rush $15 now to help us continue organizing and reaching out to Democrats across the state? Chip in to show you’re ready for a bold and equitable Massachusetts.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41689605/329909528/-1275523729?refcode=em_20220211_f_s_caucus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTAwZTQ3NS03NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIzt_4a5nn4pF4VpF0_DPe6Yp9g-K3iSQ8qHGgwTANA=) I’m excited to keep talking to folks about what we’re building together. We have a chance to make Massachusetts work for all of us — but I need your help to keep the momentum going so we can head into this weekend strong. [_**I’m counting on you. Let’s show how strong our grassroots team is — chip in $15 right away.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41689606/329909529/-1275523729?refcode=em_20220211_f_s_caucus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTAwZTQ3NS03NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NIzt_4a5nn4pF4VpF0_DPe6Yp9g-K3iSQ8qHGgwTANA=) Thanks for being a part of this team. Saludos, Sonia

name: Gibbons for Ohio
subject: RELEASE: Gibbons Pulls Away From The Pack
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zf31wjG9TLdVjcog89zSbYJVmFLf1Xjvl7z_3oJWEf7OGaEcSyoFmwmVMx0DyZ4T5-o-rVRKyWSnoa5Tr-RU3zIEyAi9z4QTLRtNrN8UadpdVtF6SJq-OFChat9oN7CSpgXxeqKruMAER1DsaGIHNQ==&c=1TT4WTfcO1LMffR7Hlq30JCZTmMPdQMIEaVCADkVQl1yp9Lgl5tRdQ==&ch=rnxw1oag0w_2O30rbt87eBogZCdWbnQn3fsmysMyE0NtxA6q1dD6iw==)
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: February 11, 2022
---
| Contact: Brianna Kraemer press@gibbonsforohio.com
---
|
Gibbons Pulls Away From The Pack
---
| Cleveland, OH \- U.S. Senate candidate Mike Gibbons continues to make gains in the Ohio Senate primary. The Gibbons campaign's latest internal poll has Mike in the lead with 23% with all others more than 10 points back. This poll once again confirms his status as the frontrunner in the race.
---
|
---
| Other key takeaways from the Cygnal survey include:

* Gibbons leads by double digits among self-identified Trump Republicans as well as Traditional Republicans.
* Among self-identified Extremely Conservative, Very Conservative, and Somewhat Conservative voters, Gibbons maintains double-digit leads across all three.
* Likewise, Gibbons holds double-digit leads over the nearest competitor among both men and women.
* By religious affiliation, Gibbons holds strong advantages among Evangelical Protestants, Mainline Protestants, and Catholic voters.

The latest internal poll comes on the heels of another independent survey from Co/Efficient, which also has Gibbons in the lead.
---
|
---
| The polls make it clear that Mike Gibbons is in command of this primary. Ohioans want a true conservative candidate who will put America First and Mike Gibbons is that candidate.
Read the full polling memo below:
---
|
---
| ###
---
|

---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zf31wjG9TLdVjcog89zSbYJVmFLf1Xjvl7z_3oJWEf7OGaEcSyoFm-nZhBget2KqKq3_sQo3qeHn9jpYTVBGXwPXjQlebZQKsSf9UoOCK0037H2rQwNxmRzoJy-UvQa8-hb8rqrT1SRvcCd9Kp4kM5HKMmoqFaOw&c=1TT4WTfcO1LMffR7Hlq30JCZTmMPdQMIEaVCADkVQl1yp9Lgl5tRdQ==&ch=rnxw1oag0w_2O30rbt87eBogZCdWbnQn3fsmysMyE0NtxA6q1dD6iw==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zf31wjG9TLdVjcog89zSbYJVmFLf1Xjvl7z_3oJWEf7OGaEcSyoFmwmVMx0DyZ4T9GDkfe839PO2OwQkdAXBI1Hg1n5DIUHW_gXnwn04rU_ScxNb7zEX84N8th5LeLZNmyIjXGfKXkyST9fljHZ4I_2M5xRy0jEq&c=1TT4WTfcO1LMffR7Hlq30JCZTmMPdQMIEaVCADkVQl1yp9Lgl5tRdQ==&ch=rnxw1oag0w_2O30rbt87eBogZCdWbnQn3fsmysMyE0NtxA6q1dD6iw==)

The Gibbons campaign's latest internal poll has Mike in the lead with 23% with all others more than 10 points back. This poll once again confirms his status as the frontrunner in the race. | | Other key takeaways from the Cygnal survey include: Gibbons leads by double digits among self-identified Trump Republicans as well as Traditional Republicans. Among self-identified Extremely Conservative, Very Conservative, and Somewhat Conservative voters, Gibbons maintains double-digit leads across all three. Likewise, Gibbons holds double-digit leads over the nearest competitor among both men and women. By religious affiliation, Gibbons holds strong advantages among Evangelical Protestants, Mainline Protestants, and Catholic voters. The latest internal poll comes on the heels of another independent survey from Co/Efficient, which also has Gibbons in the lead. | | The polls make it clear that Mike Gibbons is in command of this primary. Ohioans want a true conservative candidate who will put America First and Mike Gibbons is that candidate.
