clean_body: The National GOP is gaining momentum in Colorado, and we’re counting on supporters like you to fight back. | = FIRST: Proud insurrectionist and GOP primary candidate Ron Hanks surged ahead in the race to flip Michael’s seat, while making headlines from national news outlets like CNN and Politico. THEN: A poll showed Michael losing this race by just one point against a Republican opponent. NOW:The National Journal is ranking Michael’s seat among the top 10 most likely to flip this year. This race will not be easy, but if we invest now in the campaign infrastructure, rapid response programs, and voter outreach efforts it will take to win, we can defend Michael’s seat and hold onto our Senate majority, so he can continue delivering for Colorado’s families. Your investment today will help us build the campaign we need to win, so we have to ask: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ******************=**************** ****************** ********** | ****************=**************** | | ****************=**************** ****************** ********** | ****************=**************** | | ****************=**************** ****************** ********** | ****************=**************** Thank you, Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

subject: Momentum is Ours
body:
Our campaign has exploded out of the gates, and we are only just getting started. I've been taking our positive, conservative message on the trail. | | | [ ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=35d37d7ce1&e=b78e7c4d40)
---
| | Friend,
Our campaign has a TON of momentum right now, and people are starting to notice.

Shortly after announcing my campaign for Congress in Illinois 11th district, I went on Fox & Friends to discuss our winning strategy and our plan to take back the House and FIRE Nancy Pelosi as speaker.

Watch the video of my interview here:

---
| [ ](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=819194a6b4&e=b78e7c4d40)
---
Jerry Evans on Fox & Friends 01/28/2022
| I've been a vocal opponent of the left's tyrannical mask and vaccine mandates, especially when it comes to forced masking of our children in schools.

As a U.S. Congressman, I promise I will ALWAYS defend your freedoms against big government overreach.

[You can read the Townhall article I'm quoted in here. >>](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=5a40e0d0de&e=b78e7c4d40)
---
| Our campaign has generated so much momentum already, and Friend, we're just getting started.

Want to be a part of our team? [Chip in $5 or more today to join Team Jerry and help us win big on Election Day. >>](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=8ed6dc69a8&e=b78e7c4d40)

Thank you,

Jerry Evans
Republican Candidate of Congress, (IL-11)

---

clean_body: We are running out of time. | | | Team, If I win this election, I will become the youngest Black woman ever elected to Congress. Danny Davis has been running for Congress for 26 years. Since before I could read. His campaign has a serious head start. Even though we have been throwing everything we have at this election for the last year, we are starting at a disadvantage, and we only have 137 days left. Last quarter, Danny Davis raised $168,000 from just 80 donations of $1,000 or more. He is calling in all his favors, and we are running out of time to catch up. We have 137 days. We know what we need to do to win. We know what it will mean for this community if we do it. Thank you, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

| Dear Patriot Peter, General Michael Flynn is a true American hero who has truly sacrificed himself and of his family for this great nation.
I'm honored to have General Flynn's support, and I will always fight hard to live up to his example of selflessness and patriotic duty to God, to Family, and to Country.
---
|
---
|
---
| I hope every South Carolinian who can hear my voice today will join this campaign and help send me to Congress so that I can fight to **_restore law and order_** , **_secure our nation’s borders_** , **_protect our God given rights and liberties_** , **_preserve our Constitution_** , and **_continue to advocate for you and the America First Agenda!_**

---
|
# I BELIEVE:
* If we don't fix these elections NOW, America will be lost. Without open, honest, transparent elections, no other issue matters.

* If we don't fix these elections NOW, America will be lost

* Tyrannical Tech Oligarchs have taken over our constitutional republic, and they must be stopped.

* Life begins at conception.

* Marriage is defined as between one man and one woman.

* Our right to bear arms is INHERENT, given to us by God almighty -- NOT by any man.

* A big, beautiful wall should protect our Border.

* Our troops should protect America -- NOT foreign nations.

* The First Amendment is absolute: religious & political freedom are basic civil right, as it is the right to hold an opinion.

* Well funded police and the protection of the Rule of Law are imperative to civil society.

* Critical Race Theory is Communist, anti-white Racism.

* Vaccine and mask mandates are medical tyranny, and have no place in America.

* The Pelosi budget opens the door wide open to full-blown communism.

---

subject: re: The Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
---
**BREAKING via The Rachel Maddow Show: “Conservative justices rescue Alabama’s racially discriminatory map”**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220211-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220211-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&akid=2958%2E9716520%2EHFsZUj)
**[If you stand with the Obamas and agree that we need to PROTECT voting rights across the country, sign our petition now>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220211-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220211-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&akid=2958%2E9716520%2EHFsZUj)**

| | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220211-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220211-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&akid=2958%2E9716520%2EHFsZUj)
---

Team -- The Supreme Court just cleared the way for an obvious violation of the Voting Rights Act to move forward in Alabama.

A lower court _already_ ruled that Alabama’s new electoral maps discriminate against Black voters -- but now five of the Court's right-wing justices have stepped in to BLOCK that ruling!

We can’t stand by silently while the Supreme Court inches closer to COMPLETELY rolling back the Voting Rights Act -- **so we've launched a MASSIVE petition to stand with the Obamas and show that this grassroots team will defend voting rights with everything we've got.**
**[We need 50,000 more signatures by midnight, but we’re still MISSING your name! Add your name now to protect voting rights >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220211-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220211-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&akid=2958%2E9716520%2EHFsZUj)**

| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220211-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220211-SupremeCourtAlert-ALVotingRights-Pros-sl1&akid=2958%2E9716520%2EHFsZUj)

Team DSCC

A lower court already ruled that Alabama’s new electoral maps discriminate against Black voters -- but now five of the Court's right-wing justices have stepped in to BLOCK that ruling! We can’t stand by silently while the Supreme Court inches closer to COMPLETELY rolling back the Voting Rights Act -- so we've launched a MASSIVE petition to stand with the Obamas and show that this grassroots team will defend voting rights with everything we've got. | Thank you, Team DSCC If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded. The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. | Friend,
---
| China is doing everything in its power to use these Winter Olympics to manipulate how it is viewed by the rest of the world. Americans know better. China is not our friend. We can never let our guard down. Not only do they oppress their own people, they openly steal the intellectual property of American businesses and engage in unfair trade practices that hurt America’s working families. President Trump was right to stand up to China and demand that they play by the rules. [We need to fire Nancy Pelosi and take back Congress so that we can once again stand up to China.](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=e%2BlHqQR4V3tKXb8Uoljmj8M49iieW91lqQT8NFVHus3IZ2NiV9MGKziPpbE4s%2FCdlFSTMe3qoXOHzL0BHP0OFpo0DdgpLpqMYrPinLxJW4oG0oDp7s6zTw%3D%3D&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FEMGJG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3D6_NQEO1yLhi38icQmurD7sv8OxrBlBJZjNjYJDgBYIVtMPe02sVQhvG3cWC5LnNO0&I=20220211154906.000000773f50%40smtp-ad2-44-phx&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjI0Nzc2MzY0NzI7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE5NTM4OTUxOTs%3D&V=3&S=quemSPB0j5HSOP6FN5SLt1Ult7QSnNGttDF8wK0F5bg) We can’t do that without your help. [We put together a petition to demand Congress revise this crucial legislation and fix our election certification, and we need your signature. name: Peter Franchot
subject: BREAKING: Peter Franchot officially files for 2022 Primary
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
I’m incredibly excited to announce that today, Monique Anderson-Walker and I have officially filed for the 2022 Gubernatorial Primary Election with the Maryland State Board of Elections.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/CandidateFiling_021122.jpg]As we prepare to enter the final stretch of this Primary, I’d like to thank the incredible activists, allies, and supporters who have powered this movement from the grassroots up. Thanks to YOU, we have the highest Cash-on-Hand of any campaign, and recent polls have consistently shown that I’m leading the rest of the Democratic field by a strong margin.
With your continued support, we’re going to win the Primary in June, take back the Governor’s mansion in November, and lift our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve in the years to come.
It’s not too early to make your plan to vote! You can return your application to vote by mail in order to receive a mail ballot, or vote early from June 16 - 23, 2022. Election Day for the Democratic Primary is on June 28, 2022. Click here to visit the official State Board of Elections website to check your registration status, update your records, or register to vote. [https://elections.maryland.gov/]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Can you please add your name to say you support my legislation that would ban ghost guns?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
These are guns sold as untraceable component parts that can be easily assembled by the purchaser at home.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41677384/329854532/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=ea4548b8-538b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=oK0PlVuqtN4nkKYZXlca51+gGapfPsCeCk7E/wzX5EUJCZAagbsmMJs57ozgxQRx&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTQ1NDhiOC01MzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCDF6cqGl58NfVH9oHoT9Mh_YYWhHJ88Diz9P6mm-EE=)
Friends -
There may be considerable partisan division on many issues in this country, but if there is one issue that Democrats, Independents, and even Republicans agree on— it’s that we must take action to make our communities safer from gun violence.
In Maryland, someone is killed with a gun every 13 hours.
That loss of life represents far more than a number. It’s an epidemic that extinguishes human potential and leaves an unfillable hole in the lives of loved ones left behind.
In Maryland we took decisive action after Sandy Hook to ban certain types of firearms and keep guns out of the hands of criminals. And we banned bump stocks after the tragedy in Las Vegas.
But today, we face a new threat: ghost guns. These are guns sold as untraceable component parts that can be easily assembled by the purchaser at home. All they need is a credit card and a shipping address.
Last May, the Baltimore City Police Commissioner said the department had seen a 300 percent increase in the number of ghost guns seized.
There’s a bill in the state legislature that would ban ghost guns in Maryland, and I’ve introduced a bill in the Senate that would do the same.
Today, I am asking you to add your name in support of my bill:
**[Can you sign my petition urging Congress to pass my bill banning ghost guns? This is about saving lives and making our communities safer from gun violence.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41677385/329854549/-1375989209?refcode=em220211-15&refcode2=ea4548b8-538b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=oK0PlVuqtN4nkKYZXlca51+gGapfPsCeCk7E/wzX5EUJCZAagbsmMJs57ozgxQRx&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTQ1NDhiOC01MzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCDF6cqGl58NfVH9oHoT9Mh_YYWhHJ88Diz9P6mm-EE=&emci=e64548b8-538b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea4548b8-538b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)**
**[SIGN MY PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41677387/329854552/-1375989209?refcode=em220211-15&refcode2=ea4548b8-538b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=oK0PlVuqtN4nkKYZXlca51+gGapfPsCeCk7E/wzX5EUJCZAagbsmMJs57ozgxQRx&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTQ1NDhiOC01MzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCDF6cqGl58NfVH9oHoT9Mh_YYWhHJ88Diz9P6mm-EE=&emci=e64548b8-538b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea4548b8-538b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)**
The horror and daily toll of gun violence will continue until Congress has the courage to stand up to the NRA and act. We’ve taken action in Maryland, but our state is not an island. We need federal action for our laws to work fully.
Onward,
Chris
**[SIGN MY PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41677388/329854555/-1375989209?refcode=em220211-15&refcode2=ea4548b8-538b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=oK0PlVuqtN4nkKYZXlca51+gGapfPsCeCk7E/wzX5EUJCZAagbsmMJs57ozgxQRx&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTQ1NDhiOC01MzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCDF6cqGl58NfVH9oHoT9Mh_YYWhHJ88Diz9P6mm-EE=&emci=e64548b8-538b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea4548b8-538b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)**

PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE

name: Laura Loomer
subject: RNC wimps let us down again
body:
Just two weeks after I confronted Kevin McCarthy and NRCC Chairman Tom Emmer for
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/FOmvKXCvR763j7odPYJzjWBg/rRljmJ892H8927eCrSS9Fdo5Ng)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/FOmvKXCvR763j7odPYJzjWBg/rRljmJ892H8927eCrSS9Fdo5Ng) Just two weeks after I confronted Kevin McCarthy and NRCC Chairman Tom Emmer for their decision to ignore the traitorous actions of Liz Cheney and the nine other RINOs who voted to impeach President Trump . . . they actually did something.

In a toothless resolution, the RNC censured Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger for their participation in the Democrat-led January 6th Commission.

Make no mistake, RNC Chairwoman Ronna Romney's purpose in doing this was to appease America First patriots like us . . . because even the feckless RNC leadership understands that the America First movement is exactly that . . . a MOVEMENT.

But of course, days after the censure, the RNC backtracked after the Leftist Media went after them. The statement read, "Those who engaged in violence on January 6th and committed crimes should be held accountable."

Their CYA statement contradicted their original censure statement where they said that those who participated in the January 6th protest were engaged in "legitimate political discourse."

**What wimps!!**

The Leftist Media launched a mild attack, and the RNC buckled faster than Kamala Harris' knees when she was "working" for San Francisco Mayor Willie Brown!

It's pathetic.

And it's why I'm running, to bring BOLD, Conservative leadership to Washington, and I won't back down to the attacks launched by the Mainstream Media and Communists in Congress. [**Help me get there today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/FOmvKXCvR763j7odPYJzjWBg/rRljmJ892H8927eCrSS9Fdo5Ng)

While the RNC censured Cheney and Kinzinger for participating in the January 6th Commission, they looked the other way when my RINO opponent, Do-Nothing Dan Webster didn't even bother to cast a vote opposing the creation of that witch hunt commission! They also looked the other way when Do-Nothing Dan skipped the vote on the Second Impeachment of President Trump . . . when they should have punished him!

Their actions highlight a few things . . .

First, the "leadership" of the RNC and NRCC don't stand on principles. They sway in the wind, and can be easily pressured to stand with us, or stand against us.

**I proved that by exposing their weakness against Cheney - and they reacted by censuring her.**

But, the media flipped it right back with just a hint of pressure, and the feckless leadership of the RNC swayed right back to the Left.

God forbid they ever offend the Communist talking heads at CNN and MSDNC!

Paaaathetic!

If you don't know who you are and what you stand for BEFORE you get to Washington, you will stand for nothing except maintaining your own power at the expense of your constituents.

**And[when I get to Congress](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/FOmvKXCvR763j7odPYJzjWBg/rRljmJ892H8927eCrSS9Fdo5Ng), you better believe that I'll be applying constant pressure to the RNC and holding them accountable for all of their actions . . . and INACTIONS.**

I know who I am. I know what I believe, and my values are unshakable! You will NEVER find me swaying in the wind of public or media opinion, so if you're able to, [**please contribute to my campaign today and help me win so I CAN FIGHT FOR YOU in the halls of Congress!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/FOmvKXCvR763j7odPYJzjWBg/rRljmJ892H8927eCrSS9Fdo5Ng)

Thank you so much,

Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/rRljmJ892H8927eCrSS9Fdo5Ng)
[Web Version](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/rRljmJ892H8927eCrSS9Fdo5Ng)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
With you on his team, he’ll soon help lead our Republican Party to victory. | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=af5baa02d64449e0bacb16272104713a&_e=WLIFeDBw_nUUdXlj6UObOHzflAw-Pln26WjOU80-Etq-2nCHcJBrz7IwhsGvMNvB3hf1WzZ-ckGUGbNrY6XlnL8lQfk_3GmxTWrVJsFXYrqGiVwuaqMgeXQK6nXBIyhnQ8KIK56hE-6neBgGdUv_GBw6zJ22ORcjboN2khZYhtnhNXC4QcjJu7V5uwk3NflSVlioe41Fdc2KKv9JYgQjw6eTVt8PdKxZoTunEAo7mx5EwRY_yJIsBbEuzX7O9Nq2vUZv8c0JtFVQ8mtkRtLx9Vzh0jh9SgCHnefK9W_yzBDKsJgeHUK5Xi3By-3GDbfBcfAIGDZlljw_OKnsHs27t-ml6C-WGOU61rNSvaR4NYHt6-y4vzyPXeIte1NIZhtz2svfPeS76SBYXXz6m3GdhsBENr088yjuNXe-k3CXXciRG2pISnCMNqdEfbFD7VO2)

Fellow Conservative,

Even a great running back like Herschel Walker - a three time All-American and Heisman Trophy winner at the University of Georgia - depended on his teammates to help him be his best.

**[And just like the lineman and tight ends that made key blocks to open a path for Herschel so he could lead the team to victory, he needs the difference making support of grassroots patriots like you to win an historic U.S. Senate victory!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=af5baa02d64449e0bacb16272104713a&_e=WLIFeDBw_nUUdXlj6UObOHzflAw-Pln26WjOU80-Etq-2nCHcJBrz7IwhsGvMNvB3hf1WzZ-ckGUGbNrY6XlnL8lQfk_3GmxTWrVJsFXYrqGiVwuaqMgeXQK6nXBIyhnQ8KIK56hE-6neBgGdUv_GBw6zJ22ORcjboN2khZYhtnhNXC4QcjJu7V5uwk3NflSVlioe41Fdc2KKv9JYgQjw6eTVt8PdKxZoTunEAo7mx7d6xewoH9dqChGIrfofLPfU9BPcKyhW0YC38dvRffiXAIluOWhCdhPvN9Yd-I642ujC_s0PA9yFU3rXQmp_06RTGsSYh3vtymu775Evenw1ab6xI2Rnd8nNHpJ-xqCUmmGZcxUFVgDFnq3iBQF5H-mMFC665oIY4h9b58Sqojlsl7yOjsJxX2vUa6MKyHh7XdWBZWp36kWbaLMaFO8fSLI)**

[**SUPPORT HERSCHEL FOR SENATE -> **](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=af5baa02d64449e0bacb16272104713a&_e=WLIFeDBw_nUUdXlj6UObOHzflAw-Pln26WjOU80-Etq-2nCHcJBrz7IwhsGvMNvB3hf1WzZ-ckGUGbNrY6XlnL8lQfk_3GmxTWrVJsFXYrqGiVwuaqMgeXQK6nXBIyhnQ8KIK56hE-6neBgGdUv_GBw6zJ22ORcjboN2khZYhtnhNXC4QcjJu7V5uwk3NflSVlioe41Fdc2KKv9JYgQjw6eTVt8PdKxZoTunEAo7mx6Lbio4wHJvQJ_imuG5iQLIDpfg9pWGSXUwOWgolnNFwfhlZaKAyABz8e9ySk66gJB1W982QC39Y3DXVn8aIyq-PacvVrr4Vga8p1a0KJ5o6_W5a2zMvskZr-2YGGF2GG7ina4D4qyOiQ0_GwxQItzKqWVBqKcxg3OEoyib_P6B_bSomP2eFY2BUaBQfUkMrADIndCT6y0BmgBJt0wypJJg)
Fellow Conservative, we all know Herschel Walker is one of the greatest football players of all time, but he’s so much more than that, and with you on his team, he’ll soon help lead our Republican Party to victory not just in the pivotal Georgia Senate race, but to a new GOP majority in the U.S. Senate as well!

Herschel has been an Olympic athlete, a mixed martial artist, an entrepreneur and CEO, an advocate for mental health, a husband, father and patriot, and he’s ready to bring his wealth of leadership experience, conservative values, and extraordinary character to Washington, D.C. as Georgia’s next U.S. Senator.

**[Will you take this opportunity to help him build momentum, get his winning message to Georgia voters, and win on Election Day with a generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even more today?](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=af5baa02d64449e0bacb16272104713a&_e=WLIFeDBw_nUUdXlj6UObOHzflAw-Pln26WjOU80-Etq-2nCHcJBrz7IwhsGvMNvB3hf1WzZ-ckGUGbNrY6XlnL8lQfk_3GmxTWrVJsFXYrqGiVwuaqMgeXQK6nXBIyhnQ8KIK56hE-6neBgGdUv_GBw6zJ22ORcjboN2khZYhtnhNXC4QcjJu7V5uwk3NflSVlioe41Fdc2KKv9JYgQjw6eTVt8PdKxZoTunEAo7mx7rR4dBW_loLF3tzw3qwmMRLXhhj_ElxDadAlSvbZDbmfhbgjbSKwj248qFcn5eumdsJTdTPu951E4tHNIK8O0KWZS3cOIB6UIPoEZj-MwnIs3hMOnC7leZ8-9I1dlyk4_lWx7hfJrKy6s3QkS43lDwtjCpz1kGImySc0PwOOfHyJrwi8afp35749t_8IxNEdwbGTPxQkGyWaY1VGxcIFb2)**

**[I can’t wait to see Herschel Walker join our GOP Senate team, but he needs you to join his team to make that possible, Fellow Conservative!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=af5baa02d64449e0bacb16272104713a&_e=WLIFeDBw_nUUdXlj6UObOHzflAw-Pln26WjOU80-Etq-2nCHcJBrz7IwhsGvMNvB3hf1WzZ-ckGUGbNrY6XlnL8lQfk_3GmxTWrVJsFXYrqGiVwuaqMgeXQK6nXBIyhnQ8KIK56hE-6neBgGdUv_GBw6zJ22ORcjboN2khZYhtnhNXC4QcjJu7V5uwk3NflSVlioe41Fdc2KKv9JYgQjw6eTVt8PdKxZoTunEAo7mx6XlCdPPd7ca154K-w66jwKImlzxjzdUYdk_xY6UV9LTCf3OV9JhAhivDfJlT2Ag3BCnQwxWmHYsgaemKquTx5ZJ-BXjcQz29h3wZS1q_d43E0C-AP8f7fRKbSM8hN_neQhhKugWYAIyjBK00_qBIJ5nQxqRVExLTBb8f3oMC1pLbYek9wjM_z7YtehNOo5oX0xzN4KUmDnj-Uy3lobeDNc)**

Thank you, Fellow Conservative - I hope to hear from you today.

Sincerely,

Senator Steve Daines

|
_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=af5baa02d64449e0bacb16272104713a&_e=WLIFeDBw_nUUdXlj6UObOHzflAw-Pln26WjOU80-Etq-2nCHcJBrz7IwhsGvMNvB3hf1WzZ-ckGUGbNrY6XlnL8lQfk_3GmxTWrVJsFXYrqGiVwuaqMgeXQK6nXBIyhnQ8KIK56hE-6neBgGdUv_GBw6zJ22ORcjboN2khZYhtnhNXC4QcjJu7V5uwk3NflSVlioe41Fdc2KKv9JYgQjw6eTVt8PdKxZoTunEAo7mx5oXk4LBzRjpuoxGUmyXJ7g_f_2PCm2ZkxlrVok0NL9MKXzpPBuabJng1LHqB7hvREgryqIPvV-vspfT3A-2OQpfRARowj6JYtNnqgOT0Qa7fctPxCPDnYpaJ-tIVtTTxpCRjXaIOCG0uwLptxYPkZamQQPp6j2PB-Y_HZrQGkFmYCNSyhYzHw9VZ1j5bd_Zc6jM4LjaTELgnQU5mwvWMOf)

Herschel has been an Olympic athlete, a mixed martial artist, an entrepreneur and CEO, an advocate for mental health, a husband, father and patriot, and he’s ready to bring his wealth of leadership experience, conservative values, and extraordinary character to Washington, D.C. as Georgia’s next U.S. Senator. Thank you, Fellow Conservative - I hope to hear from you today. Sincerely, Senator Steve Daines | Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana Don't want to receive our emails? e

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: This week on voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Racial gerrymandering, now legal thanks to Trump’s Supreme Court, will limit the voting power of communities of color across the country.
#
Peter,
This week, Trump’s Supreme Court crushed a key component of the Voting Rights Act. **[Chip in $3 to help our movement fight back »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10408?refcode=em20220211-1022&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1022%2E420207%2EjGRKqV)**
First, a lower court ruled that Alabama had to redraw its blatant racial gerrymander because it took voting power away from communities of color. Then, on Monday, the Supreme Court _overturned_ that decision, allowing Alabama’s racial gerrymander to stand.
Racial gerrymandering, now legal thanks to Trump’s Supreme Court, will limit the voting power of communities of color across the country. With Republicans introducing over 400 bills to restrict voting rights in state legislatures across the country, this blow to the Voting Rights Act endangers our democracy at a critical moment.
**We have to restore balance to our democracy by ending the filibuster, expanding the Supreme Court, and passing voting rights legislation. Are you with me, Peter?**
[**Chip in $3 or anything at all to fuel my advocacy for these three urgent policies we need to protect our democracy. The conservative Supreme Court and GOP insurrectionists are tearing away voting rights and the very foundations of our free and fair elections. We can’t waste any more time.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10408?refcode=em20220211-1022&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1022%2E420207%2EjGRKqV)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10408?refcode=em20220211-1022&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1022%2E420207%2EjGRKqV)**
Conservatives have waged an attack on the Voting Rights Act via the court for years. In 2013, the Supreme Court stripped away some of the protections and rights guaranteed by the Voting Rights Act that had been law since 1965.
If we do not use our majorities in the House and Senate to end the filibuster, expand the Supreme Court and pass new voting rights legislation, the right-wing will continue to weaken the Voting Rights Act.
[**Our democracy is on the line. Can you help me fight back with a $3 contribution today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10408?refcode=em20220211-1022&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1022%2E420207%2EjGRKqV)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220211-1022-footer&t=23&refcode2=1022_420207_jGRKqV&akid=1022%2E420207%2EjGRKqV)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: What I learned from Grandpa Earl
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I want to tell you a quick story about my grandpa Earl.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3h8b5--fgxr-4qqlpo1&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h8b5-1xwxz-4qqlpo7/)
---
I guess I come by disruption and shooting straight naturally. In the Pompeo family, I’ve often been compared to my grandfather, Earl Mercer. Grandpa Earl was pretty rough cut, and he always said what was on his mind.

He never won a “Mr. Congeniality” contest, but when the going got tough, you wanted Grandpa Earl around. In the 1940s, Grandpa Earl was the Sheriff of Mitchell County, Kansas. Population today: less than 6,500.

Us grandkids learned a lot from Grandpa Earl. He was regarded as a great sheriff because he knew who he was and never tried to be something else—and he knew who the people of Mitchell County were and what they expected—and he respected that.

We learned to always stay true to ourselves and move on down the road. Never give up. Never stop fighting.

We are in a battle right now for the future of our country. It might be easy to get discouraged watching the radical Left try to move our country in entirely the wrong direction. _But we can’t back down or give in. We have to stay in the fight and stand up for what is right._

That’s exactly what I am doing, and I want you to be among the first to know.

I have started an organization - Champion American Values PAC or CAVPAC. Through CAVPAC, I’m doing everything I can to elect more principled conservative leaders who won’t give an inch to the radical Left and who will always put America first.

**[I’m humbly asking you to join me in our efforts](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h8b5-1xwy0-4qqlpo4/ "I’m humbly asking you to join me in our efforts")**. As a member of the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry, you can join me on the frontlines in the battle for the future of our country. I’m going to continue traveling all across the country to support conservatives as we push to win back the House, the Senate, Governorships and races up and down the ballot.

I need your help if we are going to be successful. As a top grassroots leader, I’m hoping you will make a donation of $100, $50 or $25 to help us push back against the radical Left and champion American values. **[Chip in to become a member of the Conservative Cavalry before it’s too late>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h8b5-1xwy1-4qqlpo5/ "Chip in to become a member of the Conservative Cavalry before it’s too late >>>")** I promise you that I will never stop fighting for our values, our freedoms, and our country. _Because Grandpa Earl taught me to keep my faith, to work hard and to never give an inch._

Fighting for our future,
[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h8b5-1xwy2-4qqlpo6/)
Mike Pompeo

PS: **[Please join me as a member of the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry in the next 24 hours](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3h8b5-1xwy3-4qqlpo7/ " Please join me as a member of the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry in the next 24 hours") **to help our organization send a clear message to the radical Left that we are a force to be reckoned with.
---
| |

Many of these voters don’t know who I am yet and the work I’ve done, which is why I am calling on long-time supporters like you to endorse my campaign. subject: Expressing my gratitude

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQK5i5bJ0D_H_09LgcZp5uFE0uIjofAduQty9vNFY-fIJx01XUjbTm2D6OW3zxZqi8wMX-4s00wP75TvOj2Wd4eBm8o7sJYCbxnBxycM-26hdC0EaO2FF7mE-hChi-qg18pKQL0Q4B0rA_5HqnCbdtoAjaztI86Gus6BM1sdkwiRHgjvoR6oHRNa3YFSD_rPEoTGjDyGodww5e34xeW1H-7c_mCealmtb_UYYYE3AmzclvdJRNMVjeuSiaoUzQRcQQFqibG6aw3FLW4CEauEBP_OpeKy9Mgs_5kPSp2wMqjt7hyW2IFeTLiR2fceMCqv88/3jh/dj_2UmvSS8Keg2XoHN_aBg/h0/GEd8DC3gQw9RhlsIoGq2x5Ps_HkrwU7BVlW3wxy_LZQ)
---
I want to express my heartfelt gratitude to all who have supported me on my run for Congress. It's been a true honor to have met, spoken with, corresponded by mail and over social media with so many good people who also see our country going down a scary path. All of that changed in the past couple years — especially after witnessing the violent insurrection that took place on January 6th. Every American watched the Republican "leader" betray his oath of office, "to defend the Constitution against ALL enemies foreign and DOMESTIC." This was an oath I took at 17 when I joined the U.S. Navy and the same oath my father took as a WWII Veteran. I was even more appalled by McCarthy's actions to overturn the Election just hours after the violence of that insurrection. I also saw a district that has been horribly neglected and ignored by that same representative for over a decade. It was ALWAYS going to be an uphill battle to compete as a Democrat in a VERY Red district against someone who is bankrolled by big corporations and wealthy donors with tens of millions, but the hope was always that redistricting would provide a more level playing field. Sadly, the exact opposite occurred, grossly protecting the incumbent. This leaves me no viable path forward. After consulting with my team and trusted friends, I have decided to suspend my campaign for Congress. I can assure you this — I will continue to be a vocal defender of our sacred American democracy, and support those who put country before party. Respectfully, Bruno Amato

name: The A-Team
subject: [SIGN THE PETITION] Nominate a Black woman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANGELA ANGEL FOR MARYLAND PO Box 471455
body:
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41691670/329918618/-1658601434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzdkZmMwZC04MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LON5UfcZUPC7yYgfe8JrYcKgYuaLnr0apNtM5u8TDGo=&emci=a1744b9f-d28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a37dfc0d-818b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8410825)
---
Friend,

For decades, we've watched a mostly all-white, male Supreme Court make decisions that have fundamentally shaped American life and policy. Since the Supreme Court convened in 1789, there have been 115 justices to sit on the bench. Of those, **108 have been white men.**

**Folks, it's time for a change.**

Representation and diversity are prerequisites for a healthy, fully realized democracy. With the retirement of Justice Breyer, we have a historic opportunity to build this reality and move the needle of justice and equity in the right direction.

As Marylanders, we know all too well what a lack of representation looks like (**cough cough** Maryland's all-male Congressional representatives). Angela's been on the ground advocating for diverse perspectives in power and creating a system of government that represents all voices.

**That's why the A-Team is thrilled to join forces with Sistascotus – an organization dedicated to getting a Black woman on the highest court in the land.**

**[Will you add your name alongside Angela's? Sign the Sistascotus petition urging President Biden to fulfill his campaign promise and nominate a Black woman to the Supreme Court>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41691671/329918619/1957794312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzdkZmMwZC04MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LON5UfcZUPC7yYgfe8JrYcKgYuaLnr0apNtM5u8TDGo=&emci=a1744b9f-d28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a37dfc0d-818b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8410825)** [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41691672/329918625/1957794312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzdkZmMwZC04MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LON5UfcZUPC7yYgfe8JrYcKgYuaLnr0apNtM5u8TDGo=&emci=a1744b9f-d28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a37dfc0d-818b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8410825) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41691673/329918632/1957794312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzdkZmMwZC04MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LON5UfcZUPC7yYgfe8JrYcKgYuaLnr0apNtM5u8TDGo=&emci=a1744b9f-d28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a37dfc0d-818b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8410825)
---

Above is a photo of my daughters taking part in a Sistascotus shoot back when RBG passed away. It was an inspiring moment for them and me because it showed the power of representation. When my little girls watch the next Supreme Court Justice get sworn in, I want them to _know_ they could be up there too one day.

The reality is, it's been Black women who've been on the frontlines fighting for voting rights, ending police violence and expanding access to healthcare, childcare, education and policies that make the lives of Americans better.

Black women have shown up – at the polls and in communities – and deserve to be represented in the places where decisions are made, especially on the Supreme Court.

**Black women have only made our democracy better – it's past time to have representation on the highest court in the country.**

**[Join Angela and Sistascotus – sign the petition today urging President Biden to nominate a Black Woman.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41691674/329918640/1957794312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzdkZmMwZC04MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LON5UfcZUPC7yYgfe8JrYcKgYuaLnr0apNtM5u8TDGo=&emci=a1744b9f-d28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a37dfc0d-818b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8410825) **
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41691675/329918647/1957794312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzdkZmMwZC04MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LON5UfcZUPC7yYgfe8JrYcKgYuaLnr0apNtM5u8TDGo=&emci=a1744b9f-d28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a37dfc0d-818b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8410825)
Folks, this moment has the potential to be transformative; we must speak out to make sure we get the justice that is owed – a Black woman on the Supreme Court.

Thank you so much for being a part of this movement,

The A-Team

clean_body: | Friend, For decades, we've watched a mostly all-white, male Supreme Court make decisions that have fundamentally shaped American life and policy. Since the Supreme Court convened in 1789, there have been 115 justices to sit on the bench. Of those, 108 have been white men. Folks, it's time for a change. Representation and diversity are prerequisites for a healthy, fully realized democracy. With the retirement of Justice Breyer, we have a historic opportunity to build this reality and move the needle of justice and equity in the right direction. As Marylanders, we know all too well what a lack of representation looks like (cough cough Maryland's all-male Congressional representatives). Angela's been on the ground advocating for diverse perspectives in power and creating a system of government that represents all voices. That's why the A-Team is thrilled to join forces with Sistascotus – an organization dedicated to getting a Black woman on the highest court in the land. | Above is a photo of my daughters taking part in a Sistascotus shoot back when RBG passed away. It was an inspiring moment for them and me because it showed the power of representation. When my little girls watch the next Supreme Court Justice get sworn in, I want them to know they could be up there too one day. The reality is, it's been Black women who've been on the frontlines fighting for voting rights, ending police violence and expanding access to healthcare, childcare, education and policies that make the lives of Americans better. Black women have shown up – at the polls and in communities – and deserve to be represented in the places where decisions are made, especially on the Supreme Court. Black women have only made our democracy better – it's past time to have representation on the highest court in the country. Folks, this moment has the potential to be transformative; we must speak out to make sure we get the justice that is owed – a Black woman on the Supreme Court. Thank you so much for being a part of this movement, The A-Team = PAID FOR BY ANGELA ANGEL FOR MARYLAND PO Box 471455 District Heights, MD 20753 240-293-2552 This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. You can .

subject: Join our fight to secure the border

body:
President Joe Biden has created a CRISIS on our southern border, allowing thousands upon thousands of illegal and unvetted immig
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zem2qmadqfp2vvor83la1qe2ignhmalihg4ajjd0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi6ao30cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65slim4prddtimdgm9otgc3jjcd3j6aob3cjjeir38t31mdq70plmesorcd9jchjjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3applmdg7cpb66hjj6p77m2qmash5u)

Dear Fellow Patriot, President Joe Biden has created a CRISIS on our southern border, allowing thousands upon thousands of illegal and unvetted immigrants to stream into our country. **I’m State Rep. Patrick Neville and I need your help.** As a State Representative I have traveled the country working with liberty-minded conservatives to secure our southern border. **That’s why I’m supporting Take Back America PAC -- they are FIGHTING to secure our borders.** | [**SECURE BORDER DONATION**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu6jh3p10g7f140o3dkk94iscvisrkan4ahtt5to_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi6ao30cjh2bs)
---
These illegal immigrants are chasing the extravagant WELFARE HANDOUTS promised by Joe Biden.
Biden’s LACK of leadership is destroying American communities and flooding the country with unvetted, illegal immigrants.
WE MUST secure our border!
Take Back America PAC’s SECURE BORDER INITIATIVE is designed to STOP Biden’s border security crisis in its tracks.
I have worked with these patriots for years, and I know you and I can trust them to FIGHT to secure our borders, not just prop up the Open Borders Establishment.
**Take Back America PAC’s SECURE BORDER INITIATIVE is a deceptively simple but DIRECT approach:**
* Step 1 -- **Expose the voting records of any and all members of Congress -- from either party -- who support open borders or voted against President Trump’s border wall.**
* Step 2 -- Elect a **ROCK SOLID, conservative Republican majority in Congress to STOP Biden’s Border Security Crisis.** Take Back America PAC WILL ONLY support candidates who have committed IN WRITING to securing our southern border.
* Step 3 -- Aggressively lobby the new Congress to **DEFUND all of Joe Biden’s illegal immigrant welfare handouts, and cut off his open-borders agenda.**

Take Back America PAC is COMMITTED to holding politicians accountable. The ONLY way our borders will be secured is by holding politicians' feet to the fire. Voters across America need to know how their politicians are voting.
Not everyone has the stomach for that kind of work. The Open Borders Establishment hates to hold politicians accountable and they have their hooks in BOTH parties.
**That’s why I hope you’ll help me and the good people at Take Back America PAC fight to SECURE OUR BORDERS with a contribution TODAY.**
**[Please click here to make a secure donation of $25, $50, $100, $250 or even $500 to fund Take Back American’s SECURE BORDER 2022 INITIATIVE today!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvage2gbmcteg828s914p1orstgmlg4t23p30jgo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi6ao30cjh2bs)**

I know that’s a lot to ask, but the situation on our southern border is THAT serious.
Even if you can only chip in $10 or $10, your investment will be well stewarded by Take Back America PAC.
The great power in America comes from the voice of We The People, not from the government. Congress won’t secure our borders until patriots like you and I organize and make our voices heard. That’s why I’m so excited to be working with the patriots at Take Back America PAC.
I believe in Take Back America PAC’s **SECURE BORDER INITIATIVE.**
**[I hope you’ll join me in supporting their plan to hold congress accountable for securing the border.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvh4onjafhaaonuinhdvlo8gqmtv7a4p82n7h7ao_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi6ao30cjh2bs)**
For secure borders,

-Patrick

State Representative Pat Neville (CO)
Advisory Committee Chair - Take Back America PAC

Take Back America PAC is COMMITTED to holding politicians accountable. The ONLY way our borders will be secured is by holding politicians' feet to the fire. Voters across America need to know how their politicians are voting.**

Team, the political terrain of our race has changed a lot over the last two weeks.

With a new map, a new electorate, a slate of new opponents, and an official designation as a tossup race – it's safe to say that our mission to take this seat back for working people and families will only succeed if everyone on this team is well informed and working together.

**That's why Kara, Perry Gershon, and our senior campaign staff are meeting virtually with supporters next Tuesday, February 15th at 7:00 pm ET, for LI for Kara: _What it takes to flip the 1st._**

We'll discuss the state of the race and how our new map will affect campaign strategy. It's an important moment for the whole team to get aligned on the work ahead of us.

name: Donna Imam
subject: Congress needs expertise in this area
body:
Congress relies on lobbyists that dictate the content of bills that address technology. They’re not looking out for Americans, we need leaders that will. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41692336/329921315/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDA5ZjNkYS04MzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGvMZtIpmp7moGQRsy_16GecacQeVXRNaLJEAksQBNQ=)
Friend, Right now, Congress has a lack of representatives that have depth in understanding of science and technology. I built my career at some of the most iconic tech companies in Austin, including Motorola/Freescale and Dell. With an 18+ year career in high tech, I’ve championed many successful products that are used by millions across our country and worldwide. Congress relies on lobbyists that dictate the content of bills addressing technology. Most members of Congress don’t have the depth of expertise to ensure that these bills are meeting the needs of our future. **[Some industries have up to 3 lobbyists for every member of Congress — that’s just ridiculous. We need leadership to ensure that we pass laws that meet the needs of the next generation. Friend can you contribute $5, $35, or $50 today so we can get out the vote and win this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41692338/329921317/-780221392?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220211_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDA5ZjNkYS04MzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hGvMZtIpmp7moGQRsy_16GecacQeVXRNaLJEAksQBNQ=)**

Congress has failed to look out for the American people and this needs to change. For example, over the past few years we had so many data privacy breaches (Equifax, Facebook) and Congress failed to hold those corporations accountable. Congress was unable to anticipate supply chain issues like the chip shortage that led to high prices of cars and other household products, which is hurting consumers and working families. I built my career at some of the most iconic tech companies in Austin, including Motorola/Freescale and Dell. With an 18+ year career in high tech, I’ve championed many successful products that are used by millions across our country and worldwide. Congress relies on lobbyists that dictate the content of bills addressing technology. Most members of Congress don’t have the depth of expertise to ensure that these bills are meeting the needs of our future. = Congress has failed to look out for the American people and this needs to change. For example, over the past few years we had so many data privacy breaches (Equifax, Facebook) and Congress failed to hold those corporations accountable. Congress was unable to anticipate supply chain issues like the chip shortage that led to high prices of cars and other household products, which is hurting consumers and working families. Yesterday, Nick sent out an email asking you what you think. The best way to make sure we defeat Ann Wagner and deliver for St. Louis is to hear from you.
So what is at the top of your list?
- Ben

subject: re: Rural New Deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hey. It’s Erica Smith.

I grew up picking corn and cucumbers on my family's farm in eastern North
Carolina.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/39965?refcode=em20220211-870&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=870%2E3698%2ESkP19Z ][IMG]

It was hard work then, and it’s only gotten harder since — for us and for
working families everywhere.

Right now, too much support goes to corporate farms. We have to do more to
support family farms, and that’s what I’ll fight for in Congress.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/39965?refcode=em20220211-870&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=870%2E3698%2ESkP19Z ]If you believe D.C. needs a proud dirt road Democrat, chip in ANY
amount to help us win.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/39965?refcode=em20220211-870&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=870%2E3698%2ESkP19Z ]Donate $5

Corporate farms are destroying rural communities. They are devastating for the
environment, our economy, family farmers, and workers.

We must secure farmworkers’ rights to unionize, ensure small farmers can
repair their own equipment, promote climate justice, take on corporate
monopolies, lift up our family farms, and so much more. We need a Rural
New Deal — and I’m fighting for it without taking a dime of corporate PAC
money.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/39965?refcode=em20220211-870&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=870%2E3698%2ESkP19Z ]Can you chip in $5 — or any amount you can — to help
send me to the U.S. House? I promise I’ll fight *hard* for farming
families like mine in North Carolina and beyond.

Together,

Erica
Erica Smith for Congress

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

name: Kina Collins
subject: This is gun violence in Chicago
body:
The fact that I faced federal charges for protesting before Van Dyke faced federal charges for Laquan’s murder tells you everything you need to know about our justice system.
#
_Content warning: This email discusses police brutality and murder._
* * *
Peter,
Last week, I was arrested along with other activists protesting the early release of Jason Van Dyke, the white police officer who shot and killed 17-year-old Laquan McDonald.
Van Dyke shot a 17-year-old Black child 16 times, then reloaded his gun. He was released from prison early last week after serving less than half of his 81 month sentence. Think about that. Just three years for the vicious murder of a child.
And for protesting this injustice, I was fined $200 and banned from the federal courthouse in Chicago for 60 days.
**The fact that I faced federal charges for protesting before Van Dyke faced federal charges for the brutal murder of a Black child tells you everything you need to know about our justice system.** It wasn’t created for people who look like me, or people who look like Laquan McDonald.
One of the U.S. Marshals who arrested us on Thursday asked me why we were protesting the release of Van Dyke and not the gun violence in Chicago, so I want to be abundantly clear: This is gun violence in Chicago. As much as Laquan was a victim of police brutality, he was also a victim of gun violence. His life was ended the same way too many lives end in Chicago — with bullets.
I was the Executive Director of the largest gun violence prevention organization in Illinois. This is a cause I’ve dedicated my life to. And it’s a fight I will bring to D.C. and the halls of Congress.
[Can you help amplify my calls for justice and help me take our fight to Congress? Split a contribution to my campaign and Justice Democrats today so I can advocate for gun violence prevention and police accountability legislation in Congress.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94081?refcode=em20220211-21920&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=21920%2E1203867%2EKGXtK-)
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94081?refcode=em20220211-21920&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=21920%2E1203867%2EKGXtK-)**
Our protest at the Dirksen Federal Building in downtown Chicago last week was to make clear that Laquan McDonald’s life was sacred. We didn’t just protest Van Dyke, his sham sentence, and the injustice of his early release. We showed up, spoke out, and engaged in civil disobedience to amplify Laquan’s story.
Our hope is that one day, this type of excessive use of force by police — and this type of gun violence — will no longer be the reality for Black Americans. Because that is what justice truly looks like.
Thank you for being a part of our fight for accountability and justice, and my campaign for Congress.
In solidarity,
Kina Collins

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=21&akid=21920%2E1203867%2EKGXtK-) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=22&akid=21920%2E1203867%2EKGXtK-) and your state public health department.

clean_body: The fact that I faced federal charges for protesting before Van Dyke faced federal charges for Laquan’s murder tells you everything you need to know about our justice system. Content warning: This email discusses police brutality and murder. Peter, Last week, I was arrested along with other activists protesting the early release of Jason Van Dyke, the white police officer who shot and killed 17-year-old Laquan McDonald. Van Dyke shot a 17-year-old Black child 16 times, then reloaded his gun. He was released from prison early last week after serving less than half of his 81 month sentence. Think about that. Just three years for the vicious murder of a child. And for protesting this injustice, I was fined $200 and banned from the federal courthouse in Chicago for 60 days. The fact that I faced federal charges for protesting before Van Dyke faced federal charges for the brutal murder of a Black child tells you everything you need to know about our justice system. It wasn’t created for people who look like me, or people who look like Laquan McDonald. One of the U.S. Marshals who arrested us on Thursday asked me why we were protesting the release of Van Dyke and not the gun violence in Chicago, so I want to be abundantly clear: This is gun violence in Chicago. As much as Laquan was a victim of police brutality, he was also a victim of gun violence. His life was ended the same way too many lives end in Chicago — with bullets. I was the Executive Director of the largest gun violence prevention organization in Illinois. This is a cause I’ve dedicated my life to. And it’s a fight I will bring to D.C. and the halls of Congress. - - Our protest at the Dirksen Federal Building in downtown Chicago last week was to make clear that Laquan McDonald’s life was sacred. We didn’t just protest Van Dyke, his sham sentence, and the injustice of his early release. We showed up, spoke out, and engaged in civil disobedience to amplify Laquan’s story. Our hope is that one day, this type of excessive use of force by police — and this type of gun violence — will no longer be the reality for Black Americans. Because that is what justice truly looks like. Thank you for being a part of our fight for accountability and justice, and my campaign for Congress. In solidarity, Kina Collins Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank - We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the - and your state public health department. - Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. subject: ALERT: Call your State Senator today
body:
This is urgent. David needs your help to fight back against Brian Kemp's latest desperate attempt to rig this election in his favor. | | | [ ](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=97c83a9068&e=89fb4d5220)
---
| Team,

_**This is urgent.**_ David needs your help to fight back against Brian Kemp's latest desperate attempt to rig this election in his favor.

As you know, Kemp signed a backroom deal last session to create an unfair advantage in this race. When he thought no one was watching, Kemp gave himself the ability to raise unlimited amounts, while challengers like David Perdue had to play by different rules. That's unconstitutional and corrupt – and we took Kemp to court over it.

This week, the court ruled in Perdue's favor and Kemp lost his slush fund.

Now, Kemp is scrambling and wants to ram through another **_Incumbent Protection Act_** (HB333) to try and silence challengers like Perdue by preventing them from raising money. This is nothing more than a blatant attempt to rig the process and protect career politicians.

Once again, Kemp is trying to change the rules in the middle of the game. This is the height of corruption, but it's business as usual for a career politician like Kemp who has been running for office for over 20 years!

The Georgia General Assembly could vote on Kemp's Incumbent Protection Act (HB333) at any moment.

**_Please [call your State Senator](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=de71103728&e=89fb4d5220) and tell them to _VOTE NO_ on Kemp's Incumbent _****_Protection Act _**(HB333)**_. _**

**_[Click here](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=d257463d98&e=89fb4d5220) _****_to look up your Senator by your home address._**

Thank you for your continued support.

– Team Perdue

Let me explain why even just a couple dollars makes a BIG difference.
Democrats are SURGING and if I came up short it’s likely they could WIN the majority this fall. This is an all hands-on deck moment for conservatives across the country. Please, if you want to PROTECT our way of life – donate RIGHT NOW!
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=efd134e6872e4bf0884658f6583108d6&_e=Q1NRdynHAJqMaSHVp1kE8MoVi8W8uYMQo4PZnX8_1JXDCyB5KWwyaAAuZri-felqx5aFPlpeDE35scY2dpcm0XPlU-1EQRxPs-SVVe9BkC9yQcI5Pegsqz6ITiQG_BS3E74_ATZ5FoQ6PzcGmmOHyRvZUvh__Q1G6jTwPSiU4UBwpbyRg3fm8XOvaIIk4PGQLEBaZLW7GqeuuGVpv9pEUwXgRWzoTLJ59fLvSig-KidB1gxN2s5JEULPCLBWfeGQrcuZryh8oz1_IQETYwqC7QqlmbZnOfSiGYeKw8rFJ_m4jEsEwcXFyWT8cxi1ZJnV5I-D0eyURVDmLNy38_NeMvokzNdtpV09mSBmey6H7-lG5KqCfTCLYJ_MWA6rCn0e) | | Peter,

1. The Democrats hold a razon-thin majority, and this Utah race is CRITICAL to Republicans WINNING BACK the Senate
2. I’m facing one of the most competitive field of challengers in recent HISTORY

name: V. Demings [Personal]
subject: I hope you'll give this a read, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
It's important for me to share my story
| | |
---
Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.
I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've _got_ to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked _hard._ And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had _faith. _I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693376/329925725/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjk0YmRhMy04NjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-SDF7ych0iEFiVEOa_MWFbtbpFXrpsjMniuIAI7apY=)
That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – _never_ tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.
**[I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693377/329925726/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjk0YmRhMy04NjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-SDF7ych0iEFiVEOa_MWFbtbpFXrpsjMniuIAI7apY=)**
_Never tire._ These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.
_Never tire,_ I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I _never tire_ of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.
This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians.** ****I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.**
[**So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is** _resources._**The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693378/329925727/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjk0YmRhMy04NjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-SDF7ych0iEFiVEOa_MWFbtbpFXrpsjMniuIAI7apY=)
Thank you for being in this with me. _Never tire._

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693379/329925728/1804727444?recurring=0&refcode=jtk2405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjk0YmRhMy04NjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-SDF7ych0iEFiVEOa_MWFbtbpFXrpsjMniuIAI7apY=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693380/329925729/1804727444?recurring=0&refcode=jtk2405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjk0YmRhMy04NjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-SDF7ych0iEFiVEOa_MWFbtbpFXrpsjMniuIAI7apY=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693381/329925730/-460395862?refcode=jtk2405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjk0YmRhMy04NjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-SDF7ych0iEFiVEOa_MWFbtbpFXrpsjMniuIAI7apY=&emci=7e27dba0-d589-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=c694bda3-868b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693386/329925735/-144803992?refcode=jtk2405-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjk0YmRhMy04NjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-SDF7ych0iEFiVEOa_MWFbtbpFXrpsjMniuIAI7apY=&emci=7e27dba0-d589-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=c694bda3-868b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7e27dba0-d589-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/c694bda3-868b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjk0YmRhMy04NjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-SDF7ych0iEFiVEOa_MWFbtbpFXrpsjMniuIAI7apY=&id=123159867).

clean_body: It's important for me to share my story | | | Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read. I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've got to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked hard. And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had faith. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career. = That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community. = Never tire. These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized. Never tire, I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law. This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians. I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win. = Thank you for being in this with me. Never tire. Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &
