### **\- American Rescue Plan *Still* Delivering for Hoosier Families Across Indiana -**
The Indiana Democratic Party continues to celebrate the brighter future the American Rescue Plan is **_STILL_** creating for the Hoosier State. This Monday, the Lafayette City Council approved an [$8 million plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693625/329926586/-1817305393?refcode=idp-em-220211-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjgyYTViZi04NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8ADbBIaXZQaqeZycEgCnbTz1rsOy1v-mpXgvpZlzXo=&emci=defd54de-6f8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0682a5bf-878b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) for many upgrades to the city’s water infrastructure system. And then on Tuesday, the Lake County Council gave the green light to a new plan to upgrade the county’s sewer systems - [an investment worth about $80 million](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693626/329926587/-1583182992?refcode=idp-em-220211-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjgyYTViZi04NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8ADbBIaXZQaqeZycEgCnbTz1rsOy1v-mpXgvpZlzXo=&emci=defd54de-6f8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0682a5bf-878b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535). **These new projects will create jobs and build a better tomorrow for Hoosier families - and Congressmen André Carson and Frank J. Mrvan delivered it.** The same cannot be said for Indiana Republicans who flat out voted “NO” on these investments. In fact, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer called these infrastructure projects [“socialism”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693627/329926588/-1180238315?refcode=idp-em-220211-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjgyYTViZi04NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8ADbBIaXZQaqeZycEgCnbTz1rsOy1v-mpXgvpZlzXo=&emci=defd54de-6f8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0682a5bf-878b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) and claimed their opposition to jobs was a [“great campaign to run on”](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693628/329926589/178131055?refcode=idp-em-220211-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjgyYTViZi04NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8ADbBIaXZQaqeZycEgCnbTz1rsOy1v-mpXgvpZlzXo=&emci=defd54de-6f8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0682a5bf-878b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535). Democrats will highlight the Republicans’ “NO” record throughout the statewide “The Jobs Tour”. Voters will learn that while Democrats delivered Indiana’s bright economic future, Republicans divided communities with their culture wars.
### **\- The Tale of the Three Todds -**
This week was the Tale of the Three Todds in the Indiana Republican Party where all three found ways to highlight how far the GOP goes to pursue their culture war agenda. Here’s how: **Todd Rokita:** Caught using taxpayer dollars to pay for a family vacation along the U.S. Southern border. Rokita also received a shout out from Donald Trump at a rally. **Todd Huston:** Resigned from a $460,000 / year job in order to sign into law House Bill 1134, which would politicize Indiana’s classrooms and further exacerbate the state’s teaching shortage. **Todd Young:** Described Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer as being a part of the “fringe group” responsible for the January 6 Insurrection. Hupfer voted to censure two Republicans for their ties to the U.S. House Select Committee on the terrorist attack. The RNC resolution said Jan. 6 was “legitimate political discourse.” So when Democrats say the INGOP will always put their culture wars first, this is why.
### **\- INDems Call on Rodric Bray, Jeff Raatz to Kill House Bill 1041 Following INGOP’s Coordination with National Hate Group -**
This week, the INDems called on Rodric Bray (Indiana Senate President Pro Tem) and Jeff Raatz (State Senator - District 27) to remove House Bill 1041 from the Indiana Senate calendar following reports showing a [clear coordination between the Indiana House GOP and Alliance Defending Freedom (ADF) - a national hate group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693629/329926590/732489254?refcode=idp-em-220211-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjgyYTViZi04NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8ADbBIaXZQaqeZycEgCnbTz1rsOy1v-mpXgvpZlzXo=&emci=defd54de-6f8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0682a5bf-878b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) \- with legislation that would bully and marginalize innocent minors. In fact, Indiana is a part of a national culture war strategy where anti-LGBTQ activists like Idaho State Rep. Barbara Ehardt parachute into states pushing this divisive policy. **The[Southern Poverty Law Center](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693630/329926591/1002651141?refcode=idp-em-220211-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjgyYTViZi04NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8ADbBIaXZQaqeZycEgCnbTz1rsOy1v-mpXgvpZlzXo=&emci=defd54de-6f8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0682a5bf-878b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535) designated the ADF as a [national hate group ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693631/329926592/1002651141?refcode=idp-em-220211-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjgyYTViZi04NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8ADbBIaXZQaqeZycEgCnbTz1rsOy1v-mpXgvpZlzXo=&emci=defd54de-6f8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0682a5bf-878b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535)for a longstanding effort against LGBTQ Americans that includes opposition to marriage equality and workplace rights and even supporting the effort to criminalize people for being LGBTQ altogether.** Indiana Republicans have come out as the Culture War Party during the 2022 legislation session. From Oath Keeper Scott Baldwin calling for educators to impartially teach Nazism in classrooms to the INGOP shoving through legislation to restrict voting rights, discrediting the COVID-19 vaccine, and bullying innocent minors – these culture wars are an election-year ploy to win votes. They are putting their divisive partisanship ahead of Indiana’s future.
### **\- Voice Your Opinion, INDems Platform Process Begins -**
It’s an election year across the state, and the Indiana Democratic Party is ready to travel to all 92 counties to help elect community leaders who will deliver on an economic agenda that includes creating jobs, supplying investments in broadband, improving roads/bridges, water, and other infrastructure needs, and securing a better future for the communities we call home. To do that, Indiana Democrats will also begin its biennial tradition of approving a party platform that includes all voices across the state. Hearing dates and locations are available below. Please take a look at a draft of the Indiana Democratic Party’s 2022 Platform, [“The Hoosier Promise” ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693632/329926593/-1920848487?refcode=idp-em-220211-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjgyYTViZi04NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8ADbBIaXZQaqeZycEgCnbTz1rsOy1v-mpXgvpZlzXo=&emci=defd54de-6f8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0682a5bf-878b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535)and consider submitting your suggestions online. Your ideas are valued and important and we’d like to craft a strong platform – with your help – and spread the news across the state during this critical election year.
### **\- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring -**
**War Room Director** The Indiana Democratic Party seeks a War Room Director to build an innovative program to hold the Indiana Republican Party accountable and inform and educate Hoosier voters year in and year out. A mix between rapid response and lead researcher, the director will work with the IDP team to push back against misinformation, disinformation, and conspiracy theories so all Hoosiers have the freedom to make better and informed decisions on the issues facing our state and country. **Voter File Administrator** The Indiana Democratic Party seeks a Voter File Administrator (VFA) to work on our data team to better serve candidates, committees, and local parties as we seek to build a stronger Democratic Party in the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategy, technology, and voter targeting and contact. IDP is making strides on this front and we want to add to our team with this important role. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at [https://www.indems.org/jobs/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693633/329926594/1076440731?refcode=idp-em-220211-fff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjgyYTViZi04NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8ADbBIaXZQaqeZycEgCnbTz1rsOy1v-mpXgvpZlzXo=&emci=defd54de-6f8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0682a5bf-878b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535)
### **\- Indiana Democratic Party Seeking Interns -**
The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. _Benefits_
* Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process
* Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials
* Enhanced communication and organizational skills
* Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development
* This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field.
* We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school.

_Intern Duties_ Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include:
* campaign research
* voter outreach
* data entry
* assistance with local campaign events
* special projects

_Qualifications_ Applicants must be:
* passionate about Democratic politics
* trustworthy and responsible
* able to communicate effectively with others
* flexible and willing to help when needed
* able to work on multiple tasks at once

**_How to Apply_** Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org.

clean_body: | \- American Rescue Plan Still Delivering for Hoosier Families Across Indiana - The Indiana Democratic Party continues to celebrate the brighter future the American Rescue Plan is STILL creating for the Hoosier State. This Monday, the Lafayette City Council approved an for many upgrades to the city’s water infrastructure system. And then on Tuesday, the Lake County Council gave the green light to a new plan to upgrade the county’s sewer systems - . These new projects will create jobs and build a better tomorrow for Hoosier families - and Congressmen André Carson and Frank J. Mrvan delivered it. The same cannot be said for Indiana Republicans who flat out voted “NO” on these investments. In fact, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer called these infrastructure projects and claimed their opposition to jobs was a . Democrats will highlight the Republicans’ “NO” record throughout the statewide “The Jobs Tour”. Voters will learn that while Democrats delivered Indiana’s bright economic future, Republicans divided communities with their culture wars. \- The Tale of the Three Todds - This week was the Tale of the Three Todds in the Indiana Republican Party where all three found ways to highlight how far the GOP goes to pursue their culture war agenda. Here’s how: Todd Rokita: Caught using taxpayer dollars to pay for a family vacation along the U.S. Southern border. Rokita also received a shout out from Donald Trump at a rally. Todd Huston: Resigned from a $460,000 / year job in order to sign into law House Bill 1134, which would politicize Indiana’s classrooms and further exacerbate the state’s teaching shortage. Todd Young: Described Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer as being a part of the “fringe group” responsible for the January 6 Insurrection. Hupfer voted to censure two Republicans for their ties to the U.S. House Select Committee on the terrorist attack. The RNC resolution said Jan. 6 was “legitimate political discourse.” So when Democrats say the INGOP will always put their culture wars first, this is why. \- INDems Call on Rodric Bray, Jeff Raatz to Kill House Bill 1041 Following INGOP’s Coordination with National Hate Group - This week, the INDems called on Rodric Bray (Indiana Senate President Pro Tem) and Jeff Raatz (State Senator - District 27) to remove House Bill 1041 from the Indiana Senate calendar following reports showing a \- with legislation that would bully and marginalize innocent minors. In fact, Indiana is a part of a national culture war strategy where anti-LGBTQ activists like Idaho State Rep. Barbara Ehardt parachute into states pushing this divisive policy. The designated the ADF as a a longstanding effort against LGBTQ Americans that includes opposition to marriage equality and workplace rights and even supporting the effort to criminalize people for being LGBTQ altogether. Indiana Republicans have come out as the Culture War Party during the 2022 legislation session. From Oath Keeper Scott Baldwin calling for educators to impartially teach Nazism in classrooms to the INGOP shoving through legislation to restrict voting rights, discrediting the COVID-19 vaccine, and bullying innocent minors – these culture wars are an election-year ploy to win votes. They are putting their divisive partisanship ahead of Indiana’s future. \- Voice Your Opinion, INDems Platform Process Begins - It’s an election year across the state, and the Indiana Democratic Party is ready to travel to all 92 counties to help elect community leaders who will deliver on an economic agenda that includes creating jobs, supplying investments in broadband, improving roads/bridges, water, and other infrastructure needs, and securing a better future for the communities we call home. To do that, Indiana Democrats will also begin its biennial tradition of approving a party platform that includes all voices across the state. Hearing dates and locations are available below. Please take a look at a draft of the Indiana Democratic Party’s 2022 Platform, consider submitting your suggestions online. Your ideas are valued and important and we’d like to craft a strong platform – with your help – and spread the news across the state during this critical election year. \- Indiana Democratic Party is Hiring - War Room Director The Indiana Democratic Party seeks a War Room Director to build an innovative program to hold the Indiana Republican Party accountable and inform and educate Hoosier voters year in and year out. A mix between rapid response and lead researcher, the director will work with the IDP team to push back against misinformation, disinformation, and conspiracy theories so all Hoosiers have the freedom to make better and informed decisions on the issues facing our state and country. Voter File Administrator The Indiana Democratic Party seeks a Voter File Administrator (VFA) to work on our data team to better serve candidates, committees, and local parties as we seek to build a stronger Democratic Party in the Hoosier State. The role is ideal for someone looking to be more involved in politics and party building and who wants to dedicate themselves to learning more about the inner workings of campaigns, strategy, technology, and voter targeting and contact. IDP is making strides on this front and we want to add to our team with this important role. For full job descriptions and how to apply visit our website at \- Indiana Democratic Party Seeking Interns - The Indiana Democratic Party is offering a very exciting opportunity for talented and dedicated individuals interested in gaining experience in the fast-paced world of politics. The Party is seeking to fill internship roles at its headquarters in Indianapolis. This is an outstanding opportunity to get hands-on experience working in the office of a state political party and contribute to the success of all of our Democratic candidates. Benefits Valuable skills and firsthand insight into the inner workings of the political and legislative process Networking with Indiana Democratic Party leaders, activists, staff, candidates, and elected officials Enhanced communication and organizational skills Work as part of a dedicated team that is interested in your personal development This position is a paid internship through a monthly stipend, interns will also be provided with free parking and opportunities for future training, travel, permanent positions, and career advancement in the field. We will work with academic institutions if interns are seeking college credit for this internship. Interns must submit the proper paperwork to the Party and their school. Intern Duties Interns will provide administrative support to party staff. Responsibilities may include: campaign research voter outreach data entry assistance with local campaign events special projects Qualifications Applicants must be: passionate about Democratic politics trustworthy and responsible able to communicate effectively with others flexible and willing to help when needed able to work on multiple tasks at once How to Apply Interested applicants need to submit their cover letter, resume, and three professional references to Lauren Ganapini at lauren@indems.org. \- Opportunities - \- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Columbus - , 1 – 2:30pm EST \- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Rochester - , 2 - 3:30pm EST \- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Statewide Virtual #1 - h, 6 - 7:30 PM EST \- INDems: "The Hoosier Promise" Platform Hearing - Statewide Virtual #2 - , 6 - 7:30 PM EST \- Indiana Stonewall Democrats Community Fundraiser - , 6 - 8:00pm EST ### | | | = | = [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| ICYMI: Governor Greitens Greeted By Massive Overflow Crowd on Visit to Lake Lotawana, MO
---
| On Monday, former Missouri governor and Navy SEAL Eric Greitens was enthusiastically greeted by hundreds of grassroots conservatives from across the south Kansas City area.
Over 300 people attended the We The People of Jackson County event featuring Governor Greitens at the Lake Lotawana Shooting Club.
---
|
---
|
---
| Governor Greitens called out RINOs (Republicans in Name Only) in Jefferson City for caving to Missouri Democrats on the issue of congressional redistricting. Greitens has led the charge for a map that would reflect 7 Republican districts and 1 Democratic district.
However, establishment RINOs have joined their liberal colleagues in pushing for the Pelosi Map that could likely lead to a 5 Republican - 3 Democratic makeup within the next few election cycles.
"The weak, woke RINOs in Jefferson City have betrayed the people of Missouri... they've betrayed America First patriots across the nation," said Governor Greitens.
Greitens also excoriated the political insiders' push to change Missouri elections to a ranked choice voting system, an initiative he has publicly rejected.
Among the hundreds in attendance, was [Mara Rose Williams](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-0PjpTlcbEIQHr1_y9XfVozVfBhOkVxeXvr9gKeNa7u0a_VcY4Pw-16oow11PUOuCeuXkzkzpGrXAOdH5dzhjzMpO6348Tf53nsZywZ3NJd1SIYI2KnnOAwsgtaHkFfjCMBnJjr5ZzV6BK072qLnACYYXuv0ebZqGK2Cwwv01QUL1UMDrF0xVVfNc4dazcF1Dnh9pskyiHzq1sGUQWnijQ==&c=RHZ5th_sF5uG3cvclc1Fw6Zd9EKGtu58JFyhZ59YYmyA-hGEmUULYw==&ch=70ubRU77baQu7cd1kX4GyAapzZxWrgGmA9e-ULsCO6sT5mzSFSwF3w==), a liberal columnist employed by the Kansas City Star, who was loudly booed and heckled as "fake news."
Following the event, the far-left columnist tried to falsely claim that women in the audience refrained from applauding Governor Greitens during his speech.
However, Governor Greitens' campaign quickly released multiple photos that proved Williams was lying.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-0PjpTlcbEIQHr1_y9XfVozVfBhOkVxeXvr9gKeNa7u0a_VcY4Pw-16oow11PUOuNjXVhJQKUPOpdVqANQD6R64BSH2WPz1gzuAa9sx9-OIXSgfIVc1kZwAgAqgsDzWScCqvK3CujdmnaDe389BECxN6xhfg2THjlXzOod3NjsYTUvpIwHnpLqMHKAxTNMu8b_5puR10x0t9czv8r7NP3vTs2vyq85aT6VZdi6P5Zzf6au1cKLcewg==&c=RHZ5th_sF5uG3cvclc1Fw6Zd9EKGtu58JFyhZ59YYmyA-hGEmUULYw==&ch=70ubRU77baQu7cd1kX4GyAapzZxWrgGmA9e-ULsCO6sT5mzSFSwF3w==)
---
|
---
| Governor Greitens is currently dominating the Republican field for the US Senate in Missouri in both polling and fundraising. According to President Trump's pollster, Governor Greitens holds a 30-point lead in the GOP primary.
As of December 2021, Governor Greitens campaign has taken in over 33,000 donations from over 24,000 individuals.
---
| | | | FOLLOW US

name: Team Engel
subject: Kelly Townsend is attacking our right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693722/329926989/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWVhYmEwYS04ODhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rN1WKDCZHve48niAxpD8axZV3I5jlIcgyt5VY5zcOAw=&emci=5de90f53-d18a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=a9eaba0a-888b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
While Kirsten Engel is traveling across the district to meet with Arizona voters and listen to their concerns,** one of Kirsten’s Republican opponents, Kelly Townsend, is busy backing radical bills aimed at silencing the voices of Arizona voters. Bills like: **
* **SB1474 \- which would COMPLETELY eliminate early voting**

* **SB1058 - which would eliminate convenient ballot drop-off boxes **

* **SB1404 - which would eliminate the right to early vote without meeting very restrictive criteria**

_The increasingly radical Republicans in the State Legislature -- legislators like Kelly Townsend -- are well on their way to eliminating voting by mail as we know it, and they want politicians, rather than the people, to choose who we elect to office.**This is not who we want representing us in Congress.**_
Kirsten is running for Congress to fight for fairness for working families, and the bills that Kelly Townsend is backing only strengthens her resolve to fight.
However, this new wave of GOP extremists are better funded and well-positioned to win races like ours. That's why it's so important to support the most qualified, the most experienced, and the absolute best choice to keep this seat blue -- **Kirsten Engel. **
[**Can we count on your help to protect voting rights by supporting our campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41693723/329926990/416963966?refcode=X_021122_TownsendBill&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOWVhYmEwYS04ODhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rN1WKDCZHve48niAxpD8axZV3I5jlIcgyt5VY5zcOAw=)

Hi Friend -- Next Tuesday, February 15th, there will be important primaries for races all over the state. Our County Party's have been hard at work to help recruit, train, and mentor many of these local candidates. **It's time for conservatives to take back control of our local governments!** **Today is your last chance to vote early in person at your clerks office before Tuesday's primary election!****** It is imperative that we turn out for those elections so we can fight back against this far-left takeover of our local governments! Click [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6tHPUOz_QyJBsFbb3HDnJj2oXbbIoglmEkF7rO8ZMAeBuay5CGbW87_VUow_ACcN&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evip_push_1&n=2) to find out if you have a primary near you or contact your local county party, [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0a23sM2IsUfkW7JDTb3cKks31us6ZQgMJq21hg5RtYyk&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evip_push_1&n=3).
* * *
For some time, liberals have been infiltrating our local governments and school boards with radical socialist ideas and Critical Race Theory, and they MUST be stopped. **It it going to take all hands on deck to take back these local governments!** Our grassroots activists have been hard at work to organize around these candidates. name: Chuck Morse
subject: Putting New Hampshire on a path to long-term prosperity.

body:

---
| | | Friend, As someone who’s lived the American Dream, I know we can’t let Washington politicians like Joe Biden and Maggie Hassan take it away for good. **_We are a strong nation, but we need strong leaders that will fight to keep the American Dream alive!_** By following the model that we set in the State Senate - where we balanced budgets, cut taxes, and led the nation in economic freedom - New Hampshire can finally be put on the path to long-term prosperity. **Will you join me and make sure D.C. doesn’t hold us back from achieving this goal?**

---
---
| |
---
| | [JOIN THE MISSION!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODgzNDU5MTQ5NDA5Mjk0OTU2JmM9eDV0MyZlPTAmYj05MDQ5OTI1MzYmZD1hNXk2aDBr.nDTfMFieoQ7MNXAVtPYjJvzvo6LxGf9r44mV3_JG-Ik)

| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODgzNDU5MTQ5NDA5Mjk0OTU2JmM9eDV0MyZlPTAmYj05MDQ5OTI1NTQmZD1sMnM4bjRw.7sG0vPVY-8UAgB8KZR3uxfiRY793lLRQ39sf3MPvlEI)
---
| |
---
| If our state’s federal delegation is more focused on carrying out the will of Joe Biden than the will of everyday Granite Staters, then New Hampshire is going to continue to be held back from achieving our full potential. **I’m running for the U.S. Senate to fix that -****_I’ll be the workhorse that fights for the priorities of the 603!_** **But I won’t be able to get there without YOUR support - this is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country, and I need everyone by my side in this fight for our state’s prosperity!** I hope you’ll support the mission to protect the American Dream today by clicking the button below.**_[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODgzNDU5MTQ5NDA5Mjk0OTU2JmM9eDV0MyZlPTAmYj05MDQ5OTI1ODEmZD1lOXgxcTR5.hMZBvP47OsNX1J9ZLtSdcmtcAzkoS_dtnyUnSk26u24)_**

subject: Meet the Kyrsten Sinema of the U.S. House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
We need to oust Henry Cuellar, too. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSefEuosMlyzL6pkt-qavlTwJWR-0wH2AIbhx_mK0BHJFIifhGBQsRkKQEjFXV5gJj2iFavd3ZxVRo2dE58rC7zoIO-AwAGiDQjcBFkzIJczECX0UiAcZgCJwCH7jl-E77UqWh1ZkWgRn18U24ZbjTPWoyOxi3c9sm0fFzsFlAuruxW6WtoGMW4avuF4vpRfvl71ruDQ0-s3kiMyI2NWE5__7ADXYIzP0nGR6mde2BGQ0NVRSwYH2d0PI5VbodA1MduBbbgz_HjJy3uiRNRtz1vs04PRce3yU3LdrxmYxeinCE/3jh/MuXbAEZFTGqBvL5faiw56g/h0/6uR7xDTcS1U2KOS5we5QtTt65ctX99qgCGKcVmSkaRY)
Hi Peter, If you don’t know who Rep. Henry Cuellar (TX-28) is, you should — because he’s basically the Kyrsten Sinema of the U.S. House. [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeShrmyqrd_NsdsE4oRUB-m3fx60N9egYckP0ODp3Nbe6WhTU479x1PiCqUMTCFw_MzIC3vi5nkFPg3BPNTl9PvZW1jD1tEDMayPtlDZAI0NiOL2ePZEiBA8Aba0z8QQZ_YmJpCQHwejICV4zmDq2x1rb0_wEUhyL7Po9RjI6bqjHwLr9EAgWqHDeTk6Dfdfkq_hoskBXrQl32UVMB-3gcTB3O9xVISD41_deXSQQcwhZR0HZIGXKlm42dPxA116Ql-V3eXgMoKmBtyt6lkYVq_jA6391Q5MuVxqSmqANmLzEblrTxUpMUalNYJvrGw-SLIxt3YwKHWVm-MSpvjUFSdgpevVm4qi85h4FNC_STKoMk/3jh/MuXbAEZFTGqBvL5faiw56g/h1/h1hWqWI3pnOY46iHrmBRbpcK3PM3lbA_VorQWdgs3ww) Just like Sinema, Henry Cuellar takes six-figure checks from Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Republican billionaires. He even took money from the Koch brothers — and put special interests before his constituents in South Texas at every turn. (Sound familiar?) He’s also the most anti-abortion Democrat in the House — while Sinema’s had endorsements recently pulled from abortion access groups like EMILY’s List and NARAL. And while Kyrsten Sinema gutted pricing reform from the Build Back Better bill on behalf of Big Pharma, Henry Cuellar plays the same game. He rolled back environmental protections and has taken hundreds of thousands of dollars from Big Oil and Gas companies, including the American Petroleum institute. **But there’s some good news:** Cuellar is being challenged by a progressive named Jessica Cisneros — a human rights lawyer, daughter of Mexican immigrants, and lifelong Texan. With enough support, Cisneros could defeat Cuellar, especially now that he’s being investigated by the FBI (!) and refuses to explain why. The primary is only 20 days away, Peter, and early voting starts on Tuesday — there’s no time to waste. **[Will you split a donation between Primary Sinema Project and Jessica Cisneros today? clean_body: We need to oust Henry Cuellar, too. | | | Hi Peter, If you don’t know who Rep. Henry Cuellar (TX-28) is, you should — because he’s basically the Kyrsten Sinema of the U.S. House. Just like Sinema, Henry Cuellar takes six-figure checks from Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Republican billionaires. He even took money from the Koch brothers — and put special interests before his constituents in South Texas at every turn. (Sound familiar?) He’s also the most anti-abortion Democrat in the House — while Sinema’s had endorsements recently pulled from abortion access groups like EMILY’s List and NARAL. And while Kyrsten Sinema gutted pricing reform from the Build Back Better bill on behalf of Big Pharma, Henry Cuellar plays the same game. He rolled back environmental protections and has taken hundreds of thousands of dollars from Big Oil and Gas companies, including the American Petroleum institute. But there’s some good news: Cuellar is being challenged by a progressive named Jessica Cisneros — a human rights lawyer, daughter of Mexican immigrants, and lifelong Texan. With enough support, Cisneros could defeat Cuellar, especially now that he’s being investigated by the FBI (!) and refuses to explain why. The primary is only 20 days away, Peter, and early voting starts on Tuesday — there’s no time to waste. Henry Cuellar and Kyrsten Sinema both need to lose their seats. That’s why we’re hoping grassroots supporters like you will do something about it today. Together, we can show politicians like Kyrsten Sinema and Henry Cuellar that being beholden to special interests comes with the ultimate political price. — Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. I wanted to ask you for a favor today, Peter.
During our 95 county tour last fall, I listened to Tennesseans all across the state describe their dreams and their struggles to achieve those dreams. Every single person I talked to had a reason for wanting a better future — and I want to hear yours.
[**Will you add your name to say that you’re with me, and tell me a little bit about why you’re part of this team?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41682572/329877056/-1061291340?refcode=fl_email_na_20220211addname_DM_op_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjIwOTQyOS02MDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHOzi67THPHvIGJAR7UMhk9JavaMcT2SwbFA95oAHBA=&emci=e6166dcf-7084-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=02209429-608b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9304149)

Maybe it’s because you’re worried about providing your kids with a quality education, or protecting the planet they’ll grow up to inherit.
Maybe it’s because you or someone you care about is paying too much for healthcare, life-saving insulin, hearing devices, prescription drugs, or something else.
Maybe it’s because you’re deeply worried about the state of our democracy, with Republicans across the country — and right here in Tennessee — openly supporting anti-democratic attempts at voter suppression and intimidation.
Maybe it’s for all of those reasons or none of them — whatever the case may be, I want to hear about it.
[**So, will you add your name to endorse my campaign for Governor, and tell us a little bit about why you’re on our team?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41682576/329877060/-1061291340?refcode=fl_email_na_20220211addname_DM_op_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjIwOTQyOS02MDhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gHOzi67THPHvIGJAR7UMhk9JavaMcT2SwbFA95oAHBA=&emci=e6166dcf-7084-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=02209429-608b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9304149)
Thank you,
Dr. Martin

name: Personal Message from Val Demings
subject: That’s me [photo attached]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
If you had told me back then
#
Peter,
That's me you're looking at.
I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694169/329928753/338701229?refcode=dd_em_220211_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzc2ZWY1Yy04YThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ht_NjZx00vXcLqbtAc8eo0EXisL_furXlvKcIfXaDyw=)
What I _did_ believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson of my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good."
It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to being representative of my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear.
My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. **As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will _never_ tire in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans.** I will _never_ tire in continuing to do more good for you and your family.
But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me.
This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election _ever_ – and with just a .12% margin in Florida's last Senate race, every dollar will count tremendously. **I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone.**
**[I'm depending on your grassroots support to power this historic campaign and help me fight back against the GOP's attacks – and right now, I'm falling short of my midnight goal. Can you split a $5 contribution between Dick Durbin and my campaign today to help make sure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect and expand Democratic Senate control?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694170/329928754/338701229?refcode=dd_em_220211_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzc2ZWY1Yy04YThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ht_NjZx00vXcLqbtAc8eo0EXisL_furXlvKcIfXaDyw=)**
Thank you so much for sharing this journey with me. It means the world to have you by my side.
Val Demings

clean_body: If you had told me back then Peter, That's me you're looking at. I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you. = What I did believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson of my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good." It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to being representative of my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear. My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will never tire in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. I will never tire in continuing to do more good for you and your family. But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me. This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election ever – and with just a .12% margin in Florida's last Senate race, every dollar will count tremendously. I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone. = Thank you so much for sharing this journey with me. It means the world to have you by my side. Val Demings **= Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

clean_body: Did you see my interview with The News of Orange County? | | Peter — Did you see my interview with The News of Orange County? I talked about my policy priorities, navigating division, and what inspired me to run for Congress. I am grateful for the work of our local journalists to deliver important information to our community. Unfortunately, not everyone remembers to read their local newspaper, so I need your help! Could you help spread the word and share my interview on social media? | | Your action not only helps spread the word about our campaign but also supports local journalism. # [Tell Attorney General Merrick Garland: "Prosecute Trump NOW!" >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T335d1f83-4835-4aad-a693-30be765025b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Donald Trump admitted that his goal on January 6, 2021 was to overthrow the election. And yet, Attorney General Merrick Garland is not taking action. What the heck is he waiting for?! Enough is enough. Trump must be held accountable for his attempt to steal the election. Our democracy depends on it. We need Garland to pursue criminal charges immediately. Let’s show Merrick Garland he has our support to prosecute Donald Trump and urge him to take action NOW. [SIGN THE PETITION: Tell Merrick Garland to prosecute Donald Trump for inciting the January 6 insurrection >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3fa9f01b-ad01-4dc7-aae5-985ff82e2944/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Team Tom
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, February 11th for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
#

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, February 11th, 2022**
Peter,
Last week we were proud to announce former Baltimore City Councilwoman Shannon Sneed has joined our ticket as Tom’s running mate. Shannon is a transformational leader who has been a true champion for communities across Baltimore. As we continue to grow our powerful grassroots movement across the state, we are glad to have Shannon join our team.
This weekend we will begin our new** series of Grassroots Zoom Calls beginning this Saturday, February 12th at 10:30am.** You can attend the zoom meeting using this **[link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694332/329929223/-484532621?emci=4807cb4b-e18a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTJhZTM3OC04YjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bL77kzQhBYocRDTprWMnDlUXrSDDrxVNZAngG-WwUPU=)** , and invite your friends to join on Facebook **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694333/329929224/1539172965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTJhZTM3OC04YjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bL77kzQhBYocRDTprWMnDlUXrSDDrxVNZAngG-WwUPU=&emci=4807cb4b-e18a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba2ae378-8b8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)** For questions, please reach out to Tucker at **[tucker@tomperez.com](mailto:tucker@tomperez.com).**
After the call, join us for a phone bank where we will be connecting with voters from Prince George's and Montgomery County to spread the word of Tom Perez and Shannon Sneed for Maryland. You can sign up for the phone bank [**here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694334/329929225/-209388586?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTJhZTM3OC04YjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bL77kzQhBYocRDTprWMnDlUXrSDDrxVNZAngG-WwUPU=&emci=4807cb4b-e18a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba2ae378-8b8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837).
Thank you for your continued support and we hope to see you this weekend!
Many thanks,
Team Tom
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694335/329929226/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTJhZTM3OC04YjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bL77kzQhBYocRDTprWMnDlUXrSDDrxVNZAngG-WwUPU=&emci=4807cb4b-e18a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba2ae378-8b8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694336/329929227/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTJhZTM3OC04YjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bL77kzQhBYocRDTprWMnDlUXrSDDrxVNZAngG-WwUPU=&emci=4807cb4b-e18a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba2ae378-8b8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
One of our state’s greatest assets is our diversity. Tom had the great privilege of joining Dr. Surinder Gill and other leaders from the Sikh community for dinner Saturday at the Royal Taj in Columbia. A Perez/Sneed administration is committed to ensuring everyone will have a seat at the table. Thank you Dr. Gill for your hospitality and for all the work you are doing to create a thriving Maryland.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694337/329929228/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTJhZTM3OC04YjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bL77kzQhBYocRDTprWMnDlUXrSDDrxVNZAngG-WwUPU=&emci=4807cb4b-e18a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba2ae378-8b8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
On the first Sunday of Black History Month, Tom and Shannon joined Rev. Kevin Slayton and North Appold United Methodist Church in Baltimore, where they celebrated the heroic contributions of Black women. Tom was honored to stand beside our state’s next Lieutenant Governor, a true leader who has made it her life’s work to ensure equality for all. Thank you Rev. Slayton for allowing us to worship with you on Sunday.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694338/329929229/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTJhZTM3OC04YjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bL77kzQhBYocRDTprWMnDlUXrSDDrxVNZAngG-WwUPU=&emci=4807cb4b-e18a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba2ae378-8b8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Tom spent Tuesday evening with members of the Central Baltimore County Democratic Club at their monthly meeting. We are grateful for the hard work of the Central Baltimore County Democratic Club to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in Baltimore County.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694339/329929230/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTJhZTM3OC04YjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bL77kzQhBYocRDTprWMnDlUXrSDDrxVNZAngG-WwUPU=&emci=4807cb4b-e18a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba2ae378-8b8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
On Thursday, Tom and Shannon attended a virtual meet and greet hosted by key leaders from Baltimore including Councilman Ryan Dorsey, Senator Cory McCray, and former Baltimore City Council President Mary Pat Clarke. They shared their vision of creating a Maryland where zip code never determines destiny and where all people have the opportunity to thrive.
* * *
**In the News**
**[Tom Perez Hopes to Transform State Government into a Force for Good](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694340/329929231/1740150806?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTJhZTM3OC04YjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bL77kzQhBYocRDTprWMnDlUXrSDDrxVNZAngG-WwUPU=&emci=4807cb4b-e18a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba2ae378-8b8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**
_“People have run out of time, they’ve run out of patience, they’ve run out of money,” Perez, who is 60, said in an interview outside a coffee shop in Baltimore. “We need somebody who will approach every single day with that sense of urgency.”_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694341/329929232/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTJhZTM3OC04YjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bL77kzQhBYocRDTprWMnDlUXrSDDrxVNZAngG-WwUPU=&emci=4807cb4b-e18a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba2ae378-8b8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
* * *
**ICYMI**
Tom announced Shannon Sneed as his Lieutenant Governor, but they first stopped at Shannon’s in-laws in Prince George’s County to share the news. We are proud to have a team that represents people all across the state.
**[Would you retweet our announcement to show your support for #TeamTom?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694342/329929233/-385595947?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTJhZTM3OC04YjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bL77kzQhBYocRDTprWMnDlUXrSDDrxVNZAngG-WwUPU=&emci=4807cb4b-e18a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba2ae378-8b8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41694343/329929234/-2071248755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTJhZTM3OC04YjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bL77kzQhBYocRDTprWMnDlUXrSDDrxVNZAngG-WwUPU=&emci=4807cb4b-e18a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ba2ae378-8b8b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)**
* * *

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, February 11th, 2022 Peter, Last week we were proud to announce former Baltimore City Councilwoman Shannon Sneed has joined our ticket as Tom’s running mate. Shannon is a transformational leader who has been a true champion for communities across Baltimore. As we continue to grow our powerful grassroots movement across the state, we are glad to have Shannon join our team. This weekend we will begin our new series of Grassroots Zoom Calls beginning this Saturday, February 12th at 10:30am. You can attend the zoom meeting using this = , and invite your friends to join on Facebook For questions, please reach out to Tucker at mailto:tucker@tomperez.com. After the call, join us for a phone bank where we will be connecting with voters from Prince George's and Montgomery County to spread the word of Tom Perez and Shannon Sneed for Maryland. You can sign up for the phone bank . Thank you for your continued support and we hope to see you this weekend! Many thanks, Team Tom On the Campaign Trail One of our state’s greatest assets is our diversity. Tom had the great privilege of joining Dr. Surinder Gill and other leaders from the Sikh community for dinner Saturday at the Royal Taj in Columbia. A Perez/Sneed administration is committed to ensuring everyone will have a seat at the table. Thank you Dr. Gill for your hospitality and for all the work you are doing to create a thriving Maryland. On the first Sunday of Black History Month, Tom and Shannon joined Rev. Kevin Slayton and North Appold United Methodist Church in Baltimore, where they celebrated the heroic contributions of Black women. Tom was honored to stand beside our state’s next Lieutenant Governor, a true leader who has made it her life’s work to ensure equality for all. Thank you Rev. Slayton for allowing us to worship with you on Sunday. Tom spent Tuesday evening with members of the Central Baltimore County Democratic Club at their monthly meeting. We are grateful for the hard work of the Central Baltimore County Democratic Club to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in Baltimore County. On Thursday, Tom and Shannon attended a virtual meet and greet hosted by key leaders from Baltimore including Councilman Ryan Dorsey, Senator Cory McCray, and former Baltimore City Council President Mary Pat Clarke. They shared their vision of creating a Maryland where zip code never determines destiny and where all people have the opportunity to thrive. In the News “People have run out of time, they’ve run out of patience, they’ve run out of money,” Perez, who is 60, said in an interview outside a coffee shop in Baltimore. “We need somebody who will approach every single day with that sense of urgency.” ICYMI Tom announced Shannon Sneed as his Lieutenant Governor, but they first stopped at Shannon’s in-laws in Prince George’s County to share the news. We are proud to have a team that represents people all across the state. Schedule of Events Tuesday, February 22 | 6:00 PM Ruxton, MD Hosted by Meg & Harry Ferguson Wednesday, February 23 | 7:30 PM Bethesda, MD Hosted by George Cohen Sunday, March 6 | 2:00 PM Frederick, MD Hosted by Tom Slater, Melanie Galloway, Dr. Syed Haque, Dr. Shahid Rafiq, and Marcie Roth Thursday, March 10 | 6:30 PM Silver Branch Brewing, Silver Spring, MD Hosted by: Elliott Andalman & Martha Bergmark, Tony & Toba Hausner, Richard & Kathy Lorr, Council President Gabe Albornoz, and Council Vice President Evan Glass Saturday, March 12 | 5:30 PM Eastern Kabob, Gaithersburg, MD Hosted by the Bangladeshi American Council Tuesday, March 29 | 6:30 PM Offices of Arnold & Porter | Washington, DC Hosted by Daniel Kracov Wednesday, March 30 | 6 PM Virtual Hosted by Bruce Cohen Wednesday, April 27 | 6:00 PM Potomac, MD Hosted by Barbara Goldberg Goldman & Michael Goldman Volunteer with us!** Saturdays, 11:00 AM | Mondays, 6:00 PM Virtual Please contact Esther at esther@tomperez.com with any questions. name: Aaron Brown
subject: What do Joe Rogan, Elon Musk, and FEE have in common?
body:
All three are cultural forces to be reckoned with, advocating for free speech, civil liberties, free enterprise, and liberty.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z07srpv4o8r35qmljfnugpd85cqk14140ffipdd0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi61or2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5heqpm2dlkchj78p9ke5omaori6hjb5dtj6dhn6d1gcppbbc5i6thr3c5gc5gefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3applmdg7co36e4ob6o37m2qmash5u)
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z8k3hsrd3e2fs8799h7l4knb9gipdrof8douosug_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi61or2c1h2bs)

Hi Friend,

What do Joe Rogan, Elon Musk and the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) all have in common?

All three are cultural forces to be reckoned with, advocating for free speech, civil liberties, free enterprise, and liberty.

Joe Rogan and Elon Musk reach MILLIONS of people on social media with a common sense message about fighting COVID/lockdown tyranny, basic economics, gun rights, and much more.

So does the Foundation for Economic Education.

**The Foundation for Economic Education (FEE) is the world 's leading pro-liberty, free enterprise think-tank. FEE's mission is to inspire, educate, and connect future leaders with the economic, ethical, and legal principles of a free society. **

So how do we reach MILLIONS of young people like Joe Rogan and Elon Musk?

FEE reaches millions of students, young people, and citizens physically in the classroom and online. We produce online content and engage on cultural topics to share our message of limited government, entrepreneurship, and civil liberties.

We create articles, videos, explainers, and relate the ideas of liberty to what's happening in pop culture to capture the attention of younger generations.__**In fact, FEE 's online content is seen over 1 million times by young people between the ages of 16 and 22 every single week. **__

Giving up on young people is a FAILING strategy to defeat socialism, restore our Republic and fight for liberty.

[_**My goal is to raise $25,000 to help fund FEE 's efforts to teach young people about the principles of liberty and free enterprise. Please help me reach this goal by donating ANY amount by clicking here >>>**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zofm41i71kf1s6f1056dleiulls67109i6doec5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi61or2c1h2bs)

FEE is one of the ONLY pro-liberty organizations teaching young people about the ideas of free enterprise, entrepreneurship, and liberty online.

You know who else is actively reaching out to young people on the internet?

Socialists.

Not good.

We CANNOT allow socialism, cancel culture, and big government to be the only voices young people hear or interact with on the internet. This is how the forces of big government recruit followers, advocates, and influencers.

The Foundation for Economic Education is going behind enemy lines and reaching out to young people with our message.

And you know what? It works.

**Our message of entrepreneurship, responsibility, opportunity, and empowering people to live free and prosperous lives is appealing to younger generations. **

Much like Joe Rogan and Elon Musk have exploded in popularity, FEE's online social networks are growing rapidly as we reach more people and teach young people about free markets.

You can fund FEE's efforts to reach young people online by using one of these links to donate:

[_**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Become a Liberty Champion: Donate $500 >>>
Become a Liberty Hero: Donate $1,000 or more**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhlm2l91f9cu63qs5svliju8fcgmt2on68e762t8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi61or2c1h2bs)

We are teaching students about big concepts by breaking things down and making them simple and relatable. We teach young people about things like...

* Why deficit spending doesn't work.
* How the Federal Reserve prints money, inflates the currency, and is destroying our wealth
* How the minimum wage fails to provide people with employment and hurts younger generations and minorities the most
* Why COVID lockdowns are failing us and causing millions of job losses
* Why the government shouldn't be in charge of education, healthcare, or the economy

FEE is reaching MILLIONS of young people online and growing the ranks of Americans who love the ideas of liberty and free enterprise.

But that's not all!

Our flagship program, FEE In The Classroom, also teaches students in the classroom itself. Last year, FEE taught over 20,000 students in over 300 classrooms across the United States.

FEE is committed to spreading our message, teaching the ideas of liberty to millions, and helping build a freer society.

[**_I am inviting you to join us by making a donation of ANY amount._**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2za8as7djhmjm6gbkops3r6r004pi869ookvq7vso_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi61or2c1h2bs)

Your gift has a real impact and will help FEE recruit young people to the cause of liberty.

Please help us reach our goal of raising $25,000.

I am counting on your help.

Thank you for everything,

Aaron Brown
Director of Development
Foundation for Economic Education
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Self Reliance Central, [please use this preferences page](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/prefs/9z2z6i8bt2es3qt1l8cdll99iu7p6ro4tg700v9d1q0).
1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5qt2veergite4eev4fli2lpmrh18bjrlc7sf87o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1c5hm8o73c9g649fg)

name: State Rep. Patrick Neville
subject: Fight back: Democrats plan to indoctrinate OUR children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Take Back America PAC**
body:
The teachers union and their stooges in the Democrat party are back at it. Democrats have revealed their REAL views on what OUR
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zekp2nmk51t6r26t2pcd2f49p6e9uok52l7goqb8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi61or2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4ppgm3hrapjie1gm7crlmdgm0s34suqjcpr5e6o67cr6eqrr2sbhc1jb7dpkeurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddjc1r60pjh62pm0ptgmlin49fg)

Dear Fellow Patriot, The teachers union and their stooges in the Democrat party are back at it. Democrats have revealed their REAL views on what OUR kids should be taught in schools. **They have once again DOUBLED DOWN on their belief that parents don’t have the right to know what propaganda they are using to indoctrinate OUR children.** I hope you’ll help us fight back. | [**Sign the Declaration of Parents Rights**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zii9v31mk2hm7k6oosp9e3icj8rktb6uqn9lm6a8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi61or2c1h2bs)
---
**Democrats have revealed their REAL views on what OUR kids should be taught in schools.**
They want their masters in the teachers union to teach “what society needs them to learn” not what parent’s think they should learn.
Parents like you and I may want our kids to learn “reading, writing and arithmetic.”
Teachers Union wants to teach:
...Marxist Critical Race Theory
...that Geroge Washington is a racist and American is an evil country
...that your kids are racists simply based on the color of their skin, not based on their actions
To make matters worse, they don’t think the taxpayers who are footing the bill for these government indoctrination facilities should have a say in how or what is being taught.
**Take Back America PAC is fighting back against this government-funded indoctrination.**
Join our fight against the Teacher’s Union’s deep pockets. [Sign our Declaration of Parent’s Rights today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze0qvf18hsl0bh3rbm46ijh98052dd30h7lr35og_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi61or2c1h2bs).
[**Sign the Declaration of Parents Rights**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6nidje92c47s4g6ercvm6djih2144b6cgeir3ug_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi61or2c1h2bs)
---
Parents in America need to let Democrats and weak-kneed Republicans know that we will not sit by and let them manipulate and indoctrinate our children.
**We as parents assert our natural rights and responsibilities to protect and raise our children.**
We as parents assert your right to review, understand and supervise the education of our children, regardless of where they go to school
We, as parents and taxpayers, assert our right to review the curriculum and educational environments and programs being offered to our children in all schools, public and private.
Parents across America will continue to hold politicians, school boards, and school administrators accountable at the ballot box.
**[I hope you’ll sign our Declaration of Parent’s Rights today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1692lklasboib8rcahhbnb29e4fhe33m58a9n4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi61or2c1h2bs).**
We will be taking to the halls of Congress, state legislatures, and school districts to ensure the voice of Parent’s is heard loud and clear.**
The more pressure we can bring to bear, through more signatures on our Declaration of Parent’s rights, the more we can push back against Democrats, the teachers union and weak-kneed Republicans.
Once you’ve signed the Declaration of Parents Rights, I hope you’ll consider making a donation to Take Back America PAC.
[Your contribution of $500, $250, $100, $50 or even $25 will help them contact and mobilize even more concerned parents to turn up the heat on the politicians and the teachers union](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0in9u4pu61m3ilhb9d59hsrt6sm5u49320i0lco_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cdi61or2c1h2bs).

For America,

name: William Timmons
subject: What do you think?
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
William Timmons for Congress
body:
I am back in Washington this week and I am thinking about how Congress cannot seem to get ANYTHING done. |
No longer want to receive emails from Timmons for Congress? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=fe0add4fd3274b1eaaef37edfb387c9b&_t=US1yJa5SAqlML4bE5fG_SQulzUgG5tyH6asWaTbiGZ6CGUAdX4ZUFYz9twDROiadsQ6mlZFQp1rNxBiRfe25lKibtRdezrErABfl08pCfd_gRorYxqTk9fdLArYH3wE8ZH7BGt2NbhHQQEU79KVbAouBaeWYZazhnPK5bsZj1JY%3D).

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fe0add4fd3274b1eaaef37edfb387c9b&_e=3mAF-gv3Vg8LvBjyBhv_DLg1dWxzoNh5MkKKcaJ9ZI2a70vuHriYT3KO_XTL39s6E1OUN0mxL_bTOL4e_Yj6bNmt_Lzp_ywbm4h925D6ra4ncGk4y0_neabwZ1LIk9nFO5QNc_lKPEiuQl7I_7QYimsn1qgS_vFK_GzeHX53RF2zrfs0w5YmNZw-QFKztrk4fF-566QNJ-GSc20JRT1Mh8WlicNw_5Pv6mc65UGU4oaI6VXlRXW8T8E0vQ0hoDDHcafnErKzifdo8ipoJbHi95j5qBNrPhUCldTlASnH2Gn0lD0yMIcYUFniqACn7nltVIj4X23q71Iqp7bXeIHSHChZg9ZEkVZv5Uoy9pPqXfQJVQ97StISxzbBg4fnVS3yOZzauqBqpUPQgEX3HGWvumDc3RJ7BTaFp4uj4KktlXldMQt0queSz2cdciXIMuY2s5xZMa60BL7-h84ApIV8Oz0KiiX4AeO19x2sZYUvcsAXGU_U8j_gx8zXVmG4h_ZE7s-L-d3_MXK6FWj3X3JSyR4gfVWyxHDrIgoqEW6qQ9RkWJuKlWi2OXMjNxEu2xGb)

---
Fellow American,

2022 is flying by - and there is still so much that needs to be accomplished.

I am back in Washington this week and I am thinking about how Congress cannot seem to get ANYTHING done.

clean_body: | = Team, While the National Republican Senate Committee was raising $104 million, the Senate Leadership Fund, a Mitch McConnell-aligned super PAC raised over $94 million to flip seats like Michael’s and return the Senate gavel to Mitch’s hands. Can you make a contribution of any amount to defend Michael’s seat so he can continue to deliver for Colorado’s families? We don’t need to outraise the NRSC and this super PAC, but we do have to stay on track of our fundraising goals each month. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ******************=**************** ****************** ********** | ****************=**************** | | ****************=**************** ****************** ********** | ****************=**************** | | ****************=**************** ****************** ********** | ****************=**************** Michael doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists, and he’s up against Mitch McConnell’s loaded super PAC, the National GOP’s $104 million warchest dedicated to flipping the Senate, and wealthy opponents that can turn to their wallets when grassroots enthusiasm is low. Not only did Michael make sure Coloradans are protected from surprise emergency medical bills, but he secured the single largest federal investment in high-speed internet in American history; invested in repairing our bridges and roads, which will create good-paying jobs; and passed the expanded Child Tax Credit that kept almost 4 million kids out of poverty. Michael delivers for folks like you because you — not corporate special interests — inspire his work in the Senate. Your support goes a long way as we fight off attacks against Michael’s record. Please pitch in any amount to keep Colorado blue, protect our slim Senate majority, and secure more victories for working families. body:
Take Back America Series Tour | | |
---

---
| | Hi Friends,

I am very grateful for all of your support helping me replace Nancy Mace! We have much to cover this week.

Time: Feb 15, 2022 07:00 PM Eastern Time
[https://zoom.us/j/92022813689?pwd=WUNOdDBkQk5aN2JmV1FGczFDS001Zz09](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=2f67fc23cb&e=bb02dd73bf)
Meeting ID: 920 2281 3689 Passcode: bP7paa

Agenda for volunteers meeting is as follows:
Briefing.
Calendar Review.
Highlight Important events including Elmer Yuen on 19 Feb.
Team actions at next weekend event and link up point to get your cap, palm cards and supporters sign-up sheets.
Weekly Campaign Training - Set for Wednesday nights.
Time: Feb 16, 2022 07:00 PM Eastern Time
[https://zoom.us/j/95888913667?pwd=VVJnV29lWVZVSUk4QVhOS1JBeFNCZz09](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=6daeceaba3&e=bb02dd73bf)
Meeting ID: 958 8891 3667Passcode: Xh6Z4E Upcoming events include:
2/17 -- Charleston St. Andrews Rotary, 12:30 pm
2/17 -- Moncks Corner VFW 10256 Town Hall, 6 pm
2/17 --Charleston Meeting, Harbour Club, 6 pm
2/19 -- Summerville VFW 3433 Town Hall & Fundraiser, 6 pm (don't miss it!)
2/21 -- Edisto GOP, 6 pm
2/23 -- Summerville Parents Group, 7 pm
2/24 \-- Bluffton Sun City GOP, 7 pm
2/24-2/27 -- Orlando CPAC
3/1 \-- Fleet Reserve Association Town Hall, 99 Wisteria Rd Goose Creek 7PM

Go to the campaign **[Events](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=e818a955a8&e=bb02dd73bf)** page for details.
---
| | **ACTIONS NEEDED TODAY : "Ingrid on the Move"
1\. If you know a Centurion Supporter, please ask them to have a house party or function to Meet and Greet the Candidate. Ingrid will come to your home, neighborhood, HOA meeting, Church meeting, School Board Meeting, 50th Anniversary, you name it, she will be there. **
**2. I am officially on GAB, DISCORD and TELEGRAM. Make sure to follow and like and comment on GAB Social Media Platform.
3. BE A 30 Second Volunteer by Liking, Commenting and Sharing on my [Facebook Page](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=6c382d5fbc&e=bb02dd73bf), [YouTube CHANNEL](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=0af35d0099&e=bb02dd73bf) , [Twitter](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=964b311d26&e=bb02dd73bf), GETTR @IngridCenturion. DAILY!! DAILY!!**

Thank you all!
Ingrid Centurion
---
| |
---
| Republican Candidate for Congress, SC-01

_P.S. We need Republicans who speak, act and vote in the House the same way they campaign. Please consider making a_[ _donation_](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=5bffd6c899&e=bb02dd73bf) _[today](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=9b0dc84b2b&e=bb02dd73bf)_ _._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Meet Kevin Dellicker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress
body:
Please get to know Kevin at one of our upcoming events | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/dellickerforcongress/upcoming_events_feb?e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| | Dear Friends and Neighbors, Two weeks ago, I invited Lisa Scheller, the other declared Republican candidate in the race for PA-07, to a series of at least six debates leading up to the primary election ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=d4c80cc107&e=1090c5c412)). Lisa Scheller declined. Her campaign said she wanted to wait until nominating petitions are filed before discussing debates. But there is a problem with that answer. Petitions won’t be finalized for weeks, and mail-in voting currently is scheduled to begin before the end of March. That means Republican primary voters could be casting ballots before we have our first debate. I’m not going to wait for my opponent to engage in a dialogue with Lehigh Valley citizens. In the next few weeks, I’ll be holding a series of Town Hall events to meet with voters, answer their questions, and discuss my plan to Keep America Free. I’ll post the schedule on my campaign blog ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=bc44e74f70&e=1090c5c412)) and on my Facebook page ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=3e83a04b20&e=1090c5c412)). In the meantime, we have a bunch of events already scheduled through the first week of March ([Dellicker Events Feb](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=98f3132e9e&e=1090c5c412)). I hope to see you soon. Sincerely,
Kevin W. Dellicker
---
|
---
| **_Kevin’s Upcoming Campaign Events_**

**Friday, 02/11: Meet & Greet @ Retriever Brewing Company**
2844 Township Line Road, Orefield, PA 18069 | 6:30 PM – 8:30 PM

**Saturday, 02/12: Youth Pizza Roundtable @ Italiano Delite**
1985 Brookside Road, Macungie, PA 18062 | 1:00 PM – 3:00 PM

**Thursday, 02/17: Berks County Patriots @ Hamburg Field House**
Pine St., Hamburg PA 19526 | Doors open 5 PM, Meeting 6:30 PM - 8:30 PM

**Saturday, 02/19: Northampton County Lincoln Day Breakfast @ Blue Event Center**
4431 Easton Avenue, Bethlehem PA 18020 | 9:00 AM

**Saturday, 02/26: Lehigh County Lincoln Day Breakfast @ Hyatt Place**
621 Grange Road, Allentown PA 18106 | 7:30 AM

**Wednesday, 03/02: Meet & Greet/Petition Signing @ Dolce Mamma Grille**
4505 Bath Pike, Bethlehem PA 18017 | 1 PM – 2:30 PM

**Wednesday, 03/02: Meet & Greet/Petition Signing @ Villa Lentini Ristorante**
2700 Balliet Street, Coplay PA 18037 | 6 PM – 8 PM

Please contact [kevin@dellickerforcongress.com](mailto:kevin@dellickerforcongress.com) for more information.
---
|
---

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Building Back Better means investing in our environment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Last week, Derek proudly voted to pass the America COMPETES Act of 2022 through the House. Along with ensuring our economy stays competitive globally, this legislation will make key investments in clean energy and climate action.

Listen, rebuilding our economy and protecting our environment go hand in hand. We can't move forward on one issue without addressing the other. President Biden's Build Back Better agenda aims to address the climate crisis with bold solutions, and the America COMPETES Act is another step in the right direction.

**The America COMPETES Act will:**
* Invest in solar energy by strengthening solar manufacturing supply chains and grid resilience.
* Improve environmental standards to protect our ocean and wildlife by investing to fight illegal fishing and to protect our reefs.
* Strengthen our global partnerships to advance clean, renewable energy and help nations prepare for the impacts of climate change.

Our communities in Washington State are already experiencing the devastating effects of climate change every single day. We need to take immediate action to combat the climate crisis, and Derek is leading the fight in Congress. The American COMPETES Act contains critical investments for our environment, but we need to keep doing more to meet this crisis.

Derek is committing to the fight to Build Back Better by growing green jobs, expanding renewable energy, and combating the threat of climate change. [**Add your name if you agree we need to Build Back Better by investing in climate resilience and green energy today >> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/DQoVaBox_FqefFnkCvD6dXVWAQ_EfVTSJ2hs3Mes7Gs=/Y8uYe7OuqiTjd2L8gEt6w-8hjcW2sAlAj-CAG4u1_os=?ms=em22_220211_BBB_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220211_BBB_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220211_BBB_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220211_BBB_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/DQoVaBox_FqefFnkCvD6dXVWAQ_EfVTSJ2hs3Mes7Gs=/tjMKxqwkmrCs-RPEUXPE6c7hNsEioI7kyVFwNxhDKjM=?refcode=em22_220211_BBB_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220211_BBB_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Team Lamb
subject: This is not legitimate discourse, team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41695153/329932576/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGExNWE5OS04ZThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4w_7RVMDTslE_DOqIRGy85O9unGa21wCHLijoEGmDh0=)

Folks,

**Legitimate** political discourse – that’s what the Republican National Committee called the deadly assault on our democracy on January 6, 2021.

It is a blatant lie to label this attack as just “ _political discourse_.” Republicans are willing to rewrite history to win this election, even if it means letting a violent insurrection happen again.

Conor Lamb sees through this facade and calls it out: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41695155/329932578/1085202693?refcode=em22_220208_jan6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGExNWE5OS04ZThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4w_7RVMDTslE_DOqIRGy85O9unGa21wCHLijoEGmDh0=)
---
Conor Lamb’s position on the attack on January 6th has been clear from the start: the Big Lie created by Trump and the Republican party is a threat to the foundation of our democracy. Hi team,

We knew it was going to be a long road to Election Day. Democrats nationwide are defending the majority in the House and the Senate. In Maryland, we're looking to flip the governor's office from red to blue for the first time in **eight years** – **and we may be going up against Donald Trump 2.0 to do it.**

A recent poll of GOP voters in Maryland reported they want their nominee to **embrace Donald Trump's agenda** over someone who appeals to Maryland's diverse electorate. The more alarming part: when respondents learned a candidate was endorsed by Trump, **their likelihood to vote for him in the primary increased 160%.**

A Trump pick in the governor's office could do untold damage to our state**– we can't let them make it to Annapolis.**

**_[Tom is the _only_ candidate in this race with the experience to go up against a Trump-approved candidate and win. Chip in $5 or more now to help Tom win the primary and defend Maryland's values.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41695259/329933074/1691752261?refcode=bpi-em-null-null-null-20220211-DGASurveyResponse-ND&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzM0YTgwOC04ZjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j3J9_6tSszbIPcm1Cdac0ET7apbsPNldHCMvX7bWRsU=)_**

As Chair of the DNC, Tom knew the work it would take to challenge the Trump agenda. In 2020, he mobilized organizers across the country and invested in a political infrastructure that helped take back the White House, Congress, 400 seats in state legislatures, and 8 legislative chambers – **that kind of success only happens roughly once every 25 years.**

But Tom's not done – he's ready to bring that same experience and commitment to push Maryland forward and provide for all families across the state. **_[Can you chip in $5 now so that we can send Tom to Annapolis to fight for jobs, justice, and equal opportunity?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41695266/329933081/1691752261?refcode=bpi-em-null-null-null-20220211-DGASurveyResponse-ND&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzM0YTgwOC04ZjhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j3J9_6tSszbIPcm1Cdac0ET7apbsPNldHCMvX7bWRsU=)_**

Together, we can – and we **will** – seize a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build a better Maryland.

Thank you,

Team Tom
