clean_body: A recent poll of GOP voters in Maryland reported they want their nominee to embrace Donald Trump’s agenda over someone who appeals to Maryland’s diverse electorate = Hi team, We knew it was going to be a long road to Election Day. Democrats nationwide are defending the majority in the House and the Senate. In Maryland, we're looking to flip the governor's office from red to blue for the first time in eight years – and we may be going up against Donald Trump 2.0 to do it. A recent poll of GOP voters in Maryland reported they want their nominee to embrace Donald Trump's agenda over someone who appeals to Maryland's diverse electorate. The more alarming part: when respondents learned a candidate was endorsed by Trump, their likelihood to vote for him in the primary increased 160%. A Trump pick in the governor's office could do untold damage to our state– we can't let them make it to Annapolis. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = As Chair of the DNC, Tom knew the work it would take to challenge the Trump agenda. In 2020, he mobilized organizers across the country and invested in a political infrastructure that helped take back the White House, Congress, 400 seats in state legislatures, and 8 legislative chambers – that kind of success only happens roughly once every 25 years. But Tom's not done – he's ready to bring that same experience and commitment to push Maryland forward and provide for all families across the state. = Together, we can – and we will – seize a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build a better Maryland. subject: Martin County FAIR - Volunteers NEEDED!
body:
Help Melissa Martz get on the ballot at the FAIR! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/055a7de71536/martin-county-fair-volunteers-needed?e=77bc5297c6)
---
| |
---
| |
# VOLUNTEERS NEED FOR MARTIN COUNTY FAIR!

Hello Fellow Patriot,

The Campaign has been blessed to find out, last minute that we WILL have a table a the Martin County Fair. IF you are able to help please reply to this email with the day and time you are available (SEE details below)

Initially we thought that the we would be able to place our CANDIDATE PETITION FORMS on the Republican Parties table (along with the other candidate who are running). However, we were told yesterday that *Melissa Martz* specifically is not allowed to have forms displayed on the table. SO, now we have secured an entire table just for the Campaign. This turns out to be a HUGE blessing. As you know we need 2600 signature to get on the ballot the Constitutional and Ethical way.

We therefore, need volunteers to man the table and to collect signatures. Thank you to those who have volunteered in the past and to those who are able to help with this event!

DETAILS

WHERE: Martin County Fair
2616 SE Dixie Hwy Stuart FL 34996

WHEN: FEBUARY --
14th - 5-10p
15th- 5-10p
16th- 5-10p
17th- 5-10p
18th- 5-Midnight
19th- Noon- Midnight

---
| |
---

name: Patrick Denny, Wes Moore for Maryland
subject: Updates from Wes Moore for Maryland - February 11th
body:
Check out the latest below!

| | Friend - Thank you for your continued support of Wes Moore! Enclosed is our weekly roundup for our top supporters. It's been another busy week for Wes - we are excited to be open for business at our Baltimore field office, where volunteer activity is well underway knocking on doors, making phone calls, and getting Wes's message out to voters. See more below, and stay tuned for more plans to open field offices in other parts of the state as well in the near future. In the coming weeks and months, the campaign has several great events scheduled that we would love to have you join us for - see more details below, and don't hesitate to reach out with any questions. See more below, and stay tuned for more plans to open field offices in other parts of the state as well in the near future. Many thanks for your support of Wes, and more to follow! Patrick Denny Finance Director Wes Moore for Maryland What people are saying - highlights from the press: Democratic Candidate for Maryland Governor Wes Moore speaks to NBC's Zerlina Maxwell about the need to protect access to the ballot box and the momentum the historic ticket with Aruna Miller has generated in Maryland’s gubernatorial race. Peter — I often tell you how important holding this seat is to holding the House majority, and how determined Republicans are to defeat me. And all of that is very true and bears repeating; this is going to be a tough race. **Today I want to share some of the reasons I feel optimistic about my chances of winning re-election:**
1. Our economy is strong. While we still deal with inflation, we’ve made remarkable strides on the economy in 2021 with the fastest GDP growth in nearly four decades.

2. Redistricting has yet to be completed in Pennsylvania, which provides an exciting opportunity to connect with new constituents and voters.

3. **I have an incredible network of grassroots supporters like you, who I know have my back as I fight to stay in Congress.**

These are just a few of the reasons I know we can defend this seat and keep the House blue in 2022. subject: McSwain to hold press conference announcing law and order plan to combat surge in crime under Biden, Wolf, and Shapiro
body:
Bill McSwain will unveil his plan to restore law and order at a press conference on Tuesday, 2/15 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/mcswain-to-hold-press-conference-announcing-law-and-order-plan-to-combat-surge-in-crime-under-biden-wolf-and-shapiro?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **MEDIA ADVISORY**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE **

---
**February 11, 2022 **
**CONTACT:** Rachel Tripp 202.738.9089
---
| |
# Bill McSwain to hold press conference to address crime in Philadelphia; announce plan to restore law and order as Governor

**On Tuesday, February 15, Republican candidate for Governor Bill McSwain will hold a press conference to address the surge in crime in Northeast Philly and across the city.

He will also unveil his plan to restore law and order as Governor, including specific policy solutions to deter violent crime, bar Joe Biden's latest attempts to install heroin injection sites and distribute crack pipes, and initiatives to support police officers in Philadelphia and across the Commonwealth. This will be the first time that this plan will be shared publicly. **

The event will be hosted by local business owner Anne Marie Muldoon, who will give introductory remarks on how Krasner and Wolf's soft-on-crime policies have wreaked havoc on Philadelphia neighborhoods and businesses.

Local activists, Republican supporters, and community members from across Philadelphia will also attend to stand with Bill in support of his law and order initiatives.

**WHO:** Republican candidate for Governor Bill McSwain, Northeast Philadelphia business owner Anne Marie Muldoon

**WHAT:** A press conference to announce Bill McSwain's plan to restore law and order, address crime in Philadelphia and across the Commonwealth

**WHEN:** Tuesday, February 15 at 11:00am ET

**WHERE:** Avenue Chiropractic, 6233 Frankford Ave, Philadelphia, PA, 19135
**_All members of the media are invited and encouraged to attend. _**
---
| [MEDIA RSVP HERE](mailto:rachel@freedompapac.com?subject=Media%20RSVP%20for%20McSwain%20press%20conference%202%2F15&body=I%20plan%20to%20attend%20the%20McSwain%20law%20and%20order%20announcement%20event%20on%20Tuesday%2C%202%2F15%20at%2011am%20 "MEDIA RSVP HERE")
---
| _RSVP is encouraged but not required. Press/mult box access will be available. _

###
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **

Bill McSwain is a United States Marine, a former US Attorney under President Trump, and a conservative Republican who has devoted his career to protecting and advocating for the people of Pennsylvania. Bill is a fierce champion of constitutional rights, and believes that Pennsylvania deserves leaders who will put the people and the rule of law first.
---

body:
This is a rarity in American politics.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41695658/329934562/1843829960?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220211-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjc1ZDc4OC05MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3F4ZLHBV-GgmEvIiEeeLRsVi9xw9es24emyU8zoPyWU=)

| Peter,

As we move through Black History Month, I am reflecting on how I can support my community. As a Black woman running for Congress, I take very seriously my responsibility to honor those who have come before me and continue to lift up the next generation of Black leaders.

**That's why I prioritize diversity in my campaign team. **This is, unfortunately, a rarity in American politics. I am so proud of what our team has accomplished thus far, and I am so grateful to have colleagues as committed to flipping Nebraska blue as I am.

[_**Will you support our work with a contribution of $5 or more today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41695659/329934563/-1590707639?refcode=BLU-ASC-20220211-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjc1ZDc4OC05MThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3F4ZLHBV-GgmEvIiEeeLRsVi9xw9es24emyU8zoPyWU=)

clean_body: This is a rarity in American politics. | = | Peter, As we move through Black History Month, I am reflecting on how I can support my community. As a Black woman running for Congress, I take very seriously my responsibility to honor those who have come before me and continue to lift up the next generation of Black leaders. That's why I prioritize diversity in my campaign team. This is, unfortunately, a rarity in American politics. I am so proud of what our team has accomplished thus far, and I am so grateful to have colleagues as committed to flipping Nebraska blue as I am. = | = We constantly see history being made by Black Americans; for example, if elected, I would be Nebraska’s first Black Congresswoman. Just by running this campaign, we have already broken down barriers. All of us here on Team Shelton are so appreciative of your support, and it would mean so much to us if you could chip in any amount today. | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much, = * | | = PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS Alisha Shelton for Congress PO Box 641026 Omaha, NE 68164 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you'd like to stop receiving these emails, please

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1252%2E878179%2ETdpPzt). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1252%2E878179%2ETdpPzt).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1252%2E878179%2ETdpPzt) to request fewer emails. subject: Reminder: Join Doug & Candace for an evening in Baltimore!
body:

If you are fully vaccinated and would like to attend, RSVP by replying to this email or emailing me at: **[tom@ganslerformaryland.com](mailto:tom@ganslerformaryland.com?subject=Baltimore Event RSVP&body=)**. Please remember to include the names of all attendees in your message. name: Rep. Demings

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
there is zero room for error.
| Hi friend, sorry to bump this in your inbox, but with time running out before tonight's deadline, **I'm still falling short of my daily fundraising deadline.**
---
I can't emphasize this enough: **This race could very well decide Senate control.** And with the **GOP pouring MILLIONS into Florida to make sure Marco Rubio defeats me** , there is _zero_ room for error.
Every single fundraising goal is critical to keeping my campaign on track to flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic majority. That's why I need to ask you again, before my midnight deadline: **[Can I count on you to donate $5 or more to help me defeat Marco Rubio and protect the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41696325/329936540/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2388-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzcyNTczNi05MzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EuRE8KWH2pE68t83wbwd4ZdFG4kuNTxMtOwcucg35ys=)**
Thank you so much,

Val Demings

| We need your help gathering 28,000 signatures!

Can you collect **50 signatures** from neighbors, family, friends, social media acquaintances, or the people in your city? **Request a packet[here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=264d21045e&e=10c1db3257) **and we will mail it to you so you can get started.

You can also join us on **February 14 at 4:00** **pm** at [Foxboro North Regional Park](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=764fbd11da&e=10c1db3257) or **February 16 at 4:00 pm** at [Laird Park](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=be8528665f&e=10c1db3257) to gather signatures in surrounding neighborhoods.

Find more information about collecting signatures at public events [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=76e3563463&e=10c1db3257).

---
| If you have volunteered to gather signatures, **please return your packet as soon as possible so we can count and verify your signatures**. Use the self-addressed stamped envelope, drop it off at an event or, contact our campaign for pickup.

Thank you for all your support!

body:
Stay afloat with The Daily Wire
Stay afloat with The Daily Wire

[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJw9kMFugzAMhp8GbqDgBCgHDttYT9thrbStpyokAdIlBNGwqn36OaybZCXy599OfssaWMmoinUNBDCyLNvkAEW6aVlO2nZDcyVE3pGIEct7zoXXbuRGzT4VzsZDnUlSVawjLZMFq3hR5VQomjFaZQAdl7GpB--nc0QfIthimCmVXJvrRc8qzEB0cV8qFOl28fZoldSLjWgzcS0jKAI7u2UWCpnn_R0JblHQjwhDvxr9X8GNPmS0-fVEqqR3QdK7dsYrQYEYfZLd9R7trPLzwCc9O8TH0eDTtPmYD3u7334eHlc4aIk-mreW62x3kvFcy-mijdHnosQF9RZ9rWvBrxndXeuoxEZY2wDWDUD__n1adnB79clNQfJ8si8kFOEJT3-d1L_yPiRVYWygZfMDUdmItQ) Hi gang,

When’s the last time one of those mainstream late night shows made you laugh? I don’t know about you, but I honestly can’t remember. These late night “comedians” have just become propagandists for the Left’s woke agenda, chasing applause from radical activists rather than laughter from everyone else.

[**Skip propaganda comedy. Get the real thing. Join The Daily Wire.**](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJw9kLFygzAMhp-GbHBGYCADQ1qSqR2aoUOXnrEVcGJjDkzT5Okr07R3Ovv06ZfsX6qGvMwz3OgaGFCkaVpxgCKp2pyztq0yjlLyE4tyZkUnhPTaDcLg5BPp7KavObYCmABRFMirvCowZbnYcl4icgWnjal778c5ynYRHCjMmCihze2qJwwzCF3dBUMxOyzeflpUerFR1oxCqwiKwGa3TBKJedE9kBSWBN1AMPTj4P8KbvAhy5pfT2wbdy5IOtdOdMUkkIOP04fek51VPvdi1JMj_DkYejpr9h87Xl3kdvleYa8V-WjeWqHT41ltplqNV22MnouSFtRZ8rWuhb5m9OlWR-VTBLC2AawbgO7967wc4f7q4ztCvD_bFxaK8Eynv434r3wMSTCMDbRsfgC9aYjp)

This should concern all of us. There’s a reason why the court jester was the only person who could criticize the king without losing his head. By delivering the truth wrapped in humor, comedians are able to talk about things the ruling class have declared to be taboo.

Comedians serve as the canary in the coal mine - when they are silenced, you know we’re in BIG trouble.

For too long, conservatives have allowed the Left to dominate the entertainment industry, especially comedy. But now it has become apparent to everyone that leftists are a bunch of humorless scolds who wouldn’t know a good joke if it hit them in the face.

This provides a golden opportunity for conservatives to step in and create REAL comedy that shatters the Left’s “sacred cows” with laughter. [**Here at the Daily Wire, we are creating a home for real comedy that doesn’t pander to the woke mob.**](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJw9kE1vgzAMhn8N3EDgQIEDh260p23Sepi0U5UvICwhFMKq9tfPYd0kK5Efv3byWtSQFRmRoaohAYw0TcscYBeXLMsTxkqSS87zNgmyxNCOUu6UHamWs4u5NWFfi5S3tISKCCZa0sqKZbySbZ6WrCipyEJd985NS0D2ARwx9BQLqvTtqmbpZyC62i_pi-S4OnM2UqjVBKSZqBIB7Dxb7DpziczR7oE4NSjoRoS-X47ur2BH5zPS_HpKqqizXtJZNuMVoYCPLkofeod2NvnS00nNFvF51Pg0abLD_tLD5U18brBXAn0074yq9DSIcK7FdFVaq2VX4II6g762teDXtGpvdVA8BQBbG8C2Aeg-vof1BPdXF90lRIfBvCS-CM94utsk_5WPIbH0Yz0tmh8cGInn)

[JOIN US TODAY](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJw9kMFuhCAQhp9GbxoYBN2Dh7Z2L22Tdg_b4wYBkS2oUexm9-kLdttkAplv_hn4R9ZQlAVRqakBQQiMcUUBWF61BUVtWxGqhKAdSgrkuOZceDMO3KrZ52J0aV8zSlmFaceQYCWmcqcEAYVZRZGAruKprXvvpyUhDwnsQ9gpl9zY68XMKs4I6DJ-qVgk-9W7k1PSrC4hzcSNTIBFtozrLFRgnus7EtwFgR4CjP1q8H-FcfAxI82vJ7TL9BglemzncGVBIAaf4bveBzubfOn5ZOYx4NNgw9Ok0b0o5OfLe3HcYG9k8NF8tNzgw1mmcy2ni7HWLKwMC9Iu-NrWEr5mTXetk_IxAdjaALYNgD5-n9cD3N58dlOQPZ_dK4pFeAqnv07qX3kfkqs4NtKy-QEFuIho)

Here’s the uncomfortable truth that keeps the Left up at night: they know that real comedy - comedy that doesn’t kowtow to the woke mob - has the power to strip the Left of its influence. They are terrified of being exposed for the laughingstocks they are.

That’s why The Daily Wire is creating a home for real comedians who are only interested in being funny, rather than parroting political talking points. [**Join us at The Daily Wire to find out more.**](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJw9kE1vgzAMhn8N3EDECR89cNjGelqlrYddq5AECEsIgrCq_fVzWDfJipXHr528ljWwklEV6xoywCCEVDlAkVYty7O2rWiuhMi7LGKZ5T3nwms3caMWnwpn46EuFasIoR3kRcYKAQQzKWkFMues6iA29eD9vEb0KYIjhplTybW5XfWiwgxEV_elQpEeN28vVkm92Yg2M9cygiKw1W2LUMg87x9IcIuCfkIY-tXk_wpu8uFGm19P2SHpXZD0rl0wJSgQk0_IQ-_Rzi5fBz7rxSG-TAafps1BwXt1Ypb7HQ5aoo_mo-WanEcZL7Wcr9oYvRYlLqi36GtfC37N6O5WR-VzBLC3AewbgP7ze9zOcD_55K4geR3tWxaK8IKnv83qX_kYkqowNtCy-QEWxYee)

Our first original comedy series, Truth Yeller with Adam Carolla, has been a smash hit. Episodes feature comic legends like Jay Leno, Rob Riggle, T.J. Miller, and, of course, Adam Carolla.

[**Join us on the right side of history and comedy. clean_body: Republicans got caught cheating Ohioans on their first map, now they have until Monday to craft a new one. | \- Marcy Kaptur | | | | Team, They got caught red-handed. Last month, the Ohio Supreme Court caught the uber-partisan Republican legislature drawing a map that served their own interests rather than those of Ohio’s eleven million people. ** | It’s no secret who’s behind this: the National GOP is so eager to take back the House, they called in a favor with the state party. subject: Join Emily's Field Kickoff on 2/26!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Beach for Congress
body:
See you there | | | | [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=d1136b3f61&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | | Peter,

We’re hosting our [**Field Kickoff & Rally on Saturday, February 26th at 10 am!**](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=526eec0e13&e=de8b2615ea) Our campaign is excited to have you join us for our first big in-person event.

**There’s no time to waste. Voters will begin casting their ballots in early May for the June 7th election._We need all boots on the ground, talking with voters about why Emily is the right candidate to represent us in Congress._**__ We all know her amazing energy, and how hard she fights for the people she represents. Now we need you to help spread that message to as many voters as possible!

Join us for an energizing (and brief) rally — then grab a sign, campaign handouts, and hit the sidewalk to help us knock on doors! We can’t do this without your help.

[**Sign up today. Don’t miss out on our first in-person event of the year! **](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=d8d46d6373&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=78893c3d5a&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| [Please consider making a donation today.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=9535cd5921&e=de8b2615ea) Your contribution will help us pay for yard signs, buttons, and the campaign walk piece volunteers will be sharing with voters so they can learn more about Emily’s vision and accomplishments. [**Can you chip in $25, $50, or even $100 to help us reach our February fundraising goal?**](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=1be06b068d&e=de8b2615ea)

clean_body: This is TIME SENSITIVE | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | Folks – Donald Trump ADMITTED to the public that he wanted Mike Pence to overturn the results of the 2020 election. It’s clearer than ever that if he becomes President again, it could permanently damage our democracy. But this is a highly controversial plan... Republicans HATE it. So we need to know what voters in Pennsylvania think. | | | Thanks, –Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . Friend,

Liz Cheney is missing in action. She has barely been in Wyoming with her constituents since 2020. I think we know the reason why. Wyoming is embarrassed of Liz Cheney and her actions in Congress and she is afraid to show her face here.

And Liz Cheney should be embarrassed. She betrayed the will of Wyomingites when she voted to impeach President Donald Trump, and now spends her days working with Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff to try to embarrass conservatives that dare stand up to the regime.

Liz Cheney has been censured by the Wyoming Republican Party and the Republican National Committee. She is using Wyoming's lone Congressional district to pursue her own personal vendettas. Wyoming deserves better, and we, the people, see what she is doing.

The only support Liz Cheney has is from Democrats and coastal elites. Wyomingites will not allow this seat to be bought by outside special interest groups. We are Wyoming Tough, and soon enough we will have a voice fighting for us in Washington.

Read more about Liz Cheney's exile from Wyoming [_**HERE**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfi1h-2BiqGk1q-2FgaJc66Vj2HDaagPdrDZm9PCSijkjfna4KIjRWiM45Mw2apOGueF-2FvMbT-2B2o8f0S9OmwjnNRwZy2xqoYNeh0wyeOBgfrOil2UNo-y_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz63YHx-2FZjHjlrD4HS0FZXhZ9Uy-2FWcExAZ-2FTD0q4y4RG974raO12gdWWS2q59LE0JgeQAP3SWrJzarANCsczVBxa5DrRgJOEQ8Dl7BTpUrWtO3-2FQhQ-2FDfRCqq02L1W9Urw-2BeD3u-2B8qwsIvan4QSuPj0m7LXcytGvhqr0G6Q6vD0fiHim9WDplIZUjZVtOVpslfJhW6BoMkbhz0Dbw89nAAELngbkPnp71ocKHX6RsKBVZEfO-2FTEAAKEgCOKc9sjqxUuwe-2FQjNPclEUjovqR8Vf5EVaVA66uS4w9fWBgGp1bTSja3uWgKtlR8xvcHQKFGKTUa87o4CoVSaGg2QEotp6YBGwH2P40aRvO-2FfJFXygLQZ-2FSgeopC0-2BTdZRK2ZaWMvMQxVo5LKLfGg77pc0qR18RnSKtThRapQLi1qJueUZb369JHcmCuA24ja7wN7j6Leygk8gns6W4NPHfT0Xep8N64garcYtDbV4P8vWPPlHTcSUGo9am0Z2Fls4FTizKs0f7S-2B2wLgpkok-2BgtZS9gICAMA5sUZhEaY-2FO7vxC6OSyF-2FuKPx4oagH-2BtM6ztmuznKjhK3lptjZbQxlsPT8HqTEAwSkQErhTtw6YBLLPLoRHzhcOkRACZVhbOtk9iNwgwV6Q2XlLJqe3sIlAVwYPkVwelPHCWCVBaJ4xJ6pwzI-2BCoadm9hAl6oMHoYvZWXO9DjFJUd93Kvbf-2BxseTXHRn3aHIBgeSXxmN6MKdbMpLDryGaBIdRzDzz9HLZoArVZ2ezgN5mNPUn8tWuo9sUiS61hcqKJgdsOTvJ2rSU-2BC621IFBnrFjmnL2mBb-2FhdEPNzU2VenYaoUr27-2BYDNFlPgDpYWTw-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | At home, in Northern Virginia | Friend, Liz Cheney is missing in action. She has barely been in Wyoming with her constituents since 2020. I think we know the reason why. Wyoming is embarrassed of Liz Cheney and her actions in Congress and she is afraid to show her face here. And Liz Cheney should be embarrassed. She betrayed the will of Wyomingites when she voted to impeach President Donald Trump, and now spends her days working with Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff to try to embarrass conservatives that dare stand up to the regime. Liz Cheney has been censured by the Wyoming Republican Party and the Republican National Committee. She is using Wyoming's lone Congressional district to pursue her own personal vendettas. Wyoming deserves better, and we, the people, see what she is doing. The only support Liz Cheney has is from Democrats and coastal elites. Wyomingites will not allow this seat to be bought by outside special interest groups. We are Wyoming Tough, and soon enough we will have a voice fighting for us in Washington. Read more about Liz Cheney's exile from Wyoming For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

Peter,
---
My parents began their American journey with just $5 in their pocket, escaping Cuba and finding freedom at my childhood home in Little Havana.
---
Through their hard work, dedication, and faith, they allowed me to live the American dream and pursue a career holding the corrupt and powerful accountable as a 5-time Emmy Award-winning journalist, television anchor, and eventually, as a member of Congress.
---
**Now, I’m fighting to save the American dream from future generations by defeating Nancy Pelosi and the Left this November – but I can’t do it on my own.**
---
_I’m asking grassroots conservatives across American to contribute the same $5 my parents started with so we can defend our families, our values, and our dreams from the socialist Democrats._

---
**The TRUTH is that socialism has led to misery and immense human suffering wherever it’s been implemented.**
---
_It destroys economies, crushes individual freedom, and benefits the corrupt and powerful at the expense of the people._Socialism kills._ _
---

clean_body: This is our story. | Peter, My parents began their American journey with just $5 in their pocket, escaping Cuba and finding freedom at my childhood home in Little Havana. Through their hard work, dedication, and faith, they allowed me to live the American dream and pursue a career holding the corrupt and powerful accountable as a 5-time Emmy Award-winning journalist, television anchor, and eventually, as a member of Congress. Now, I’m fighting to save the American dream from future generations by defeating Nancy Pelosi and the Left this November – but I can’t do it on my own. I’m asking grassroots conservatives across American to contribute the same $5 my parents started with so we can defend our families, our values, and our dreams from the socialist Democrats. Democrats like AOC and Ilhan Omar are great at lying to the American people about the reality of socialism. They love to portray it as a utopia where the government solves all your problems. But I’ve spoken to left-wing tyrants like Fidel Castro and Nicolás Maduro, and I’ve seen socialist countries firsthand... ...So trust me when I say that this couldn’t be further from the truth. The TRUTH is that socialism has led to misery and immense human suffering wherever it’s been implemented. It destroys economies, crushes individual freedom, and benefits the corrupt and powerful at the expense of the people.Socialism kills. That’s why I’ve consistently been one of the socialist Left’s staunchest critics in Congress. We’re already seeing the tell-tale signs of socialism in America... Our economy is tanking as the price of basic goods skyrockets, and our elected Democrat leaders think they can live by a different set of rules than the rest of Americans. Whether it’s defunding the police while they’re protected by armed security or breaking their own absurd COVID-19 restrictions, they clearly think they don’t have to abide by the rules that they’re forcing on everyone else. And worst of all, the Left is using big tech companies to silence opposition and Biden has even used the Department of Justice to target political opponents, just like totalitarian regimes do. America is looking more and more like communist Cuba and Venezuela – and if we don’t sweep the Democrats out of power in November, it will be too late to save our country from the same fate. Thank you, María Elvira Salazar Florida’s 27th Congressional District Paid for by Salazar for Congress P.O. Box 431332, Miami, FL 33243

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

Hey — did you know conservatives are banning books in our schools and held a massive book burning this month? It is like something out of a dystopian novel (the irony), but unfortunately this is dead serious.

But Democrats are fighting back! We’ll fully fund our public schools and defend a rigorous, scientifically accurate, curriculum that reflects the full context of our history. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

Fighting back isn’t going to be easy. But we’re in it for the long haul, and won’t stop until we build an education system that our kids deserve.

— Brit

From: Hendrell Remus <hendrell@tndp.org>
Date: Fri, Feb 11, 2022 at 8:49 AM
Subject: Republican Indoctrination
To: Brit Bender <brit@tndp.org>

Peter,

Tennessee Republicans are trying to indoctrinate our kids. Just this month:

- They banned “Maus,” a book about the Holocaust in McMinn County.
- Governor Lee is again using taxpayer money to bring far right Hillsdale College charter schools to Tennessee. (For those of you who are not familiar with the Koch supported Hillsdale College, they’re consistently rated as one of the worst colleges in the country for LGBTQ students, they held a panel with the Trump Administration to counter the New York Times’ 1619 Project, they sponsored the Rush Limbaugh Show and have strong ties with Betsy DeVos.)
- Conservatives held a massive book burning in Mt. Juliet burning books like Harry Potter and Twilight (??).
- Ultra-conservative group Moms For Liberty are pushing to ban an educational book about seahorses for being “too sexy.”

This is incredibly dangerous. Tennessee Republicans don’t just care about tax cuts, they never did — they want to control the minds of the next generation with their extremist, dangerous ideology, and they want to do it unchallenged.

Well we plan on challenging them with everything we’ve got.

With Republicans becoming more and more extreme by the day, will you help us fight back so that we can protect our public schools and our kids? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

They know their extremist views are increasingly unpopular with Americans, so they are lashing out and fighting to maintain control through any means necessary. This could go one of two ways: either we slide into authoritarianism by minority rule, or we fight back and ensure that these are just the death throes of their dangerous ideology.

We need to fight this together — will you chip in to help us fight for leadership that will fully fund our schools and push back against Tennessee’s Republican theocracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

Yours in the fight,

Hendrell Remus

Fifty years ago, when Marco's dad and I made the decision to move our family from Mexico to Arizona, we came here for the promise of greater opportunity – what Marco calls the promise of Arizona. But I never could have imagined where that promise would take him.
**From becoming the mayor of our hometown of Nogales, Arizona, to serving in the Obama administration, Marco has always been a champion for the people of this state. And today, he's following in my footsteps – running his own small business and creating jobs and opportunities in his community. **

As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. Marco is dedicated to fighting for real families and their real concerns – not playing politics or spouting conspiracies. And now that we're officially in his election year, we're closer than ever to turning his vision into a reality.
**But we'll have to fight to elect Marco and defeat the GOP extremism sweeping our state. Marco is running against a Trump-backed Republican who has threatened many of our fundamental rights, from voting rights to reproductive health care. Simply put, she's the exact _opposite_ of my son.**

That's why I need your help today. Even though Marco fights day after day to make Arizona's promise a reality for everyone, he has many more fights ahead of him. And while our family has plenty of love and support to go around, he's counting on grassroots folks like you to help power this campaign to victory.

**Last time he called, he mentioned he was falling a few thousand dollars short of his next big goal, and I don't want to let him down – especially now that we're only _months_ from the first votes being cast. So I have to humbly ask: [Friend, will you please give $5 or more today so we can elect Marco as our next governor and build a state that works for all people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41697143/329941617/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk439-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmNhNzQ2OS05NzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x8-kDZ675-TK16ij3V_vS2neJbWDT5L-ZcpC-biio_c=)**

But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. **Peter: Senator Grassley (R-IA) has been in Washington for nearly half a century – and in that time, he turned his back on working-class families in favor of whatever Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump asked him to do. **
Sen. Grassley voted to defund Planned Parenthood, tried to take away health care from millions of Americans and schemed with Mitch McConnell to ram through extremist Supreme Court nominees. **Now, he has somehow reached a new low: defending Trump's attempts to overturn the results of the election and enabling conspiracy theorists!**
**The good news is this:** 64% of likely Iowa voters say it's time for someone NEW to hold Iowa's Senate seat, and Abby Finkenauer – the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – is running to defeat him. Sen. Grassley had already been in Washington for _13 years_ when Abby was born, and 34 years later, she's going to send him packing.
It's time for Chuck Grassley to go – but Abby needs your help to win. **Please, if you're with her to flip this Senate seat blue and EXPAND our Senate majority, respond to our live grassroots poll NOW before it closes at 11:59 p.m. Hurry! What’s the opposite of invincible? “Vincible.” And that’s exactly what Ann Selzer – who Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight says is “the best pollster in politics” – is now calling Chuck Grassley.
**Her latest poll with the extremely-respected Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley!**
Admiral Mike Franken is running against Chuck Grassley this November, and he is Democrats’ best chance ever to defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue.
**But with McConnell and Grassley raising millions to attack Mike, we’re still falling short of our $15,000 daily goal and what we need to fight back and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**

Her latest poll with the extremely-respected Des Moines Register shows just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley! Admiral Mike Franken is running against Chuck Grassley this November, and he is Democrats’ best chance ever to defeat Grassley and turn Iowa blue. But with McConnell and Grassley raising millions to attack Mike, we’re still falling short of our $15,000 daily goal and what we need to fight back and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate. name: Katie Britt for Alabama
subject: Official Team Britt Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
**OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER** ****Katie Supports Peace Through Strength**** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=8e6375cb8e2d45a7ad9ba4f3050efe0f&_e=MxXYFlJ1lTlbAa8PXjaiinfHtFksSD2mzE_Xzc80RHZJd9VREFKJjZEJkbMwdJrwKKBQMTEMsWjbddTPCHfclFTpXNGsRUjZ_6YofWM-4aKjjdXUAJEMEdfU4xGYAf6Xu_v8HeeVcpSMhVTS6kJyCMB1_7IcR4WKc21iOXhw6jwl_nyrfrAIv3n5cna3L3huwjgy78tKZHtCTAlQZYvrCIy1XgcVA31HIBnjq3pBCXqnRl1GSBXiOOdUiv7jLlgAtExkmT2n4Dj1HHkeEHVoYe0UC21uhu_gXuialRkCylmFV9GLTO_Owjh1VT3DcDYL) China and Russia are emboldened because Joe Biden is the weakest president in American history. As Alabama's next Senator, I will always support peace through strength. This keeps our families and communities safe here at home, while allowing our economy to thrive and grow good-paying Alabama jobs. Weakness only invites conflict and continues the cycle of endless war that costs American lives and adds to our national debt. clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER **Katie Supports Peace Through Strength China and Russia are emboldened because Joe Biden is the weakest president in American history. As Alabama's next Senator, I will always support peace through strength. This keeps our families and communities safe here at home, while allowing our economy to thrive and grow good-paying Alabama jobs. Weakness only invites conflict and continues the cycle of endless war that costs American lives and adds to our national debt. Maggie’s List Endorses Katie Britt I am excited to announce the endorsement of Maggie's List, which supports candidates who "stand for fiscal conservatism, less government, more personal responsibility and strong national security." In releasing their endorsement of our campaign, they stressed their confidence that I will champion these principles and "fight against the radical left’s disastrous agenda for the American people." Katie Addresses Human Trafficking While the spike in violent crime nationwide last year has rightfully grabbed headlines, one heinous crime wave continues to go relatively under the radar. Human trafficking, already the second-largest criminal industry in the world, is also the fastest-growing. While this might seem like a distant problem to our state, the reality is that human trafficking is hitting Alabama communities and some of the most vulnerable among us every day. Biden’s “Big Brother” Administration The Biden Administration continues to push the IRS to become even more like Big Brother. We need smaller government and more individual freedom. In the Senate, I'll vote to ban the IRS from mandating that Alabama taxpayers submit a facial recognition scan. Katie Talks Inflation Inflation hasn’t been this high since the month I was born. A 40-year high in inflation is a crushing hidden tax on the Alabamians who can least afford it. This comes on the heels of our national debt surpassing $30 trillion. Pattern is clear: it’s time to end the reckless spending in Washington. **She wants to force mask mandates on our children, but posed IN A SCHOOL without her mask.**

_But the children were still forced to cover their faces._ [](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=6e9da0366d4c45f1815c7d26ab40a964&_e=Fyp95K2qN_N4RIGDj1AoL43ktkiTHD3hXTP_zp62kbEyC-ptX1-wVAL-365iLCey1jCEa5f2X6mR3G8nuPxeOztilmLvu3o__7arVxJIuV3GQ7CcErvp0Ld7-lfvwasoeP8hBIVQXldhY2viD_k7yAADDExMVDQxy23190Xdw4Js3mali6vwo1JMEbEVHAdGyBS6JdAxGFNr2qYXKKWkRnLPiwPApViHqOraPt9dgwpQv4AEefq4G2gwP6UG7g8z9XbETjRgobVGY5tkTKxf2pGTqboYUISiEVXuM09tl6qVcT-bvHt3JZkgmwWy4YgSVcyIAJ4Vp_4oFgum9gcqZLl6EaOVkAGNyG0ZWGMRqXBDGS0DR9TNr9IPRUD3rdLz9qx-402q9ZdjggA0K_QZ8g%3D%3D) The Democrat motto is clear: they want you to do as they say, but not as they do.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Leftist Media Terrified of Decertification
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
I'm standing strong |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3254a4a933&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
I made waves just a couple of days ago by sponsoring groundbreaking legislation to recall electors in Maricopa, Pima, and Yuma counties in Arizona.

**And the media absolutely hates it.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=534dcf4098&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **According to Laurie Roberts, this crucial bill should be “dispatched to oblivion.”**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cadfa7f332&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This article which came out yesterday is trying to convince people this bill is a “show,” and that I’m not dead serious.

_Talking Points Memo_ reads:

_Within hours of Arizona state Rep. Mark Finchem (R) introducing his bill to “decertify” and “set aside” the 2020 election results in three of Arizona’s largest counties, two things happened._

_Donald Trump celebrated the move in a public statement, calling it “Big News in Arizona!”_

_And Arizona House Speaker Rusty Bowers (R) essentially doomed the bill to failure: “Mr. Finchem’s obviously unconstitutional and profoundly unwise proposal will receive all of the consideration it deserves,” Bowers said in a statement._

_The two statements say a lot about Finchem’s bill: It’s likely not going anywhere, and it also thrilled Finchem’s most important supporter in his campaign to become Arizona’s next secretary of state._
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7e5be3dc26&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Here, I am being attacked with the suggestion that the NFL move the Super Bowl out of Arizona because I support election integrity. Ridiculous and petty. When they mock me, they are really dismissing you. I will not let that happen.

**They won’t challenge me to my face. They won’t debate me. But they will threaten the Super Bowl.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b3e268c900&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Even _Vice_ interviewed me on Election integrity.**

_Finchem is a staunch advocate for the so-called audit in Arizona which was conducted last spring by Cyber Ninjas, a company that had no prior experience with election audits._

_When asked about the election reviews that did occur, and that did not find evidence of widespread voter fraud, Finchem told VICE News, “That is absolutely crap and you know it. You didn't look at the findings.”_

_At Trump’s first rally of the year in Florence, Arizona in early January, Finchem got a primetime speaking slot. “Ladies and gentlemen,” he told the crowd, “We know it and they know it. Donald Trump won.”_

_Trump has already said what he expects from his chosen secretaries of state if they win. In a video for a Pennsylvania Republican group, the former president said, “There’s a famous statement– sometimes the vote-counter is more important than the candidate. And we can’t let that ever ever happen again.”_

_When asked if he would certify the 2024 election results, no matter the outcome, Finchem told VICE News, “It's a hypothetical I can't answer. You're asking me, ‘OK, no matter what happens in an election, would you certify it?’ Only a moron would say yes.”_

**There’s a clear pattern here. We make big strides in Election Integrity and the media freaks out. Every. Single. Time.**

_If this wasn’t real, if we weren’t a threat, then Biden’s attack dogs wouldn’t be after us. We have seen exponentially more attacks because we are making exponential progress._

[_Please help me push forward with this critical bill to decertify. I can’t do it without your help. Donate today!_

_This is the only way to stop election fraud in the future. This is the only way to fight back against the unjust, incompetent, and evil coup of a Presidency that is the Joe Biden administration. Join the fight today!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ae6557d725&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c410966268&e=44b8c466b0)

Conservative

name: Beto for Texas
subject: This is not a drill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
This is what voter suppression looks like.
#
Greg Abbott’s voter suppression law is working as intended, and it’s wreaking havoc on our elections.
Early voting for primary elections — including our own primary — begins in 3 days. But in Harris County, where nearly 2.5 million registered voters live, **a staggering 40% of mail-in ballots have already been rejected.**
**This is not a drill.** Congress has shown it won’t protect our voting rights. The Supreme Court won’t either. So it’s on ALL of us to step up.
If we want every voter to get a say in who becomes their next governor, we need nothing less than a historic, record-setting voter mobilization effort that is bigger than anything Texas has seen before.
[Will you donate right away to fuel our voter outreach program? We’re in the midst of an ambitious push to have our 44,000+ volunteers reach 2 million voters before March 1st — and we need every single supporter’s help to get it done, including yours. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52842?refcode=ema20220211-175777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=175777%2E444211%2EmPkrYW)
Make no mistake: Abbott signed SB1 into law to cement his own power. His success in this campaign will rely on low voter turnout from the communities most hurt by these new voter restrictions.
**That means we have to work twice as hard, register more voters than ever before, and make sure a historic number of people show up at the ballot box in November.**
Over the course of February, we’re going to personally connect with over 2 million Texas voters. That means we’re going to knock on their doors, reach them on their phones, and even send them hand-written notes in the mail. Tens of thousands of volunteers have joined our team — that’s more than twice the number of volunteers we had in 2018, when we set the voter turnout record in Texas.
This is how we directly take on Greg Abbott’s voter suppression, and it’s how we win this election. But we can’t do it without you.
[By making a donation to our campaign today, you will help us reach the Texans most targeted by Abbott’s new voter suppression law. Can you chip in today? ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52842?refcode=ema20220211-175777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=175777%2E444211%2EmPkrYW)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52842?refcode=ema20220211-175777&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=175777%2E444211%2EmPkrYW)**
We can do this but it can’t wait.
Thank you,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220211-175777-footer&t=22&refcode2=175777_444211_mPkrYW&akid=175777%2E444211%2EmPkrYW)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=23&akid=175777%2E444211%2EmPkrYW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=175777%2E444211%2EmPkrYW)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

Donald J. Trump February 11th, 2022
Even more Voter Fraud was just discovered in Wisconsin. It shows the Election was Rigged and Stolen. A hearing this week revealed at least 50,000 illegal phantom votes were cast in the 2020 Presidential Election, which is more than twice the “victory” margin. Incredible problems were also uncovered within Wisconsin’s voter rolls, including an apartment building with 102 percent turnout rate (not possible), 113 ballots cast from an address where no one lives, 3,713 “voters” registered to U.S. Post Offices, and 625,000 dead people on Wisconsin’s voter rolls. In addition, 46,000 votes were cast on Nov. 3rd based on voter information that was never verified by the state. This is on top of massive ballot harvesting, rigged “indefinitely confined” votes, the Wisconsin Election Commission instructing election officials to break the law, Zuckerberg drop boxes, etc. So who in Wisconsin is leading the charge to decertify this fraudulent Election? It’s time for RINOs to step forward and save our Country!

Fellow Conservative,

If you look at the screenshot below from a recent Democrat Senatorial Campaign Committee email, _you'd think that our opponent was in dire need of cash and help from the National Democrat Party._

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3547b1e95e1548c6b4a5e7a68d218070&_e=8b5e3DmZvKNQiK6PZfulKJ99Y6ZgkQeSuZt3T00gu3Nfq3Ps1EP4PrrlxZoj49SzFEB4oxHy2enzEkdj2AkYKxHPYUAsyzEdsdV0TlFC5-VsNbO4hSDupdzNdPU91NHOR0c2tx_dwGHfWfL9cbGo6BaTBrbKMIJgIDdGzSOIqoDphZfkt9xNd2Pd2RPGdL1_ns-hcbjOpxVFQpA26k6k87uB8va2fgfHwNd_Yvl6-wkDyBdcWTDOj3thp7bN-yLBlezS7eH2V1gCN3RPx-ClkVrX5Zs37UF1wx9NEYS48B7lzUb-LB_-vPXxW3YBnulUCXnwIDsIURp2wjaYXGKv3fguegpl-8_N7Zft7l77TIpFmhhHM2XvslFz1V16MDY3VDVkZz88uBX9BvGWEgt5teYnXeIeetBNuCiDD3T3gAevUUIuKuuxmXnNa0Shouo4GluAQ2G7Z8zGnmQh0F-eQg%3D%3D)
Recent polling in Georgia indeed gives our campaign a slight lead (within the margin of error), but our Democrat opponent doesn't need more campaign cash.

In the last three months of 2021, **our opponent raised $9.8 million from 130,000 individual donors. As it stands, he has $23 million in the bank for our Senate race this November.**

While our campaign also had significant fundraising support last quarter, the fact remains that our opponent started raising money months before we even entered the race. With his early start, he now has millions more in the bank than us. We've got to pick up the pace if we're going to catch up because "to keep the Senate blue," Democrats must win Georgia.

**[With that in mind, would you kindly send $4.50 to our campaign today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3547b1e95e1548c6b4a5e7a68d218070&_e=8b5e3DmZvKNQiK6PZfulKJ99Y6ZgkQeSuZt3T00gu3Nfq3Ps1EP4PrrlxZoj49SzFEB4oxHy2enzEkdj2AkYKxHPYUAsyzEdsdV0TlFC5-VsNbO4hSDupdzNdPU91NHOR0c2tx_dwGHfWfL9cbGo6BaTBrbKMIJgIDdGzSOIqoDphZfkt9xNd2Pd2RPGdL1_ns-hcbjOpxVFQpA26k6k87uB8va2fgfHwNd_Yvl6-wkDyBdcWTDOj3thp7bN-yLBgLHhNO3vCgxcdICz5ubTcr1GFI6Zbql02wawfj5DC0WpxwCyb-lLhjmz6nuo6ADkoDYXbqlnxGtMDiR26rB1UOPB4XB58_gwAh1KtQxKSDJ8-5nyRCtfaT_VgEJKo3bJuf3X5eN-xOlktmN3Xi8FEiVuJQJHRnb8jCwxb_sbHSBDNaK_OJ8UDclTURUmZsARgQ-jOsIHQNO9cZ34cr5inQ%3D%3D)**

Our race in Georgia is going to be the most competitive contest in the nation this fall, so we can't afford to be outspent for a single moment.

Sincerely,

name: Paul Gazelka
subject: Calling on Minnesota's Parents
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
Minnesota's children deserve the best education. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1bd57dc268bc42b78babb2b1c9c81ce5&_e=kC9TF121O8mwk7YHYox98z4sT95F0yL_dBLMnpX68273RNfQtmza3wUftQmnWCt4ULl1K5_Fm-_V6jUcLYemtKkzI4_XUVYWSlvVXH1RV6_P7ES20g7ZCQs6m87ZgJKb-OC_snf0mevwFo8Pxipzq5M2mZHwJD8gCXSHE4ApWoq-RB5objM4isPo3LPFnLBi2Mzr_sOiH3MeNDY1F4RmDhq82Uxusxx0yDsLyDrNjph0WZ4XPU2pPrJ2p-Ixjw2sl8ZNRH32NG1EsXYQJpT5CuAlumg5NQLYCmUxkFkUNYSUxsC-UWIAuuVt8jct2jHivWrAH9zUgLbnX3uw_hhCt5vb5JPaAEiIPjSk4gif8pY%3D) My friend,
I am fighting on the front lines to protect Minnesota’s children and their education. My top priority is to make sure _all_ schools are successful — public, parochial, private, or home — and I knows **parents need to be involved in the process.** That’s why I took a major step to advocate for parental curriculum review in the Minnesota Senate _without cost_ and _immediately_ upon request. Through this bill, parents are now able to review the curriculum before it’s taught to your children and give them the opportunity to seek alternative instruction. My work hasn't stopped there. I am co-authoring a "Parents Bill of Rights," which would give parents the right to have control in the classroom! We know that education is crucial in establishing a brighter future for our children, and a parent's involvement in the classroom is an important piece to ensuring such success. Bureaucrats should not have the ability to make unilateral decisions regarding our children's education. This bill would make that abundantly clear. Tim Walz and many Democrats in Minnesota have lost sight of reality by trying to take parents out of the equation. That’s why I'm fighting back and running to become Minnesota’s next governor.
[Can I count on you?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1bd57dc268bc42b78babb2b1c9c81ce5&_e=kC9TF121O8mwk7YHYox98z4sT95F0yL_dBLMnpX68273RNfQtmza3wUftQmnWCt4ULl1K5_Fm-_V6jUcLYemtKkzI4_XUVYWSlvVXH1RV6_P7ES20g7ZCQs6m87ZgJKb-OC_snf0mevwFo8Pxipzq7ZA-D81fk0xKLL898OYwdYpDA-ka8dDd-1mFMiECyhD_GC8c-b3aR0Oc0_6yaSO3_uPV6nKUXAi43Bdypfq3edWptEujUKdj2VIaYUcx8R_Qemtw1fSMkpKPNV6zT9s6BKajZMUuCNtZ2qdtiZApPOzIkGtt9L-zqIkX8_BYdd5unQnM5hO8_nmcgPGIgCXeNAXNDyDPtZHVD9zE7fL4RQ%3D) [**Stand Up for Parents >> Chip In!
**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1bd57dc268bc42b78babb2b1c9c81ce5&_e=kC9TF121O8mwk7YHYox98z4sT95F0yL_dBLMnpX68273RNfQtmza3wUftQmnWCt4ULl1K5_Fm-_V6jUcLYemtKkzI4_XUVYWSlvVXH1RV6_P7ES20g7ZCQs6m87ZgJKb-OC_snf0mevwFo8Pxipzq08uBokEPZeis84BHC8jdvS-HQAzcXGE_pjvc4u79hFHpZYXO-KOnYIrmnb1g9lUzZTREbJGucHnjSlAdcgaM8Lf8FK23Fh3Iww3M4oi3X5aLOnvikXhEnSfop2v2ycph3E39d3oJJM2UL2utwjunOB46YqfvF7AZxHYFUfzqcQ4ExnESNz213ckleib36UqozwnxhMXcac2M-GLi7IMly0%3D) Not only am Il working to increase transparency in schools, but I firmly believe in each family’s right to choose where they learn through school choice. A zip code shouldn’t determine a child’s right to a good education.
Thank you, [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1bd57dc268bc42b78babb2b1c9c81ce5&_e=kC9TF121O8mwk7YHYox98z4sT95F0yL_dBLMnpX68273RNfQtmza3wUftQmnWCt4ULl1K5_Fm-_V6jUcLYemtKkzI4_XUVYWSlvVXH1RV6_P7ES20g7ZCQs6m87ZgJKb-OC_snf0mevwFo8PxipzqxZ5kn5fNr5noAgnRbGl_tjinzU7mNZvfZKF-1Ixy1MgtFP1f-7jJ-8DUwjyqELy45wYNMau1cTjxhuqnPW-ahRvbpchKfKDqOQK47lRbWrs7vBHfhMSkbKawj9GG4OwvxhAwF3yquoAvNzHi_3528OVuQ0IQGZZ4V-lDg3ySWhoVBT7yywmijR_E2UWTZZGJHsVzRf3ToFAhf44EkAp8Go%3D) Senator Paul Gazelka _Candidate for Governor_ _P.S._ I will be having a press conference on Monday where I will be discussing my efforts on parental curriculum review. Keep an eye on the news and social media for more details.
| | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1bd57dc268bc42b78babb2b1c9c81ce5&_e=kC9TF121O8mwk7YHYox980k-qmuhFvXJgsRHJXDgF3Arh-An9kME45SFBLIcWIt0zEe4mkJwUDJEw86J0FrvKKvbSyEEXLbRvbMJ9SHy1eBaZLh1wOivrgwpjp2EC05dxu61DWR6WRJvrc5vj8doQUZSlb6gYoATq5Fw3D6SEF8s8AOsz6r0ZT9Ri2XaDdcZaTHTcYjV9rA3m68jfEA5pmjzUNGNz2fAxpSaXIm3ijQ6XbICUT2X8TkTwd09PiTSWuoKV0RUzR7MHU6ZhIFO5A%3D%3D) | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1bd57dc268bc42b78babb2b1c9c81ce5&_e=kC9TF121O8mwk7YHYox98-rz7irhmY3UdjYmO25Wi327VmsWn-brHS8dTZmcXQ8nRhOds1MK4ENv667dlbWaF_qX35_pyKtQaHrLaq142DRMk-NOkzJILagO78lmGgy96A3EXXXponFxfJIL3Jkawcs5vDxF45DBHAT8E3RNj3oVS-VS_sC7_s-TczYEGFKGG5zLw1Fh2uWpO873va6eLYqeZ2KlbJj3Pfc31uh1hC1zXCtanbGqGbAqCL-ux7avPYdNaZCdoR84C0X1Xjl6JA%3D%3D) | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=1bd57dc268bc42b78babb2b1c9c81ce5&_e=kC9TF121O8mwk7YHYox98wAHWbdiCVqHRsdXbANNS0gb8b0bCT5UlGH7cMmuviuhl9l4oVHWrIFqy3xrOBX5zThjbM0PcYZoEIXYhWxD2a_lrtcB2DwWTi-e8uQ8MnTB0IKVU0-16Dx7LEj1MIYUc5kwNPoiEL_h2_vRiZq_OfeOwGxX5yFCgpv-SMxM0ItWXJoOfJuN45z20QBa4ibVocBObb1NgjjbSivhYNExmXwrhv2pM_c9jLQxs5jAYIR2WTJb-xUzfKyWLhQW-X1Hwg%3D%3D)

name: Morgan Harper
subject: 🏛 On the steps of the Old Court House 🏛
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Morgan is really making waves.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220211-650-footer-ak&t=2&akid=650%2E90090%2EAhAvTC)
Hey — our Ohio Opportunity Guarantee tour is going great, and Morgan is really making waves. Check out what Dayton 24/7 Now had to say about our visit:
_On the steps of the Old Court House, Harper railed against multinational corporations for shipping jobs overseas and Big Pharma for what she said was creating the opioid epidemic._
_**"We don't have a policy problem, we have a politician problem," she said. "The career politicians who are currently running Washington D.C. are out for themselves."**_
_She said Ohio needs to be laser-focused on getting better representation in Washington._
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25292?t=3&akid=650%2E90090%2EAhAvTC)
**[Our campaign is 100% grassroots-funded, so can you chip in to help us stay on the road and keep Morgan talking to voters across the state?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25292?t=4&akid=650%2E90090%2EAhAvTC)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25298?refcode=em20220211-650&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=650%2E90090%2EAhAvTC)**
Morgan is the only candidate with the track record and the message to turn out voters everywhere in Ohio and flip this Senate seat blue.
To make sure we get to meet as many folks as possible, we need to keep Morgan on the road, not on the phone asking for more donations. Your contribution today will directly fuel our gas costs, equipment, and everything else that comes with driving all across Ohio to talk about the Opportunity Guarantee.
**[Chip in right now to fuel our efforts to send Morgan to the U.S. Senate.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/25292?t=24&akid=650%2E90090%2EAhAvTC)**
Onwards,
Morgan Harper HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220211-650-footer&t=25&refcode2=650_90090_AhAvTC&akid=650%2E90090%2EAhAvTC)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

I’m behind my goal of 5,000 donors for the month of February and I cannot afford to fall short. | | | ---|---|--- | | Red States - like Utah - are being targeted by the Democrats. They know their razon-thin Senate majority is vulnerable and they are doing whatever it takes to win. No one is safe - including me. That’s why it’s imperative I hit each and every one of my fundraising goals - to show strength. For America, Mike Lee | Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails? Let me explain why even just a couple dollars makes a BIG difference.

# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
Donald J. Trump February 11th, 2022 Even more Voter Fraud was just discovered in Wisconsin. It shows the Election was Rigged and Stolen. A hearing this week revealed at least 50,000 illegal phantom votes were cast in the 2020 Presidential Election, which is more than twice the “victory” margin. Incredible problems were also uncovered within Wisconsin’s voter rolls, including an apartment building with 102 percent turnout rate (not possible), 113 ballots cast from an address where no one lives, 3,713 “voters” registered to U.S. Post Offices, and 625,000 dead people on Wisconsin’s voter rolls. In addition, 46,000 votes were cast on Nov. 3rd based on voter information that was never verified by the state. This is on top of massive ballot harvesting, rigged “indefinitely confined” votes, the Wisconsin Election Commission instructing election officials to break the law, Zuckerberg drop boxes, etc. So who in Wisconsin is leading the charge to decertify this fraudulent Election? clean_body: | | | | Let’s DEFEND! | Look at this headline, Peter! Since the liberal Democrats have begun defunding our police, a crime crisis has plagued our country. It’s time we make it illegal to be a criminal again in this country! In 2021, the highest number of officers were killed ever recorded. Liberal Lisa Murkowski cast the deciding vote to confirm Biden's radical defund the police nominee for a senior level Department of Justice position. Every day hundreds of thousands of men and women put their lives on the line to protect you and me. They keep our kids safe and uphold law and order. The fact that Liberals are prioritizing criminals over citizens is inexcusable. President Trump endorsed Kelly Tshibaka for United States Senate because he knows that she will defend our police not defund them, unlike her opponent liberal Lisa Murkowski. Thank you, Team Tshibaka | | | | ==

| | | This is personal to me | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403Sf7UApC8n__WxiA_8o6CPNkK6pHmNe38fnnKbStCjvBdd6RaZ05mj3Qxazca2JK1wIkv0FA-HPbNmSn2LxGEqoGViMsQTaMv5sLZRWfQnHyAp92rN4IZ1cif3Tc6yrMXv6XjaWlELlQIUrMufnM-rYEc0JsGfr2EM9X1FaqHUwk152R16mpF_RQ8EcIYO5dmNcWKCN1bxVStvHEPzyBGy4Z3NYNyUSUN_WOa4PmJWDGIgHih4CRl_DzUQObRjE2OdXfLbRBpXJcL3s5OpJo-Rm-osYpR3bLYtMQzKg4z55JfGkMfdHZiBEaewCd_F7n7USFXTEtW_fNKbRqcG2i8FAVidUoL62LUPhAeav0THlx63jdsDfvaKzTYzAuFmQBKg/3jh/IpxDCMacQZ-Z5QaVSl5FHg/h0/VVjMsma6qMpW89eLxD2Bf7w5Kr82cT0VsEm2e36O6z8)

| Team, I want to be upfront with you. This is going to be a longer email from me because the issue of immigration is extremely important to me.

**I’m writing to you to talk about Republican Kari Lake’s immigration plan, which in reality, is not really a plan.** It’s just a very open way for her to say she is willing to demonize and terrorize people to win votes.

_It’s unacceptable!_
Kari Lake’s plan is basically to take anyone she deems remotely qualified, give them authority she does not have, and set them loose in southern Arizona to round up anyone they believe may be an immigrant.

**It’s racist, and it’s going to end up getting people hurt.**

As someone who has been falsely accused, repeatedly and publicly, of not being a U.S. citizen, I know that Kari Lake’s plan will not only affect those trying to immigrate to the U.S. **It will put a target on every non-white person in this state.**

Arizona is not the same place it was a decade ago. We’ve come a long way from the “show me your papers” law, and _we’re not letting Kari Lake take us back._

**[Team, I need your support to make sure the Arizona Democratic Party has the resources it needs to flip the AZ governor’s office this November. Can you give $10 today to make sure we flip that office and other important statewide offices to turn Arizona completely blue?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wRF8YrhE8c9xv_YgDEKrAP0t2Flm0Rq6_zIKYkw8403Sf7UApC8n__WxiA_8o6CPNkK6pHmNe38fnnKbStCjvBv6Sy8veSMjs7Zf2GQ4EWyCAjaTqXpvwSigS6_3jygzeUCkiuyo0U6dFwWfqAzy4NOt4cbcBG4nMMYxxFuDdWidEcDbxHBIGUF8Q8GfuOZp0nIifgX1ixaSywHbakGDCSfoTllzoTk5KYwhps9os1wY_MRhVy4McA11KNhH0cfqO4W5v_jMF5w_wsy1fGCICAp2vVbblTOxC40qtrx8Rt6tUGBJx-nNrE5GV0YYamc0X4SBu9Q-QQMsYlKD-vu37mnRsV7s-d0J6V2-bm5jzL5ITvy2HtoItkRX5IBLrobSr6JjMVxxjWNKtr9t4qMjuKSvzdrxjUQsZg0LKIxVEr1Q/3jh/IpxDCMacQZ-Z5QaVSl5FHg/h1/XmyzsJeQNJ2gzqCQt6L4LivEuWxdxkY2cvN5KrvTydU)**

clean_body: | | | This is personal to me | | | Team, I want to be upfront with you. This is going to be a longer email from me because the issue of immigration is extremely important to me. I’m writing to you to talk about Republican Kari Lake’s immigration plan, which in reality, is not really a plan. It’s just a very open way for her to say she is willing to demonize and terrorize people to win votes. It’s unacceptable! Kari Lake’s plan is basically to take anyone she deems remotely qualified, give them authority she does not have, and set them loose in southern Arizona to round up anyone they believe may be an immigrant. It’s racist, and it’s going to end up getting people hurt. As someone who has been falsely accused, repeatedly and publicly, of not being a U.S. citizen, I know that Kari Lake’s plan will not only affect those trying to immigrate to the U.S. It will put a target on every non-white person in this state. Arizona is not the same place it was a decade ago. We’ve come a long way from the “show me your papers” law, and we’re not letting Kari Lake take us back. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Sincerely, Raquel Terán Chair AZ Dems For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Arizona Democrats, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neal?=
subject: Contest Alert! Help us Disturb the Peace
body:
And now a musical break from our usual campaign emails... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/55d6a5606034/contest-alert-help-us-disturb-the-peace?e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| | |
---
| | |
> Dear Friends,
>
> My campaign is endorsed by Blue America, an organization which exclusively supports progressive candidates who do not accept corporate dollars. Blue America is headed by former record executive and music promoter Howie Klein, who has given us a chance to take a break from your average political donation ask.
> By participating in this musical challenge with me Howie may select you to win a signed copy of the book _Disturbing the Peace: 415 Records and the Rise of New Wave_ by Bill Kopp, along with an accompanying CD. You can read Howie’s article on the contest [_here_](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=08d13a944c&e=e67cbb3f92).
> Howie is asking supporters to give a donation as a 'vote' for a candidate’s favorite musical artist or band. My favorite is Mos Def. Probably not the most popular amongst those listed by candidates, but let me win you over . . .
>
> Mos Def is the artist that redefined my expectations of what rap was. The lyrical integrity of the work is truly poetic. Please take a moment to listen to my favorite track and enjoy the artistry of how each verse is spun...
>
---
| [ ](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=737f96e71a&e=e67cbb3f92)
---
Hip Hop by Mos Def
| Just as this is not your typical artist in this competition, we are not a typical campaign. I'm up against legends like Pink Floyd, but I am hoping that you will cast your vote for Mos Def and in support of those breaking the mold and building something beautiful.

The bottom line is, please participate in this fun break from our usual money asks and support this fundraiser. You have through Monday, February 14th, and no matter how you vote you will be supporting some wonderful candidates.

[Here is the link to cast your vote.](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=7152b4ea90&e=e67cbb3f92) By selecting 'customize amounts' and scrolling down to my name you can vote for me and Mos Def as your pick. Even $1 goes a long way in helping us in our grassroots effort, and could win us the $1,000 prize in this competition.

Regards,
Neal
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=a82080606a&e=e67cbb3f92)

Social Security is a federal program that uses taxes paid into a trust fund to provide benefits to people who are eligible – which right now is anyone 62 or older. clean_body: Hey everyone, Here at the Ballard for Montana headquarters, we’re dedicated to ensuring we hear from everyday Montanas about their thoughts on the go | | | Hey everyone, Here at the Ballard for Montana headquarters, we’re dedicated to ensuring we hear from everyday Montanas about their thoughts on the government and how we can improve it. Today, we’re coming to you with a quick question on social security. Social Security is a federal program that uses taxes paid into a trust fund to provide benefits to people who are eligible – which right now is anyone 62 or older. Social Security provides you with a source of income when you retire or if you can’t work due to a disability. Do you think the government should expand, shrink, or keep social Social Security as is? Your feedback is important to us. Thank you so much. Team Ballard Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. He knows how to fight for Montana and he intends to fight for you and MT-02 in Washington D.C. PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA.

**Defunding the Police** could be on the table if Democrats win in the midterms.

Cori Bush (D-Mo.) says she's not going to stop using the slogan 'defund the police' ahead of this fall's midterms..." -- AXIOS 2/8/22 | UNIQUE ID: #188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb SUPPORTER STATUS: Progressive Democrats want us to believe Defunding the Police will decrease the rate of violent crime, but the facts don't back them up... "After the city of Portland slashed its police budget by $12 million and eliminated three police units, the police withdrew while shootings climbed 173% and murders rose 255% in nine months" -- LELDF 4/14/21 That's why we're calling for 10,000 responses to our survey before midnight. Defunding the Police could be on the table if Democrats win in the midterms. Thank you, \- Senate Republicans | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. We know that it’s only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. We know that it's only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. |
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eeb56c03486c4dba9e97aba62a3463c7&_e=ecGpITsSCcYXE7cEzoxFl721UmFhMn9KFMAVY5gouCKrTl6VvXLLYChme2t_exZuNP8zQDLJ4sqPsP9HLprAFLJz1qgdxPXs1OqH7Wx3u63NpxWqJpT8Fk_YuRIK2aTPBhxmJiyF7RU8K5Pp6abM9JgfYBM_BKUmdsKHhb12KOlKVBVx9jFwL6DfuKhQro8QCJY3xbEZkS5oJzgILGkHEBN-BIjhG7Zv6oNj2Ge4caNj4pS3i48kPQyEMQY5qdgeE3VyyIePSxuGYnp8rjTuNLF_L9gS4QhMATrVlmAp4Lo-tyKErbJnO0s34rBrEclUXTEDZGamuo4y-5oOw3nihE0zgPU1TWzwzUH9otn98_qolKZ_goKS2OT5piPnFtw44VNbocv5BE40ATqFLP1fypg16W8LMn6sn4MdKu0BPtxCDAiXit0lospsa3aORX7tfgozH4kTYY0xVyWIF96PTGjd8jsJPHYceaviyrEOg-I%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**_FIRST_** , Raphael Warnock won a 2021 special election by about 100,000 votes - out of more than 4 million ballots cast - becoming the first Democrat to win election to the Senate from Georgia since 2000.

**_THEN_** , Senator Warnock, using the national donor list he built during the 2021 runoff race, raised $32 million in his bid for a full six-year term in this fall's midterm elections.

**_NOW_** , we're in a “statistical dead heat” in the race for Georgia's Senate seat. BUT Warnock's got more than $23 million in the bank (cash) that he is using to make an $861,000 ad buy.

That's why we're asking you to help us close the gap between what our opponent has in the bank and what we've got in our reserves.

_This race is going to be the most expensive race of the 2022 cycle._

We know that it's only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. **[It's going to take thousands of hours of work to catch up with our opponent's fundraising, which is why we're emailing you today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eeb56c03486c4dba9e97aba62a3463c7&_e=ecGpITsSCcYXE7cEzoxFl721UmFhMn9KFMAVY5gouCKrTl6VvXLLYChme2t_exZuNP8zQDLJ4sqPsP9HLprAFLJz1qgdxPXs1OqH7Wx3u63NpxWqJpT8Fk_YuRIK2aTPBhxmJiyF7RU8K5Pp6abM9JgfYBM_BKUmdsKHhb12KOlKVBVx9jFwL6DfuKhQro8QCJY3xbEZkS5oJzgILGkHEBN-BIjhG7Zv6oNj2Ge4caNj4pS3i48kPQyEMQY5qdgeGNu0vSYXqQupj4BTIuyq_7dEto9ke7L6KfQVf6XzNsd1isvuoEJ-nOZGNUd9kFlGaIxQ1YUea6Dea9qpPd-u5p40R7fxKv7SbVxUzpfyEg8samLl4FH7F4xkc7UEjcNTEMjKGKLaz-BZTEVWg0zB8mEkXqdQlgy_O6HneqPvlxDT9OPn3JWXxXHkkg4wfQSm9Ap_aoh6ePoiV2dmkbPaXeH6vG_JHeBAMPu71xNzMz0%3D)**

One of our biggest hurdles is complacency. We must start NOW.

**[Team Herschel is looking for 4,000 conservative patriots to make a gift of $6 or more today to help us close the fundraising gap with our opponent. Can we count on you to head to our donation page now and make YOUR contribution?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=eeb56c03486c4dba9e97aba62a3463c7&_e=ecGpITsSCcYXE7cEzoxFl721UmFhMn9KFMAVY5gouCKrTl6VvXLLYChme2t_exZuNP8zQDLJ4sqPsP9HLprAFLJz1qgdxPXs1OqH7Wx3u63NpxWqJpT8Fk_YuRIK2aTPBhxmJiyF7RU8K5Pp6abM9JgfYBM_BKUmdsKHhb12KOlKVBVx9jFwL6DfuKhQro8QCJY3xbEZkS5oJzgILGkHEBN-BIjhG7Zv6oNj2Ge4caNj4pS3i48kPQyEMQY5qdgedldovTgQHtonXgEDy4jDwSUtR9dRb79UoJZdUR9UyaKQ7Y5_pHI8Cw6kV7lI0sTSbF-IwQRq4q7l1hydLIPGhWPCOJGvgJ3jryx-6ha8R_5zUAVkYBMydqPbOhSJiuW6503Ys-2vVX5Cy0WmZJ9Z-O_wYcVkStO0b0Yeldvzz829d8Kc-Q1C0byzejHVb_t2KA9Tb4UD_XTKOoyHxDCK66jDjt-UenofpYKOBGKO9kE%3D)**

subject: Scott Jensen: Democrats’ favorite Republican
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
one bad bill after another | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=74c5a22b77&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | Before his last year in office,[ MinnPost wrote a story about Scott Jensen ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=015cd7abdf&e=9d6926af69)[being Democrat’s favorite Republican](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=bc15378af9&e=9d6926af69) because he always sided with them in the legislature
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=f758241a46&e=9d6926af69)In 2017, Jensen was the [only Republican to vote with Democrats](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=4439a22d3f&e=9d6926af69) to replace healthcare reinsurance with single-payer healthcare.

[Jensen supported legalizing marijuana](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=c4adb03b23&e=9d6926af69).

He sided with Democrats in the legislature to [support gun ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=adc835efd4&e=9d6926af69)_control and _ [penalties for gun owners](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=4d38194d1d&e=9d6926af69).

[Even recently, he continues to say he supports ranked choice voting and running our elections like Minneapolis. ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=eec98ec935&e=9d6926af69)

Scott Jensen says he stands with us now...but why did he stand with Democrats so much in St. Paul?
---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=0ef1207a2a&e=9d6926af69)
---
Jensen with Democrat Senator Melissa Franzen and Democrat Representative Mike Freiberg at their press conference supporting progressive policies.
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=40f7f26112&e=9d6926af69)
