subject: Important ruling
body:
Please read if you are a parent. |

https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/huge-win-for-parents?amount=25&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220211_tinar_va-supreme-court
https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/huge-win-for-parents?amount=25&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220211_tinar_va-supreme-court
https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/huge-win-for-parents?amount=25&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220211_tinar_va-supreme-court
Friend, can you believe it?!

This is a huge WIN for Parents!

Our children have been brutally penalized by an overbearing government and a teachers union that is trying to maintain power.

To mask students not only hurts their mental development, but is also an encroachment on the rights of parents.

I want to thank Governor Youngkin and I strongly support his decision to give parents and kids alike the option to decide whether to wear a mask in school.

Join me in celebrating this victory by making a contribution of at least $5 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. Tomorrow morning we will share a list of all our supporters with Team Youngkin, to show we stand with them! (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/huge-win-for-parents?amount=25&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220211_tinar_va-supreme-court)

CONTRIBUTE $250 (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/huge-win-for-parents?amount=250&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220211_tinar_va-supreme-court)

CONTRIBUTE $100 (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/huge-win-for-parents?amount=100&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220211_tinar_va-supreme-court)

CONTRIBUTE $50 (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/huge-win-for-parents?amount=50&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220211_tinar_va-supreme-court)

CONTRIBUTE $25 (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/huge-win-for-parents?amount=25&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220211_tinar_va-supreme-court)

CONTRIBUTE $10 (https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/huge-win-for-parents?amount=10&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220211_tinar_va-supreme-court)

When I am in the Senate, I promise to always work with Parents and Gov. Youngkin, instead of fighting against them.

Thank you,

https://secure.winred.com/ramirez-for-virginia-inc/huge-win-for-parents?amount=25&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220211_tinar_va-supreme-court
Tina Ramirez
Republican Candidate
VA’s 12th State Senate District
Proud Parent

name: Jessica Katzenmeyer
subject: I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Katzenmeyer for Wisconsin
body:
I’m a proud, hard-working Wisconsinite who knows what it means to go the extra mile. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41698530/329969524/-366912648?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTcyOThkYS1hOThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ym5x8OsnE-_6kv6WD1VeVzxgMHnTE8dkzjn32Qqe8nQ=)
Hi Peter, my name is Jessica Katzenmeyer. Three years ago, I lost my home in a fire and was hospitalized for several days. If I didn’t have health insurance through the Affordable Care Act (ACA), it would have cost me over $80,000 to save my life. When I learned Republicans were attempting to gut the ACA, I decided to get involved and run for office for the first time in my life. In my campaign for State Assembly, I was the closest to defeating Rep. Joe Sanfelippo than any other Democrat since he first took office in an extremely Republican-leaning district. The people of Wisconsin are getting sick of poor Republican leadership and want change. So, I have decided to run to represent Wisconsin’s 5th Congressional District to make that change a reality. The road will certainly be tough and we’ll be taking on powerful special interest groups, large corporate donors, misinformation, and blatant conspiracy theories. But together, I KNOW we can defeat them and have a government that truly has the interests of the people at heart. That’s why I’m running for Congress to defeat Republican Scott Fitzgerald and maintain Democratic control in the House. If you have a few moments, I hope you will allow me to share a little about myself and then, [sign on to support our campaign for Congress, Peter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41698531/329969525/482091639?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTcyOThkYS1hOThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ym5x8OsnE-_6kv6WD1VeVzxgMHnTE8dkzjn32Qqe8nQ=&emci=ed4f6b5c-a98b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=9a7298da-a98b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9315441) A little bit about myself... I’m a proud, hard-working Wisconsinite who knows what it means to go the extra mile. For over 12 years, I was an active member of Teamsters Union Local 344, where I fought and advocated for my fellow workers’ rights and safety. I am proud and out transgender woman and the first transgender candidate for Congress in the history of Wisconsin. I’ve advocated for LGBTQ+ rights at both the local and statewide levels because I believe no one should be ashamed of being who they are or for choosing who they love. Here is what I’m running on...
* Expand the ACA to protect the millions with pre-existing conditions
* Empower Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices to lower medication costs
* Take climate change head on by pushing for net-zero emissions by 2050
* Invest in clean energy initiatives
* Expand broadband access across the country
* Expand collective bargaining rights for workers
* Establish a $15/hr minimum wage
* Invest in universal pre-k
* Support safer communities with proactive gun and policing legislation
* Legalize cannabis for medicinal and recreational use

That’s just a snapshot of what I want to do in Congress. You can find my entire vision to better this state and country [HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41698532/329969526/482091639?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTcyOThkYS1hOThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ym5x8OsnE-_6kv6WD1VeVzxgMHnTE8dkzjn32Qqe8nQ=&emci=ed4f6b5c-a98b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=9a7298da-a98b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9315441). Look, the road to progress won’t be easy, but I promise to fight like hell to get us there. At the end of the day, it’s up to us to make the world a better place. Let’s make it happen. Sincerely, Jessica
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41698533/329969527/1417465907?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTcyOThkYS1hOThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ym5x8OsnE-_6kv6WD1VeVzxgMHnTE8dkzjn32Qqe8nQ=&emci=ed4f6b5c-a98b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=9a7298da-a98b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9315441) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41698534/329969528/2110689797?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTcyOThkYS1hOThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ym5x8OsnE-_6kv6WD1VeVzxgMHnTE8dkzjn32Qqe8nQ=&emci=ed4f6b5c-a98b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=9a7298da-a98b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9315441) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41698535/329969529/-1104386148?sourceid=1025450&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTcyOThkYS1hOThiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ym5x8OsnE-_6kv6WD1VeVzxgMHnTE8dkzjn32Qqe8nQ=&emci=ed4f6b5c-a98b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=9a7298da-a98b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9315441)

clean_body: I’m a proud, hard-working Wisconsinite who knows what it means to go the extra mile. | = Hi Peter, my name is Jessica Katzenmeyer. Three years ago, I lost my home in a fire and was hospitalized for several days. If I didn’t have health insurance through the Affordable Care Act (ACA), it would have cost me over $80,000 to save my life. When I learned Republicans were attempting to gut the ACA, I decided to get involved and run for office for the first time in my life. In my campaign for State Assembly, I was the closest to defeating Rep. Joe Sanfelippo than any other Democrat since he first took office in an extremely Republican-leaning district. The people of Wisconsin are getting sick of poor Republican leadership and want change. So, I have decided to run to represent Wisconsin’s 5th Congressional District to make that change a reality. The road will certainly be tough and we’ll be taking on powerful special interest groups, large corporate donors, misinformation, and blatant conspiracy theories. But together, I KNOW we can defeat them and have a government that truly has the interests of the people at heart. That’s why I’m running for Congress to defeat Republican Scott Fitzgerald and maintain Democratic control in the House. If you have a few moments, I hope you will allow me to share a little about myself and then, A little bit about myself... I’m a proud, hard-working Wisconsinite who knows what it means to go the extra mile. For over 12 years, I was an active member of Teamsters Union Local 344, where I fought and advocated for my fellow workers’ rights and safety. I am proud and out transgender woman and the first transgender candidate for Congress in the history of Wisconsin. I’ve advocated for LGBTQ+ rights at both the local and statewide levels because I believe no one should be ashamed of being who they are or for choosing who they love. Here is what I’m running on... Expand the ACA to protect the millions with pre-existing conditions Empower Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices to lower medication costs Take climate change head on by pushing for net-zero emissions by 2050 Invest in clean energy initiatives Expand broadband access across the country Expand collective bargaining rights for workers Establish a $15/hr minimum wage Invest in universal pre-k Support safer communities with proactive gun and policing legislation Legalize cannabis for medicinal and recreational use That’s just a snapshot of what I want to do in Congress. You can find my entire vision to better this state and country . Look, the road to progress won’t be easy, but I promise to fight like hell to get us there. At the end of the day, it’s up to us to make the world a better place. Let’s make it happen. Sincerely, Jessica | | Paid for by Jessica Katzenmeyer for Wisconsin If you'd like to make a contribution to Jessica's grassroots campaign, please chip in = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . Jessica Katzenmeyer for Wisconsin P.O. Box 14782 West Allis, WI 53214

Peter, We knew this election would be tough and these fundraising numbers confirm that. We need your help to make sure we can keep pace and add to our Democratic majority in the House this year. Dr. Harder is determined to fight for affordable healthcare, public education equality, climate action, and affordable housing. But she can’t do this alone. She needs your help to defeat dark money come November. With your help, we can give the fight for equality and climate action another advocate in the room. Dr. Harder has experienced firsthand the power of dark money and how it can take over an election. She’s determined to not only defeat dark money come election day but also to take it on once elected. I'm emailing you on a Friday afternoon because I'm so close to paying for our ad in the Super Bowl, but I need your help to put us over the top! We only need to raise $628 more! | Our message is clear and my daughter, Colette, does such a good job of sharing our tax-cutting message. Every Nebraskan needs to see this! name: =?utf-8?Q?Neal?=
subject: Contest Alert! Help us Disturb the Peace
body:
And now a musical break from our usual campaign emails. (with resolved contest link issues) | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a51f9ed89252/contest-alert-help-us-disturb-the-peace-6774758?e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| | |
---
| | |
> Dear Friends,
>
> My campaign is endorsed by Blue America, an organization which exclusively supports progressive candidates who do not accept corporate dollars. Blue America is headed by former record executive and music promoter Howie Klein, who has given us a chance to take a break from your average political donation ask.
> By participating in this musical challenge with me Howie may select you to win a signed copy of the book _Disturbing the Peace: 415 Records and the Rise of New Wave_ by Bill Kopp, along with an accompanying CD. You can read Howie’s article on the contest [_here_](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=f3a27548ac&e=e67cbb3f92).
> Howie is asking supporters to give a donation as a 'vote' for a candidate’s favorite musical artist or band. My favorite is Mos Def. Probably not the most popular amongst those listed by candidates, but let me win you over . . .
>
> Mos Def is the artist that redefined my expectations of what rap was. The lyrical integrity of the work is truly poetic. Please take a moment to listen to my favorite track and enjoy the artistry of how each verse is spun...
>
---
| [ ](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=2308273686&e=e67cbb3f92)
---
Hip Hop by Mos Def
| Just as this is not your typical artist in this competition, we are not a typical campaign. I'm up against legends like Pink Floyd, but I am hoping that you will cast your vote for Mos Def and in support of those breaking the mold and building something beautiful.

The bottom line is, please participate in this fun break from our usual money asks and support this fundraiser. You have through Monday, February 14th, and no matter how you vote you will be supporting some wonderful candidates.

[Here is the link to cast your vote.](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=7c4efc772f&e=e67cbb3f92) By selecting 'customize amounts' and scrolling down to my name you can vote for me and Mos Def as your pick. Even $1 goes a long way in helping us in our grassroots effort, and could win us the $1,000 prize in this competition.

Regards,
Neal
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=68f5679bc3&e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| | [](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=4a8c1ae360&e=e67cbb3f92)
---
| | [](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=5b8cf0b9b5&e=e67cbb3f92)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Neal Walia for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Neal Walia for CongressPO Box 9278Denver, CO 80209-0278
[Add us to your address book](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=2ef0cde0d0)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=2ef0cde0d0&e=e67cbb3f92&c=0886979623) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=2ef0cde0d0&e=e67cbb3f92&c=0886979623).

body:
Do you SUPPORT our House Democrats' efforts to defend the Post Office?
| | | **_NEW YORK TIMES_ BREAKING:
House Passes Bill to Shore Up Postal Service**

---
| **YOUR URGENT RESPONSE NEEDED:**

Have you seen the AMAZING news??

The House just passed a bill to protect the Post Office for YEARS to come.

We're so proud of our House Democrats for leading the charge.

But the GOP has been attacking the Post Office for YEARS, and we know they won't stop.

_Now we 're urgently seeking your feedback on this important issue._

**Let us know: Do you SUPPORT our House Democrats ' efforts to defend the Post Office?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/x4-WFAYEaqB_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

This is AMAZING!!

_**The House just passed a HISTORIC bill to SAVE the Post Office and safeguard its essential public services.**_

This legislation will:

- **SAVE** the Post Office nearly $50 BILLION over the next decade,
- **SAFEGUARD** existing USPS services,
- and **INCREASE** transparency around the status of mail deliveries.

Look: We were thrilled to see this bill pass with overwhelming bipartisan support.

**But we know the GOP never hesitated to attack and degrade this essential public service when they were in power under Donald Trump** \-- so the fight to defend the Post Office is far from over.

So now more than ever, we need to know: **
Do you SUPPORT our House Democrats ' efforts to defend the Post Office?** | [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---
****
Thanks,

DCCC

The House just passed a HISTORIC bill to SAVE the Post Office and safeguard its essential public services. This legislation will: - SAVE the Post Office nearly $50 BILLION over the next decade, - SAFEGUARD existing USPS services, - and INCREASE transparency around the status of mail deliveries. Look: We were thrilled to see this bill pass with overwhelming bipartisan support. But we know the GOP never hesitated to attack and degrade this essential public service when they were in power under Donald Trump \-- so the fight to defend the Post Office is far from over. So now more than ever, we need to know: Do you SUPPORT our House Democrats ' efforts to defend the Post Office? | | | ---|---|--- Thanks, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Fred Guttenberg
subject: My daughter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
she is on my mind every second of every minute of every day
| | |
---
Friend,

We're approaching four years since my beautiful daughter, Jaime, was murdered in her classroom at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida. No matter how much time goes by, she is on my mind every second of every minute of every day.
I had never spoken out about gun violence before my Jaime was murdered. I would never have guessed that gun violence could affect me and my family. But no one is safe from gun violence – and it hurts me to describe our country like that. So now, the work to end this violence – to spare other families this pain – has become my life's purpose and mission.
That's why I'm reaching out today. Just a week after my daughter was murdered, I confronted Marco Rubio at a town hall on gun safety. He couldn't even look at me. He refused to work with Parkland survivors to reduce gun violence. He refused to make it more difficult for people to access assault weapons like the one used to kill my Jaime, 13 other students and three educators. Marco Rubio failed Floridians.
I will do anything I can to make sure Marco Rubio is no longer able to fail our families and communities in the Senate – and there is no one better than Val Demings, a fierce advocate for gun safety, to replace him. Val Demings can win in Florida and expand our gun safety majority in the Senate – but the GOP is rolling out a full attack ad blitz to defeat her, so I promised I'd help raise $50,000 by midnight to make sure she can fight back.
**[Please, i](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41698668/329970046/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2025-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGU4MDY1Yy1hYzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DoHh2Rm9dXczHLziVAqOua7e7zz6k6CrbZ7psXcShU=)**[**n honor of ending gun violence, will you donate $5 or more today to support Val Demings, defeat Marco Rubio and make real progress on gun safety?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41698669/329970047/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2025-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGU4MDY1Yy1hYzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DoHh2Rm9dXczHLziVAqOua7e7zz6k6CrbZ7psXcShU=)
Throughout her service in Congress, Val Demings has made it clear that she is not afraid of the gun lobby. She voted to pass expanded background checks in the House, and I know we can count on her to continue fighting to end gun violence in the Senate.
Electing Val Demings in November would be a crucial step toward creating a gun safety majority that will enact the kind of real, meaningful change that is long overdue in our country – the kind of change that can save lives and prevent future tragedies. But Val Demings is facing an uphill climb to defeat Marco Rubio, which is why I'm personally asking for your help.
NRA-backing Republicans have already funneled tens of millions of dollars into Florida to back him, and this is only the beginning. If Val Demings is going to defeat him, it's going to take every bit of grassroots support from people like you and me. **[So please, can I count on you to donate $5 or more right now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio and build a gun safety majority in the Senate? Every dollar truly does make a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41698670/329970048/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2025-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGU4MDY1Yy1hYzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DoHh2Rm9dXczHLziVAqOua7e7zz6k6CrbZ7psXcShU=)**
By supporting a gun safety advocate like Val Demings, you're helping me honor my Jaime's life and memory. On especially painful days like today, that means more than I could ever express.

Thank you,

Fred Guttenberg
Gun Violence Survivor
Jaime and Jesse's Dad
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41698671/329970050/-890400302?recurring=0&refcode=jtk2025-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OGU4MDY1Yy1hYzhiLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DoHh2Rm9dXczHLziVAqOua7e7zz6k6CrbZ7psXcShU=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. clean_body: she is on my mind every second of every minute of every day | | | Friend, We're approaching four years since my beautiful daughter, Jaime, was murdered in her classroom at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida. No matter how much time goes by, she is on my mind every second of every minute of every day. I had never spoken out about gun violence before my Jaime was murdered. I would never have guessed that gun violence could affect me and my family. But no one is safe from gun violence – and it hurts me to describe our country like that. So now, the work to end this violence – to spare other families this pain – has become my life's purpose and mission. That's why I'm reaching out today. Just a week after my daughter was murdered, I confronted Marco Rubio at a town hall on gun safety. He couldn't even look at me. He refused to work with Parkland survivors to reduce gun violence. He refused to make it more difficult for people to access assault weapons like the one used to kill my Jaime, 13 other students and three educators. Marco Rubio failed Floridians. I will do anything I can to make sure Marco Rubio is no longer able to fail our families and communities in the Senate – and there is no one better than Val Demings, a fierce advocate for gun safety, to replace him. Val Demings can win in Florida and expand our gun safety majority in the Senate – but the GOP is rolling out a full attack ad blitz to defeat her, so I promised I'd help raise $50,000 by midnight to make sure she can fight back. = Throughout her service in Congress, Val Demings has made it clear that she is not afraid of the gun lobby. She voted to pass expanded background checks in the House, and I know we can count on her to continue fighting to end gun violence in the Senate. Electing Val Demings in November would be a crucial step toward creating a gun safety majority that will enact the kind of real, meaningful change that is long overdue in our country – the kind of change that can save lives and prevent future tragedies. But Val Demings is facing an uphill climb to defeat Marco Rubio, which is why I'm personally asking for your help. NRA-backing Republicans have already funneled tens of millions of dollars into Florida to back him, and this is only the beginning. If Val Demings is going to defeat him, it's going to take every bit of grassroots support from people like you and me. = By supporting a gun safety advocate like Val Demings, you're helping me honor my Jaime's life and memory. On especially painful days like today, that means more than I could ever express. Thank you, Fred Guttenberg Gun Violence Survivor Jaime and Jesse's Dad | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &

clean_body: | | | | \- - - - - | Check out this Fox Business headline, Peter Willis. For 5 straight weeks gas prices have consecutively climbed and are predicted to keep climbing. Families all across Pennsylvania and the country are at a crossroads trying to make ends meet. Let’s be clear: Bidenflation is DESTROYING our economy and emptying our wallets. When Governor, Lou will work hard to implement conservative policies to give our Pennsylvania workers some much-needed relief! Thank you, Team Barletta | | | | If you prefer to contribute by check, please mail a check to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 =

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Session Update Jan 2022 Week 5
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
---
| | | | | | 2022 Session Update Week 5
---
| VA Delegate John McGuire (Navy SEAL - Father - Business Owner)
---
|
---
| The General Assembly convened on January 12, marking the beginning of the 402nd legislative session of the House of Delegates.
---
| We have much work ahead of us to make Virginia the best place to live work and raise a family. It is an honor to be your voice and fight for you in Richmond. We are getting after it!
---
| VA Mask Mandate Update
---
|
---
| Parent Choice: A bipartisan senate bill to end mask mandates in Virginia passed the Senate 29 -9 and it also passed the house full education committee 12-10. The House version HB 1272 passed the full education committee and will pass the floor soon. Political science is catching up to medical science as we learned in Florida. Wearing a mask 8 hours per day is harmful to a child's mental health and more. Unfortunately, some Virginia school boards and superintendents push fear rather than data and will do everything in their power to make sure that children will wear a mask all day despite Governor Youngkin's Executive Order No. 2. California, New Jersey, and Connecticut, are ending their mask mandates. This bill will give parents the right to choose whether or not their children will wear a mask.
---
| Tebow Bill Passes
---
|
---
| The Tebow bill passes the House! A bill I chief co-patroned with chief patron Delegate Marie March just passed the House and is headed to the Senate. This bill will allow homeschooled students to play public school sports.
---
| Voter ID
---
|
---
| A bill I chief co-patroned with chief patron Delegate Lee Ware seen here passed privileges and elections sub-committee 6-4. 80% of Americans support voter ID rules.
---
| 2022 McGuire LEGISLATION

Bills:

* [HB 59](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NEqL66pRExZ8eauBA5Y9vEZSwbnJ47xdNfqHG7LmgyneZSDpufBxW1nNVSI8Gv0r6Ss65ieugJSPPjsL_l14hQLe5qtCVfDkIoOBoZtrqaHYL86FahXnzvAXI9FL0ov3xqCLF2HYOkcrXvX6kgouTqixVAEfGTvnMAsEyGY1_TT0muAFwlFQrqdMPV5LeB_kQdvKHLzoWUE=&c=0a4fQYOl_5NIhVOr5ty4TOD24NKlVupBvhzt-LubLoNbdpwA1HSQrA==&ch=mExX7inRPjkSDZuCRLeKtG77JuH1l0I0o9j251er3r9j8dU25ahJcA==)[ Repeals House Bill 257 (Predator Protection Act).](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NEqL66pRExZ8eauBA5Y9vEZSwbnJ47xdNfqHG7LmgyneZSDpufBxW1nNVSI8Gv0r6Ss65ieugJSPPjsL_l14hQLe5qtCVfDkIoOBoZtrqaHYL86FahXnzvAXI9FL0ov3xqCLF2HYOkcrXvX6kgouTqixVAEfGTvnMAsEyGY1_TT0muAFwlFQrqdMPV5LeB_kQdvKHLzoWUE=&c=0a4fQYOl_5NIhVOr5ty4TOD24NKlVupBvhzt-LubLoNbdpwA1HSQrA==&ch=mExX7inRPjkSDZuCRLeKtG77JuH1l0I0o9j251er3r9j8dU25ahJcA==) This bill was rolled into HB4 and passed the floor 59-40. Now headed to the senate.

---
| Speaker's Bible Study
---
|
---
| Governor Youngkin and Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears joined us at 7am on Wednesday for the Speaker's weekly Bible Study. This week we prayed and talked about the book of Micah and justice.
---
| Virginia Pro Life Advocacy Day
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Life is a miracle and it must be protected. I really enjoyed meeting constituents and folks all over Virginia who support life on Virginia Pro Life Advocacy Day.
---
| Bridgewater Funeral
---
|
---
| Hundreds of officers from all over the country and Virginia gathered on the campus of James Madison University to pay respects to two Bridgewater College officers who were killed last week. Governor Youngkin spoke and said, "The Dynamic Duo" knew this was a dangerous job, but they were willing to serve and sacrifice in their common defense. Those two knew what service was all about. They lived it, and they breathed it. They served our country and served our community."
---
| China Before Communism
---
|
---
| Jisun Bae and Tong Wang, constituents in District 56 Henrico County, stopped by to visit and to tell me about the Shen Yun traditional Chinese culture event, Feb. 15-20, 2022 at the Kennedy Center Opera House.
---
| Rural Caucus
---
|
---
| I really enjoyed attending the rural caucus reception with Governor Youngkin, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, Attorney General Jason Miyares, fellow members of the Virginia House of Delegates, and many more. Thank you to everyone who supports Rural Virginia.
---
| | |
---
| Freedom Convoy 2022
---
|
---
| More than 500 heavy-duty trucks, pickup trucks and other vehicles have been serving as a parking lot in downtown Ottawa. These vehicles are operated by individuals who are fed up with the social restrictions and vaccine mandates which are destroying businesses and families. Who knew Canadians had this much fight and would reach their limit before the United States?
---
| Pray for Ukraine
---
|
---
| Things are escalating between Russia and Ukraine. Russia is poised to invade Ukraine any day now and the United Nations, which includes American soldiers, could get drawn into another unnecessary armed conflict, which will kill innocent civilians. We are praying that better judgement will prevail.
---
| Governor's Reception
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| My wife, Tracy, and I attended Governor Youngkin's reception at the Governor's mansion, honoring the Virginia House Republicans. We are all working hard to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family.
---
| Fox Hunting Day
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Once per year, Fox hunting clubs from around Virginia visit the Virginia General Assembly to advocate for their sport and conservation.Today I had the honor of introducing Deep Run Hunt Club located in Manakin Sabot Goochland County and also located just a couple of miles down the road from our house. Deep Run Hunt Club is a third old is fox hunting club in the nation. Thank you for all you do to educate young people and promote conservation. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NEqL66pRExZ8eauBA5Y9vEZSwbnJ47xdNfqHG7LmgyneZSDpufBxW5VTJCjvVMsvfY-h3TqILARZWmFonqwodgqJKVfIi_RP2hn81pegEpCdT2ZSr77Rsh-vWrzgqmUcWgvLTM7xgjGM36HrG4H9iEybSpMI8Qh7w6EBaN4oiFgxjYSOM6VyVA==&c=0a4fQYOl_5NIhVOr5ty4TOD24NKlVupBvhzt-LubLoNbdpwA1HSQrA==&ch=mExX7inRPjkSDZuCRLeKtG77JuH1l0I0o9j251er3r9j8dU25ahJcA==)
---
| Constituents
---
|
---
---
| Sexually Explicit Material in Classroom
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NEqL66pRExZ8eauBA5Y9vEZSwbnJ47xdNfqHG7LmgyneZSDpufBxW5VTJCjvVMsvln7sFw0-NBENM_N5rdFkeaNyaQWej_lnQlC516ESaF5PNBWYx5tFzGXz9rEDMgmvafS_yjc_gC80mCrfY8i6jDy1LkpNe94YwDR7mFJfTzS2ByPy2UytG3taaWoczZi8xtbvBPwVUIbxrvtqdeksNpsY0AT_PXpHhEBS0K4amMI67SnhNRhQWAFUO0S-jwYn4PA3yrLrtj99qaQJ7aEMyHyoibjtpGf9ADDyfHpKC_o=&c=0a4fQYOl_5NIhVOr5ty4TOD24NKlVupBvhzt-LubLoNbdpwA1HSQrA==&ch=mExX7inRPjkSDZuCRLeKtG77JuH1l0I0o9j251er3r9j8dU25ahJcA==)
---
| SB656 passed the Senate with bipartisan support. This bill gives parents the right to opt out of sexually explicit materials in schools for their children. This bill passed the General Assembly overwhelmingly in 2016 and was vetoed by then Gov. McAuliffe. Youngkin will not veto it!
---
| Delegate Mike Cherry Prayer
---
|
---
| Delegate Mike Cherry of Chesterfield led the prayer for the General Assembly on his birthday this week. He prayed for our military, law enforcement, and for Virginia. I am proud to be the first elected official who endorsed him for his race last year!
---
| THANK YOU!
---
| I am committed to adhering to the principal duties of Government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, the protection of life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness.
I look forward to seeing you in the District. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov or 804-698-1056.
---
|
---
| | |
---
| God Bless,
---
---
Delegate John McGuire Virginia House District 56

900 East Main Street Pocahontas Building, Suite E213 Richmond, VA 23219 Phone: 804-698-1056

Thank you for all you do to educate young people and promote conservation. == | Constituents | | Sexually Explicit Material in Classroom | == | SB656 passed the Senate with bipartisan support. This bill gives parents the right to opt out of sexually explicit materials in schools for their children. This bill passed the General Assembly overwhelmingly in 2016 and was vetoed by then Gov. McAuliffe. Youngkin will not veto it! | Delegate Mike Cherry Prayer | | Delegate Mike Cherry of Chesterfield led the prayer for the General Assembly on his birthday this week. He prayed for our military, law enforcement, and for Virginia. I am proud to be the first elected official who endorsed him for his race last year! | THANK YOU! | I am committed to adhering to the principal duties of Government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, the protection of life, liberty and the pursuit of happiness. I look forward to seeing you in the District. In the meantime, please continue the teamwork and let me know what you are thinking. You can reach me at deljmcguire@house.virginia.gov or 804-698-1056. | | | | | God Bless, Delegate John McGuire Virginia House District 56 900 East Main Street Pocahontas Building, Suite E213 Richmond, VA 23219 Phone: 804-698-1056 == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA | | | STAY CONNECTED | == == == Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, 11357 Nuckols Road # 156, Glen Allen, VA 23059 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 02/11/22
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_11_from_the_trail&n=1)
---
Friend, After last week's snowstorm disrupted a few events, the pace of the campaign has picked back up again. Carolyn and I attended events throughout the state this past week and our schedules are only going to get more hectic as we move towards June.
Our first TV ad is up and running--introducing the voters of Illinois to Carolyn. Our second TV ad is already in production AND PAID FOR. Those TV ads don't happen without your donations--thank you for helping get our message out! Last week JB Pritzker gave a dishonest, hyper-partisan State of the State speech where he claimed that Illinois' financial affairs are now in order due to his stewardship. WRONG!!! Until we get our insatiable government spending under control, any fiscal improvements in Illinois are due to the huge federal bailout our state received. You can listen to me discuss the State of the State Speech and JB Pritzker's courtroom loss on mask mandates during this radio interview from Tuesday. Listen to the interview by clicking [here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=954wJVfXJnGDSMt_j90vIl2I9Mts3vNP7Yqes3Kf2ONgstbi0NS9muTQezBLi5LptsF3Q2aIhWWW5i2N85ZzMQ&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_11_from_the_trail&n=2)

* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** This week's volunteers to highlight are the individuals who are circulating our nominating petitions.
We are halfway through the petition circulation period; please keep working hard to get us as many signatures as you can! We need to turn in the maximum amount possible to ensure that we are on the ballot. [If you'd like to volunteer on our campaign, click here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/volunteer?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_11_from_the_trail&n=3)
* * *
**Social Media Spotlight** We are urging Republicans to sign petitions for ALL Republican candidates. This primary is similar to a high school basketball team tryout. We are trying to figure out who has the best skill set to be the starting point guard, but when the tryout is over, WE ARE ALL ON THE SAME TEAM TO DEFEAT JB PRITZKER! [Comment, share, or like our post here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6p7ZXH-vvq5spyZWuG_w9lEhdV11ii4MJxqSeE5yVeMNB1UleyP_s62g-KTz89DLJggHtrZyahwquEphTySl_6g&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_11_from_the_trail&n=4)[
](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/army_navy_game_watch_party?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_11_from_the_trail&n=5)
* * *
**Get Involved** Many of our volunteers are hosting small events for us in their homes. If you would like to host an event, please send an email to events@schimpf4illinois.org **Lastly, a final reminder about petitions: even if you are only able to collect a few signatures, any amount will be a big boost to our campaign.** Again, you can [click here __ to download my petition](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=9g-hQKRcSqWoOTpvxkNQHxn3i1LqqUTzTetgJNEvAi0oOUVR0SUwW9SvyYA55ousIR97Gn686DanKy_vJiDs3DLorBq0lUGjGH1YrsZt9hECm0dCGdzygdJKua6DT3W5&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_11_from_the_trail&n=6) and [here __ to download instructions](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=GcXJViS5uWLVlPDTVbxjZGqms1hw5waDRvdeiHfbzoK7VSZmLZDBTtS1oNAnHHDSD24Sr_H9qJh5-5SPSCjDdTy9PhqiTE1-3HGV1lexGZf7hzZBEaS55iwkAdRAEIzgRJSUaPdbJVdJmIrkl1rd67W9JisL4YCo_WWa9bADCN0&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_11_from_the_trail&n=7) for petition signers and circulators. Thanks for reading and Semper Fidelis, Paul

Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to us or one of our friends.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_11_from_the_trail&n=8).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_11_from_the_trail&n=9) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_11_from_the_trail&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_11_from_the_trail&n=11), software for leaders.

**Security For Me But Not For Thee 👮**
It's been [two years](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=82e15458a01449479e24096b9c807704&_e=1sObNb-Sj0owstcsThDEPek3gb8LDJmDZwDdNMhs_E2wLdZxUhc3lkQcB6dwJ7r_1nnE8QOXQ1ff9-F40RbSbW2f6tR6bMoNYuLlE2DsHDckuzjjKnoZQWWxe6ahLIVfktObBB7130I_n24yL60U-rLXFn-oJWVVNNGGwS4cPLAusEqI163KBcjJ3LPEF4KVcV2gSvKdc89HMutrewF8XVXxi_xO-nHpbhRHYlSzrBNt4NDrebiB7qkNLhwS6zMLjGyMWGS-E7oFv8m8gtIzdMaQ9HShMgD-G0e1E8brQHl_jCm0ATa1XSknx_1sRb63) since liberals revived one of their worst ideas known to mankind: Defund the police.

That's enough time to see just how terrible an idea it was.

Murders across 22 major U.S. cities increased by [44%](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=82e15458a01449479e24096b9c807704&_e=1sObNb-Sj0owstcsThDEPfr2tyqEGuVL0Wfx5X8V_gv5IUOAUdt4P0kyJ6oVZ0VQq3I46qivOl9nDiun2TRmGqhbpM6Zsro7CgQW1x9sAEJrRti7smigTItP_B-0pFhjfXUoyAPN6EQMoDG4r14Lv_5SfblqQ3oqV1mxx7kihg4tBjDiYrTPZ_PxyAqMAgVr5pIg_GaIqWz2cSX-sKgZkPJRieT8V1vhjnPmawS3kRjqk8SPlNQosUJKDNfJzbSDm6fDtbP4vCMCA88B9uM2wqfWxZ9HxVNZtoMJR4m9faE%3D) in 2021 compared to 2019, leading to the highest murder rate in [25 years](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=82e15458a01449479e24096b9c807704&_e=1sObNb-Sj0owstcsThDEPfr2tyqEGuVL0Wfx5X8V_gs_dwMXnAjgqQ4sbzMX7H6HBwJw8fhL67SGRr2J-WSpXYh0IXUtB5cf7XO_OJuYhFtVIfheH5VmmoLm7R6RoztCGU88ttv08i3l9gyNEXXahsADlVmT967CIbsw7G0zskWnRrzOzzu8fct93Jd12rdnqlpTe3gD-F6MeWSW98A08LyX_0zr2puxc3U8IaJCasCzAeIzVWQfQqZ-1Lt3d1tEuwlephtGvxMMmNJv701Bj82F-Q7UX6v7rFCWnbHaSAmqCe8nX2My6d1C-rYfkZiZ). Aggravated assaults [increased](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=82e15458a01449479e24096b9c807704&_e=1sObNb-Sj0owstcsThDEPZzODsYtY5WYv95m2kVN30xocyFhb3NBf8uJizSUD4cdd8dPux5XOejcMfSwm9uRwBhnaNTWU5p3eM0716R19YFAD33p75MWd2Q-b8BIfQ8HV652dyTZXZCih06yfPCjU3dU4YnP0opxKhLs5Ad0aWI2ge_OlZZVfCEA1XT9iqQ8NWZ5Tf1ra87GqYL3_31E_aGVapDbuFuxvrV-8JMJipJ11whuc_XC9HdSfAU0b4hfjavHUDbzpq77ORGmTl78X1i7Ca-bgggTm4zz8KPw1y17b3Ipzb71rmnN0A_AVIPA) by 4%, while gun assaults went up by 8%.

At the same time, the number of officers killed in 2021 was the [highest](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=82e15458a01449479e24096b9c807704&_e=1sObNb-Sj0owstcsThDEPfr2tyqEGuVL0Wfx5X8V_gtRfn519nh9aPHUgl9O_h2fgFY3R4YLbb-Vj_8yv_uEXSeZpJz45-7KWjpyGMuZtDydip1SXDFYkyTqHRSgDgN4j9HdF65ZyBdwPB_VnYnRSnGbKRKfv3oSLhfuUbGzv7aRvMTD_8vlqR9fogRIB8SS8F-h9QOiYNSdGYOsCjpk8IlvfaTL2dbOoQAANWZlH1QZ228WjPYiOxHbJWjeGNutdCtcwx0XbCkXhMHxlxNGEqzcZ7m8Cs-edaPQVWi0tPuzh0lIF5ApxoYkdelA-b5UJJiz8NQ_Ox9GhGy8fiGN5g%3D%3D) recorded in at least two decades. Seventy-three law enforcement officers were killed in 2021, a 58.7% [increase](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=82e15458a01449479e24096b9c807704&_e=1sObNb-Sj0owstcsThDEPfr2tyqEGuVL0Wfx5X8V_gtRfn519nh9aPHUgl9O_h2fgFY3R4YLbb-Vj_8yv_uEXSeZpJz45-7KWjpyGMuZtDxHIEIM53bUZRRGa8xcVA6y2mkUTnagGj3EX_Y3cpa6VoJlheCE0OYdMrAagsGRONSWaqQLUUHOGfoKB6I_YkLcMrWq34IJ6gAWW_6kO8VARYU1fk4VfhAc4yN1EVocF6bamobtvy-GCsrC6oe6Dbdp4Azlq2fmzjqWaIORe9Na7c5FocaCP6FFldNC7ZdSaam2DFIhHuTIONxIA8iQRqdPypS1OtzooTRdZpnW_r-htw%3D%3D) compared to just one year ago. Police are [leaving](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=82e15458a01449479e24096b9c807704&_e=1sObNb-Sj0owstcsThDEPbzRG3le4lkNb9OGI2UEwJDjobNn5EQYEBhhCHtVg-R2EzCEWGuixzfKdG1CToeO_91ADsEQUOus2rB5HeIjF8Bn3BIMfHQE0JYRBNWTUO-hkl9yaIzzmectroOvTnfq-cA7kaIFjcwevTb1hmCpYZ9Ga0NQil_r4R3Ag1ESgMicC6PViCztbxr2aY658UprmTECK2FvdnTdr8WsDpFMxb8ZtA6oCdGpdXTFBODt4JYFhG4uQntv1yUTs9In_c3NCbSjPY2bt7oAuLDD8xtTP4s%3D) the workforce in droves, and can you blame them?

Despite all this, the most extreme members of the Democrat Party are still clinging to this cockamamie idea.

**Exhibit A:** Rep. Cori Bush is [doubling down](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=82e15458a01449479e24096b9c807704&_e=1sObNb-Sj0owstcsThDEPVDJxBJgqVsrrGQepLa6ig7S8cQO8XRWlZahXT9leU9PY6G_hnfB43ULzNy65bCrGIUYFD154GLQFIQQR6RI8qRP8tqzBzfoBz7Rwp8WRiBZEO-S_hoXMlV68DY9qMr67kqojNXL24B9B9Y6u2X8Muo8H5xdvh6XbgjU33DkdfdzLE5RB3MyZvL5Z8QE0EQEzMMFRaTm93hsmQ0tldQQLul8aLiQIxlltZ1gfpSOiCpKhMaDBuNhb-zKhSJKxM233y7E7ITcj2GkiLxppjzKySDIPwJ-E9k_GW54uftkfjf-) on defunding the police even though fellow Democrats requested she go easy on the “defund” language. Bush wasn’t having it.

**Exhibit B:** Rep. Rashid Tlaib [paid](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=82e15458a01449479e24096b9c807704&_e=1sObNb-Sj0owstcsThDEPVDJxBJgqVsrrGQepLa6ig5BzCdbP1XOsDjpazXwHpTZkZAlXyWsb8lfID01sOc2MQv8CPo1cjCki7Uanf7hALh4QVKG7H3les57LlXvDalx61iAQO2bKOyRpDPxbQHmUEf2hOCsUBXGVvU65gveqcEgAKuh0rMO-5dZ-hIum-MXCLrspc4uLxMA9e3oOB6Bcf60dczHfGzU3X1mupzf8rBArwKvmj_jThWWfKiRpACSyKn1cwTuQpmG0Pkc9iSxYO818_83ptCV7MtaTCkVYhhuBQ-BP5yvF3twDO-pi89K) $170,000 to an anti-Israel activist who has called for defunding the police multiple times. Rasha Mubarak has openly posted about [abolishing](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=82e15458a01449479e24096b9c807704&_e=1sObNb-Sj0owstcsThDEPTHQkgn7dbAz8MFrv8ClIYjmx64jiT5XzQGfU8qtWqJAdM93wXg4yWBmJIWLep371ermBN3aTtaNpBysgLupmt-E2mQth3kDZO-q9XRMYfsplsQ9uRxXeY-vT_Ec88tfej5CDLDJn1QG6FU4v8IMlY3kZ9UTvHGbGiCC8KdcaFovX1G1JgMqwgh1pjbu8RJol0mRPayorwvz80zz3FZ461zYoNPwnCGrytHnZa-GcpDr0rhrtBUE9dHTOzuV14U24DTBUQ0BxXWn-WTUWuMTCyWH9QgBlvNFnOn9-86OMDRs) the police. No secrets here.

**But wait it gets worse:** Cori Bush and other members of the far-left "Squad" collectively [spent](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=82e15458a01449479e24096b9c807704&_e=1sObNb-Sj0owstcsThDEPfr2tyqEGuVL0Wfx5X8V_gtQ0cpLJwH2tUHd-Ox3ruMMgyqgKEDAtz78AmvlZbDh47OyjTRCyR7wgjGGmXIJfuHcegU6klUbvObSESuiBzSlvUqTYkjnxQy6nPV63plfixuRLeJWME3vGYzlUM8Vxve1_rPkedaiKku9VTQoCjvUjLivUKV7XJCtXiYpM2B55qz0g2TC5nMnclfeaU48FgSSegOyXIqZNstrTQD5PqA8IDDkmpnEiifHZdLJa21HZ949PjELyGjHli-Qns6Zqfx2RtI7ey-uhrVNcnP9ViCjMHWThedsFEH766H4VHP4ShnR4U-FwTMj1qeIQBAjokmQFUmyna4v_xIcaGvm4TfLiofYdqQi0ZVcmWgM84PJCw%3D%3D) over $325,000 on private security in 2021 despite their calls to defund the police.

This is not just liberals shooting off their mouths. The constant police bashing has real life and death consequences. Where is the Democrat leadership when you need it? Oh right, pandering to the far-Left.

Brad Davis, who has special needs and is mostly non-verbal, [has begun training for the 2023 Special Olympics World Winter Games this week as an alpine skier.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=82e15458a01449479e24096b9c807704&_e=1sObNb-Sj0owstcsThDEPSIcX7C9IVA0SggoV1kL26q_EwpnYm_LFdGNlgiHkMjkjWe5tlFfgTF8gjaiIBJSWDSv7leH-PSPB7kBfBKn2y0QP72Re1nAI4KZeueXtgthyL2loPwfLXeajg6of7CLLsIfDKe0UFxH074x6sH8imbu_wY6fUiJ05RkxC7suou5CQlBAzPGVL4IJabkRXIiUHcoKn43X_tHlujGI7Q3K6mcXLbKSfKnWIw4wMgHoqHmlRshphDwAipI8nZoJZDn0J6r2GczTCcVnA41NkKXfnFG2eKF09gI3Zzy8AqhGntInprIRcwa1OXMzM3l4lwWpeLjuGXSz1L-l_b8-aVNOj0xBiHYRuxbgUowynvWU6FZeEFV9sKXkZ17lx5zqP80KpSIZYpfpV8JLCGIWgUYmh0%3D)

Brad's love of the sport started as a young boy while skiing with his family and led to him earning a coveted spot on Team USA. Being the only East Tennessee skier, I am looking forward to cheering on this local star. Go Brad!

Despite all this, the most extreme members of the Democrat Party are still clinging to this cockamamie idea. Exhibit A: Rep. Cori Bush is - on defunding the police even though fellow Democrats requested she go easy on the “defund” language. Bush wasn’t having it. Exhibit B: Rep. Rashid Tlaib $170,000 to an anti-Israel activist who has called for defunding the police multiple times. Rasha Mubarak has openly posted about the police. No secrets here. But wait it gets worse: Cori Bush and other members of the far-left "Squad" collectively over $325,000 on private security in 2021 despite their calls to defund the police. This is not just liberals shooting off their mouths. The constant police bashing has real life and death consequences. Where is the Democrat leadership when you need it? Oh right, pandering to the far-Left. | Going For Gold 🥇 Image courtesy of WBIR An East Tennessee native is going for the gold! Brad Davis, who has special needs and is mostly non-verbal, Brad's love of the sport started as a young boy while skiing with his family and led to him earning a coveted spot on Team USA. Being the only East Tennessee skier, I am looking forward to cheering on this local star. Go Brad! Product Of The Month 🛍 | Just For Fun 🎉 → American Dream hustle 🇺🇸 🍕 () → A magical surprise for these grandparents 💖 🏰 () → New addition to the family 🐶 🥺 () | | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. Please chip in today to help us oust Nancy Pelosi and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, Jane had another great week traveling the state and listening to the issues voters care most about. Jane continues to prove that she’ll put in the work as your U.S. Senator and be strong voice for Ohioans and their families in Washington. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Jane is Tied for First** All of Jane’s hard work is paying off as she continues to build momentum around her America First campaign for U.S. Senate. Yet another one of our opponents have confirmed that Jane is tied for first and the more people know about Jane, the more they like her. As we get head towards Election Day, Jane’s hard work and winning message will continue to pay off. Our amazing grassroots team is ready to finish strong and put Jane over the top on May 3rd. **From the Trail** Last Saturday, Jane went on a ride-along with the Ashtabula County Sheriff’s Office. Police officers work day and night to keep communities safe and Jane feels strongly that whoever represents them in Washington should try to see what they face day in and day out. Thanks to Ashtabula County Sheriff Niemi for having us! [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a02959d82a664b608706f7e0f6c5fd21&_e=9PqmqZj4eWZalusSOtQZt001Cns7gyxi_HGrZW2v50v6dsiF5lfr18tVskQhsU4uzCd02UYkGjLfL6Ced84UYXEYN7g67MVuTq6ZNyFA5UiTad48ta2uDCob9VZnaVGENGn92sVT-seQNNZPGvYRbu0sbeMo_bAoIhoIiMFOqSiB603B7pjFP6ih3AGsbMf0hP_GHEHPYiS2fw0kemdHexQ8HPKjLXdqM-HRGItsK4ET8KQ9u0wfLwlk7aQu882-AogLhE2e15rMWsovojEd5C9WH1TAv_C9vb5Xb-fAu4HBFun-Wj9bMu3PeWw6SgMWp-GGXWx6NCxvKHlkOmWWYQ%3D%3D) Later that day, Jane stopped by the Northwest Ambulance District and Geneva Fire Department to talk with and say thank you to these incredible first responders. Nights, weekends, and snowstorms like we had last week – these men and women are here when we need them! [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a02959d82a664b608706f7e0f6c5fd21&_e=9PqmqZj4eWZalusSOtQZt6cPtzwu5MGHNnVLyOEt7iWQxTUJVVNvGICmAAS6DJgd4wM-RMQ3XKIqABd-1GqRJUnAN6VahK_l5gnV5CX4srRpqDYWYH-L-OT5IbUMF1opk5oFlHj7J43ET7QSqRBYVME4bCLkHfjtb7iwX8Da3b3xobu95V76zZy55ACAMSR02s7nMqBULm4hkl8i1lHFJKE-DaglyX1LI_Y5pPNwio8HjHmWRy93-nDFrb8t5UKxRxQRiiY62YUYPZYnngdWjQ%3D%3D) On Tuesday night, our great supporters in Lorain County hosted a meet and greet for Jane in Amherst. Jane took questions about economic development, the dangers of Critical Race Theory, Biden’s unconstitutional vaccine mandates, and how we can spur Ohio’s workforce. Thanks to Commissioner Dave Moore for having us out! **Media Roundup** The [Star Beacon](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a02959d82a664b608706f7e0f6c5fd21&_e=9PqmqZj4eWZalusSOtQZt3MAPv1By1bCzOpOXkPE6rS3BLZBk9EyWGoBcW_Y2EOVuJFLvP9c4o1dC_2nbpaPmMorqPtgoOjY1nrZmbOVwRhsLuAwAnDTjsz_x0vZhW6oGyKdJBsCDH08N8PIFfz3Y5B-WVMR5fgkp-KAB68jhvXkTXICyu4OdKk4oXgHij1lps_3a5Pw7pBHwzeKnG806Ng2yEOM6qi7SnW-EzITcxGXufHOxIkQJcaaZMZIq1S9yHFd7Zr4aM0pHsbjy_ZIS8Ir37SDG6Z6bY1gRo36yuUN6_17p_frNW7piQb36QnevzRbmpymi4CzTaMYEu-OhP7L3B8WopEpw244ytT_3JORqyYBPHqE3Jc5rkpWVGWS) covered Jane’s visit to Ashtabula County last Saturday: “Republican U.S. Senate candidate Jane Timken got an up close look at some of the challenging law enforcement areas in Ashtabula County on Saturday morning. Timken joined Ashtabula County Sheriff's Office Lt. Steve Murphy on a drive that included a trip along the Route 45 and Interstate 90 corridor, where Murphy said there is a lot of drug distribution and even human trafficking. Timken's time with Murphy was a little less adventurous than a similar trip in the Toledo area late last year that ended in a police chase, Timken said. She joked that Murphy taught her all the secrets to catching criminals.” Check out the full story [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a02959d82a664b608706f7e0f6c5fd21&_e=9PqmqZj4eWZalusSOtQZt3MAPv1By1bCzOpOXkPE6rS3BLZBk9EyWGoBcW_Y2EOVuJFLvP9c4o1dC_2nbpaPmMorqPtgoOjY1nrZmbOVwRhsLuAwAnDTjsz_x0vZhW6oGyKdJBsCDH08N8PIFfz3Y5B-WVMR5fgkp-KAB68jhvVqjn8T-RtXdY0yv94S48X2kBCM1kUe12nGB_S3kTdDPXJTUBT_JLEPkqEsnBcw48A5FQBG12UBzCCzoAbUu2egy8FOnF28N0dNvSVHyKmaCup7ZdEaO08zf9_E2A9cVJI3MX5idvA_30-VMS64wMgUPsM0mjRA96FGbiq4pDpVTpyRqHEVfHyAFNVi94Mo8fE3KLQbxJHXpAWrnjkMhmNN). | |
---
On Sunday, Jane joined Mindy Drayer on [610 WTVN](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a02959d82a664b608706f7e0f6c5fd21&_e=9PqmqZj4eWZalusSOtQZt023jXNc17BpSYrQYwF7ewAyfprg6ReSwYU4T5FdwEzhPGTYMO4MhVBdLHdwz2S-j0QTJ6I26LEcroIuIAceNMe6_N6o1GoCSBXrbs1YzGgM7lVk6G1XU9KjoiVQvkeSlp-v5Ba1ZsudBT4VM_nzmbC4N5viKTDCvUG-5ljBDQdYiyJGOkgk0AUadoLH8MR4NsNqCm4dFin3FisvgY8QGs4LUqADXejm2pXVoDd6towN36PzKHkHjwFhfbobI9e6yA%3D%3D) in Columbus to talk about the Senate race and how we can secure a brighter future for Ohioans. Take a listen to the clip [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a02959d82a664b608706f7e0f6c5fd21&_e=9PqmqZj4eWZalusSOtQZt2a27QWXbXYrdcSLKNZHetResdtNUUIIieqUGQC6lhHjiZHjwetaBXISlbSjj3C8aLjiwzhwpxF73XG57eQoLWXf-XsKGIp2maIy9l4tPERkzNpnduTkOiQsH3f5KPHlag16eIE3rR_Pr9cstvgBNpG27ShQDTMR6gXNFaz-HRINL7y3viVo9btxaCeDzbyiHpXb2YcqIvAt84VF9JEXT2E-wU9Ezq6F3qZrBJjfwo8KPraYNCtiFMBEh8-p_lnqXRlC1RA8ebOkK-vMgVzLdzTwuoFr3faAwzx_hgKSLIj1z4ayXUT7It5GovEeU6SQMJPtuvF0G9bRtJJqmpgZPxw%3D).
|
---
On Tuesday, the Chronicle-Telegram was on hand for our Lorain County Meet & Greet. Jane talked about how devastating the effects of inflation are on Ohio’s families and took questions on a variety of issues from the crowd.
Read the full story [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a02959d82a664b608706f7e0f6c5fd21&_e=9PqmqZj4eWZalusSOtQZt_KV2Hd-WN-WmF5gJD9G6daUs_oclkRC2tsfak5TTttMxliqk8_hwiHlC7pabWxeDyO05chkuCNNXQ78eXG5ABqJWa5SJzz61R-_oQKCtKlwaMc8bU6GfmclZioWstEd6ne2Fu46QeHIv9Qxzatt84pJR9b7o5Rg1nu1Q5oOI6ETc1cJzNOxlquSD8bN8990U1zRs-Z7PB8TN376GxilQYutfHZmwX5XHqX-lP6ZBnANGC-15sre6QFf2bhiDOeybbFzAGEHu-xuVARa0gFzoBbQRbr8GbJVZplQBVovCmJqRQpQ-GdJN-x0yJ43oy32LFsu_MA1ZC90V1ajsYTp81j9TjJvuqmhkrItchMHhIF4).
|
---
On Thursday night, Jane joined Sean Spicer on Newsmax to talk about how she took on the Kasich establishment in her run for Ohio GOP Chair and turned Ohio into a conservative stronghold for President Trump.
[](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a02959d82a664b608706f7e0f6c5fd21&_e=9PqmqZj4eWZalusSOtQZtzP-kuoFUBJfuhNGXE4euzGM9uTVNlBEPsLmSaM_LTHnO6F8BajXCJ04iP8X7hAQwVYw121P22lBzGmwDpng0FJFaHk0yk-R7Z1B64s3VJzbiSKVPzjUgPKBb-UyB9Jz3KR4NM6eBBR-UdyCpmSIQs5nXGQyxONX3Ul7YZSLwl-X-gh_xDLEo9Jh2lNRtjo0Vh77APlApXE3EdzWfRxNYvfM8pf4KKuJmVYPvNX44fs9OwjweCka8x4JNdPxD8p7aFSW6V3bSQElfZPigh1Jhf0%3D)
You can watch the full interview [here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=a02959d82a664b608706f7e0f6c5fd21&_e=9PqmqZj4eWZalusSOtQZtzP-kuoFUBJfuhNGXE4euzHmhQ2RRirpVeExsBQrbz4d2D6eNE_BPTVa7Yv85U30qD8FLqTORcbNjvU7I5BIIqdGBVXSGwJRo5zpXuOATSBztRvDbapCRdis29f_I7it4RzZKX-IwXNcEZNXpGsFatiidUBjlH5rLo6LCXOVCoMwG4bZ6ktr7jbMVkRXRP6uReGjpbt8qnK0GynMGshYd93ikrNyPs9MARI-ykY7ZBm4DDGMKJki9M6kPs3Rk8OhWNeXw5CUniO5l3vmD4jhXUA%3D).

I hope everyone has a great weekend and go Bengals!
Sincerely,

Rob Secaur
Campaign Manager
Jane Timken for Ohio

name: Charles Booker
subject: BREAKING: Rand Paul’s top priority if he wins re-election this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we can’t
afford six more years of Rand Paul.

This is Rand Paul’s top priority if he wins re-election this year:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220211?refcode=em20220211-1560&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1560_346206_fIHYus&akid=1560%2E346206%2EfIHYus ][IMG]

I wish this man cared as much about Kentuckians as he does about his
obsession with Dr. Fauci.

While Rand is plotting his next tantrum to get on Fox News, the people of
the state he represents – my family – are suffering. Not because of Dr.
Fauci, but because of Rand Paul.

We are at the bottom of nearly every quality of life index. Our schools
are underfunded, hundreds of thousands of people haven’t had clean
drinking water in decades, and 1 in four people in Appalachia are living
in poverty.

I can promise you,
Peter, playing political games
isn’t going to be on the top of my mind if I get elected to the Senate.
The people of Kentucky are – and have always been – my top priority.

From ensuring that folks can afford their prescription drugs to creating
economic opportunities in communities that have been left behind. These
are the things that people care about. And that’s exactly what I’m going
to do when I get to the United States Senate.

We’re working to build a campaign that represents ALL of us, from the hood
to the holler. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220211?refcode=em20220211-1560&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1560_346206_fIHYus&akid=1560%2E346206%2EfIHYus ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can
right now to support our movement to replace Rand Paul?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220211?refcode=em20220211-1560&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1560_346206_fIHYus&akid=1560%2E346206%2EfIHYus ]Contribute $5

Rand Paul led a dangerous push to spread COVID misinformation to make a
profit off Big Pharma. He’s voted down countless bills that would support
workers and families who have been hurt the most in this pandemic. And now
instead of focusing on ways to help Kentucky — he’s planning his next
political show.

Enough is enough. I’m running to replace Rand Paul because the cost of
inaction is too high.

I’ve lived in poverty. I’ve been unhoused. I’ve lost family members to gun
violence. I am still paying off my student loans. And I know that when our
politicians ignore these struggles, our pain only continues.

Together, we have the power to change the future of Kentucky. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220211?refcode=em20220211-1560&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1560_346206_fIHYus&akid=1560%2E346206%2EfIHYus ]But this
kind of deep organizing work requires significant resources and funding.
Please chip in $5 or anything you can today so that we can
sustain this work to replace Rand Paul.

Together,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220211-1560-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1560_346206_fIHYus&akid=1560%2E346206%2EfIHYus

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1560%2E346206%2EfIHYus

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: UNMASK OUR KIDS!!
body:
A Sangamon County judge recently ruled in favor of parents’ rights when it comes to school mask mandates.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_11_newsletter&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_11_newsletter&n=2) Dear Peter -- A Sangamon County judge recently ruled in favor of parents’ rights when it comes to school mask mandates. Obviously, there is still a lot to do when it comes to the school mask requirements as this ruling is being appealed. While these issues are being sorted out, we need to keep one thing in mind – the chaos at our schools is the sole responsibility of failed Governor, JB Pritzker. Illinois kids are paying dearly for JB’s failed leadership. He owns the collar for this. And what’s worse, he is setting a course to continue to fail Illinois families by appealing the Circuit Court’s decision. We need and deserve better. Let’s make sure JB Pritzker is a one-term Governor. I am standing up for working families. Best Regards, Gary Rabine **Will you join our growing movement to defeat JB Pritzker?****** Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker and help turn our state around! | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_11_newsletter&n=3 "Join Team Rabine") [Join Team Rabine](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_11_newsletter&n=3)

### **Governor lifts indoor mask mandates but keeps masking requirements at schools **
This week the Governor set a timetable to end the indoor mask mandates, but he said he is keeping the mask requirements for schools in place.
Here is the statement I released on the Governor’s announcement.
**“** Illinois kids and parents go into day five of JB Pritzker’s mask mandate mess. Today, he will compound the chaos by beginning to lift the mandate for the general public but keep it in place for schools. Other states, including those with Democratic Governors, have figured this out. But when politics, not people, are your primary concern, this is what happens. COVID chaos and a crime epidemic are Pritzker’s legacy. It’s time to take our state back. Action needed on HB 4640.”
### Pritzker is failing to keep Illinois citizens safe
While the Governor was delivering a message about the crime wave in Chicago, there was a major shooting incident on the Dan Ryan that occurred during his speech.
We did not need visual evidence of Pritzker’s failings, but tragically we got it. Below is a statement I released on the impact of Pritzker’s lack of leadership when it comes to keeping our citizens safe.
“JB Pritzker’s soft-on-crime policies, which went into effect just weeks ago, are now taking hold and criminals who commit the most serious offenses are not being prosecuted. JB has failed miserably in his primary obligation as Governor—keeping Illinois residents safe. All of this, with an assist from the worst Prosecutor and best Public Defender in the country, Kim Foxx. People are committing murder in Cook County and getting away with it.
We need to immediately repeal Pritzker’s Safe-T Act which is the softest-on-crime piece of legislation in Illinois history. But we need to go one step further. The day I am sworn in as Governor of Illinois, I will introduce legislation allowing voters to recall rogue State’s Attorneys like Kim Foxx. Illinois residents should not be held hostage and harmed by woke and out of touch public officials who are supposed to keep us safe.”
### More security failures in state agencies
There have been numerous security concerns at state agencies particularly the Illinois Department of Employment Security, which still refuses to shed light on how much money in unemployment benefits have been paid out fraudulently.
The latest in the Governor’s continued bungling of state agencies is an online portal allowing tenants impacted by COVID-19 to apply for rental assistance which just recently went offline for two days.
The portal was shut down because personal information was compromised.
An applicant told a call center representative earlier this month that someone’s information was visible through the portal.
The Illinois Housing Development Authority did the right thing by shutting the site down and taking steps to fix the problem.
But it begs the question – who is in charge here?
These glitches seem to be happening far too frequently. JB Pritzker is asking voters to re-elect him for the job he has done so far as governor. Allowing private financial information to get out into the open is just one of many examples of his failings. Illinois can’t afford more of JB Pritzker’s incompetence.

Peter, Last night my team gave me my list of my top supporters who have stood up to join Lisa’s Leaders for just $7 a month...but I was disappointed when I didn’t see your name on the list. I know that you’ve always been a huge supporter of my campaign and given my campaign the momentum it needs to defeat Susan Wild this November. It’s why I wanted to personally email you, Peter, in hopes that you can join Lisa’s Leaders IN THE NEXT HOUR before we have to close the club! I know that you’ve always been a huge supporter of my campaign and given my campaign the momentum it needs to defeat Susan Wild this November. It’s why I wanted to personally email you, Peter, in hopes that you can join Lisa’s Leaders IN THE NEXT HOUR before we have to close the club! I’ll be looking out for your name, Peter. body:

| | | | | | |

| | | | | | |

## PolitiFact fact checked my tweet about the Biden admin redirecting COVID funds to crack pipes...
and I stand corrected. The $30 million will also fund condoms, syringes, lip balm, vending machines, etc. You can read the grant [**here**](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b10b5da84f&e=f6564bbe3b), and read _The Free Beacon_ ’s excellent reporting on the White House’s backtracking following criticism [**here**](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ea8c4f5df5&e=f6564bbe3b).
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d01c991eab&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | | | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[U.S. to try house arrest for immigrants as alternative to detention](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9de6e7abc3&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Reuters Stop and think about how ridiculous this is — they enter the US illegally and the Biden Admin is going to make them stay at “home”?[Frustrations mount inside DNC over midterm strategy](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4e9194d41c&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The HillMakes sense. [Paul promises investigation of Fauci if Republicans take control of the Senate](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=aca67091f7&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The Hill[Michael Avenatti convicted of stealing from Stormy Daniels ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fdb40ee0d3&e=f6564bbe3b)— via PoliticoDoes this mean he isn’t going to be President like the media said? [Olympics Opening Ceremony draws record-low ratings](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=90a72e5dbc&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Yahoo Sports[‘Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde’: Biden’s top science adviser bullied and demeaned subordinates, according to White House investigation](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=985bbc8e30&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Politico[Andrew Cuomo Says He’s Been ‘Vindicated,” Won’t Rule Out Run](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d06cd8a990&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Bloomberg[Delaware to end mask mandates for schools, indoor settings](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=78f745ed19&e=f6564bbe3b) — via AxiosFirst New Jersey, now Delaware, who knows maybe Dem governors are actually paying attention to the science. [California’s indoor mask mandate will end next week for vaccinated individuals, Gov. Newsom says](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9320f34c5c&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Fox News Attn: Mayor Bowser, the rest of the Dems are finally using science, how about DC? [Biden Admin to Fund Crack Pipe Distribution To Advance ‘Racial Equity’ ($30 million from COVID funding)](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f8c57febda&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The Free Beacon[Hunter Biden tried to broker oil deal between Kazakhs and China](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d8160e0fce&e=f6564bbe3b) — via The Daily Mail
| | | | | | |
---

[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e66d6ca5f7&e=f6564bbe3b)

To ramp up the momentum, we’re excited AOC is hosting a GOTV rally with Jessica and Greg Casar this Saturday! [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCbh7SAnXSuexa8p9kF_P9OfHLzHu-BWlzEAl8OMQIGcIhh5065ywebLCImYjDl9ufU5vqfCOoAiHwaExxZ1GU0X0cqYJ4pQoA_veVr8s_Ukd74GLY5GKQjUQWTiv3CEOEnqSoZAuPlR3Mx8kFlVqBBkLZqLESglbvaCb7P2SecXytkjeBVvZCOFG5lTvCPcKya07hnaZxGeikMERlmmYOsN4cV6hE-1perfgYjKugSQMAfbuMWmmzGFmcpDAZDQ2Lc2tn8MAB6gppZsYb98qiicBqXgz87xxO4UeBkEWzne54xK7NVhtY9ZhrlfO8J16mo2cJzgXH0yf1v-DPOnIuC88RKydvt4CfnrZvXXMkDII/3jh/PZ_xArozSBmlWtlHVe1-Hw/h1/t-uA3UX62xDeGlJIVfwzyZdHJp4wYZX8Y9VRV9YB7PY) **The results of this election could come down to how much we’re able to raise over the next few days.** We need to raise as much as we can before early voting so we have the resources to spread the word about Jessica’s vision for progressive, meaningful change for the families of South Texas.

[**_We only have three more days left to reach our $15,000 goal by February 14 – and there is no better time than today to make a contribution. If you’ve been waiting for the right time, now is the perfect moment to make a contribution to help elect Jessica to Congress._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCbh7SAnXSuexa8p9kF_P9OfHLzHu-BWlzEAl8OMQIGcLwNlOTG91NWNwjvXR-6nMeH6FcPFPkw7sSlbJc7CU_j9vtAugahxbZbkQJmnMGOD7i1GMjd4oitO1DTzvmiFar4-87Qdjr6MDQ5GmE41CS05-i_XL0QMT7evjzjo2nwq7MqRbKxe4yCUfGMIbQBwZbGQIPowXJN9nBMQA8XDBLedLYWxMLwh-DFhKqKlB-JHmzahErKEpEjDHwUQyNtoRml3UsFze1A9zR7rtzt9iL0hUoo-eSYC1R4_UuYr096v1pueo2axBZQcQseEL6RwhvxVAJPTZ-fZfNlzqKrgXdSwkjjaMchntgxHrP0GdWI8o/3jh/PZ_xArozSBmlWtlHVe1-Hw/h2/tYFLbqs6D6fa-Truj-vmQ6oqXVdKTIRyfiCb4zLfpUM) [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCbh7SAnXSuexa8p9kF_P9OfHLzHu-BWlzEAl8OMQIGcK77gHDlrC-uqT8DzQRBkghcsZWnNsfUWdRUtbMebNGDPW-it5yEe6iL_OLEafu_Q7HxiV0J9fGvH27C9NNqrwQXq6q_TVCgqU42snilrWlF4Zv1FuRRXKYCHuEXcdleT_Oq3yLKXOgCj2vS1nfH8SesFuxOjZlpD_KRD9DYPmALNkJupeCo40yVKq5MannN4iyUy0kdFYlAfdyzldeMG9QZXuF-40hMVAKup2uXPTu2ApGKWETkS0cmuqKJqyzZy67OcwesXGntnaBCv1mxme9VXtD79C0zH2MPK8q47mmXEulyFJApSbZ2SEig7G3_yw/3jh/PZ_xArozSBmlWtlHVe1-Hw/h3/tsWu85DtWjlT0qWrFAdBn-niShpneOWk6r2-WXToA-c) This campaign is about much more than defeating Henry Cuellar. It’s about sending representation to Congress that will fight tooth and nail for working people, for immigrant communities, for all of our neighbors in South Texas who have been ignored, neglected, and disenfranchised.

Texas’s 28th District is what some people call a “blue seat.” But our representative, Henry Cuellar, hasn’t acted like a Democrat in Congress. Instead, he’s catering to his corporate donors, the NRA, Big Oil, private prison companies, and big banks.

Jessica is running because we need a representative who’ll fight for a path to citizenship, Medicare for All, and a Green New Deal that creates good-paying union jobs.

Despite everything stacked against us, we defied expectations in 2020. But it was just the beginning. Together, this time, we are going to prove that a big grassroots movement can take on the machine and win. We’re finishing what we started.

[**_Please, make the best contribution you can to join our movement to bring bold, progressive change to South Texas. Any contributions made between now and our primary on March 1st are incredibly helpful — and we need all hands on deck. Please make a contribution today._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCbh7SAnXSuexa8p9kF_P9OfHLzHu-BWlzEAl8OMQIGcIjZWym-h_zl86JCxdB5hW-L7BcO3a29UB_kmy8OzQm_s3hYnNl3D1vRcNhvV4SLuS9ry-LM7qA7iCfzQkiAWCenKN5XW04OsZh17kV_OwBh99YzlXBtgtrRQ9chbbvfzeErVuuVamZUsgK-QsFpCkXeIW7IgRlpWXsiTZxOOU7619QPQUqkJaf37sIJqOvbhKfZReCU4JZB-TPfPLu1O8_ciMDFC39Im84tIVI-JsXt3961usWICCVgHAInGJ8Yyn07mTWa_lEuHQlkJmGPLLMhpP_KbLE9K2l_DF-04kXxuqpFf0hRceFWs26WePHWJU/3jh/PZ_xArozSBmlWtlHVe1-Hw/h4/38TtillTY8hlrnxvQruMIsSduZ7iaHwhi32AjorYF58) [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCbh7SAnXSuexa8p9kF_P9OfHLzHu-BWlzEAl8OMQIGcJWtDAU_NHLD8OL8hnE-KNOiT95CjeTL76GU1YL9DJDNhXvM0OQFbTb4o1F1OINPhKgBCV2b0gu85Ws3xsAaUqAe2BedT_APVy_6hIEWMCCyYm_9maA2UDIV06Wax7cTkHu15wlrbmV8bzeQSMixm99V-3DxTv8fpUkMEpYT9g8F9mBEj4xWxPZjISkGB76jpQcLZoJA4hTKnul1w0JTy6nueMWi0oE_2JZiGB9_cRlw-OXkXJwCxldVeAtEHFp3SW29aImB30ZBuTTDrw88wvdxtgsPEkq_xla6cG4XPit_JIxPL_WH7fNWXUipqc1LJ4/3jh/PZ_xArozSBmlWtlHVe1-Hw/h5/fMgP9TB6U6DYhBhv8LlKJNQQIhHLiQBQlr7LPfC6jYo) Let’s get this done,
