clean_body: There are only THREE more days until early voting starts! | | | Peter, we are only THREE days out until early voting starts! 😱 That means we only have three more days to do everything we can to reach every voter in the district and urge them to vote for Jessica. To ramp up the momentum, we’re excited AOC is hosting a GOTV rally with Jessica and Greg Casar this Saturday! The results of this election could come down to how much we’re able to raise over the next few days. We need to raise as much as we can before early voting so we have the resources to spread the word about Jessica’s vision for progressive, meaningful change for the families of South Texas. This campaign is about much more than defeating Henry Cuellar. It’s about sending representation to Congress that will fight tooth and nail for working people, for immigrant communities, for all of our neighbors in South Texas who have been ignored, neglected, and disenfranchised. Texas’s 28th District is what some people call a “blue seat.” But our representative, Henry Cuellar, hasn’t acted like a Democrat in Congress. Instead, he’s catering to his corporate donors, the NRA, Big Oil, private prison companies, and big banks. Jessica is running because we need a representative who’ll fight for a path to citizenship, Medicare for All, and a Green New Deal that creates good-paying union jobs. Despite everything stacked against us, we defied expectations in 2020. But it was just the beginning. Together, this time, we are going to prove that a big grassroots movement can take on the machine and win. We’re finishing what we started. Let’s get this done, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Scandals in Loudoun keep getting worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
It wasn't enough to destroy our children's educations, now Democrats have hired a registered sex offender to work in the Commonwealth Attorney's offic | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6618f147d068/scandals-in-loudoun-keep-getting-worse-5395134?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=99eb4e76e0&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| Dear ,

The mess in Loudoun County just keeps getting worse. It wasn't enough to remove our children from school, institute mask mandates, and then cover up sexual assault within the school system. Now the Loudoun County Commonwealth Attorney [hired a registered sex offender, who was convicted of child pornography charges, to work in the Commonwealth Attorney's office.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=b3d69d116a&e=fc83fb200d)

I've had enough of our elected representatives taking money from George Soros and the radical left, just to turn around and implement a political agenda that is devastating to our children and our community.

My opponent, Jennifer Wexton endorsed the Loudoun County Commonwealth's Attorney when she ran in 2019. Now, it's complete radio silence on scandals like this.

This comes after Democrats in Loudoun and elsewhere have destroyed our school system, inhibited our children's educations, and turned a blind eye to sexual assault.

I've had enough.

It's time to send a message that we won't allow left-wing radicals like Jennifer Wexton and her Commonwealth's Attorney to ruin our country and our community. I'm running for Congress to send Wexton packing and put an end to this madness, but I can't do it without your help.

I'm counting on your support to help to take back Virginia's 10th Congressional District. [Will you contribute just $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today so that I can do what needs to be done to protect our children and keep our community safe?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=343b4f6e04&e=fc83fb200d)

This is the year to take back our country and restore commonsense leadership to our elected offices, but I NEED your help to do it.

Please consider supporting my campaign today, and together we can protect our children, hold our elected officials accountable, and stop the madness in Loudoun and across the 10th District.

---

Friends –

**WHO DEY!!!
WHO DEY!!!
WHO DEY think gonna beat them Bengals!!!**

I don’t know about you, but the Bengals’ huge comeback win to advance them to the Super Bowl has me incredibly **_INSPIRED AND EXCITED! For Ohio and beyond!_**

If the Bengals, a 7-point underdog, can comeback in the last 4 minutes of the AFC Championship, **then I can beat Josh Mandel and JD Vance in this race.**

**It is _COMEBACK HOUR_ for so many reasons – and if the Bengals aren’t enough proof of that, I don’t know what is. As a Cincinnati native, this win was huge.**

**_[Chip in to bring home a CHAMPIONSHIP!](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=000ad8e780e94cdcabbe48134b2314da&_m=81a8f428f7e34625a12f06ded9ccc47a&_e=lv7yoH01yrDIy_-47j7dSaUkEi-fPg1sAFVonciwBvpYiZLDZKJeFBM6GNd4ExdSzpbi-vLOs0vY2pNcQjWBYYU6srOEDhd4m4x2WBh3Ubvcef4PWyFRDgM3TwJ4_DGxyFWgGAKyUA5pj4C0wOHBQNI0en6lIOSejwdLExLsnYALKtOj8CRD8FKi0SGXGcY5xK9WHXt-cz0X1NYygDJJH4C7lNvWhhKQ9nWFe7BG4_jgKLs-_VE3GOGELRUEAqHyYYaRFvi-AZr63OKlKGp481eodUJZMcOTbat9s6RfWj4wn8sKSDTDL06LM5-Q9qJ0bKhdcPyWkgLQRkY6W57Qteah51IZtgtur_zcNEkqOdRZTo473GkR0AV_IFJ7lq4D_fBczJRY5gNkSCyV9oDr5CsDbjHiiY9gx3UOaQbcvhXUYuHnXoicDi_RkBa6q7_i81J121qb1kEbyyF40pZ-9f2MuSvHG_p4CoNRKEYXJ8orf2Hs2NbdV4kwZmCNwByo)_**

And we’re getting closer to the “last 4 minutes” of this game – **_the Ohio Senate Primary is in less than 100 days. And I’m about to prove everyone wrong._**

This year is the year for Conservatives, for Women, and for OHIO!

_I have never felt so energized and ready to win._

clean_body: it’s comeback hour. | Friends – WHO DEY!!! WHO DEY!!! WHO DEY think gonna beat them Bengals!!! I don’t know about you, but the Bengals’ huge comeback win to advance them to the Super Bowl has me incredibly INSPIRED AND EXCITED! For Ohio and beyond! If the Bengals, a 7-point underdog, can comeback in the last 4 minutes of the AFC Championship, then I can beat Josh Mandel and JD Vance in this race. It is COMEBACK HOUR for so many reasons – and if the Bengals aren’t enough proof of that, I don’t know what is. As a Cincinnati native, this win was huge. And we’re getting closer to the “last 4 minutes” of this game – the Ohio Senate Primary is in less than 100 days. And I’m about to prove everyone wrong. This year is the year for Conservatives, for Women, and for OHIO! I have never felt so energized and ready to win. | 2022 is the year of the TIGER. The year for the brave, competitive, confident, and unpredictable. Super Bowl LVI here we come. Ohio Senate Primary here I come. God Bless Ohio and Let’s Go Bengals! Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Soros knows that this race for Texas’ brand-new 38th congressional district will determine which party controls the House. As 1 of the 5 key seats needed to flip the House, we have to ensure our FINAL month of fundraising is our strongest yet to fight back against Soros’ attacks. For more than 3 decades George Soros has been buying Pelosi her House majorities, allowing her to enrich herself at the expense of the American people. But this year, we can FLIP the People’s House and build a conservative majority that will always put YOU first. Now with less than 2 weeks to go in the very FIRST election of 2022, we can’t leave anything up to chance. Soros’ $125 million investment at the final hour could jeopardize everything that we’ve been fighting for. But with your support, we will stop Soros in his tracks and win this all-important new seat.
